import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColAvatar } from './col-avatar';
import { AVATAR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

describe('ColAvatar component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-avatar')) {
      customElements.define('col-avatar', ColAvatar);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-avatar').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default values', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar></col-avatar>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-container');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('User Avatar: ');
    });

    it('should display initials and name by default (full variant)', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="Jane Doe"></col-avatar>`);

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');

      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('JD');
      expect(name?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Jane Doe');
    });
  });

  describe('Variant properties', () => {
    it('should hide the avatar name when variant is icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="Jane Doe" variant="icon"></col-avatar>`
      );

      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name).to.not.exist;

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle).to.exist;
    });

    it('should hide the initials icon when variant is name', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="Jane Doe" variant="name"></col-avatar>`
      );

      const icon = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(icon).to.not.exist;

      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name).to.exist;
    });

    it('should show both icon and name when variant is full', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="Jane Doe" variant="full"></col-avatar>`
      );

      const icon = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');

      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(name).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Avatar name processing', () => {
    it('should trim the avatar name and compute correct initials', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="   Cats Meow   "></col-avatar>`
      );

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('CM');

      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Cats Meow');
    });

    it('should handle single word avatar names', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="Cat"></col-avatar>`);

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('C');
    });

    it('should generate no initials for empty name', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name=""></col-avatar>`);

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic updates', () => {
    it('should recompute initials when name changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="Bob Ross"></col-avatar>`);

      let circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('BR');

      element.name = 'Bob Marley';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('BM');
    });

    it('should update name display when name changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="Initial Name"></col-avatar>`);

      let name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Initial Name');

      element.name = 'Updated Name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Name');
    });

    it('should update aria-label when name changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="Original Name"></col-avatar>`
      );

      let container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('User Avatar: Original Name');

      element.name = 'New Name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('User Avatar: New Name');
    });
  });

  describe('Null and undefined handling', () => {
    it('should generate no initials and no name for null name', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar></col-avatar>`);

      element.name = null as any;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');

      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
      expect(name?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
      expect(element.name).to.equal('');
    });

    it('should handle undefined name', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar></col-avatar>`);

      element.name = undefined as any;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      const name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');

      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
      expect(name?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
      expect(element.name).to.equal('');
    });
  });

  describe('Initials computation edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle names with multiple spaces', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="John    Middle    Last"></col-avatar>`
      );

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('JM');
    });

    it('should handle names with leading/trailing spaces', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="  Alice  Bob  "></col-avatar>`
      );

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('AB');
    });

    it('should handle names with more than 2 words (take first 2)', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(
        html`<col-avatar name="First Second Third Fourth"></col-avatar>`
      );

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('FS');
    });

    it('should handle names with single character words', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="A B"></col-avatar>`);

      const circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('AB');
    });
  });

  describe('Variant dynamic changes', () => {
    it('should toggle icon visibility when variant changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="Test User"></col-avatar>`);

      let circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle).to.exist;

      element.variant = AVATAR_VARIANTS.NAME;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle).to.not.exist;

      element.variant = AVATAR_VARIANTS.FULL;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      circle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-circle');
      expect(circle).to.exist;
    });

    it('should toggle name visibility when variant changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColAvatar>(html`<col-avatar name="Test User"></col-avatar>`);

      let name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name).to.exist;

      element.variant = AVATAR_VARIANTS.ICON;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name).to.not.exist;

      element.variant = AVATAR_VARIANTS.FULL;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      name = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.avatar-name');
      expect(name).to.exist;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/avatar/col-avatar.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { ColAvatarStyles } from './col-avatar.styles';
import { AVATAR_VARIANTS, getEnumValues } from '@/types';

/**
 * Avatar component that displays user initials or name in a circular format.
 *
 * @element col-avatar
 *
 * @summary A customizable avatar component that shows user initials in a circle, with an optional name display below.
 *
 * @csspart avatar - The main avatar container element.
 *
 * @attr {string} name - The full name of the user to display initials from.
 * @attr {string} variant - The display variant: 'icon', 'name', or 'full'.
 *
 * @property {string} name - The full name of the user to display initials from.
 * @property {string} variant - The display variant: 'icon', 'name', or 'full'.
 *
 * @default 'full' variant - By default, both icon and name are shown.
 */
@Meta({ name: 'avatar' })
export class ColAvatar extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColAvatarStyles];

  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(AVATAR_VARIANTS), AVATAR_VARIANTS.FULL)
  variant!: string;

  private _name: string = '';

  @property({ type: String })
  set name(value: string) {
    const trimmed = value?.trim() ?? '';
    if (this._name !== trimmed) {
      this._name = trimmed;
      this._initials = this.computeInitials(trimmed);
      this.requestUpdate();
    }
  }
  get name(): string {
    return this._name;
  }

  @state()
  private _initials: string = '';

  private computeInitials(name: string): string {
    return name
      .split(/\s+/)
      .map(word => word[0])
      .slice(0, 2)
      .join('');
  }

  render() {
    const showIcon = this.variant === AVATAR_VARIANTS.ICON || this.variant === AVATAR_VARIANTS.FULL;
    const showName = this.variant === AVATAR_VARIANTS.NAME || this.variant === AVATAR_VARIANTS.FULL;

    return html`
      <div part="avatar" class="avatar-container" aria-label=${`User Avatar: ${this.name}`}>
        ${showIcon ? html`<div class="avatar-circle">${this._initials}</div>` : null}
        ${showName ? html`<div class="avatar-name">${this.name}</div>` : null}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-avatar': ColAvatar;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColBadgeStyles = css`
  :host {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  .badge-container {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    width: fit-content;
    min-width: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    max-width: 100%;
    min-height: 16px;
    line-height: 16px;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .badge-container::after {
    display: block;
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.alpha.white-50')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='icon']) {
    margin-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
  }

  .info {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.information-dark')};
  }

  .warning {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.warning-dark')};
  }

  .danger {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.danger-dark')};
  }

  .success {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.success-dark')};
  }

  .default {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.base-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.base')};
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/badge/col-badge.test.ts

import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColBadge } from './col-badge';
import { BADGE_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

describe('ColBadge component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    // Ensure the component is registered
    if (!customElements.get('col-badge')) {
      customElements.define('col-badge', ColBadge);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    // Clean up elements after each test
    document.querySelectorAll('col-badge').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge></col-badge>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('col-badge');

      const badgeContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(badgeContainer).to.exist;

      const className = badgeContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('badge-container');
      expect(className).to.include('default');
    });

    it('should render with text content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge>Test Badge</col-badge>`);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Badge');
    });

    it('should render with icon slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`
        <col-badge>
          <span slot="icon">⭐</span>
          Badge Text
        </col-badge>
      `);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Badge Text');
    });
  });

  describe('Variant property', () => {
    it('should apply default variant when not set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge></col-badge>`);

      expect(element.variant).to.equal('default');

      const badgeContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(badgeContainer?.className).to.include('default');
    });

    it('should apply custom variant correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(
        html`<col-badge variant=${BADGE_VARIANTS.SUCCESS}></col-badge>`
      );

      expect(element.variant).to.equal(BADGE_VARIANTS.SUCCESS);

      const badgeContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(badgeContainer?.className).to.include('success');
    });

    it('should update variant dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(
        html`<col-badge variant=${BADGE_VARIANTS.INFO}></col-badge>`
      );

      let badgeContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(badgeContainer?.className).to.include(BADGE_VARIANTS.INFO);

      // Change variant
      element.variant = 'warning';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      badgeContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(badgeContainer?.className).to.include('warning');
    });
  });

  describe('Disabled property', () => {
    it('should not be disabled by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge></col-badge>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(container?.hasAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge disabled></col-badge>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(container?.hasAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge></col-badge>`);

      // Initially not disabled
      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      // Enable disabled
      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(container?.hasAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.be.true;

      // Disable disabled
      element.disabled = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
      const containerUpdated = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(containerUpdated?.hasAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct aria-label based on variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(
        html`<col-badge variant=${BADGE_VARIANTS.SUCCESS}></col-badge>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      const ariaLabel = container?.getAttribute('aria-label');

      expect(ariaLabel).to.equal('Badge of variant success');
    });

    it('should update aria-label when variant changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(
        html`<col-badge variant=${BADGE_VARIANTS.INFO}></col-badge>`
      );

      let container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Badge of variant info');

      // Change variant
      element.variant = 'danger';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.badge-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Badge of variant danger');
    });
  });

  describe('Slot behavior', () => {
    it('should show icon slot when content is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`
        <col-badge>
          <span slot="icon">🎯</span>
          Content
        </col-badge>
      `);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;

      // The slot should be visible (not hidden) when there's content
      // Note: hasSlotted() detects if there are elements with slot="icon"
      expect(element.hasSlotted('icon')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should hide icon slot when no content is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBadge>(html`<col-badge>Just text</col-badge>`);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;

      // hasSlotted should return false when there are no elements with slot="icon"
      expect(element.hasSlotted('icon')).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/badge/col-badge.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { ColBadgeStyles } from './col-badge.styles';
import { BADGE_VARIANTS, getEnumValues } from '@/types';

/**
 * Badge component for displaying status indicators, labels, or notifications.
 *
 * @element col-badge
 *
 * @summary A versatile badge component that displays status indicators with semantic color variants.
 *
 * @slot - The badge content (text, numbers, etc.)
 * @slot icon - Optional icon to display alongside the badge content
 *
 * @csspart badge - The main badge container element
 *
 * @attr {string} variant - The semantic variant that determines the badge's appearance and color
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the badge is in a disabled state
 *
 * @property {string} variant - The semantic variant that determines the badge's appearance and color
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the badge is in a disabled state
 *
 * @default 'default' - Default variant value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'badge' })
export class ColBadge extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColBadgeStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(BADGE_VARIANTS), BADGE_VARIANTS.DEFAULT)
  variant!: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        part="badge"
        class="badge-container ${this.variant || BADGE_VARIANTS.DEFAULT}"
        ?aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-label=${`Badge of variant ${this.variant}`}
      >
        <slot ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('icon')} name="icon"></slot>
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-badge': ColBadge;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColBreadcrumbStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  nav {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center;
  }

  ::slotted(col-breadcrumb-item) {
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  /* Accessibility - Screen reader only text */
  .sr-only {
    position: absolute;
    width: 1px;
    height: 1px;
    padding: 0;
    margin: -1px;
    overflow: hidden;
    clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
    white-space: nowrap;
    border-width: 0;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/breadcrumb/col-breadcrumb.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColBreadcrumb } from './col-breadcrumb';

describe('ColBreadcrumb component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-breadcrumb')) {
      customElements.define('col-breadcrumb', ColBreadcrumb);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-breadcrumb').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(nav).to.exist;

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should have default aria-label', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      expect(element.ariaLabel).to.equal('Breadcrumb navigation');

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(nav?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Breadcrumb navigation');
    });

    it('should have default separator', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('/');
    });

    it('should render "You are here:" screen reader text', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      const srText = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.sr-only');
      expect(srText).to.exist;
      expect(srText?.textContent).to.equal('You are here:');
    });
  });

  describe('Custom properties', () => {
    it('should use custom aria-label when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb aria-label="Custom navigation"></col-breadcrumb>`
      );

      expect(element.ariaLabel).to.equal('Custom navigation');

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(nav?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Custom navigation');
    });

    it('should use custom separator when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb separator=">"></col-breadcrumb>`
      );

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('>');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update aria-label dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      expect(element.ariaLabel).to.equal('Breadcrumb navigation');

      element.ariaLabel = 'Updated navigation';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.ariaLabel).to.equal('Updated navigation');

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(nav?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Updated navigation');
    });

    it('should update separator dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('/');

      element.separator = '>';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('>');
    });
  });

  describe('Slot content', () => {
    it('should render slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`
        <col-breadcrumb>
          <span>Test content</span>
        </col-breadcrumb>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test content');
    });

    it('should render multiple slotted items', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`
        <col-breadcrumb>
          <span>Item 1</span>
          <span>Item 2</span>
          <span>Item 3</span>
        </col-breadcrumb>
      `);

      const items = element.querySelectorAll('span');
      expect(items).to.have.length(3);
      expect(items[0].textContent).to.equal('Item 1');
      expect(items[1].textContent).to.equal('Item 2');
      expect(items[2].textContent).to.equal('Item 3');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct navigation role', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(nav?.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('nav');
    });

    it('should have screen reader only text', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(html`<col-breadcrumb></col-breadcrumb>`);

      const srText = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.sr-only');
      expect(srText).to.exist;
      expect(srText?.textContent).to.equal('You are here:');
    });

    it('should maintain aria-label attribute on nav element', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb aria-label="Main breadcrumb"></col-breadcrumb>`
      );

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(nav?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Main breadcrumb');
    });
  });

  describe('Separator handling', () => {
    it('should handle special character separators', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb separator="→"></col-breadcrumb>`
      );

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('→');
    });

    it('should handle empty separator', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb separator=""></col-breadcrumb>`
      );

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('');
    });

    it('should handle multi-character separator', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumb>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb separator=" >> "></col-breadcrumb>`
      );

      expect(element.separator).to.equal(' >> ');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/breadcrumb/col-breadcrumb.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, TAG_PREFIX } from '@/config';
import { ColBreadcrumbStyles } from './col-breadcrumb.styles';

/**
 * Breadcrumb component for navigation hierarchy display.
 *
 * @element col-breadcrumb
 *
 * @summary A navigation component that displays the current page's location within a site hierarchy.
 *
 * @slot - The breadcrumb items to be displayed in the navigation
 *
 * @csspart breadcrumb - The main breadcrumb navigation container
 *
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the breadcrumb navigation
 * @attr {string} separator - The separator character between breadcrumb items
 *
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the breadcrumb navigation
 * @property {string} separator - The separator character between breadcrumb items
 *
 * @default 'Breadcrumb navigation' - Default ariaLabel value
 * @default '/' - Default separator value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'breadcrumb' })
export class ColBreadcrumb extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColBreadcrumbStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel = 'Breadcrumb navigation';

  @property({ type: String })
  separator = '/';

  firstUpdated() {
    this.updateItemSeparators();
  }

  updated(changedProperties: Map<PropertyKey, unknown>) {
    if (changedProperties.has('separator')) {
      this.updateItemSeparators();
    }
  }

  private updateItemSeparators() {
    const items = this.querySelectorAll(`${TAG_PREFIX}-breadcrumb-item`);
    items.forEach(item => {
      if (item instanceof HTMLElement && 'separator' in item) {
        (item as any).separator = this.separator;
      }
    });
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <nav part="breadcrumb" aria-label="${this.ariaLabel}">
        <span class="sr-only">You are here:</span>
        <slot @slotchange=${this.updateItemSeparators}></slot>
      </nav>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-breadcrumb': ColBreadcrumb;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/breadcrumb-item/col-breadcrumb-item.styles.ts

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColBreadcrumbItemStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    line-height: 20px;
  }

  .breadcrumb-link {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .breadcrumb-link:hover {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  .breadcrumb-link:focus {
    outline: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .breadcrumb-text {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.base')};
    padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .separator {
    margin: 0;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    user-select: none;
  }

  :host([current]) .breadcrumb-link,
  :host([current]) .breadcrumb-text {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.base')};
    font-weight: 600;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Hide separator for last item */
  :host(:last-child) .separator {
    display: none;
  }

  :host(:first-child) .breadcrumb-text,
  :host(:first-child) .breadcrumb-link {
    padding-left: 0;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/breadcrumb-item/col-breadcrumb-item.test.ts

import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColBreadcrumbItem } from './col-breadcrumb-item';

describe('ColBreadcrumbItem component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-breadcrumb-item')) {
      customElements.define('col-breadcrumb-item', ColBreadcrumbItem);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-breadcrumb-item').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item></col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.separator).to.equal('/');
      expect(element.href).to.equal('');
      expect(element.current).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render slotted text content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item>Test Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Item');
    });

    it('should have default separator property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item></col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('/');
    });
  });

  describe('Link rendering', () => {
    it('should render as span when no href is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item>Span Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;

      // Check if the slot content is properly rendered
      const slot = span?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Span Item');

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render as link when href is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#test">Link Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#test');

      // Check if the slot content is properly rendered
      const slot = link?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Link Item');

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render as link when router is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item router>Router Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#');

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Current state', () => {
    it('should render as span when current is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item current>Current Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.current).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('current')).to.be.true;

      // When current is true, it should render as span even if href is not provided
      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should not be clickable when current is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item current>Non-current Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.current).to.be.true;

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render as span when current is true even with href', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#current" current>Current Link</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      // When current is true, it should render as span even with href
      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update href dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item>Dynamic Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      // Initially no href - should render span
      let span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      let link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(span).to.exist;
      expect(link).to.not.exist;

      // Set href - should render link
      element.href = '#dynamic';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(span).to.not.exist;
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#dynamic');

      // Remove href - should render span again
      element.href = '';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(span).to.exist;
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should update current state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#test">Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.current).to.be.false;

      // Initially should render as link
      let link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      let span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(span).to.not.exist;

      element.current = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.current).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('current')).to.be.true;

      // Should now render as span when current is true
      link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
      expect(span).to.exist;

      element.current = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.current).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('current')).to.be.false;

      // Should render as link again
      link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(span).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should update separator dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item>Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('/');

      element.separator = '>';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.separator).to.equal('>');

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator?.textContent).to.equal('>');
    });
  });

  describe('Separator rendering', () => {
    it('should render separator element', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item>Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator).to.exist;
      expect(separator?.textContent).to.equal('/');
      expect(separator?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should use custom separator', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item separator="→">Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator?.textContent).to.equal('→');
    });

    it('should handle empty separator', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item separator="">Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator?.textContent).to.equal('');
    });
  });

  describe('Slot content', () => {
    it('should render multiple slotted elements', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(html`
        <col-breadcrumb-item>
          <span>Icon</span>
          <span>Text</span>
        </col-breadcrumb-item>
      `);

      const items = element.querySelectorAll('span');
      expect(items).to.have.length(2);
      expect(items[0].textContent).to.equal('Icon');
      expect(items[1].textContent).to.equal('Text');
    });

    it('should handle complex slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(html`
        <col-breadcrumb-item>
          <div class="custom-content"><strong>Bold</strong> text</div>
        </col-breadcrumb-item>
      `);

      const customContent = element.querySelector('.custom-content');
      expect(customContent).to.exist;
      expect(customContent?.querySelector('strong')?.textContent).to.equal('Bold');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper structure for screen readers', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item>Home</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      // Check if there's a wrapper element
      const wrapper = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('*');
      expect(wrapper).to.exist;

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should render current items as non-interactive', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item current>Current Page</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;

      // Should not have interactive elements when current
      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should maintain proper link semantics', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#page">Page</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link?.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('a');
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#page');
    });

    it('should add role="button" for router links without href', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item router>Router Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(link?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('button');
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#');
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle href with special characters', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#page?query=test&foo=bar&section=1"
          >Page</col-breadcrumb-item
        >`
      );

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#page?query=test&foo=bar&section=1');
    });

    it('should handle multi-character separators', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item separator=" >> ">Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator?.textContent).to.equal(' >> ');
    });

    it('should handle empty content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item></col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use value or href as fallback when value is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#fallback">Item</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link') as HTMLElement;

      const clickPromise = oneEvent(element, 'breadcrumb-click');
      link.click();

      const event = await clickPromise;
      expect(event.detail.value).to.equal('#fallback'); // Should use href as fallback
    });
  });

  describe('Combined states', () => {
    it('should handle all properties together', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(html`
        <col-breadcrumb-item href="#current-page" current separator="→">
          Current Page
        </col-breadcrumb-item>
      `);

      expect(element.href).to.equal('#current-page');
      expect(element.current).to.be.true;
      expect(element.separator).to.equal('→');

      // When current is true, should render as span even with href
      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(span).to.exist;

      const link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;

      const separator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.separator');
      expect(separator?.textContent).to.equal('→');
    });

    it('should update from link to span when current is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBreadcrumbItem>(
        html`<col-breadcrumb-item href="#test">Test</col-breadcrumb-item>`
      );

      let link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      expect(link).to.exist;
      expect(link?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#test');

      element.current = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      link = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-link');
      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.breadcrumb-text');
      expect(link).to.not.exist;
      expect(span).to.exist;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/breadcrumb-item/col-breadcrumb-item.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { LinkHandlerController, Meta, ThemedComponent, TAG_PREFIX } from '@/config';
import { ColBreadcrumbItemStyles } from './col-breadcrumb-item.styles';

export interface BreadcrumbClickDetail {
  value: string;
  label: string;
  index: number;
  href?: string;
}

const TAG_NAME = 'breadcrumb-item';

/**
 * Breadcrumb item component for individual navigation links within a breadcrumb.
 *
 * @element col-breadcrumb-item
 *
 * @summary A breadcrumb item that represents a single level in the navigation hierarchy with link functionality.
 *
 * @slot - The text content for the breadcrumb item
 *
 * @csspart breadcrumb-item - The main breadcrumb item element (when clickable)
 *
 * @attr {string} href - The URL for the breadcrumb item link
 * @attr {boolean} current - Whether this item represents the current page
 * @attr {string} separator - The separator character to display after this item
 * @attr {boolean} newtab - Whether to open the link in a new tab
 * @attr {string} value - A value identifier for the breadcrumb item
 * @attr {boolean} router - Whether to use router navigation instead of regular links
 *
 * @property {string} href - The URL for the breadcrumb item link
 * @property {boolean} current - Whether this item represents the current page
 * @property {string} separator - The separator character to display after this item
 * @property {boolean} newTab - Whether to open the link in a new tab
 * @property {string} value - A value identifier for the breadcrumb item
 * @property {boolean} router - Whether to use router navigation instead of regular links
 *
 * @fires breadcrumb-click - Fired when the breadcrumb item is clicked. Event detail: BreadcrumbClickDetail
 *
 * @default '' - Default href value
 * @default false - Default current state
 * @default '/' - Default separator value
 * @default false - Default newTab state
 * @default '' - Default value
 * @default false - Default router state
 */
@Meta({ name: TAG_NAME })
export class ColBreadcrumbItem extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColBreadcrumbItemStyles];

  private linkHandler = new LinkHandlerController(this);

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  current = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  separator = '/';

  @property({ type: String })
  value = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  router = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  get href(): string {
    return this.linkHandler.href;
  }

  set href(value: string) {
    this.linkHandler.href = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  get newTab(): boolean {
    return this.linkHandler.newTab;
  }
  set newTab(value: boolean) {
    this.linkHandler.newTab = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  get downloadable(): boolean {
    return this.linkHandler.downloadable;
  }

  set downloadable(value: boolean) {
    this.linkHandler.downloadable = value;
  }

  @property({ type: String })
  get filename(): string {
    return this.linkHandler.filename;
  }

  set filename(value: string) {
    this.linkHandler.filename = value;
  }

  private handleClick(event: MouseEvent) {
    if (this.router) {
      event.preventDefault();
    }

    if (this.current) {
      event.preventDefault();
      return;
    }

    const parent = this.parentElement;
    const items = parent ? Array.from(parent.querySelectorAll(`${TAG_PREFIX}-${TAG_NAME}`)) : [];
    const index = items.indexOf(this);

    const detail: BreadcrumbClickDetail = {
      value: this.value || this.href || '',
      label: this.textContent?.trim() || '',
      index: index,
      href: this.href,
    };

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('breadcrumb-click', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  render() {
    const isClickable = (this.href || this.router) && !this.current;
    const attrs = this.linkHandler.getLinkAttributes();

    const content = isClickable
      ? html`<a
          part="breadcrumb-item"
          class="breadcrumb-link"
          href=${attrs.href || '#'}
          tabindex=${attrs.tabindex || nothing}
          target=${attrs.target || nothing}
          rel=${attrs.rel || nothing}
          download=${attrs.download !== undefined ? attrs.download : nothing}
          @click=${this.handleClick}
          role=${this.router && !this.href ? 'button' : nothing}
        >
          <slot></slot>
        </a>`
      : html`<span class="breadcrumb-text">
          <slot></slot>
        </span>`;

    return html`
      ${content}
      <span class="separator" aria-hidden="true">${this.separator}</span>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-breadcrumb-item': ColBreadcrumbItem;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColButtonStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-block;
    position: relative;
    width: fit-content;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    border: none;
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xl')};

    /* Default state styles */
    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    }
    &:hover:not(:disabled) {
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
    }
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
    }
    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.active')};
    }
    &:disabled::after {
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      border-radius: calc(${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')} - 1px);
      content: ' ';
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.alpha.white-55')};

    }
  }

    line-height: 22px;
    min-height: 42px;
  }

  }

  .plain {

  /* Styles for colors */

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled) {

    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger')};
    }

    &.outlined {
      border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger')};
    }

    &.outlined,
    &.plain {
      background-color: transparent;
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger')};

      &:hover:not(:disabled),
      &:focus:not(:disabled),
      &:active:not(:disabled) {
        background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger-lighter')};
      }
    }
  }

  .primary {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-dark')};
    }

    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    }

    /* Styles for variants */

    &.outlined {
      border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    }

    &.outlined,
    &.plain {
      background-color: transparent;
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};

      &:hover:not(:disabled),
      &:focus:not(:disabled),

        background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
      }

    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success-dark')};
    }

    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success')};

      &:active:not(:disabled) {
        background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success-lighter')};
      }

  }

  /* Group styling for adjacent radio buttons */
  :host([data-grouped]) {
    gap: 1px;
  }

  :host([data-grouped]) button {
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  :host([data-grouped][data-item='first']) button {
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    border-top-right-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  }

    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    border-top-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/button/col-button.test.ts
