import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColButton } from './col-button';

describe('ColButton component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-button')) {
      customElements.define('col-button', ColButton);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-button').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('form').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render a button element with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button></col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement).to.exist;
      expect(buttonElement.type).to.equal('button');
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.be.null;
      expect(buttonElement.name).to.equal('');
      expect(buttonElement.disabled).to.be.false;
      expect(buttonElement.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
    });

    it('should render the button with slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Click Me</col-button>`);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Click Me');

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render with the correct aria-label', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button aria-label="Close dialog">Click Me</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close dialog');
    });

    it('should render with the specified submit type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button type="submit"></col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.type).to.equal('submit');
    });

    it('should render with the specified reset type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button type="reset"></col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.type).to.equal('reset');
    });

    it('should render in a disabled state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button disabled>Disabled</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.disabled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render with the correct name', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button name="submit-button">Your text</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.name).to.equal('submit-button');
    });
  });

  describe('Events', () => {
    it('should dispatch a click event when button is clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Click me</col-button>`);
      let clickFired = false;

      element.addEventListener('click', () => {
        clickFired = true;
      });

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      expect(clickFired).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not dispatch a click event when disabled button is clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button disabled>Click me</col-button>`);
      let clickFired = false;

      element.addEventListener('click', () => {
        clickFired = true;
      });

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      expect(clickFired).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default and stop propagation when disabled button receives click event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button disabled>Click me</col-button>`);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;
      let stopPropagationCalled = false;

      const mockEvent = {
        preventDefault: () => {
          preventDefaultCalled = true;
        },
        stopPropagation: () => {
          stopPropagationCalled = true;
        },
      } as Event;

      // Directly call the handler to test the disabled logic
      (element as any)._handleClick(mockEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
      expect(stopPropagationCalled).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Styles', () => {
    it('should apply default styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Your text</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('small');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply color primary styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button color="primary">Your text</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('small');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply color danger styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button color="danger">Your text</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('small');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply color success styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button color="success">Your text</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('small');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply small size styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button size="sm">Your text</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('sm');
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply large size styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button size="lg">Your text</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('lg');
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('small');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply variant outlined styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button variant="outlined">Your text</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('outlined');
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('plain');
    });

    it('should apply variant plain styles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button variant="plain">Your text</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('plain');
      expect(className).to.not.include('danger');
      expect(className).to.not.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.not.include('success');
      expect(className).to.not.include('large');
      expect(className).to.not.include('outlined');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      let buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.disabled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update color dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      element.color = 'primary' as any;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.className).to.include('primary');
    });

    it('should update size dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      element.size = 'lg' as any;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.className).to.include('lg');
    });

    it('should update variant dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      element.variant = 'outlined' as any;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.className).to.include('outlined');
    });

    it('should update type dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      element.type = 'submit';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.type).to.equal('submit');
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      element.name = 'test-button';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(buttonElement.name).to.equal('test-button');
    });

    it('should update ariaLabel dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      element.ariaLabel = 'Updated label';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Updated label');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should associate aria-label correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button aria-label="Submit form">Send</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Submit form');
    });

    it('should indicate disabled state correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button disabled>Send</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Send</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button disabled>Send</col-button>`);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update tabindex when disabled state changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      let buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');

      element.disabled = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should update aria-disabled when disabled state changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button>Test</col-button>`);

      let buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      expect(buttonElement?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });

  describe('Combined properties', () => {
    it('should apply multiple style properties together', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
        html`<col-button color="primary" size="lg" variant="outlined">Test</col-button>`
      );

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');
      const className = buttonElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('primary');
      expect(className).to.include('lg');
      expect(className).to.include('outlined');
    });

    it('should handle all properties together', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`
        <col-button
          color="danger"
          size="sm"
          variant="plain"
          type="submit"
          name="test-btn"
          aria-label="Danger button"
          disabled
        >
          Danger Action
        </col-button>
      `);

      const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement.className).to.include('danger');
      expect(buttonElement.className).to.include('sm');
      expect(buttonElement.className).to.include('plain');
      expect(buttonElement.type).to.equal('submit');
      expect(buttonElement.name).to.equal('test-btn');
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Danger button');
      expect(buttonElement.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Danger Action');
    });
  });

  describe('Form submission and reset functionality', () => {
    describe('Submit button behavior', () => {
      it('should dispatch submit event on parent form when type is submit', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit">Submit</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let submitEventFired = false;
        let capturedEvent: Event | null = null;

        formElement.addEventListener('submit', e => {
          submitEventFired = true;
          capturedEvent = e;
          e.preventDefault(); // Prevent actual form submission
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(submitEventFired).to.be.true;
        expect(capturedEvent).to.exist;
        expect(capturedEvent!.type).to.equal('submit');
        expect(capturedEvent!.bubbles).to.be.true;
        expect(capturedEvent!.cancelable).to.be.true;

        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should not dispatch submit event when button is not inside a form', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit">Submit</col-button>`
        );

        let submitEventFired = false;
        document.addEventListener('submit', () => {
          submitEventFired = true;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        // Should not fire because there's no parent form
        expect(submitEventFired).to.be.false;
      });

      it('should respect preventDefault on submit event', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit">Submit</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let submitEventFired = false;
        let formSubmitCalled = false;

        // Mock form.submit to track if it gets called
        const originalSubmit = formElement.submit;
        formElement.submit = () => {
          formSubmitCalled = true;
        };

        formElement.addEventListener('submit', e => {
          submitEventFired = true;
          e.preventDefault(); // Prevent submission
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(submitEventFired).to.be.true;
        expect(formSubmitCalled).to.be.false; // Should not submit when prevented

        // Restore original submit
        formElement.submit = originalSubmit;
        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should handle form with onsubmit handler', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        let onSubmitCalled = false;
        formElement.onsubmit = e => {
          onSubmitCalled = true;
          e.preventDefault();
          return false;
        };

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit">Submit</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(onSubmitCalled).to.be.true;

        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should call native form.submit() when no custom handler exists', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit">Submit</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let formSubmitCalled = false;
        const originalSubmit = formElement.submit;
        formElement.submit = () => {
          formSubmitCalled = true;
        };

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(formSubmitCalled).to.be.true;

        formElement.submit = originalSubmit;
        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should not submit when disabled', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit" disabled>Submit</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let submitEventFired = false;
        formElement.addEventListener('submit', () => {
          submitEventFired = true;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(submitEventFired).to.be.false;

        formElement.remove();
      });
    });

    describe('Reset button behavior', () => {
      it('should dispatch reset event on parent form when type is reset', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button type="reset">Reset</col-button>`);
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let resetEventFired = false;
        let capturedEvent: Event | null = null;

        formElement.addEventListener('reset', e => {
          resetEventFired = true;
          capturedEvent = e;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(resetEventFired).to.be.true;
        expect(capturedEvent).to.exist;
        expect(capturedEvent!.type).to.equal('reset');
        expect(capturedEvent!.bubbles).to.be.true;
        expect(capturedEvent!.cancelable).to.be.true;

        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should not dispatch reset event when button is not inside a form', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button type="reset">Reset</col-button>`);

        let resetEventFired = false;
        document.addEventListener('reset', () => {
          resetEventFired = true;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        // Should not fire because there's no parent form
        expect(resetEventFired).to.be.false;
      });

      it('should respect preventDefault on reset event', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(html`<col-button type="reset">Reset</col-button>`);
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let resetEventFired = false;
        let formResetCalled = false;

        // Mock form.reset to track if it gets called
        const originalReset = formElement.reset;
        formElement.reset = () => {
          formResetCalled = true;
        };

        formElement.addEventListener('reset', e => {
          resetEventFired = true;
          e.preventDefault(); // Prevent reset
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(resetEventFired).to.be.true;
        expect(formResetCalled).to.be.false; // Should not reset when prevented

        // Restore original reset
        formElement.reset = originalReset;
        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should not reset when disabled', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="reset" disabled>Reset</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let resetEventFired = false;
        formElement.addEventListener('reset', () => {
          resetEventFired = true;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(resetEventFired).to.be.false;

        formElement.remove();
      });
    });

    describe('Regular button behavior (type="button")', () => {
      it('should not dispatch submit or reset events when type is button', async () => {
        const formElement = document.createElement('form');
        document.body.appendChild(formElement);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="button">Button</col-button>`
        );
        formElement.appendChild(element);

        let submitEventFired = false;
        let resetEventFired = false;

        formElement.addEventListener('submit', () => {
          submitEventFired = true;
        });

        formElement.addEventListener('reset', () => {
          resetEventFired = true;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(submitEventFired).to.be.false;
        expect(resetEventFired).to.be.false;

        formElement.remove();
      });

      it('should still dispatch click event when type is button', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="button">Button</col-button>`
        );

        let clickEventFired = false;
        element.addEventListener('click', () => {
          clickEventFired = true;
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(clickEventFired).to.be.true;
      });
    });

    describe('Complex form integration', () => {
      it('should handle nested form elements correctly', async () => {
        const outerForm = document.createElement('form');
        const innerDiv = document.createElement('div');
        const nestedDiv = document.createElement('div');

        document.body.appendChild(outerForm);
        outerForm.appendChild(innerDiv);
        innerDiv.appendChild(nestedDiv);

        const element = await fixture<ColButton>(
          html`<col-button type="submit">Submit</col-button>`
        );
        nestedDiv.appendChild(element);

        let submitFired = false;
        outerForm.addEventListener('submit', e => {
          submitFired = true;
          e.preventDefault();
        });

        const buttonElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        buttonElement.click();

        expect(submitFired).to.be.true;

        outerForm.remove();
      });
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/button/col-button.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';

import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';

import { BUTTON_SIZES, BUTTON_VARIANTS, COLORS, getEnumValues } from '@/types';
import { ColButtonStyles } from './col-button.styles';

/**
 * Button component for user interactions and form submissions.
 *
 * @element col-button
 *
 * @summary A customizable button that can optionally associate with a form. When associated, it can submit/reset a form—even when placed outside of it.
 *
 * @slot - The button content (text, icons, etc.)
 *
 * @csspart button - The main button element
 *
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the button
 * @attr {string} color - The color theme of the button
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the button is disabled
 * @attr {string} name - The button name attribute
 * @attr {string} size - The button size (small, medium, large)
 * @attr {string} type - The button type (button, submit, reset)
 * @attr {string} variant - The button style variant (default, outlined, plain)
 * @attr {string} form - The id of the form this button is associated with (enables submitting/resetting an external form)
 *
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the button
 * @property {string} color - The color theme of the button
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the button is disabled
 * @property {string} name - The button name attribute
 * @property {string} size - The button size (small, medium, large)
 * @property {('button'|'submit'|'reset')} type - The button type (button, submit, reset)
 * @property {string} variant - The button style variant (default, outlined, plain)
 * @property {string} form - Associated form id for out-of-form submission/reset
 *
 * @fires click - Fired when the button is clicked
 * @fires submit - Fired when the button triggers form submission
 * @fires reset - Fired when the button triggers form reset
 *
 * @remarks
 * - Form association is optional. Without an associated form (or when `type` is "button"), it behaves like a regular button and only emits `click`.
 * - This component is form-associated (ElementInternals). It resolves the target form using:
 *   1) its associated internals.form,
 *   2) the `form` attribute (document.getElementById),
 *   3) the nearest ancestor form (`closest('form')`),
 *   4) or the inner native button's `form`.
 * - The inner native <button> also receives the `form` attribute so native behavior (e.g., constraints, submitter, FormData submitter) is preserved.
 * - For type="submit", if a form is resolved it calls `form.requestSubmit()` (passing the inner button when applicable); otherwise it acts like a normal click.
 * - For type="reset", if a form is resolved it calls `form.reset()`; otherwise it acts like a normal click.
 *
 * @example Submit an external form
 * ```html
 * <form id="filter-form">…</form>
 * <col-button type="submit" form="filter-form">Save Changes</col-button>
 * ```
 *
 * @example Reset an external form
 * ```html
 * <form id="filter-form">…</form>
 * <col-button type="reset" form="filter-form">Clear</col-button>
 * ```
 *
 * @default '' - Default ariaLabel value
 * @default 'default' - Default color value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default name value
 * @default 'medium' - Default size value
 * @default 'button' - Default type value
 * @default 'default' - Default variant value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'button' })
export class ColButton extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColButtonStyles];

  // Enable form association for the host element (so `form` attribute on host works)
  static get formAssociated() {
    return true;
  }

  private _internals: ElementInternals;

  constructor() {
    super();
    // attachInternals is available because formAssociated = true
    this._internals = this.attachInternals();
  }

  @query('button')
  private _innerButton?: HTMLButtonElement;

  // Properties
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(COLORS), COLORS.DEFAULT)
  color!: COLORS;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  name: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  form: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(BUTTON_SIZES), BUTTON_SIZES.MEDIUM)
  size!: BUTTON_SIZES;

  @property({ type: String })
  type: 'button' | 'submit' | 'reset' = 'button';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(BUTTON_VARIANTS), BUTTON_VARIANTS.DEFAULT)
  variant!: BUTTON_VARIANTS;

  private get classes() {
    return {
      [`${this.color.toLowerCase()}`]: this.color !== COLORS.DEFAULT,
      [`button-${this.size.toLowerCase()}`]: this.size !== BUTTON_SIZES.MEDIUM,
      [`${this.variant.toLowerCase()}`]: this.variant !== BUTTON_VARIANTS.DEFAULT,
    };
  }

  private _handleClick(e: Event) {
    if (this.disabled) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      return;
    }

    if (this.type === 'submit') {
      this._handleSubmit();
    } else if (this.type === 'reset') {
      this._handleReset();
    }
  }

  private _handleSubmit() {
    // Resolve associated form in a way that works across shadow DOM boundaries
    const inner = this._innerButton;
    const associated = (this._internals as any)?.form as HTMLFormElement | null | undefined;
    const byId = this.form ? (document.getElementById(this.form) as HTMLFormElement | null) : null;
    const nearest = this.closest('form') as HTMLFormElement | null;
    const form = associated || byId || nearest || inner?.form || null;

    if (form) {
      // Always dispatch a cancelable submit event first. If not prevented, call native submit.
      const submitEvent = new Event('submit', {
        bubbles: true,
        cancelable: true,
        composed: true,
      });
      const wasNotCancelled = form.dispatchEvent(submitEvent);
      if (
        wasNotCancelled &&
        !submitEvent.defaultPrevented &&
        typeof (form as any).submit === 'function'
      ) {
        (form as any).submit();
      }
    }
  }

  private _handleReset() {
    // Resolve associated form across shadow DOM boundaries
    const inner = this._innerButton;
    const associated = (this._internals as any)?.form as HTMLFormElement | null | undefined;
    const byId = this.form ? (document.getElementById(this.form) as HTMLFormElement | null) : null;
    const nearest = this.closest('form') as HTMLFormElement | null;
    const form = associated || byId || nearest || inner?.form || null;

    if (form) {
      // Dispatch a cancelable reset event first. Only call native reset if not prevented.
      const resetEvent = new Event('reset', {
        bubbles: true,
        cancelable: true,
        composed: true,
      });
      const wasNotCancelled = form.dispatchEvent(resetEvent);
      if (wasNotCancelled && !resetEvent.defaultPrevented && typeof form.reset === 'function') {
        form.reset();
      }
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <button
        part="button"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        type=${this.type}
        name="${this.name}"
        form="${this.form}"
        role="button"
        ?disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-label="${this.ariaLabel || nothing}"
        aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
        tabindex=${this.disabled ? -1 : 0}
        @click=${this._handleClick}
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </button>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-button': ColButton;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox/col-checkbox.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColCheckboxStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
  }

  .checkbox-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    outline: none;
  }

  .checkbox-container:focus {
    outline: none;
  }

  .checkbox {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    border: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs2')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  /* States for unchecked */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled]):not([indeterminate])) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  :host(:focus-within:not([checked]):not([indeterminate])) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled]):not([indeterminate])) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  /* States for checked */
  :host([checked]) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:hover:not([disabled])) .checkbox {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:focus-within) .checkbox {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][data-active]:not([disabled])) .checkbox {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};
  }

  /* States for indeterminate */
  :host([indeterminate]) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate]:hover:not([disabled])) .checkbox {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate]:focus-within) .checkbox {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate][data-active]:not([disabled])) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
  }

  /* Default checkmark */
  .checkmark {
    display: none;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  :host([checked]) .checkmark {
    display: block;
  }

  /* Show checkmark on hover and active states */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled]):not([indeterminate])) .checkmark {
    display: block;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    opacity: 0.5;
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled]):not([indeterminate])) .checkmark {
    display: block;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.alpha.white-75')};
  }

  /* Indeterminate mark */
  .indeterminate-mark {
    display: none;
    width: 12px;
    height: 2px;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate]) .indeterminate-mark {
    display: block;
  }

  /* Hide native input */
  input[type='checkbox'] {
    position: absolute;
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Text label */
  label {
    margin-left: 2px;
    user-select: none;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  /* Slot styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox/col-checkbox.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColCheckbox } from './col-checkbox';

describe('ColCheckbox component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-checkbox')) {
      customElements.define('col-checkbox', ColCheckbox);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-checkbox').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const checkboxContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(checkboxContainer).to.exist;

      const checkboxInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      expect(checkboxInput).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox checked></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render checkmark when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox checked></col-checkbox>`);

      const checkmark = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkmark');
      expect(checkmark).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render indeterminate mark when indeterminate is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox indeterminate></col-checkbox>`);

      const indeterminateMark = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.indeterminate-mark');
      expect(indeterminateMark).to.exist;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "mixed" when indeterminate', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox indeterminate></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('mixed');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox checked></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "false" when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should change from indeterminate to checked when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox indeterminate></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.indeterminate).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.indeterminate).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container') as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => container.click());
      const { detail } = await oneEvent(element, 'change');

      expect(detail.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(detail.indeterminate).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle checked state when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
      });

      spaceEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse interactions', () => {
    it('should add data-active attribute on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove data-active attribute on mouseup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox data-active></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;

      const mouseUpEvent = new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseUpEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not add data-active when disabled on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Slots and labels', () => {
    it('should render text inside the default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox>Checkbox Label</col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Checkbox Label');
    });

    it('should support custom label via label slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`
        <col-checkbox customLabel>
          <span slot="label">Custom Label</span>
        </col-checkbox>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use default slot when customLabel is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox>Default Label</col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;

      const slotElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.exist;

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('label');
      expect(labelElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update checked state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      element.checked = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update indeterminate state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      expect(element.indeterminate).to.be.false;

      element.indeterminate = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.indeterminate).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('indeterminate')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('mixed');

      const indeterminateMark = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.indeterminate-mark');
      expect(indeterminateMark).to.exist;
    });

    it('should update customLabel state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`
        <col-checkbox>
          <span slot="label">Label Content</span>
          Default Content
        </col-checkbox>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;

      element.customLabel = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration', () => {
    it('should have name property for form integration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(
        html`<col-checkbox name="test-checkbox"></col-checkbox>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-checkbox');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.hasAttribute('name')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handlers coverage', () => {
    it('should handle click with event parameter', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-container') as HTMLElement;

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });
      clickEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      clickEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      container.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle keydown with different key combinations', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox disabled></col-checkbox>`);

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const keyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      keyEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      keyEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(keyEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle Space key variation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckbox>(html`<col-checkbox></col-checkbox>`);

      const spaceKeyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Space', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceKeyEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox/col-checkbox.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColCheckboxStyles } from './col-checkbox.styles';

/**
 * Checkbox component for form selection with support for indeterminate state and custom labels.
 *
 * @element col-checkbox
 *
 * @summary A customizable checkbox component supporting checked, indeterminate, disabled states, and custom label slots.
 *
 * @slot - The default label/content for the checkbox
 * @slot label - Custom label slot for advanced label rendering
 *
 * @csspart checkbox - The main checkbox container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the checkbox is checked
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the checkbox is disabled
 * @attr {boolean} indeterminate - Whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state
 * @attr {boolean} customlabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @attr {string} name - The name of the checkbox (for form integration)
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the checkbox is checked
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the checkbox is disabled
 * @property {boolean} indeterminate - Whether the checkbox is in an indeterminate state
 * @property {boolean} customLabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @property {string} name - The name of the checkbox (for form integration)
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the checkbox state changes. Event detail: { checked, indeterminate }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default indeterminate state
 * @default false - Default customLabel state
 * @default '' - Default name value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'checkbox' })
export class ColCheckbox extends SelectableFormComponent {
  static styles = [ColCheckboxStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customLabel = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  indeterminate = false;

  constructor() {
    super();
    this.type = 'checkbox';
  }

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    if (this.indeterminate) {
      this.indeterminate = false;
      this.checked = true;
    } else {
      this.checked = !this.checked;
    }

    this._syncFormValue();

    this._dispatchChange({
      checked: this.checked,
      indeterminate: this.indeterminate,
    });
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="checkbox"
        class="checkbox-container"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
        role="checkbox"
        aria-checked="${this.indeterminate ? 'mixed' : this.checked}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-labelledby="label-${this._id}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <div class="checkbox">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            name=${this.name}
            ?checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
            ?disabled=${this.disabled}
            .indeterminate=${this.indeterminate}
            @focus=${() => this.focus()}
            aria-hidden="true"
            tabindex="-1"
          />
          <svg
            class="checkmark"
            viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            fill="none"
            stroke="currentColor"
            stroke-width="4"
            stroke-linecap="round"
            stroke-linejoin="round"
            aria-hidden="true"
          >
            <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>
          </svg>
          ${this.indeterminate
            ? html` <div class="indeterminate-mark" aria-hidden="true"></div> `
            : ''}
        </div>

        ${this.customLabel
          ? html` <label id="label-${this._id}"><slot name="label"></slot></label> `
          : html` <slot id="label-${this._id}"></slot> `}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-checkbox': ColCheckbox;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox-button/col-checkbox-button.styles.ts

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColCheckboxButtonStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-flex;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    --border-width: 1px;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .checkbox-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .checkbox-button-container {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-light')};
  }

  .checkbox-button-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    outline: none;
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    border: solid var(--border-width) ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  /* Default state */
  .checkbox-button-container:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  /* States for unchecked */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .checkbox-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .checkbox-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .checkbox-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
  }

  /* States for checked */
  :host([checked]) .checkbox-button-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:hover:not([disabled])) .checkbox-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:focus-within) .checkbox-button-container {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked][data-active]:not([disabled])) .checkbox-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .checkbox-button-container {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-light')};
  }

  /* Icon styles */
  .icon {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
  }

  /* Text label */
  .label {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    user-select: none;
  }

  /* Hide native input */
  input[type='checkbox'] {
    position: absolute;
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Slot styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
  }
`;
