FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox-button/col-checkbox-button.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColCheckboxButton } from './col-checkbox-button';

describe('ColCheckboxButton component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-checkbox-button')) {
      customElements.define('col-checkbox-button', ColCheckboxButton);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-checkbox-button').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const checkboxButtonContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-button-container'
      );
      expect(checkboxButtonContainer).to.exist;

      const checkboxInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      expect(checkboxInput).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button checked></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button checked></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "false" when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-button-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-button-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-button-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => container.click());
      const { detail } = await oneEvent(element, 'change');

      expect(detail.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle checked state when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
      });

      spaceEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle Space key variation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const spaceKeyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Space', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceKeyEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse interactions', () => {
    it('should add data-active attribute on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove data-active attribute on mouseup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button data-active></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;

      const mouseUpEvent = new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseUpEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not add data-active when disabled on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Slots and labels', () => {
    it('should render text inside the default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button>Checkbox Button Label</col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Checkbox Button Label');
    });

    it('should render label when label property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button label="Label Text"></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.label).to.equal('Label Text');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Label Text');
    });

    it('should support custom label via label slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(html`
        <col-checkbox-button customLabel>
          <span slot="label">Custom Label</span>
        </col-checkbox-button>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom icon via icon slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(html`
        <col-checkbox-button>
          <div slot="icon">🔘</div>
          Button Text
        </col-checkbox-button>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('🔘');
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Button Text');

      const iconElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon');
      expect(iconElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use default slot when no label property and customLabel is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button>Default Content</col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;
      expect(element.label).to.equal('');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Content');
    });

    it('should prioritize label property over default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button label="Property Label">Slot Content</col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Property Label');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update checked state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      element.checked = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update label dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.label).to.equal('');

      element.label = 'Updated Label';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.label).to.equal('Updated Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Label');
    });

    it('should update customLabel state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(html`
        <col-checkbox-button>
          <span slot="label">Slot Label</span>
          Default Content
        </col-checkbox-button>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;

      element.customLabel = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration', () => {
    it('should have name property for form integration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button name="test-checkbox-button"></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-checkbox-button');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.hasAttribute('name')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handlers coverage', () => {
    it('should handle click with event parameter when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-button-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });
      clickEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      clickEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      container.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle keydown when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button disabled></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const keyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      keyEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      keyEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(keyEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle click without event parameter', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button></col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      (element as any)._handleClick();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Icon slot behavior', () => {
    it('should not render icon container when no icon slot is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(
        html`<col-checkbox-button>Just text</col-checkbox-button>`
      );

      const iconElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon');
      expect(iconElement).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render icon container when icon slot is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxButton>(html`
        <col-checkbox-button>
          <span slot="icon">⭐</span>
          Text with icon
        </col-checkbox-button>
      `);

      const iconElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon');
      expect(iconElement).to.exist;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox-button/col-checkbox-button.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColCheckboxButtonStyles } from './col-checkbox-button.styles';
import { GroupsCheckboxRadioStyles } from '@/styles/utils/styles/groups-checkbox-radio.styles';

/**
 * Checkbox button component styled as a button for enhanced visual presentation.
 *
 * @element col-checkbox-button
 *
 * @summary A checkbox component that appears as a button with support for icons, custom labels, and indeterminate state.
 *
 * @slot - The default label content for the checkbox button
 * @slot label - Custom label slot for advanced label rendering
 * @slot icon - Optional icon to display alongside the checkbox button
 *
 * @csspart checkbox-button - The main checkbox button container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the checkbox button is checked
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the checkbox button is disabled
 * @attr {string} label - The label text for the checkbox button
 * @attr {boolean} customlabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @attr {boolean} indeterminate - Whether the checkbox button is in an indeterminate state
 * @attr {string} name - The name of the checkbox button (for form integration)
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the checkbox button is checked
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the checkbox button is disabled
 * @property {string} label - The label text for the checkbox button
 * @property {boolean} customLabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @property {boolean} indeterminate - Whether the checkbox button is in an indeterminate state
 * @property {string} name - The name of the checkbox button (for form integration)
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the checkbox button state changes. Event detail: { checked, indeterminate }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default label value
 * @default false - Default customLabel state
 * @default false - Default indeterminate state
 * @default '' - Default name value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'checkbox-button' })
export class ColCheckboxButton extends SelectableFormComponent {
  static styles = [ColCheckboxButtonStyles, GroupsCheckboxRadioStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  label = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customLabel = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true }) indeterminate = false;

  constructor() {
    super();
    this.type = 'checkbox';
  }

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this.indeterminate = false;
  }

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    if (this.indeterminate) {
      this.indeterminate = false;
      this.checked = true;
    } else {
      this.checked = !this.checked;
    }

    this._syncFormValue();

    this._dispatchChange({
      checked: this.checked,
      indeterminate: this.indeterminate,
    });
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="checkbox-button"
        class="checkbox-button-container item-groupable"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
        role="checkbox"
        aria-checked="${this.checked}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-labelledby="label-${this._id}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <input
          type="checkbox"
          name=${this.name}
          checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
          ?disabled=${this.disabled}
          @focus=${() => this.focus()}
          aria-hidden="true"
          tabindex="-1"
        />
        ${this.hasSlotted('icon')
          ? html`
              <div class="icon">
                <slot name="icon"></slot>
              </div>
            `
          : nothing}
        ${this.customLabel
          ? html` <div id="label-${this._id}" class="label"><slot name="label"></slot></div> `
          : html`
              <div id="label-${this._id}" class="label">${this.label || html`<slot></slot>`}</div>
            `}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-checkbox-button': ColCheckboxButton;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColCheckboxCardStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]).checkbox-card-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    .title {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    }
    .checkbox {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .checkbox-card-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    outline: none;
  }

  /* Default state */
  .checkbox-card-container:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
  }

  /* States for unchecked */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .checkbox-card-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
  }

  :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  /* States for checked */
  :host([checked]) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    .title,
    .description {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    }
  }

  :host([checked]:hover:not([disabled])) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  :host([checked]:focus-within) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][data-active]:not([disabled])) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    .title,
    .description {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-light')};
    }
    .checkbox {
      border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary-light')};
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
    }
  }

  /* States for indeterminate */
  :host([indeterminate]) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    .title,
    .description {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    }
  }

  :host([indeterminate]:hover:not([disabled])) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate]:focus-within) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate][data-active]:not([disabled])) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([indeterminate][disabled]) .checkbox-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    .title,
    .description {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    }
    .checkbox {
      border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .checkbox {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    min-width: 16px;
    height: 16px;
    border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs2')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  :host([checked]) .checkbox {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  /* Checkmark styles */
  .checkmark {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')};
  }

  /* Indeterminate mark styles */
  .indeterminate-mark {
    width: 12px;
    height: 2px;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default')};
  }

  /* Content styles */
  .content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .title {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.m')};
    font-weight: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.heading.semibold-m')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  .description {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
  }

  /* Hide native input */
  input[type='checkbox'] {
    position: absolute;
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Slot styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: block;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox-card/col-checkbox-card.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColCheckboxCard } from './col-checkbox-card';

describe('ColCheckboxCard component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-checkbox-card')) {
      customElements.define('col-checkbox-card', ColCheckboxCard);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-checkbox-card').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const checkboxCardContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(checkboxCardContainer).to.exist;

      const checkboxInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      expect(checkboxInput).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card checked></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card checked></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "false" when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-card-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-card-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-card-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => container.click());
      const { detail } = await oneEvent(element, 'change');

      expect(detail.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle checked state when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
      });

      spaceEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle Space key variation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      const spaceKeyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Space', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceKeyEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse interactions', () => {
    it('should add data-active attribute on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove data-active attribute on mouseup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card data-active></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;

      const mouseUpEvent = new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseUpEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not add data-active when disabled on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Content rendering', () => {
    it('should render title when title property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card title="Card Title"></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.title).to.equal('Card Title');

      const titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Card Title');
    });

    it('should render description when description property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card
          title="Card Title"
          description="Card Description"
        ></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.description).to.equal('Card Description');

      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');
      expect(descriptionElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Card Description');
    });

    it('should not render description when description is empty', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card title="Card Title"></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');
      expect(descriptionElement).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`
        <col-checkbox-card customContent>
          <div>Custom Card Content</div>
        </col-checkbox-card>
      `);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Card Content');

      const contentElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.content');
      expect(contentElement).to.exist;

      const slotElement = contentElement?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use title/description when customContent is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`
        <col-checkbox-card title="Default Title" description="Default Description">
          <div>This content should be ignored</div>
        </col-checkbox-card>
      `);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.false;

      const titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');

      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Title');
      expect(descriptionElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Description');

      const slotElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Icon rendering', () => {
    it('should render checkmark when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card checked></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      const checkmark = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkmark');
      expect(checkmark).to.exist;

      const checkedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="checked-icon"]');
      expect(checkedIconSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render unchecked icon slot when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      const uncheckedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="unchecked-icon"]');
      expect(uncheckedIconSlot).to.exist;

      const checkmark = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkmark');
      expect(checkmark).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom checked icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`
        <col-checkbox-card checked>
          <span slot="checked-icon">✓</span>
        </col-checkbox-card>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('✓');

      const checkedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="checked-icon"]');
      expect(checkedIconSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom unchecked icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`
        <col-checkbox-card>
          <span slot="unchecked-icon">○</span>
        </col-checkbox-card>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('○');

      const uncheckedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="unchecked-icon"]');
      expect(uncheckedIconSlot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update checked state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkmark')).to.not.exist;

      element.checked = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');

      const checkmark = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkmark');
      expect(checkmark).to.exist;
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.checkbox-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update title dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.title).to.equal('');

      element.title = 'Updated Title';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.title).to.equal('Updated Title');

      const titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Title');
    });

    it('should update description dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card title="Title"></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.description).to.equal('');
      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description')).to.not.exist;

      element.description = 'New Description';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.description).to.equal('New Description');

      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');
      expect(descriptionElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('New Description');
    });

    it('should update customContent state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`
        <col-checkbox-card title="Title" description="Description">
          <div>Custom Content</div>
        </col-checkbox-card>
      `);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.false;

      let titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Title');

      element.customContent = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.true;

      const slotElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.content slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.exist;

      titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration', () => {
    it('should have name property for form integration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card name="test-checkbox-card"></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-checkbox-card');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.hasAttribute('name')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handlers coverage', () => {
    it('should handle click with event parameter when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.checkbox-card-container'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });
      clickEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      clickEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      container.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle keydown when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(
        html`<col-checkbox-card disabled></col-checkbox-card>`
      );

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const keyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      keyEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      keyEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(keyEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle click without event parameter', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCheckboxCard>(html`<col-checkbox-card></col-checkbox-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      (element as any)._handleClick();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/checkbox-card/col-checkbox-card.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColCheckboxCardStyles } from './col-checkbox-card.styles';

/**
 * Checkbox card component for card-style checkbox selection.
 *
 * @element col-checkbox-card
 *
 * @summary A checkbox component styled as a card with title, description, and custom content support.
 *
 * @slot - The custom content when customContent is true
 * @slot checked-icon - Icon to display when the checkbox card is checked
 * @slot unchecked-icon - Icon to display when the checkbox card is unchecked
 *
 * @csspart checkbox-card - The main checkbox card container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the checkbox card is checked
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the checkbox card is disabled
 * @attr {string} title - The title text for the checkbox card
 * @attr {string} description - The description text for the checkbox card
 * @attr {boolean} customcontent - Whether to use custom content instead of title/description
 * @attr {boolean} indeterminate - Whether the checkbox card is in an indeterminate state
 * @attr {string} name - The name of the checkbox card (for form integration)
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the checkbox card is checked
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the checkbox card is disabled
 * @property {string} title - The title text for the checkbox card
 * @property {string} description - The description text for the checkbox card
 * @property {boolean} customContent - Whether to use custom content instead of title/description
 * @property {boolean} indeterminate - Whether the checkbox card is in an indeterminate state
 * @property {string} name - The name of the checkbox card (for form integration)
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the checkbox card state changes. Event detail: { checked, indeterminate }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default title value
 * @default '' - Default description value
 * @default false - Default customContent state
 * @default false - Default indeterminate state
 * @default '' - Default name value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'checkbox-card' })
export class ColCheckboxCard extends SelectableFormComponent {
  static styles = [ColCheckboxCardStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  title = '';

  @property({ type: String })
  description = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customContent = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  indeterminate = false;

  constructor() {
    super();
    this.type = 'checkbox';
  }

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    if (this.indeterminate) {
      this.indeterminate = false;
      this.checked = true;
    } else {
      this.checked = !this.checked;
    }

    this._syncFormValue();

    this._dispatchChange({
      checked: this.checked,
      indeterminate: this.indeterminate,
    });
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="checkbox-card"
        class="checkbox-card-container"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
        role="checkbox"
        aria-checked="${this.indeterminate ? 'mixed' : this.checked}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-labelledby="title-${this._id}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <div class="checkbox">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            name=${this.name}
            checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
            ?disabled=${this.disabled}
            .indeterminate=${this.indeterminate}
            @focus=${() => this.focus()}
            aria-hidden="true"
            tabindex="-1"
          />
          ${this.checked
            ? html`
                <slot name="checked-icon">
                  <svg
                    class="checkmark"
                    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="4"
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    aria-hidden="true"
                  >
                    <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>
                  </svg>
                </slot>
              `
            : this.indeterminate
              ? html`
                  <slot name="indeterminate-icon">
                    <div class="indeterminate-mark" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                  </slot>
                `
              : html` <slot name="unchecked-icon"></slot> `}
        </div>

        ${this.customContent
          ? html`
              <div class="content">
                <slot></slot>
              </div>
            `
          : html`
              <div class="content">
                <div id="title-${this._id}" class="title">${this.title}</div>
                ${this.description ? html`<div class="description">${this.description}</div>` : ''}
              </div>
            `}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-checkbox-card': ColCheckboxCard;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColDividerStyles = css`
  .divider {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.base-light')};
  }

  .horizontal {
    width: 100%;
    height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')};
    margin: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.ml')} 0;
  }

  .vertical {
    width: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')};
    height: 100%;
    margin: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.ml')};
  }
`;
