FILE: src/components/atoms/divider/col-divider.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColDivider } from './col-divider';
import { DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS } from '@/types';

describe('ColDivider component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-divider')) {
      customElements.define('col-divider', ColDivider);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-divider').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default horizontal orientation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement).to.exist;
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
    });

    it('should apply vertical orientation when specified', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="vertical"></col-divider>`
      );

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have role="separator"', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('separator');
    });

    it('should set aria-orientation to horizontal by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('aria-orientation')).to.equal(
        DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL
      );
    });

    it('should set aria-orientation to vertical when orientation is vertical', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="vertical"></col-divider>`
      );

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('aria-orientation')).to.equal(
        DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL
      );
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update orientation dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);

      let dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('aria-orientation')).to.equal('horizontal');

      element.orientation = 'vertical';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);

      dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('aria-orientation')).to.equal(
        DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL
      );
    });

    it('should update from vertical back to horizontal', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="vertical"></col-divider>`
      );

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);

      element.orientation = 'horizontal';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('aria-orientation')).to.equal(
        DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL
      );
    });
  });

  describe('CSS class application', () => {
    it('should apply both base and orientation classes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include('divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
    });

    it('should apply both base and vertical classes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="vertical"></col-divider>`
      );

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include('divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);
    });

    it('should not have both orientation classes simultaneously', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="vertical"></col-divider>`
      );

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.not.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
    });
  });

  describe('Default values', () => {
    it('should have horizontal as default orientation property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
    });

    it('should render correctly without any attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const dividerElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.divider');
      expect(dividerElement).to.exist;
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('separator');
      expect(dividerElement?.getAttribute('aria-orientation')).to.equal(
        DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL
      );
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include('divider');
      expect(dividerElement?.className).to.include(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
    });
  });

  describe('TypeScript type safety', () => {
    it('should accept valid orientation values', async () => {
      const horizontalElement = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="horizontal"></col-divider>`
      );
      const verticalElement = await fixture<ColDivider>(
        html`<col-divider orientation="vertical"></col-divider>`
      );

      expect(horizontalElement.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
      expect(verticalElement.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);
    });

    it('should update orientation programmatically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDivider>(html`<col-divider></col-divider>`);

      element.orientation = 'vertical';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.VERTICAL);

      element.orientation = 'horizontal';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.orientation).to.equal(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL);
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/divider/col-divider.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS, getEnumValues } from '@/types';
import { ColDividerStyles } from './col-divider.styles';

/**
 * Divider component for creating visual separators between content sections.
 *
 * @element col-divider
 *
 * @summary A simple visual separator that can be oriented horizontally or vertically.
 *
 * @csspart divider - The main divider element
 *
 * @attr {string} orientation - The orientation of the divider (horizontal or vertical)
 *
 * @property {string} orientation - The orientation of the divider (horizontal or vertical)
 *
 * @default 'horizontal' - Default orientation value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'divider' })
export class ColDivider extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColDividerStyles];

  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS), DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL)
  orientation!: string;

  render() {
    return html`<div
      part="divider"
      class="divider ${this.orientation || DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL}"
      role="separator"
      aria-orientation=${this.orientation || DIVIDER_ORIENTATIONS.HORIZONTAL}
    ></div>`;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-divider': ColDivider;
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/divider/index.ts
================================================
export * from './col-divider';



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/dropdown/col-dropdown.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColDropdownStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-block;
    position: relative;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  .dropdown-container {
    position: relative;
    display: contents;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .dropdown-trigger {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
  }

  .dropdown-trigger[aria-disabled='true'] {
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  .dropdown-trigger:focus-visible {
    outline: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    outline-offset: 2px;
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
  }

  .dropdown-content {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 1000;
    min-width: var(--dropdown-trigger-width, 200px);
    max-width: 100%;
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.s')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.m')};
    overflow: hidden;
    animation: dropdown-in 0.2s ease-out;
  }

  /* Vertical positioning */
  .dropdown-content.bottom {
    top: 100%;
    margin-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .dropdown-content.top {
    bottom: 100%;
    margin-bottom: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  /* Horizontal alignment */
  .dropdown-content.start {
    left: 0;
  }

  .dropdown-content.end {
    right: 0;
  }

  @keyframes dropdown-in {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: scale(0.95);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: scale(1);
    }
  }

  /* Slotted content styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: block;
  }

  ::slotted([role='menuitem']) {
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background-color 0.15s ease;
    outline: none;
  }

  ::slotted([role='menuitem']:focus-visible) {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    outline: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    outline-offset: -2px;
  }

  ::slotted([role='separator']) {
    height: 1px;
    margin: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} 0;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }
`;



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/dropdown/col-dropdown.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColDropdown } from './col-dropdown';

describe('ColDropdown component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-dropdown')) {
      customElements.define('col-dropdown', ColDropdown);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-dropdown').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
      expect(element.placement).to.equal('end');

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-container');
      expect(container).to.exist;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not render content when closed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render content when open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render with custom placement', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open placement="start">
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.placement).to.equal('start');
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content?.className).to.include('start');
    });

    it('should render in disabled state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown disabled>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('button');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('aria-haspopup')).to.equal('true');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
      expect(trigger?.hasAttribute('aria-controls')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update ARIA attributes when opened', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('menu');
      expect(content?.hasAttribute('aria-labelledby')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should have proper IDs for accessibility', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');

      const triggerId = trigger?.getAttribute('id');
      const contentId = content?.getAttribute('id');
      const ariaControls = trigger?.getAttribute('aria-controls');
      const ariaLabelledBy = content?.getAttribute('aria-labelledby');

      expect(triggerId).to.exist;
      expect(contentId).to.exist;
      expect(ariaControls).to.equal(contentId);
      expect(ariaLabelledBy).to.equal(triggerId);
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle open state when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const triggerButton = element.querySelector('button[slot="trigger"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      triggerButton.click();

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      triggerButton.click();
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown disabled>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const triggerButton = element.querySelector('button[slot="trigger"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      triggerButton.click();

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should open when Enter key is pressed on trigger', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      trigger.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should open when Space key is pressed on trigger', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger') as HTMLElement;
      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      trigger.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should close when Escape key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not respond to keyboard events when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown disabled>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      trigger.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default for handled keyboard events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      enterEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      trigger.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Position calculation', () => {
    it('should have default position classes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content?.className).to.include('bottom');
      expect(content?.className).to.include('start');
    });

    it('should update position classes based on placement', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open placement="start">
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content?.className).to.include('start');
    });

    it('should recalculate position when opened', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Very long content that might overflow</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      // Position should be calculated
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content).to.exist;
      expect(content?.className).to.include('bottom');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update open state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('open')).to.be.false;

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('open')).to.be.true;

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content).to.exist;
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update placement property dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.placement).to.equal('end');

      element.placement = 'start';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.placement).to.equal('start');

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
      expect(content?.className).to.include('start');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handling and cleanup', () => {
    it('should handle scroll and resize events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      // Trigger scroll event
      const scrollEvent = new Event('scroll');
      window.dispatchEvent(scrollEvent);

      // Trigger resize event
      const resizeEvent = new Event('resize');
      window.dispatchEvent(resizeEvent);

      // Should not throw errors and dropdown should still be open
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should clean up event listeners on disconnect', async () => {
      let removeEventListenerCalled = false;
      const originalRemoveEventListener = window.removeEventListener;
      window.removeEventListener = (type: string, listener: any, options?: any) => {
        if (type === 'scroll' || type === 'resize') {
          removeEventListenerCalled = true;
        }
        originalRemoveEventListener.call(window, type, listener, options);
      };

      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      element.remove();

      expect(removeEventListenerCalled).to.be.true;

      window.removeEventListener = originalRemoveEventListener;
    });
  });

  describe('Trigger slot handling', () => {
    it('should handle trigger elements properly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Custom Trigger</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const triggerButton = element.querySelector('button[slot="trigger"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(triggerButton).to.exist;
      expect(triggerButton.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Trigger');
    });

    it('should handle slotted elements being clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <div slot="trigger">
            <span>Clickable Content</span>
          </div>
          <div>Dropdown Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const triggerDiv = element.querySelector('div[slot="trigger"]') as HTMLElement;
      triggerDiv.click();

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should prevent event propagation from slotted triggers', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      let outsideClickHandled = false;
      element.addEventListener('click', () => {
        outsideClickHandled = true;
      });

      const triggerButton = element.querySelector('button[slot="trigger"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      triggerButton.click();

      // Event should be stopped from propagating
      expect(outsideClickHandled).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Content rendering and slots', () => {
    it('should render default slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Default slot content</div>
          <p>More content</p>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent).to.include('Default slot content');
      expect(element.textContent).to.include('More content');
    });

    it('should support complex content structures', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Menu</button>
          <ul>
            <li><a href="#">Item 1</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">Item 2</a></li>
            <li><a href="#">Item 3</a></li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const list = element.querySelector('ul');
      const items = element.querySelectorAll('li');

      expect(list).to.exist;
      expect(items).to.have.length(3);
    });
  });

  describe('Auto-close behavior', () => {
    it('should close dropdown when clicking on list item by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>Item 1</li>
            <li>Item 2</li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.keepopen).to.be.false;

      const listItem = element.querySelector('li') as HTMLElement;
      listItem.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should keep dropdown open when keepopen is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open keepopen>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>Item 1</li>
            <li>Item 2</li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.keepopen).to.be.true;

      const listItem = element.querySelector('li') as HTMLElement;
      listItem.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update keepopen property dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>Item 1</li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.keepopen).to.be.false;

      element.keepopen = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.keepopen).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('keepopen')).to.be.true;

      const listItem = element.querySelector('li') as HTMLElement;
      listItem.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should close on clicking elements with role="menuitem"', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div role="menuitem">
            <span>Menu item content</span>
          </div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const menuItemChild = element.querySelector('span') as HTMLElement;
      menuItemChild.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should close on clicking li elements', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>List item</li>
            <li>Another item</li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const listItem = element.querySelector('li') as HTMLElement;
      listItem.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should close on clicking elements with data-dropdown-close', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>
            <button data-dropdown-close>Close dropdown</button>
            <span>Other content</span>
          </div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const closeButton = element.querySelector('[data-dropdown-close]') as HTMLElement;
      closeButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not close on clicking non-matching elements', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>
            <p>Regular paragraph</p>
            <span>Regular span</span>
          </div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const paragraph = element.querySelector('p') as HTMLElement;
      paragraph.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const span = element.querySelector('span') as HTMLElement;
      span.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should close when list-menu-item-click event is dispatched', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      // Simulate list-menu-item-click event
      const customEvent = new CustomEvent('list-menu-item-click', {
        detail: { value: 'test-value', item: 'test-item' },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      element.dispatchEvent(customEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not close on custom event when keepopen is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open keepopen>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const customEvent = new CustomEvent('list-menu-item-click', {
        detail: { value: 'test-value' },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      element.dispatchEvent(customEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should work with mixed content types', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>
            <ul>
              <li>List item (should close)</li>
            </ul>
            <p>Paragraph (should not close)</p>
            <div role="menuitem">
              <span>Menu item content (should close)</span>
            </div>
            <button data-dropdown-close>Close button (should close)</button>
          </div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      // Test list item closes dropdown
      const listItem = element.querySelector('li') as HTMLElement;
      listItem.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      // Reopen and test paragraph doesn't close
      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      const paragraph = element.querySelector('p') as HTMLElement;
      paragraph.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      // Test menu item content closes
      const menuItemSpan = element.querySelector('[role="menuitem"] span') as HTMLElement;
      menuItemSpan.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      // Reopen and test close button
      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      const closeButton = element.querySelector('[data-dropdown-close]') as HTMLElement;
      closeButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should respect keepopen with all close trigger types', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open keepopen>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>
            <li>List item</li>
            <div role="menuitem">Menu item</div>
            <button data-dropdown-close>Close button</button>
          </div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      // All these should not close the dropdown when keepopen is true
      const elements = [
        element.querySelector('li'),
        element.querySelector('[role="menuitem"]'),
        element.querySelector('[data-dropdown-close]'),
      ] as HTMLElement[];

      for (const el of elements) {
        el.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);
        expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      }

      // Test custom event also respects keepopen
      const customEvent = new CustomEvent('list-menu-item-click', {
        detail: { value: 'test' },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      element.dispatchEvent(customEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle clicking on nested elements within close triggers', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>
              <span>
                <strong>Deeply nested text</strong>
              </span>
            </li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const deeplyNested = element.querySelector('strong') as HTMLElement;
      deeplyNested.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not interfere with existing click outside behavior', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>Item</li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      // Simulate clicking outside the dropdown
      const outsideClick = new MouseEvent('click', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      // Mock composedPath to simulate click outside
      Object.defineProperty(outsideClick, 'composedPath', {
        value: () => [document.body], // Path that doesn't include the dropdown
      });

      document.dispatchEvent(outsideClick);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle rapid clicks without errors', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <ul>
            <li>Item</li>
          </ul>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const listItem = element.querySelector('li') as HTMLElement;

      // Rapid clicks should not cause errors
      listItem.click();
      listItem.click();
      listItem.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('suppressTriggerKeys property', () => {
    it('should have default value of false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.suppressTriggerKeys).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should accept suppressTriggerKeys property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown suppressTriggerKeys>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.suppressTriggerKeys).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update suppressTriggerKeys dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.suppressTriggerKeys).to.be.false;

      element.suppressTriggerKeys = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.suppressTriggerKeys).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should prevent keyboard events when suppressTriggerKeys is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown suppressTriggerKeys>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      trigger.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      trigger.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should set tabindex to -1 when suppressTriggerKeys is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown suppressTriggerKeys>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should set tabindex to 0 when suppressTriggerKeys is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should update tabindex when suppressTriggerKeys changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      let trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');

      element.suppressTriggerKeys = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');

      element.suppressTriggerKeys = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should allow keyboard events when suppressTriggerKeys is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown suppressTriggerKeys>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      element.suppressTriggerKeys = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      trigger.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard navigation with nested elements', () => {
    it('should open dropdown when Enter is pressed on nested element within trigger', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <div slot="trigger">
            <input type="text" />
          </div>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const input = element.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      input.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should open dropdown when Space is pressed on nested element within trigger', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <div slot="trigger">
            <input type="text" />
          </div>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const input = element.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      input.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not open when keyboard event originates outside trigger', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <div>
          <col-dropdown>
            <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
            <div>Content</div>
          </col-dropdown>
          <button id="outside">Outside</button>
        </div>
      `);

      const dropdown = element.querySelector('col-dropdown') as ColDropdown;
      expect(dropdown.open).to.be.false;

      const outsideButton = element.querySelector('#outside') as HTMLButtonElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      outsideButton.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(dropdown);

      expect(dropdown.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle deeply nested trigger elements', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <div slot="trigger">
            <div>
              <span>
                <input type="text" />
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const input = element.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      input.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not open when already open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown open>
          <div slot="trigger">
            <input type="text" />
          </div>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const input = element.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      input.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should work with suppressTriggerKeys to prevent opening from nested elements', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown suppressTriggerKeys>
          <div slot="trigger">
            <input type="text" />
          </div>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const input = element.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      });

      input.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Component lifecycle', () => {
    it('should initialize properly after connection', async () => {
      const element = document.createElement('col-dropdown') as ColDropdown;
      element.innerHTML = `
        <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
        <div>Content</div>
      `;

      document.body.appendChild(element);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.remove();
    });

    it('should handle firstUpdated correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDropdown>(html`
        <col-dropdown>
          <button slot="trigger">Toggle</button>
          <div>Content</div>
        </col-dropdown>
      `);

      const trigger = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-trigger');
      expect(trigger).to.exist;
      expect(trigger?.hasAttribute('id')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/dropdown/col-dropdown.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColDropdownStyles } from './col-dropdown.styles';

const DEFAULT_CLOSE_SELECTORS = ['li', '[role="menuitem"] > *', '[data-dropdown-close]'] as const;
const LIST_MENU_ITEM_CUSTOM_EVENT = 'list-menu-item-click';

/**
 * Dropdown component for displaying contextual content triggered by user interaction.
 *
 * @element col-dropdown
 *
 * @summary A dropdown component that displays content in a positioned overlay with keyboard navigation and accessibility features.
 *
 * @slot trigger - The trigger element that opens/closes the dropdown
 * @slot - The dropdown content to display when open
 *
 * @csspart dropdown-trigger - The trigger element container
 * @csspart content - The dropdown content container
 *
 * @attr {boolean} open - Whether the dropdown is currently open
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the dropdown is disabled
 * @attr {string} placement - The placement of the dropdown content relative to the trigger
 * @attr {boolean} keepopen - Whether the dropdown should stay open when an item is selected
 * @attr {boolean} suppresstriggerkeys - Whether to suppress keyboard events (Enter/Space) on the trigger element
 *
 * @property {boolean} open - Whether the dropdown is currently open
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the dropdown is disabled
 * @property {string} placement - The placement of the dropdown content relative to the trigger
 * @property {boolean} keepopen - Whether the dropdown should stay open when an item is selected
 * @property {boolean} suppressTriggerKeys - Whether to suppress keyboard events (Enter/Space) on the trigger element. When true, the trigger tabindex is set to -1 and keyboard navigation is disabled. Useful when the trigger contains interactive elements like inputs that need their own keyboard handling.
 *
 * @fires open - Fired when the dropdown opens
 * @fires close - Fired when the dropdown closes
 *
 * @default false - Default open state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default 'end' - Default placement value
 * @default false - Default keepopen value
 * @default false - Default suppresstriggerkeys value
 */

@Meta({ name: 'dropdown' })
export class ColDropdown extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColDropdownStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  open: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  placement: string = 'end';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  keepopen: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  suppressTriggerKeys: boolean = false;

  @state()
  private _anchorId: string = `dropdown-anchor-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;

  @state()
  private _positionY: 'bottom' | 'top' = 'bottom';

  @state()
  private _alignX: string = 'start';

  private _contentId: string = `dropdown-content-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;

  private _handledByCustomEvent = false;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    document.addEventListener('click', this._handleDocumentClick);

    this.addEventListener(LIST_MENU_ITEM_CUSTOM_EVENT, this._handleItemSelect);

    // Listen for scroll and resize to recheck position
    window.addEventListener('scroll', this._handleScrollResize, true);
    window.addEventListener('resize', this._handleScrollResize);
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    document.removeEventListener('click', this._handleDocumentClick);
    document.removeEventListener('keydown', this._handleDocumentKeyDown);

    this.removeEventListener(LIST_MENU_ITEM_CUSTOM_EVENT, this._handleItemSelect);

    window.removeEventListener('scroll', this._handleScrollResize, true);
    window.removeEventListener('resize', this._handleScrollResize);
  }

  updated(changedProperties: Map<string, unknown>) {
    super.updated(changedProperties);

    if (changedProperties.has('open')) {
      if (this.open) {
        // Add document keydown listener when opened
        document.addEventListener('keydown', this._handleDocumentKeyDown);
        this.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('open', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      } else {
        // Remove document keydown listener when closed
        document.removeEventListener('keydown', this._handleDocumentKeyDown);
        this.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('close', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      }
    }

    // Handle placement property changes when dropdown is open
    if (changedProperties.has('placement') && this.open) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this._checkPosition();
      });
    }
  }

  private _handleScrollResize = () => {
    if (this.open) {
      this._checkPosition();
    }
  };

  private _handleDocumentKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (!this.open || this.disabled) return;

    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.open = false;
      this._focusTrigger();
    }
  };

  firstUpdated() {
    this._setupTriggerListener();
  }

  private _setupTriggerListener() {
    const slot = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="trigger"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    if (slot) {
      slot.addEventListener('slotchange', () => {
        const assignedElements = slot.assignedElements();
        assignedElements.forEach(element => {
          // Remove any existing listener to avoid duplicates
          element.removeEventListener('click', this._handleSlottedClick, true);
          // Add click listener in capture phase to catch it before col-button re-dispatches
          element.addEventListener('click', this._handleSlottedClick, true);
        });
      });
      // Initial setup
      const assignedElements = slot.assignedElements();
      assignedElements.forEach(element => {
        element.addEventListener('click', this._handleSlottedClick, true);
      });
    }
  }

  private _handleSlottedClick = (e: Event) => {
    const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
    if (target.dataset.dropdownIgnore !== undefined) {
      return;
    }

    e.stopPropagation();
    e.preventDefault();

    if (this.disabled) return;

    this.open = !this.open;
    if (this.open) {
      // Check position after opening
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this._checkPosition();
      });
    }
  };

  private _handleDocumentClick = (e: MouseEvent) => {
    if (!this.open) return;

    const path = e.composedPath();
    if (!path.includes(this)) {
      this.open = false;
    }
  };

  private _handleKeyDown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (this.disabled) return;
    if (this.suppressTriggerKeys) return;

    const trigger = this._getTriggerElement();
    if (!trigger) return;

    const path = e.composedPath();
    const triggerIndex = path.indexOf(trigger);
    const targetIndex = e.target ? path.indexOf(e.target) : -1;

    switch (e.key) {
      case 'Enter':
      case ' ':
        if (!this.open && triggerIndex !== -1 && targetIndex <= triggerIndex) {
          e.preventDefault();
          this.open = true;
          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
            this._checkPosition();
          });
        }
        break;
    }
  }

  private _checkPosition() {
    const trigger = this._getTriggerElement();
    const content = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dropdown-content') as HTMLElement;

    if (!trigger || !content) return;

    const triggerRect = trigger.getBoundingClientRect();

    // Reset to default alignment before measuring
    this._alignX = this.placement;

    // Force layout update to get accurate measurements
    content.style.visibility = 'hidden';
    content.style.display = 'block';

    const contentRect = content.getBoundingClientRect();

    content.style.visibility = '';
    content.style.display = '';

    const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
    const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
    const scrollbarWidth = window.innerWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth;
    const effectiveViewportWidth = viewportWidth - scrollbarWidth;

    // Check vertical space
    const spaceBelow = viewportHeight - triggerRect.bottom;
    const spaceAbove = triggerRect.top;

    // If not enough space below and more space above, flip to top
    if (spaceBelow < contentRect.height && spaceAbove > spaceBelow) {
      this._positionY = 'top';
    } else {
      this._positionY = 'bottom';
    }

    // Check horizontal space based on current alignment
    if (this._alignX === 'start') {
      const spaceRight = effectiveViewportWidth - triggerRect.left;

      // If dropdown would overflow on the right, switch to end alignment
      if (spaceRight < contentRect.width) {
        const spaceLeft = triggerRect.right;

        // Only switch to end if there's more space on the left
        if (spaceLeft >= contentRect.width || spaceLeft > spaceRight) {
          this._alignX = 'end';
        }
      }
    } else {
      // placement === 'end'
      const spaceLeft = triggerRect.right;

      // If dropdown would overflow on the left, switch to start alignment
      if (spaceLeft < contentRect.width) {
        const spaceRight = effectiveViewportWidth - triggerRect.left;

        // Only switch to start if there's more space on the right
        if (spaceRight >= contentRect.width || spaceRight > spaceLeft) {
          this._alignX = 'start';
        }
      }
    }
  }

  private get _triggerTabIndex(): string {
    return this.disabled || this.suppressTriggerKeys ? '-1' : '0';
  }

  private _getTriggerElement(): HTMLElement | null {
    return this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="dropdown-trigger"]') as HTMLElement;
  }

  private _focusTrigger() {
    const trigger = this._getTriggerElement();
    trigger?.focus();
  }

  private _handleItemSelect = () => {
    if (this.keepopen) return;

    this._closeDropdown();
    this._preventSelectorHandling();
  };

  private _handleContentClick = (e: Event) => {
    if (this._handledByCustomEvent || this.keepopen) return;

    const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
    if (this._shouldCloseOnClick(target)) {
      this._closeDropdown();
    }
  };

  private _closeDropdown() {
    this.open = false;
  }

  private _preventSelectorHandling() {
    this._handledByCustomEvent = true;
    setTimeout(() => {
      this._handledByCustomEvent = false;
    }, 0);
  }

  private _shouldCloseOnClick(target: HTMLElement): boolean {
    return (
      target.matches(DEFAULT_CLOSE_SELECTORS.join(', ')) ||
      DEFAULT_CLOSE_SELECTORS.some(selector => target.closest(selector))
    );
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div class="dropdown-container">
        <div
          id="${this._anchorId}"
          part="dropdown-trigger"
          class="dropdown-trigger"
          @keydown="${this._handleKeyDown}"
          role="button"
          aria-haspopup="true"
          aria-expanded="${this.open}"
          aria-controls="${this._contentId}"
          aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
          tabindex="${this._triggerTabIndex}"
        >
          <slot name="trigger"></slot>
        </div>

        ${this.open
          ? html`
              <div
                id="${this._contentId}"
                part="content"
                class="dropdown-content ${this._positionY} ${this._alignX}"
                role="menu"
                aria-labelledby="${this._anchorId}"
                @click="${this._handleContentClick}"
              >
                <slot></slot>
              </div>
            `
          : nothing}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-dropdown': ColDropdown;
  }
}

import { css, unsafeCSS } from 'lit';
import { generateAllGridUtilities } from '@/styles/utils';
import { tokens } from '@/styles/tokens';

export const ColGridStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: contents;
  }

  .col-grid,
  .col-inline-grid {
    color: inherit;
    font-family: inherit;
  }

  ${unsafeCSS(generateAllGridUtilities(tokens))}
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/grid/col-grid.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColGrid } from './col-grid';

describe('ColGrid component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-grid')) {
      customElements.define('col-grid', ColGrid);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-grid').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid>
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Item 1');
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Item 2');

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(gridContainer).to.exist;
      expect(gridContainer?.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('div');

      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid');
      expect(className).to.not.include('col-inline-grid');
    });

    it('should render as inline grid when inline property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid inline>
          <div>Inline Item 1</div>
          <div>Inline Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-inline-grid');
      expect(className).to.not.include('col-grid');
    });

    it('should render with slot content projection', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="2">
          <div>First item</div>
          <div>Second item</div>
          <span>Third item</span>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;

      const slottedItems = element.querySelectorAll('div, span');
      expect(slottedItems).to.have.lengthOf(3);
      expect(slottedItems[0].textContent).to.equal('First item');
      expect(slottedItems[1].textContent).to.equal('Second item');
      expect(slottedItems[2].textContent).to.equal('Third item');
    });

    it('should render with specified columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="3">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-cols-3');
    });

    it('should render with specified gap', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid gap="l">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-gap-l');
    });

    it('should render with specified rows', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid rows="3">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-rows-3');
    });

    it('should render with separate column and row gaps', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid col-gap="l" row-gap="m">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
          <div>Item 4</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-gap-col-l');
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-gap-row-m');
    });

    it('should render with auto-fit columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid auto-fit="m">
          <div>Auto Item 1</div>
          <div>Auto Item 2</div>
          <div>Auto Item 3</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-cols-auto-fit-m');
    });

    it('should render with grid areas', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid areas="header-main">
          <div>Header content</div>
          <div>Main content</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-areas-header-main');
    });

    it('should render with multiple properties combined', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="4" rows="2" gap="xl" inline>
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
          <div>Item 4</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      const classList = className?.split(' ').filter(cls => cls.trim() !== '') || [];
      expect(classList).to.include('col-inline-grid');
      expect(classList).to.not.include('col-grid');
      expect(classList).to.include('col-grid-cols-4');
      expect(classList).to.include('col-grid-rows-2');
      expect(classList).to.include('col-grid-gap-xl');
    });
  });

  describe('Responsive behavior', () => {
    it('should render with sm responsive columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid sm="2">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-sm:grid-cols-2');
    });

    it('should render with md responsive columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid md="3">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-md:grid-cols-3');
    });

    it('should render with lg responsive columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid lg="4">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
          <div>Item 4</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-lg:grid-cols-4');
    });

    it('should render with xl responsive columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid xl="6">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
          <div>Item 4</div>
          <div>Item 5</div>
          <div>Item 6</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-xl:grid-cols-6');
    });

    it('should render with xxl responsive columns', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid xxl="12">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
          <div>Item 4</div>
          <div>Item 5</div>
          <div>Item 6</div>
          <div>Item 7</div>
          <div>Item 8</div>
          <div>Item 9</div>
          <div>Item 10</div>
          <div>Item 11</div>
          <div>Item 12</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-2xl:grid-cols-12');
    });

    it('should render with multiple responsive breakpoints', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="1" md="2" lg="4" xl="6">
          <div>Responsive Item 1</div>
          <div>Responsive Item 2</div>
          <div>Responsive Item 3</div>
          <div>Responsive Item 4</div>
          <div>Responsive Item 5</div>
          <div>Responsive Item 6</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('col-grid-cols-1');
      expect(className).to.include('col-md:grid-cols-2');
      expect(className).to.include('col-lg:grid-cols-4');
      expect(className).to.include('col-xl:grid-cols-6');
    });

    it('should render responsive columns with other properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="1" lg="3" gap="m" inline>
          <div>Mixed Item 1</div>
          <div>Mixed Item 2</div>
          <div>Mixed Item 3</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      const className = gridContainer?.className;
      const classList = className?.split(' ').filter(cls => cls.trim() !== '') || [];
      expect(classList).to.include('col-inline-grid');
      expect(classList).to.not.include('col-grid');
      expect(classList).to.include('col-grid-cols-1');
      expect(classList).to.include('col-lg:grid-cols-3');
      expect(classList).to.include('col-grid-gap-m');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have role="grid" by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="2">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(gridContainer?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('grid');
    });

    it('should apply aria-label when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid aria-label="Product grid" cols="3">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
          <div>Item 3</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(gridContainer?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Product grid');
    });

    it('should apply aria-labelledby when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid aria-labelledby="grid-heading" cols="2">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(gridContainer?.getAttribute('aria-labelledby')).to.equal('grid-heading');
    });

    it('should not have aria-label or aria-labelledby when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGrid>(html`
        <col-grid cols="2">
          <div>Item 1</div>
          <div>Item 2</div>
        </col-grid>
      `);

      const gridContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(gridContainer?.hasAttribute('aria-label')).to.be.false;
      expect(gridContainer?.hasAttribute('aria-labelledby')).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/grid/col-grid.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { ColGridStyles } from './col-grid.styles';
import {
  Meta,
  ThemedComponent,
  Validate,
  GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS,
  LAYOUT_VALIDATION_ARRAYS,
} from '@/config';

/**
 * Grid component for creating CSS Grid layouts with responsive breakpoints.
 *
 * @element col-grid
 *
 * @summary A flexible grid component that provides CSS Grid functionality with responsive design and accessibility features.
 *
 * @slot - The grid items to be arranged in the grid layout
 *
 * @csspart grid - The main grid container element
 *
 * @attr {string} cols - The number of columns in the grid
 * @attr {string} rows - The number of rows in the grid
 * @attr {string} gap - The gap between grid items
 * @attr {string} col-gap - The gap between columns
 * @attr {string} row-gap - The gap between rows
 * @attr {boolean} inline - Whether to use inline-grid instead of grid
 * @attr {string} auto-fit - Auto-fit configuration for responsive columns
 * @attr {string} areas - Named grid areas configuration
 * @attr {string} sm - Small breakpoint column configuration
 * @attr {string} md - Medium breakpoint column configuration
 * @attr {string} lg - Large breakpoint column configuration
 * @attr {string} xl - Extra large breakpoint column configuration
 * @attr {string} xxl - 2XL breakpoint column configuration
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the grid
 * @attr {string} aria-labelledby - Reference to element that labels the grid
 *
 * @property {string} cols - The number of columns in the grid
 * @property {string} rows - The number of rows in the grid
 * @property {string} gap - The gap between grid items
 * @property {string} colGap - The gap between columns
 * @property {string} rowGap - The gap between rows
 * @property {boolean} inline - Whether to use inline-grid instead of grid
 * @property {string} autoFit - Auto-fit configuration for responsive columns
 * @property {string} areas - Named grid areas configuration
 * @property {string} sm - Small breakpoint column configuration
 * @property {string} md - Medium breakpoint column configuration
 * @property {string} lg - Large breakpoint column configuration
 * @property {string} xl - Extra large breakpoint column configuration
 * @property {string} xxl - 2XL breakpoint column configuration
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the grid
 * @property {string} ariaLabelledby - Reference to element that labels the grid
 *
 * @default '' - Default cols value
 * @default '' - Default rows value
 * @default '' - Default gap value
 * @default '' - Default colGap value
 * @default '' - Default rowGap value
 * @default false - Default inline state
 * @default '' - Default autoFit value
 * @default '' - Default areas value
 * @default '' - Default sm value
 * @default '' - Default md value
 * @default '' - Default lg value
 * @default '' - Default xl value
 * @default '' - Default xxl value
 * @default '' - Default ariaLabel value
 * @default '' - Default ariaLabelledby value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'grid' })
export class ColGrid extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColGridStyles];

  // Grid classes
  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.columns, '')
  cols!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.rows, '')
  rows!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(LAYOUT_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.gaps, '')
  gap!: string;

  @property({ attribute: 'col-gap', type: String })
  @Validate(LAYOUT_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.gaps, '')
  colGap!: string;

  @property({ attribute: 'row-gap', type: String })
  @Validate(LAYOUT_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.gaps, '')
  rowGap!: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  inline = false;

  @property({ attribute: 'auto-fit', type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.autofit, '')
  autoFit!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.areas, '')
  areas!: string;

  // Responsive classes
  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.columns, '')
  sm!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.columns, '')
  md!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.columns, '')
  lg!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.columns, '')
  xl!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.columns, '')
  xxl!: string;

  // Accessibility properties
  @property({ attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel!: string;

  @property({ attribute: 'aria-labelledby' })
  ariaLabelledby!: string;

  private get gridClasses() {
    return {
      'col-grid': !this.inline,
      'col-inline-grid': this.inline,
      [`col-grid-cols-${this.cols}`]: !!this.cols,
      [`col-grid-rows-${this.rows}`]: !!this.rows,
      [`col-grid-gap-${this.gap}`]: !!this.gap,
      [`col-grid-gap-col-${this.colGap}`]: !!this.colGap,
      [`col-grid-gap-row-${this.rowGap}`]: !!this.rowGap,
      [`col-grid-cols-auto-fit-${this.autoFit}`]: !!this.autoFit,
      [`col-grid-areas-${this.areas}`]: !!this.areas,
      [`col-sm:grid-cols-${this.sm}`]: !!this.sm,
      [`col-md:grid-cols-${this.md}`]: !!this.md,
      [`col-lg:grid-cols-${this.lg}`]: !!this.lg,
      [`col-xl:grid-cols-${this.xl}`]: !!this.xl,
      [`col-2xl:grid-cols-${this.xxl}`]: !!this.xxl,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        part="grid"
        class=${classMap(this.gridClasses)}
        role="grid"
        aria-label=${this.ariaLabel || nothing}
        aria-labelledby=${this.ariaLabelledby || nothing}
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-grid': ColGrid;
  }
}

import { css, unsafeCSS } from 'lit';
import { generateAllGridUtilities } from '@/styles/utils';
import { tokens } from '@/styles/tokens';

export const ColGridItemStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: contents;
  }

  div {
    color: inherit;
    font-family: inherit;
  }

  ${unsafeCSS(generateAllGridUtilities(tokens))}
`;
