FILE: src/components/atoms/grid-item/col-grid-item.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColGridItem } from './col-grid-item';

describe('ColGridItem', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-grid-item')) {
      customElements.define('col-grid-item', ColGridItem);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-grid-item').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html` <col-grid-item>Test content</col-grid-item> `);

      expect(el).to.exist;
      expect(el.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Test content');
    });

    it('should apply col-span class when colSpan prop is set', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html`
        <col-grid-item col-span="3">Test content</col-grid-item>
      `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.classList.contains('col-span-3')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply row-span class when rowSpan prop is set', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html`
        <col-grid-item row-span="2">Test content</col-grid-item>
      `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.classList.contains('row-span-2')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply grid area class when area prop is set', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html`
        <col-grid-item area="header">Test content</col-grid-item>
      `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.classList.contains('col-grid-area-header')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply multiple classes when multiple props are set', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html`
        <col-grid-item col-span="2" row-span="3" area="main">Test content</col-grid-item>
      `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.classList.contains('col-span-2')).to.be.true;
      expect(div?.classList.contains('row-span-3')).to.be.true;
      expect(div?.classList.contains('col-grid-area-main')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have role="gridcell" by default', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html` <col-grid-item>Test content</col-grid-item> `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('gridcell');
    });

    it('should apply aria-label when provided', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html`
        <col-grid-item aria-label="Product card">Test content</col-grid-item>
      `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Product card');
    });

    it('should not have aria-label when not provided', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html` <col-grid-item>Test content</col-grid-item> `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.hasAttribute('aria-label')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should combine accessibility with grid properties', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColGridItem>(html`
        <col-grid-item col-span="2" aria-label="Wide item">Content</col-grid-item>
      `);

      const div = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(div?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('gridcell');
      expect(div?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Wide item');
      expect(div?.classList.contains('col-span-2')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/grid-item/col-grid-item.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { ColGridItemStyles } from './col-grid-item.styles';
import {
  Meta,
  ThemedComponent,
  Validate,
  GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS,
  GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS,
} from '@/config';

/**
 * Grid item component for individual items within a CSS Grid layout.
 *
 * @element col-grid-item
 *
 * @summary A grid item component that defines the positioning and spanning behavior within a grid container.
 *
 * @slot - The content to be displayed within the grid item
 *
 * @csspart grid-item - The main grid item container element
 *
 * @attr {string} col-span - The number of columns this item should span
 * @attr {string} row-span - The number of rows this item should span
 * @attr {string} area - The named grid area this item should occupy
 * @attr {string} sm - Small breakpoint column span
 * @attr {string} md - Medium breakpoint column span
 * @attr {string} lg - Large breakpoint column span
 * @attr {string} xl - Extra large breakpoint column span
 * @attr {string} xxl - 2XL breakpoint column span
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the grid item
 *
 * @property {string} colSpan - The number of columns this item should span
 * @property {string} rowSpan - The number of rows this item should span
 * @property {string} area - The named grid area this item should occupy
 * @property {string} sm - Small breakpoint column span
 * @property {string} md - Medium breakpoint column span
 * @property {string} lg - Large breakpoint column span
 * @property {string} xl - Extra large breakpoint column span
 * @property {string} xxl - 2XL breakpoint column span
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the grid item
 *
 * @default '' - Default colSpan value
 * @default '' - Default rowSpan value
 * @default '' - Default area value
 * @default '' - Default sm value
 * @default '' - Default md value
 * @default '' - Default lg value
 * @default '' - Default xl value
 * @default '' - Default xxl value
 * @default '' - Default ariaLabel value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'grid-item' })
export class ColGridItem extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColGridItemStyles];

  // Base grid properties
  @property({ attribute: 'col-span', type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.colSpan, '')
  colSpan!: string;

  @property({ attribute: 'row-span', type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.rowSpan, '')
  rowSpan!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS.area, '')
  area!: string;

  // Responsive column span properties
  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.colSpan, '')
  sm!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.colSpan, '')
  md!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.colSpan, '')
  lg!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.colSpan, '')
  xl!: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS.colSpan, '')
  xxl!: string;

  // Accessibility properties
  @property({ attribute: 'aria-label', type: String })
  ariaLabel!: string;

  private get gridItemClasses() {
    return {
      [`col-span-${this.colSpan}`]: !!this.colSpan,
      [`row-span-${this.rowSpan}`]: !!this.rowSpan,
      [`col-grid-area-${this.area}`]: !!this.area,
      [`col-sm:span-${this.sm}`]: !!this.sm,
      [`col-md:span-${this.md}`]: !!this.md,
      [`col-lg:span-${this.lg}`]: !!this.lg,
      [`col-xl:span-${this.xl}`]: !!this.xl,
      [`col-2xl:span-${this.xxl}`]: !!this.xxl,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        part="grid-item"
        class=${classMap(this.gridItemClasses)}
        role="gridcell"
        aria-label=${this.ariaLabel || nothing}
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-grid-item': ColGridItem;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColGroupStyles = css`
  :host {
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  .group {
    width: 100%;

    .group-items {
      display: flex;
      width: 100%;
      gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
      margin: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} 0;

      &.vertical {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: stretch;
      }

      &.without-gap {
        gap: 0;
      }
    }

    .group-helper {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    }
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/group/col-group.test.ts

import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColGroup } from './col-group';

describe('ColGroup component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-group')) {
      customElements.define('col-group', ColGroup);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-group').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.label).to.equal('');
      expect(element.helper).to.equal('');
      expect(element.role).to.equal('group');
      expect(element.orientation).to.equal('horizontal');
      expect(element.withoutGap).to.be.false;

      const groupElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group');
      expect(groupElement).to.exist;
      expect(groupElement?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('group');
    });

    it('should render label when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group label="Test Label"></col-group>`);

      expect(element.label).to.equal('Test Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Label');
    });

    it('should render helper when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group helper="Helper text"></col-group>`);

      expect(element.helper).to.equal('Helper text');

      const helperElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper');
      expect(helperElement).to.exist;
      expect(helperElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Helper text');
    });

    it('should render both label and helper', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`
        <col-group label="Group Label" helper="Group Helper"></col-group>
      `);

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-label');
      const helperElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper');

      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
      expect(helperElement).to.exist;
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Group Label');
      expect(helperElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Group Helper');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should set aria-labelledby when label is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group label="Test Label"></col-group>`);

      const groupElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group');
      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-label');
      const labelId = labelElement?.getAttribute('id');

      expect(labelId).to.exist;
      expect(groupElement?.getAttribute('aria-labelledby')).to.equal(labelId);
    });

    it('should set aria-describedby when helper is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group helper="Helper text"></col-group>`);

      const groupElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group');
      const helperElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper');
      const helperId = helperElement?.getAttribute('id');

      expect(helperId).to.exist;
      expect(groupElement?.getAttribute('aria-describedby')).to.equal(helperId);
    });

    it('should set both aria attributes when label and helper are provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`
        <col-group label="Label" helper="Helper"></col-group>
      `);

      const groupElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group');
      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-label');
      const helperElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper');

      expect(groupElement?.getAttribute('aria-labelledby')).to.equal(
        labelElement?.getAttribute('id')
      );
      expect(groupElement?.getAttribute('aria-describedby')).to.equal(
        helperElement?.getAttribute('id')
      );
    });

    it('should have aria-live="polite" on helper element', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group helper="Helper"></col-group>`);

      const helperElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper');
      expect(helperElement?.getAttribute('aria-live')).to.equal('polite');
      expect(helperElement?.getAttribute('aria-atomic')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });

  describe('Orientation', () => {
    it('should apply horizontal class by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      const itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('horizontal')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply vertical class when orientation is vertical', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group orientation="vertical"></col-group>`);

      const itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('vertical')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update orientation dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      let itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('horizontal')).to.be.true;

      element.orientation = 'vertical';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('vertical')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Gap behavior', () => {
    it('should not have without-gap class by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      const itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('without-gap')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should apply without-gap class when withoutGap is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group withoutGap></col-group>`);

      const itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('without-gap')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update withoutGap dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      element.withoutGap = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const itemsElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-items');
      expect(itemsElement?.classList.contains('without-gap')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Slotted content', () => {
    it('should render slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`
        <col-group>
          <button>Button 1</button>
          <button>Button 2</button>
        </col-group>
      `);

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;

      const slottedElements = slot?.assignedElements();
      expect(slottedElements?.length).to.equal(2);
    });

    it('should update children attributes on slot change', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-group id="group">
            <button id="btn1">Button 1</button>
            <button id="btn2">Button 2</button>
          </col-group>
        </div>
      `);

      const btn1 = container.querySelector('#btn1');
      const btn2 = container.querySelector('#btn2');

      expect(btn1?.getAttribute('data-grouped')).to.equal('');
      expect(btn1?.getAttribute('data-orientation')).to.equal('horizontal');
      expect(btn1?.getAttribute('data-item')).to.equal('first');

      expect(btn2?.getAttribute('data-grouped')).to.equal('');
      expect(btn2?.getAttribute('data-orientation')).to.equal('horizontal');
      expect(btn2?.getAttribute('data-item')).to.equal('last');
    });

    it('should update children when orientation changes', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-group id="group">
            <button id="btn1">Button 1</button>
            <button id="btn2">Button 2</button>
          </col-group>
        </div>
      `);

      const group = container.querySelector('#group') as ColGroup;
      const btn1 = container.querySelector('#btn1');
      const btn2 = container.querySelector('#btn2');

      group.orientation = 'vertical';
      await elementUpdated(group);

      expect(btn1?.getAttribute('data-orientation')).to.equal('vertical');
      expect(btn2?.getAttribute('data-orientation')).to.equal('vertical');
    });

    it('should handle single child correctly', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-group id="group">
            <button id="btn1">Button 1</button>
          </col-group>
        </div>
      `);

      const btn1 = container.querySelector('#btn1');

      expect(btn1?.getAttribute('data-item')).to.equal('last');
    });

    it('should handle middle items correctly', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-group id="group">
            <button id="btn1">Button 1</button>
            <button id="btn2">Button 2</button>
            <button id="btn3">Button 3</button>
          </col-group>
        </div>
      `);

      const btn1 = container.querySelector('#btn1');
      const btn2 = container.querySelector('#btn2');
      const btn3 = container.querySelector('#btn3');

      expect(btn1?.getAttribute('data-item')).to.equal('first');
      expect(btn2?.getAttribute('data-item')).to.equal('middle');
      expect(btn3?.getAttribute('data-item')).to.equal('last');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update label dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-label')).to.not.exist;

      element.label = 'New Label';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('New Label');
    });

    it('should update helper dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper')).to.not.exist;

      element.helper = 'New Helper';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const helperElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group-helper');
      expect(helperElement).to.exist;
      expect(helperElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('New Helper');
    });

    it('should update role dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      element.role = 'radiogroup';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const groupElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.group');
      expect(groupElement?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('radiogroup');
    });
  });

  describe('Reflected properties', () => {
    it('should reflect label attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      element.label = 'Reflected Label';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.getAttribute('label')).to.equal('Reflected Label');
    });

    it('should reflect helper attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      element.helper = 'Reflected Helper';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.getAttribute('helper')).to.equal('Reflected Helper');
    });

    it('should reflect role attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      element.role = 'radiogroup';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('radiogroup');
    });

    it('should reflect withoutGap attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColGroup>(html`<col-group></col-group>`);

      element.withoutGap = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('withoutGap')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/group/col-group.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColGroupStyles } from './col-group.styles';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';

/**
 * Group component for organizing related form controls or UI elements.
 *
 * @element col-group
 *
 * @summary A container component that groups related elements with optional labels, helper text, and orientation control.
 *
 * @slot - The grouped elements to be contained and styled together
 *
 * @csspart group - The main group container element
 *
 * @attr {string} label - The label text for the group
 * @attr {string} helper - Helper text displayed below the group
 * @attr {string} role - The ARIA role for the group container
 * @attr {string} orientation - The orientation of grouped items (horizontal, vertical)
 * @attr {boolean} withoutgap - Whether to remove gaps between grouped items
 *
 * @property {string} label - The label text for the group
 * @property {string} helper - Helper text displayed below the group
 * @property {string} role - The ARIA role for the group container
 * @property {string} orientation - The orientation of grouped items (horizontal, vertical)
 * @property {boolean} withoutGap - Whether to remove gaps between grouped items
 *
 * @default '' - Default label value
 * @default '' - Default helper value
 * @default 'group' - Default role value
 * @default 'horizontal' - Default orientation value
 * @default false - Default withoutGap state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'group' })
export class ColGroup extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColGroupStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  label: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  helper: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  role: string = 'group';

  @property({ type: String })
  orientation: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  withoutGap: boolean = false;

  private _labelId = `group-label-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  private _helperId = `group-helper-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this._setupSlotListener();
  }

  firstUpdated() {
    this._updateChildren();
  }

  updated(changedProperties: Map<string, any>) {
    super.updated(changedProperties);

    if (changedProperties.has('orientation')) {
      this._updateChildren();
    }
  }

  private _setupSlotListener() {
    const slot = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
    if (slot) {
      slot.addEventListener('slotchange', () => {
        this._updateChildren();
      });
    }
  }

  private _updateChildren() {
    const slot = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
    if (!slot) return;

    const children = slot.assignedElements();

    children.forEach((child, index) => {
      child.setAttribute('data-grouped', '');
      child.setAttribute('data-orientation', this.orientation);
      child.setAttribute('data-item', 'middle');

      if (index === 0) {
        child.setAttribute('data-item', 'first');
      }
      if (index === children.length - 1) {
        child.setAttribute('data-item', 'last');
      }
    });
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        part="group"
        class="group"
        role="${this.role}"
        aria-labelledby="${this.label ? this._labelId : nothing}"
        aria-describedby="${this.helper ? this._helperId : nothing}"
      >
        ${this.label
          ? html`
              <col-typography
                id="${this._labelId}"
                class="group-label"
                aria-hidden="false"
                variant="label"
                element="label"
              >
                ${this.label}
              </col-typography>
            `
          : nothing}

        <div
          class=${classMap({
            'group-items': true,
            'without-gap': this.withoutGap,
            [this.orientation]: this.orientation,
          })}
          role="presentation"
        >
          <slot></slot>
        </div>

        ${this.helper
          ? html`
              <col-typography
                id="${this._helperId}"
                class="group-helper"
                aria-live="polite"
                aria-atomic="true"
                variant="helper"
                element="span"
              >
                ${this.helper}
              </col-typography>
            `
          : nothing}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-group': ColGroup;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColListMenuItemStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: flex;
    position: relative;
    width: -webkit-fill-available;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  .container {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: -webkit-fill-available;
  }

  .label-container {
    position: relative;
    width: -webkit-fill-available;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
  }

  .button-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: -webkit-fill-available;
    margin: 0;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    cursor: pointer;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};

    &:hover:not([data-disabled='true']) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
    }
    &:focus:not([data-disabled='true']),
    &:active:not([data-disabled='true']) {
      margin-top: 3px;
      margin-left: 3px;
      width: calc(100% - ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} * 2);
      height: calc(100% - 6px);
      padding: calc(${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} - 2px)
        calc(${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} - 3px);
    }
    &:focus:not([data-disabled='true']) {
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
    }
    &:active:not([data-disabled='true']) {
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.active')};
    }
    &[data-disabled='true'] {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }

    & * {
      font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
      font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
      line-height: 20px;
    }
  }

  a.button-container {
    text-decoration: none;
    outline: none;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    line-height: 20px;
    &[data-disabled='true'] {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }
  }

  .button-container.selected {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};

    &:hover:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    }
  }

  button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: -webkit-fill-available;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    background-color: transparent;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    outline: none;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};

    &:disabled {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }
  }

  button > p {
    margin: 0;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/list-menu-item/col-list-menu-item.test.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';

import { ColCheckbox, ColRadio, ColListMenu } from '@/components';
import { LIST_MENU_ITEM_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColListMenuItem } from './col-list-menu-item';

describe('ColListMenuItem component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-list-menu')) {
      customElements.define('col-list-menu', ColListMenu);
    }
    if (!customElements.get('col-list-menu-item')) {
      customElements.define('col-list-menu-item', ColListMenuItem);
    }
    if (!customElements.get('col-checkbox')) {
      customElements.define('col-checkbox', ColCheckbox);
    }
    if (!customElements.get('col-radio')) {
      customElements.define('col-radio', ColRadio);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-list-menu-item').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-checkbox').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-radio').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Default Rendering and Properties', () => {
    it('renders default ColListMenuItem with expected attributes and structure', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(html`<col-list-menu-item></col-list-menu-item>`);
      const container = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('option');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('false');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('data-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
      expect(container?.classList.contains('selected')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('renders variant="label" with expected label structure', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item variant="${LIST_MENU_ITEM_VARIANTS.LABEL}"
          >Title</col-list-menu-item
        >`
      );
      const labelContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label-container');
      expect(labelContainer).to.exist;
      expect(labelContainer?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('presentation');
    });

    it('renders inside parent with role="menu"', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item id="item"></col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('#item')!;
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('button');
      expect(button).to.exist;
      expect(button?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(button?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('renders inside parent with role="menu" for navigation lists', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item id="item" href="/test" newTab></col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('#item')!;
      const anchor = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchor).to.exist;
      expect(anchor?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('/test');
      expect(anchor?.getAttribute('target')).to.equal('_blank');
      expect(anchor?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(anchor?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });
  });

  describe('Slot rendering for ColListMenuItem', () => {
    it('renders default slot content in LABEL variant', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item variant="label">Label Content</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const slot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
      expect(slot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Label Content');
    });

    it('renders default slot content in default option role with BUTTON variant', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item>Button Content</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const slot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot') as HTMLSlotElement | null;
      expect(slot).to.exist;
      expect(slot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Button Content');
    });

    it('renders named slot content in default role with BUTTON variant', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item>
          Button Content
          <div slot="list-menu-item-slot">Named Slot</div>
        </col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const namedSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'slot[name="list-menu-item-slot"]'
      ) as HTMLSlotElement | null;
      expect(namedSlot).to.exist;
      expect(namedSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Named Slot');
    });

    it('renders default slot content in menu role with BUTTON variant (non-link)', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item>Menu Button Content</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const slot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('button slot') as HTMLSlotElement | null;
      expect(slot).to.exist;
      expect(slot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Menu Button Content');
    });

    it('renders named slot content in menu role with BUTTON variant (non-link)', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item>
            Menu Button Content
            <div slot="list-menu-item-slot">Named Slot</div>
          </col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const namedSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'slot[name="list-menu-item-slot"]'
      ) as HTMLSlotElement | null;
      expect(namedSlot).to.exist;
      expect(namedSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Named Slot');
    });

    it('renders default slot content in menu role with clickable <a> variant', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item href="/test" newTab>Link Content</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const slot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a slot') as HTMLSlotElement | null;
      expect(slot).to.exist;
      expect(slot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Link Content');
    });

    it('renders named slot content in menu role with clickable <a> variant', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item href="/test" newTab>
            Link Content
            <div slot="list-menu-item-slot">Named Slot</div>
          </col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const namedSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'slot[name="list-menu-item-slot"]'
      ) as HTMLSlotElement | null;
      expect(namedSlot).to.exist;
      expect(namedSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Named Slot');
    });
  });

  describe('Click event behavior in ColListMenuItem', () => {
    it('should not trigger click event for LABEL variant', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item variant="label">Label</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      let clicked = false;
      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', () => {
        clicked = true;
      });
      el.click();
      expect(clicked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should trigger click event for default role (role="option")', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item value="testValue">Item</col-list-menu-item>`
      );

      const buttonContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container') as HTMLElement;
      let detail: any;
      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        detail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      buttonContainer.click();
      expect(detail).to.deep.equal({ value: 'testValue', href: '', selected: true });
    });

    it('should not trigger click event for disabled default role (role="option")', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item disabled>Item</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      let clicked = false;
      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', () => {
        clicked = true;
      });
      el.click();
      expect(clicked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should trigger click event for role="menuitem" without link props', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item value="menuItem">Menu Item</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);

      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item') as ColListMenuItem;
      const buttonContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container') as HTMLElement;
      let detail: any;

      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        detail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      buttonContainer.click();
      expect(detail).to.deep.equal({ value: 'menuItem', href: '', selected: true });
    });

    it('should not trigger click event for disabled role="menuitem" without link props', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item disabled>Menu Item</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);

      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')! as ColListMenuItem;
      const buttonContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container') as HTMLElement;
      let clicked = false;

      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', () => {
        clicked = true;
      });

      buttonContainer.click();
      expect(clicked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should trigger click event for role="menuitem" with href and newTab', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item href="/page" newTab value="linkItem">Link Item</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);

      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')! as ColListMenuItem;
      const buttonContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container') as HTMLElement;
      let detail: any;

      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        detail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      buttonContainer.click();
      expect(detail).to.deep.equal({ value: 'linkItem', href: '/page', selected: true });
    });

    it('should not trigger click event for disabled role="menuitem" with href', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item href="/page" disabled>Link Item</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')! as ColListMenuItem;
      let clicked = false;
      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', () => {
        clicked = true;
      });
      el.click();
      expect(clicked).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Selected state coverage', () => {
    it('should apply the "selected" class when selected is true (BUTTON variant)', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html` <col-list-menu-item selected></col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const buttonContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container');
      expect(buttonContainer).to.have.class('selected');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility (ARIA) Tests', () => {
    it('should set aria-disabled="false" and tabindex="0" for BUTTON variant with role="option"', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item>Button</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container');
      expect(button).to.exist;
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('aria-disabled', 'false');
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '0');
    });

    it('should set aria-selected="true" when selected and not disabled (role="option")', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item selected>Item</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container');
      expect(button?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('true');
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '0');
    });

    it('should set aria-selected="false" and tabindex="-1" when disabled (role="option")', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item disabled>Item</col-list-menu-item>`
      );
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.button-container');
      expect(button?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('false');
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '-1');
    });

    it('should set aria-disabled="false" and tabindex="0" for BUTTON variant with role="menuitem" and no href', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item>Menu Button</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('button');
      expect(button).to.exist;
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('aria-disabled', 'false');
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '0');
    });

    it('should set aria-disabled="false" and tabindex="0" for BUTTON variant with role="menuitem" and href', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item href="/test" newTab>Link</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const anchor = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchor).to.exist;
      expect(anchor).to.have.attribute('aria-disabled', 'false');
      expect(anchor).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '0');
      expect(anchor).to.have.attribute('href', '/test');
      expect(anchor).to.have.attribute('target', '_blank');
    });

    it('should set aria-disabled="true" and tabindex="-1" when disabled (role="menuitem", no href)', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item disabled>Item</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('button');
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
      expect(button).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '-1');
    });

    it('should set aria-disabled="true" and tabindex="-1" when disabled (role="menuitem", with href)', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu role="menu">
          <col-list-menu-item href="/test" newTab disabled>Item</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const el = container.querySelector('col-list-menu-item')!;
      const anchor = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchor).to.have.attribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
      expect(anchor).to.have.attribute('tabindex', '-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard Navigation Tests', () => {
    it('should navigate to next item on ArrowDown key', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item3" value="3">Item 3</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const item2 = container.querySelector('#item2') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      const focusTarget2 = item2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      // Focus first item
      focusTarget1.focus();
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item1);
      // Press ArrowDown
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget1.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should focus second item
      await item2.updateComplete;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item2);
      expect(focusTarget2).to.equal(item2.shadowRoot?.activeElement);
    });
    it('should navigate to previous item on ArrowUp key', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item3" value="3">Item 3</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item2 = container.querySelector('#item2') as ColListMenuItem;
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget2 = item2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      // Focus second item
      focusTarget2.focus();
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item2);
      // Press ArrowUp
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget2.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should focus first item
      await item1.updateComplete;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item1);
      expect(focusTarget1).to.equal(item1.shadowRoot?.activeElement);
    });

    it('should wrap around to first item when pressing ArrowDown on last item', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item3" value="3">Item 3</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item3 = container.querySelector('#item3') as ColListMenuItem;
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget3 = item3.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      // Focus last item
      focusTarget3.focus();
      // Press ArrowDown
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget3.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should wrap to first item
      await item1.updateComplete;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item1);
      expect(focusTarget1).to.equal(item1.shadowRoot?.activeElement);
    });

    it('should wrap around to last item when pressing ArrowUp on first item', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item3" value="3">Item 3</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const item3 = container.querySelector('#item3') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      const focusTarget3 = item3.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      // Focus first item
      focusTarget1.focus();
      // Press ArrowUp
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget1.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should wrap to last item
      await item3.updateComplete;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item3);
      expect(focusTarget3).to.equal(item3.shadowRoot?.activeElement);
    });

    it('should skip disabled items during keyboard navigation', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2" disabled>Item 2 (disabled)</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item3" value="3">Item 3</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const item3 = container.querySelector('#item3') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      const focusTarget3 = item3.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      // Focus first item
      focusTarget1.focus();
      // Press ArrowDown
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget1.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should skip disabled item2 and focus item3
      await item3.updateComplete;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item3);
      expect(focusTarget3).to.equal(item3.shadowRoot?.activeElement);
    });

    it('should not navigate when no parent element exists', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(html` <col-list-menu-item></col-list-menu-item>`);
      const focusTarget = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      focusTarget.focus();
      const initialActiveElement = document.activeElement;
      // Press ArrowDown
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should remain focused on same element
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(initialActiveElement);
    });

    it('should not respond to other keys', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      focusTarget1.focus();
      const initialActiveElement = document.activeElement;
      // Press a random key
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'a', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget1.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should remain focused on same element
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(initialActiveElement);
    });

    it('should work with clickable items (href variant)', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" href="/page1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" href="/page2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1') as ColListMenuItem;
      const item2 = container.querySelector('#item2') as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget1 = item1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      const focusTarget2 = item2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      // Focus first item
      focusTarget1.focus();
      // Press ArrowDown
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget1.dispatchEvent(event);
      // Should focus second item
      await item2.updateComplete;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(item2);
      expect(focusTarget2).to.equal(item2.shadowRoot?.activeElement);
    });
  });

  describe('Controller integration', () => {
    it('should ignore click on interactive element in slot', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(html`
        <col-list-menu-item>
          <col-button slot="list-menu-item-slot" id="actionBtn">Action</col-button>
        </col-list-menu-item>
      `);
      let fired = false;
      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', () => {
        fired = true;
      });
      const btn = el.querySelector('#actionBtn') as HTMLElement;
      btn.click();
      await el.updateComplete;
      expect(fired).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not ignore click on non-interactive element in slot', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(html`
        <col-list-menu-item>
          <col-tag slot="list-menu-item-slot" id="infoTag">Info</col-tag>
        </col-list-menu-item>
      `);
      let fired = false;
      el.addEventListener('list-menu-item-click', () => {
        fired = true;
      });
      const tag = el.querySelector('#infoTag') as HTMLElement;
      tag.click();
      await el.updateComplete;
      expect(fired).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Context integration', () => {
    it('should consume menuItems from context when inside ColListMenu', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <col-list-menu>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item1" value="1">Item 1</col-list-menu-item>
          <col-list-menu-item id="item2" value="2">Item 2</col-list-menu-item>
        </col-list-menu>
      `);
      const item1 = container.querySelector('#item1')! as ColListMenuItem;
      expect(item1.context.menuItems.length).to.equal(2);
    });

    it('should not throw when context is missing', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture<ColListMenuItem>(
        html`<col-list-menu-item value="solo">Solo</col-list-menu-item>`
      )) as ColListMenuItem;
      const focusTarget = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[tabindex="0"]') as HTMLElement;
      focusTarget.focus();
      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', bubbles: true });
      focusTarget.dispatchEvent(event);
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/list-menu-item/col-list-menu-item.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property, queryAssignedElements } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';

import { ColTypography } from '@/components/atoms/typography';
import {
  Meta,
  FormComponent,
  listMenuContext,
  ListMenuContextValue,
  ListMenuController,
  LinkHandlerController,
  Validate,
} from '@/config';
import { getEnumValues, LIST_MENU_ITEM_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

import { ColListMenuItemStyles } from './col-list-menu-item.styles';

export interface ListMenuItemClickDetail {
  value: string;
  href?: string;
  selected: boolean;
}

/**
 * List menu item component for navigation and selection within col-list-menu.
 *
 * @element col-list-menu-item
 *
 * @summary A menu item component that supports navigation, selection, and keyboard interaction within col-list-menu.
 *
 * @slot - The main content of the menu item.
 * @slot list-menu-item-slot - Additional content slot for the menu item (right-aligned, for interactive or status elements).
 *
 * @csspart list-menu-item - The main menu item element.
 * @csspart list-menu-item-button - The button element (when variant is button).
 * @csspart list-menu-item-label - The label element (when variant is label).
 *
 * @attr {string} href - The URL for the menu item link.
 * @attr {boolean} newtab - Whether to open the link in a new tab.
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the menu item is disabled.
 * @attr {boolean} router - Whether to use router navigation instead of regular links.
 * @attr {boolean} selected - Whether the menu item is selected.
 * @attr {string} variant - The variant of the menu item (`button`, `label`).
 * @attr {string} value - A value identifier for the menu item.
 *
 * @property {string} href - The URL for the menu item link.
 * @property {boolean} newTab - Whether to open the link in a new tab.
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the menu item is disabled.
 * @property {boolean} router - Whether to use router navigation instead of regular links.
 * @property {boolean} selected - Whether the menu item is selected.
 * @property {string} variant - The variant of the menu item (`button`, `label`).
 * @property {string} value - A value identifier for the menu item.
 *
 * @fires list-menu-item-click - Fired when the menu item is clicked. Event detail: ListMenuItemClickDetail.
 *
 * @default '' href - Default href value.
 * @default false newTab - Default newTab state.
 * @default false disabled - Default disabled state.
 * @default false router - Default router state.
 * @default false selected - Default selected state.
 * @default 'button' variant - Default variant value.
 * @default '' value - Default value.
 */
const TAG_NAME = 'list-menu-item';
@Meta({ name: TAG_NAME, components: [ColTypography] })
export class ColListMenuItem extends FormComponent {
  static styles = [ColListMenuItemStyles];

  private linkHandler = new LinkHandlerController(this);
  private listMenuController = new ListMenuController(this, () => this.context);

  @consume({ context: listMenuContext })
  context!: ListMenuContextValue;

  @property({ type: String })
  get href(): string {
    return this.linkHandler.href;
  }
  set href(value: string) {
    this.linkHandler.href = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  get newTab(): boolean {
    return this.linkHandler.newTab;
  }
  set newTab(value: boolean) {
    this.linkHandler.newTab = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  router = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  selected: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(LIST_MENU_ITEM_VARIANTS), LIST_MENU_ITEM_VARIANTS.BUTTON)
  variant!: string;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  value!: string;

  @queryAssignedElements({ slot: 'list-menu-item-slot', flatten: true })
  private assignedSlotElements!: HTMLElement[];

  private interactiveSlotElements: HTMLElement[] = [];

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();

    const slot = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="list-menu-item-slot"]');
    slot?.addEventListener('slotchange', () => {
      this.updateInteractiveSlotElements();
    });

    this.updateInteractiveSlotElements();
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'button-container': true,
      selected: this.selected,
    };
  }

  private updateInteractiveSlotElements() {
    const slotElements = this.assignedSlotElements?.length
      ? this.assignedSlotElements
      : (Array.from(this.querySelectorAll('[slot="list-menu-item-slot"]')) as HTMLElement[]);

    this.interactiveSlotElements = slotElements.filter(el =>
      ['col-button', 'col-checkbox', 'col-radio'].includes(el.tagName.toLowerCase())
    );
  }

  private isClickOnInteractiveSlot(target: Node): boolean {
    return this.interactiveSlotElements.some(el => el.contains(target));
  }

  private handleClick(e: Event) {
    if (this.isClickOnInteractiveSlot(e.target as Node)) return;

    if (this.disabled) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      return;
    }

    const detail: ListMenuItemClickDetail = {
      value: this.value || this.href || '',
      href: this.href,
      selected: !this.selected,
    };

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('list-menu-item-click', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private handleKeyDown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    const items = this.context?.menuItems?.filter(item => !item.disabled) ?? [];
    const currentItem = items.find(item => item.value === this.value);
    if (currentItem) {
      const currentIndex = items.indexOf(currentItem);
      this.listMenuController.handleKeyNavigation(e, items, currentIndex, () =>
        this.handleClick(e)
      );
    }
  }

  private renderLabelVariant() {
    return html`
      <div class="label-container" role="presentation">
        <col-typography variant="label" part="list-menu-item-label">
          <slot></slot>
        </col-typography>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  private renderMenuItemLink() {
    const { href, target, rel, download } = this.linkHandler.getLinkAttributes();
    const tabIndex = this.listMenuController.getTabIndex(this.disabled);

    return html`
      <a
        part="list-menu-item"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        href=${href || '#'}
        target=${target}
        rel=${rel}
        download=${download}
        @click=${this.handleClick}
        @keydown=${this.handleKeyDown}
        role="menuitem"
        data-disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
        tabindex=${tabIndex}
      >
        <slot></slot>
        <col-spacer></col-spacer>
        <slot name="list-menu-item-slot" class="list-menu-item-slot"></slot>
      </a>
    `;
  }

  private renderMenuItemButton() {
    const tabIndex = this.listMenuController.getTabIndex(this.disabled);

    return html`
      <div
        part="list-menu-item"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        @click=${this.handleClick}
        @keydown=${this.handleKeyDown}
        role="menuitem"
        data-disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
        tabindex=${tabIndex}
      >
        <button
          part="list-menu-item-button"
          ?disabled=${this.disabled}
          aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
          tabindex=${tabIndex}
        >
          <slot></slot>
        </button>
        <col-spacer></col-spacer>
        <slot name="list-menu-item-slot" class="list-menu-item-slot"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  private renderOptionRole() {
    const ariaSelected = this.listMenuController.getAriaSelected(this.selected);
    const tabIndex = this.listMenuController.getTabIndex(this.disabled);

    return html`
      <div
        part="list-menu-item"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        @click=${this.handleClick}
        @keydown=${this.handleKeyDown}
        role="option"
        aria-selected=${ariaSelected}
        data-disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
        tabindex=${tabIndex}
      >
        <slot></slot>
        <col-spacer></col-spacer>
        <slot name="list-menu-item-slot" class="list-menu-item-slot"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  render() {
    if (this.variant === LIST_MENU_ITEM_VARIANTS.LABEL) {
      return this.renderLabelVariant();
    }

    const role = this.listMenuController.role;
    const isClickable = (this.href || this.router) && !this.selected;

    if (role === 'menuitem') {
      return isClickable ? this.renderMenuItemLink() : this.renderMenuItemButton();
    }

    return this.renderOptionRole();
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-list-menu-item': ColListMenuItem;
  }
}

export * from './col-list-menu-item';

FILE: src/components/atoms/overlay/col-overlay.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColOverlayStyles = css`
  :host {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: var(--col-overlay-z-index, 1000);
    display: none;
  }

  :host([active]) {
    display: block;
  }

  .overlay-backdrop {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.alpha.black-50')};
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  :host([active]) .overlay-backdrop {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  :host([nobackdrop]) .overlay-backdrop {
    display: none;
  }

  .overlay-content {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    pointer-events: auto;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
  }

  :host([active]) .overlay-content {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* No centered mode - removes centering transforms */
  :host([nocentered]) .overlay-content {
    position: absolute;
    transform: none;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  /* Absolute positioning */
  :host([absolute]) {
    position: absolute;
  }

  /* Contained overlay */
  :host([contained]) {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
  }

  /* Persistent overlay (prevents backdrop clicks from closing) */
  :host([persistent]) .overlay-backdrop {
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Custom z-index */
  :host([z-index]) {
    z-index: var(--col-overlay-z-index, 1000);
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .overlay-backdrop {
      transition: none;
    }
  }
`;
