FILE: src/components/atoms/overlay/col-overlay.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColOverlay } from './col-overlay';

describe('ColOverlay component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-overlay')) {
      customElements.define('col-overlay', ColOverlay);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-overlay').forEach(el => el.remove());
    // Reset body overflow
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Overlay content</col-overlay> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element.absolute).to.be.false;
      expect(element.contained).to.be.false;
      expect(element.persistent).to.be.false;
      expect(element.noBackdrop).to.be.false;
      expect(element.noCentered).to.be.false;
      expect(element.noFocusTrap).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not render backdrop and content when inactive', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop');
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-content');

      expect(backdrop).to.not.exist;
      expect(content).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render backdrop and content when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop');
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-content');

      expect(backdrop).to.exist;
      expect(content).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <div id="test-content">Test content</div>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      const slottedContent = element.querySelector('#test-content');
      expect(slottedContent).to.exist;
      expect(slottedContent?.textContent).to.equal('Test content');
    });

    it('should render activator slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay>
          <button slot="activator">Open</button>
          <div>Overlay content</div>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      const activator = element.querySelector('[slot="activator"]');
      expect(activator).to.exist;
      expect(activator?.textContent).to.equal('Open');
    });
  });

  describe('Active state management', () => {
    it('should toggle active state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.false;

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.true;

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should maintain visibility state during transitions', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.true;

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop');
      expect(backdrop).to.exist;

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Body scroll management', () => {
    it('should block body scroll when active', async () => {
      const originalOverflow = document.body.style.overflow;

      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal('hidden');

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal(originalOverflow);
    });

    it('should restore original body overflow value', async () => {
      document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';

      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal('hidden');

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal('');
    });

    it('should restore body overflow on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal('hidden');

      element.disconnectedCallback();
      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal('');
    });
  });

  describe('Backdrop interaction', () => {
    it('should close overlay when clicking backdrop', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop') as HTMLElement;
      expect(backdrop).to.exist;

      backdrop.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not close when persistent is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active persistent>Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop') as HTMLElement;
      backdrop.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should emit overlay-click-outside event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop') as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => backdrop.click());
      const event = await oneEvent(element, 'overlay-click-outside');

      expect(event).to.exist;
      expect(event.detail.overlay).to.equal(element);
      expect(event.detail.originalEvent).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not close when clicking content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <div id="content">Content</div>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      const content = element.querySelector('#content') as HTMLElement;
      content.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Escape key handling', () => {
    it('should close overlay on Escape key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Escape',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not close on Escape when persistent', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active persistent>Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Escape',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should emit overlay-escape event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      setTimeout(() => {
        const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
          key: 'Escape',
          bubbles: true,
        });
        document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      });

      const event = await oneEvent(element, 'overlay-escape');

      expect(event).to.exist;
      expect(event.detail.overlay).to.equal(element);
      expect(event.detail.originalEvent).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not respond to Escape when inactive', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      let eventFired = false;
      element.addEventListener('overlay-escape', () => {
        eventFired = true;
      });

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Escape',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(eventFired).to.be.false;
      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should remove escape listener on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.disconnectedCallback();

      // After disconnect, escape should not affect the element
      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Escape',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);

      // Element should remain active since listener was removed
      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Focus trap', () => {
    it('should initialize focus trap when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      // Wait for focus trap initialization
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not initialize focus trap when noFocusTrap is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active nofocustrap>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;
    });

    it('should destroy focus trap on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));

      const focusTrap = element['_focusTrap'];
      expect(focusTrap).to.exist;

      let destroyCalled = false;
      if (focusTrap) {
        const originalDestroy = focusTrap.destroy;
        focusTrap.destroy = function () {
          destroyCalled = true;
          originalDestroy.call(this);
        };
      }

      element.disconnectedCallback();

      expect(destroyCalled).to.be.true;
      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;
    });

    it('should handle focus trap property changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));
      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.exist;

      // Disable focus trap
      element.noFocusTrap = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;

      // Re-enable focus trap
      element.noFocusTrap = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));
      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.exist;
    });

    it('should deactivate focus trap when overlay becomes inactive', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));

      const focusTrap = element['_focusTrap'];
      expect(focusTrap).to.exist;

      let deactivateCalled = false;
      if (focusTrap) {
        focusTrap.deactivate = function () {
          deactivateCalled = true;
        };
      }

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(deactivateCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should provide updateFocusTrap method', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 150));

      const focusTrap = element['_focusTrap'];
      expect(focusTrap).to.exist;

      let updateCalled = false;
      if (focusTrap) {
        focusTrap.updateTrap = function () {
          updateCalled = true;
        };
      }

      element.updateFocusTrap();
      expect(updateCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not update focus trap when noFocusTrap is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay active nofocustrap>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-overlay>
      `);

      // Should not throw error even when focus trap is null
      expect(() => element.updateFocusTrap()).to.not.throw();
    });
  });

  describe('Properties', () => {
    it('should reflect absolute property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay absolute>Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('absolute')).to.be.true;
      expect(element.absolute).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should reflect contained property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay contained>Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('contained')).to.be.true;
      expect(element.contained).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should reflect no-backdrop property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay nobackdrop>Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('nobackdrop')).to.be.true;
      expect(element.noBackdrop).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should reflect no-centered property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay nocentered>Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('nocentered')).to.be.true;
      expect(element.noCentered).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply custom z-index', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html`
        <col-overlay z-index="9999">Content</col-overlay>
      `);

      expect(element.zIndex).to.equal(9999);
      expect(element.style.getPropertyValue('--col-overlay-z-index')).to.equal('9999');
    });

    it('should update z-index dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.zIndex = 5000;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.style.getPropertyValue('--col-overlay-z-index')).to.equal('5000');
    });
  });

  describe('ARIA attributes', () => {
    it('should have correct ARIA attributes when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-content');
      expect(content?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('dialog');
      expect(content?.getAttribute('aria-modal')).to.equal('true');
      expect(content?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have correct ARIA attributes when inactive', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-content');

      // Content should not exist when inactive
      expect(content).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should update aria-modal based on active state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-content');
      expect(content?.getAttribute('aria-modal')).to.equal('true');

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      // After becoming inactive, content should not render
      const inactiveContent = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-content');
      expect(inactiveContent).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle rapid active state changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      // Rapidly toggle active state
      element.active = true;
      element.active = false;
      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.true;
      expect(document.body.style.overflow).to.equal('hidden');

      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element['_isVisible']).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle multiple event listeners', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      let clickOutsideCount = 0;
      let escapeCount = 0;

      element.addEventListener('overlay-click-outside', () => clickOutsideCount++);
      element.addEventListener('overlay-escape', () => escapeCount++);

      // Click backdrop
      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop') as HTMLElement;
      backdrop.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(clickOutsideCount).to.equal(1);

      // Reset and test escape
      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Escape',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(escapeCount).to.equal(1);
    });

    it('should stop event propagation on backdrop click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay active>Content</col-overlay> `);

      let _parentClicked = false;
      document.body.addEventListener('click', () => {
        _parentClicked = true;
      });

      const backdrop = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.overlay-backdrop') as HTMLElement;
      const event = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });

      // Spy on stopPropagation
      let stopPropagationCalled = false;
      const originalStopPropagation = event.stopPropagation;
      event.stopPropagation = function () {
        stopPropagationCalled = true;
        originalStopPropagation.call(this);
      };

      backdrop.dispatchEvent(event);

      expect(stopPropagationCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle undefined zIndex', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColOverlay>(html` <col-overlay>Content</col-overlay> `);

      expect(element.zIndex).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element.style.getPropertyValue('--col-overlay-z-index')).to.equal('');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/overlay/col-overlay.ts
================================================
import { html, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property, state, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColOverlayStyles } from './col-overlay.styles';
import { FocusTrap } from '@/utils/accessibility';

/**
 * Overlay component that creates a backdrop and positions content over the page.
 *
 * @element col-overlay
 *
 * @summary A flexible overlay component for modals, dialogs, loading states, and tooltips.
 *
 * @slot - The overlay content
 * @slot activator - The element that triggers the overlay (when using activator pattern)
 *
 * @csspart backdrop - The backdrop element
 * @csspart content - The content container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} active - Whether the overlay is active/visible
 * @attr {boolean} absolute - Use absolute positioning instead of fixed
 * @attr {boolean} contained - Contain the overlay within its parent
 * @attr {boolean} persistent - Prevent backdrop clicks from closing the overlay
 * @attr {boolean} nobackdrop - Hide the backdrop
 * @attr {boolean} nocentered - Remove centering transforms for custom positioning
 * @attr {boolean} nofocustrap - Disable focus trapping
 * @attr {number} z-index - Custom z-index value
 * @attr {number} opacity - Backdrop opacity (0-1)
 */
@Meta({ name: 'overlay' })
export class ColOverlay extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColOverlayStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  active: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  absolute: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  contained: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  persistent: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  noBackdrop: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  noCentered: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  noFocusTrap: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'z-index' })
  zIndex?: number;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  preventClose: boolean = false;

  @state()
  private _isVisible: boolean = false;

  @query('.overlay-content')
  private _contentElement!: HTMLElement;

  private _originalBodyOverflow: string = '';
  private _focusTrap: FocusTrap | null = null;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();

    // Handle escape key
    document.addEventListener('keydown', this._handleEscapeKey);
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    document.removeEventListener('keydown', this._handleEscapeKey);

    // Clean up focus trap
    if (this._focusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.destroy();
      this._focusTrap = null;
    }

    // Restore body overflow if it was modified
    if (this._originalBodyOverflow !== undefined) {
      document.body.style.overflow = this._originalBodyOverflow;
    }
  }

  protected firstUpdated() {
    // Don't initialize focus trap here - wait for overlay to be active
    // This prevents unnecessary initialization for overlays that may never be shown
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    if (changedProperties.has('active')) {
      this._handleActiveChange();
    }

    if (changedProperties.has('zIndex') && this.zIndex) {
      this.style.setProperty('--col-overlay-z-index', this.zIndex.toString());
    }

    if (changedProperties.has('noFocusTrap')) {
      this._handleFocusTrapChange();
    }
  }

  protected updated(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    // Initialize or update focus trap when overlay becomes active
    if (
      changedProperties.has('active') &&
      this.active &&
      this._contentElement &&
      !this.noFocusTrap
    ) {
      this._initializeFocusTrap();
    }
  }

  private _initializeFocusTrap() {
    if (!this._contentElement || this.noFocusTrap) return;

    // Clean up existing focus trap
    if (this._focusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.destroy();
      this._focusTrap = null;
    }

    // Create new focus trap with shadow root support
    this._focusTrap = new FocusTrap(this._contentElement, this.shadowRoot as ShadowRoot);

    // Activate if overlay is currently active
    if (this.active && this._isVisible) {
      // Small delay to ensure DOM is ready and animations have started
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (this.active && this._focusTrap) {
          this._focusTrap.activate();
        }
      }, 100);
    }
  }

  private _handleActiveChange() {
    if (this.active) {
      this._isVisible = true;
      this._blockBodyScroll();

      // Focus trap will be initialized/activated in the updated lifecycle
    } else {
      this._isVisible = false;
      this._restoreBodyScroll();

      // Deactivate focus trap
      if (this._focusTrap) {
        this._focusTrap.deactivate();
      }
    }
  }

  private _handleFocusTrapChange() {
    if (this.noFocusTrap) {
      // Disable focus trap
      if (this._focusTrap) {
        this._focusTrap.destroy();
        this._focusTrap = null;
      }
    } else {
      // Enable focus trap if overlay is active
      if (this.active && this._isVisible && this._contentElement) {
        this._initializeFocusTrap();
      }
    }
  }

  private _blockBodyScroll() {
    // Only block scroll if we haven't already
    if (!this._originalBodyOverflow) {
      this._originalBodyOverflow = document.body.style.overflow || '';
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    }
  }

  private _restoreBodyScroll() {
    // Only restore if we have a stored value
    if (this._originalBodyOverflow !== undefined) {
      document.body.style.overflow = this._originalBodyOverflow;
      this._originalBodyOverflow = '';
    }
  }

  private _handleBackdropClick = (event: Event) => {
    event.stopPropagation();
    if (event.target === event.currentTarget && !this.persistent) {
      this.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('overlay-click-outside', {
          detail: { overlay: this, originalEvent: event },
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
        })
      );
      if (!this.preventClose) {
        this.active = false;
      }
    }
  };

  private _handleEscapeKey = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (event.key === 'Escape' && this.active && !this.persistent) {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();

      // Dispatch escape event for parent components to handle if needed
      this.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('overlay-escape', {
          detail: { overlay: this, originalEvent: event },
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
        })
      );

      if (!this.preventClose) {
        this.active = false;
      }
    }
  };

  private _renderContent() {
    return html`<slot></slot>`;
  }

  /**
   * Manually update the focus trap (useful when content changes dynamically)
   */
  updateFocusTrap() {
    if (this._focusTrap && !this.noFocusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.updateTrap();
    }
  }

  render() {
    // Don't render anything if not active
    if (!this.active && !this._isVisible) {
      return html``;
    }

    return html`
      <div part="backdrop" class="overlay-backdrop" @click=${this._handleBackdropClick}></div>
      <div
        part="content"
        class="overlay-content"
        role="dialog"
        aria-modal=${this.active}
        aria-hidden=${!this.active}
      >
        ${this._renderContent()}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-overlay': ColOverlay;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/radio/col-radio.styles.ts

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColRadioStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
    .checked {
      border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .radio-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    outline: none;
  }

  .radio-container:focus {
    outline: none;
  }

  .radio {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    border: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.full')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  /* States for unchecked */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  /* States for checked */
  :host([checked]) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  :host([checked]:hover:not([disabled])) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:focus-within) .radio {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][data-active]:not([disabled])) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary-light')};
  }

  /* Radio dot */
  .radio-dot {
    display: none;
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]) .radio-dot {
    display: block;
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .radio-dot {
    display: block;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
  }

  /* Hide native input */
  input[type='radio'] {
    position: absolute;
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Text label */
  label {
    margin-left: 2px;
    user-select: none;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  /* Slot styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/radio/col-radio.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColRadio } from './col-radio';

describe('ColRadio component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-radio')) {
      customElements.define('col-radio', ColRadio);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-radio').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const radioContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(radioContainer).to.exist;

      const radioInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
      expect(radioInput).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio checked></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render radio dot when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio checked></col-radio>`);

      const radioDot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-dot');
      expect(radioDot).to.exist;
      expect(radioDot?.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio checked></col-radio>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "false" when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should select the radio when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle off when clicked while already checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio checked></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(
        html`<col-radio value="test-value" name="test-name" group="test-group"></col-radio>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => container.click());
      const { detail } = await oneEvent(element, 'change');

      expect(detail.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(detail.value).to.equal('test-value');
      expect(detail.name).to.equal('test-name');
      expect(detail.group).to.equal('test-group');
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle checked state when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
      });

      spaceEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle Space key variation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      const spaceKeyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Space', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceKeyEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse interactions', () => {
    it('should add data-active attribute on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove data-active attribute on mouseup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio data-active></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;

      const mouseUpEvent = new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseUpEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not add data-active when disabled on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Slots and labels', () => {
    it('should render text inside the default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio>Radio Label</col-radio>`);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Radio Label');
    });

    it('should support custom label via label slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`
        <col-radio customLabel>
          <span slot="label">Custom Label</span>
        </col-radio>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use default slot when customLabel is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio>Default Label</col-radio>`);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;

      const slotElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.exist;

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('label');
      expect(labelElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Radio group behavior', () => {
    it('should uncheck other radios in the same group when one is checked', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio id="radio1" group="test-group" value="option1"></col-radio>
          <col-radio id="radio2" group="test-group" value="option2"></col-radio>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadio;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadio;

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      container1.click();

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      container2.click();

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not affect radios in different groups', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio id="radio1" group="group1" value="option1"></col-radio>
          <col-radio id="radio2" group="group2" value="option2"></col-radio>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadio;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadio;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;

      container1.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      container2.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should work correctly with multiple radios in the same group', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio id="radio1" group="test-group" value="option1"></col-radio>
          <col-radio id="radio2" group="test-group" value="option2"></col-radio>
          <col-radio id="radio3" group="test-group" value="option3"></col-radio>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadio;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadio;
      const radio3 = container.querySelector('#radio3') as ColRadio;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container3 = radio3.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;

      container1.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.false;

      container3.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.true;

      container2.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update checked state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      element.checked = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');

      const radioDot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-dot');
      expect(radioDot?.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update value dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('');

      element.value = 'new-value';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('new-value');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.value).to.equal('new-value');
    });

    it('should update group dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('');

      element.group = 'new-group';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('new-group');
    });

    it('should update customLabel state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`
        <col-radio>
          <span slot="label">Label Content</span>
          Default Content
        </col-radio>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;

      element.customLabel = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration', () => {
    it('should have name property for form integration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio name="test-radio"></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-radio');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.name).to.equal('test-radio');
    });

    it('should use group as name when name is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio group="test-group"></col-radio>`);

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.name).to.equal('test-group');
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handlers coverage', () => {
    it('should handle click with event parameter when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-container') as HTMLElement;

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });
      clickEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      clickEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      container.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle keydown when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio disabled></col-radio>`);

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const keyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      keyEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      keyEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(keyEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle click without event parameter', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadio>(html`<col-radio></col-radio>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      (element as any)._handleClick();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/radio/col-radio.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, RadioGroupMixin, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColRadioStyles } from './col-radio.styles';

/**
 * Radio button component for single selection within a group.
 *
 * @element col-radio
 *
 * @summary A radio button component that supports group selection, custom labels, and form integration.
 *
 * @slot - The default label/content for the radio button
 * @slot label - Custom label slot for advanced label rendering
 *
 * @csspart radio - The main radio button container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the radio button is checked
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the radio button is disabled
 * @attr {boolean} customlabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @attr {string} name - The name of the radio button (for form integration)
 * @attr {string} value - The value of the radio button
 * @attr {string} group - The group identifier for radio button grouping
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the radio button is checked
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the radio button is disabled
 * @property {boolean} customLabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @property {string} name - The name of the radio button (for form integration)
 * @property {string} value - The value of the radio button
 * @property {string} group - The group identifier for radio button grouping
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the radio button state changes. Event detail: { checked, value, name, group }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default customLabel state
 * @default '' - Default name value
 * @default '' - Default value
 * @default '' - Default group value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'radio' })
export class ColRadio extends RadioGroupMixin(SelectableFormComponent) {
  static styles = [ColRadioStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customLabel = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  group = '';

  constructor() {
    super();
    this.type = 'radio';
  }

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    // Radio buttons can only be selected, not deselected
    if (!this.checked) {
      this.checked = true;
      this._notifyGroup();

      this._syncFormValue();

      this._dispatchChange({
        checked: this.checked,
        value: this.value,
        name: this.name,
        group: this.group,
      });
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="radio"
        class="radio-container"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
        role="radio"
        aria-checked="${this.checked}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-labelledby="label-${this._id}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <div class="radio">
          <input
            type="radio"
            .name=${this.name || this.group}
            .value=${this.value}
            checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
            ?disabled=${this.disabled}
            @focus=${() => this.focus()}
            aria-hidden="true"
            tabindex="-1"
          />
          <div class="radio-dot" ?checked=${this.checked} aria-hidden="true"></div>
        </div>

        ${this.customLabel
          ? html` <label id="label-${this._id}"><slot name="label"></slot></label> `
          : html` <slot id="label-${this._id}"></slot> `}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-radio': ColRadio;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/radio-button/col-radio-button.styles.ts

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColRadioButtonStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-flex;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    --border-width: 1px;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
    .radio-button-container {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .radio-button-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    outline: none;
    border: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
  }

  /* Default state */
  .radio-button-container:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  /* States for unchecked */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .radio-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
  }

  :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .radio-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .radio-button-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-dark')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  /* States for checked */
  :host([checked]) .radio-button-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:hover:not([disabled])) .radio-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]:focus-within) .radio-button-container {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][data-active]:not([disabled])) .radio-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .radio-button-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border: none;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-light')};
  }

  /* Icon styles */
  .icon {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
  }

  /* Text label */
  .label {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    user-select: none;
  }

  /* Hide native input */
  input[type='radio'] {
    position: absolute;
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Slot styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
  }

  /* Group styling for adjacent radio buttons */
  :host([group]) + :host([group]) .radio-button-container {
    border-top-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
    margin-left: -1px;
  }

  :host([group]) + :host([group]) + :host([group]) .radio-button-container {
    border-radius: 0;
    margin-left: -1px;
  }

  :host([group]):first-of-type .radio-button-container {
    border-top-right-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  }

  :host([group]):last-of-type .radio-button-container {
    border-top-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
  }

  /* Z-index handling for focus and hover states */
  :host(:hover) .radio-button-container,
  :host(:focus-within) .radio-button-container,
  :host([checked]) .radio-button-container {
    z-index: 1;
    position: relative;
  }
`;
