FILE: src/components/atoms/radio-button/col-radio-button.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColRadioButton } from './col-radio-button';

describe('ColRadioButton component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-radio-button')) {
      customElements.define('col-radio-button', ColRadioButton);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-radio-button').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const radioButtonContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(radioButtonContainer).to.exist;

      const radioInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
      expect(radioInput).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button checked></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button checked></col-radio-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "false" when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should select the radio button when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle off when clicked while already checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button checked></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button
          value="test-value"
          name="test-name"
          group="test-group"
        ></col-radio-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => container.click());
      const { detail } = await oneEvent(element, 'change');

      expect(detail.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(detail.value).to.equal('test-value');
      expect(detail.name).to.equal('test-name');
      expect(detail.group).to.equal('test-group');
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle checked state when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
      });

      spaceEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle Space key variation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      const spaceKeyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Space', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceKeyEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse interactions', () => {
    it('should add data-active attribute on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove data-active attribute on mouseup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button data-active></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;

      const mouseUpEvent = new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseUpEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not add data-active when disabled on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Slots and labels', () => {
    it('should render text inside the default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button>Radio Button Label</col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Radio Button Label');
    });

    it('should render label when label property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button label="Label Text"></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.label).to.equal('Label Text');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Label Text');
    });

    it('should support custom label via label slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`
        <col-radio-button customLabel>
          <span slot="label">Custom Label</span>
        </col-radio-button>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom icon via icon slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`
        <col-radio-button>
          <div slot="icon">🔘</div>
          Button Text
        </col-radio-button>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('🔘');
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Button Text');

      const iconElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon');
      expect(iconElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use default slot when no label property and customLabel is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button>Default Content</col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;
      expect(element.label).to.equal('');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Content');
    });

    it('should prioritize label property over default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button label="Property Label">Slot Content</col-radio-button>`
      );

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Property Label');
    });
  });

  describe('Radio group behavior', () => {
    it('should uncheck other radio buttons in the same group when one is checked', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio-button id="radio1" group="test-group" value="option1"></col-radio-button>
          <col-radio-button id="radio2" group="test-group" value="option2"></col-radio-button>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadioButton;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadioButton;

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      container1.click();

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      container2.click();

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not affect radio buttons in different groups', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio-button id="radio1" group="group1" value="option1"></col-radio-button>
          <col-radio-button id="radio2" group="group2" value="option2"></col-radio-button>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadioButton;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadioButton;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;

      container1.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      container2.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should work correctly with multiple radio buttons in the same group', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio-button id="radio1" group="test-group" value="option1"></col-radio-button>
          <col-radio-button id="radio2" group="test-group" value="option2"></col-radio-button>
          <col-radio-button id="radio3" group="test-group" value="option3"></col-radio-button>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadioButton;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadioButton;
      const radio3 = container.querySelector('#radio3') as ColRadioButton;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container3 = radio3.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;

      container1.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.false;

      container3.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.true;

      container2.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update checked state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      element.checked = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update label dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.label).to.equal('');

      element.label = 'Updated Label';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.label).to.equal('Updated Label');

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Label');
    });

    it('should update value dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('');

      element.value = 'new-value';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('new-value');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.value).to.equal('new-value');
    });

    it('should update group dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('');

      element.group = 'new-group';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('new-group');
    });

    it('should update customLabel state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`
        <col-radio-button>
          <span slot="label">Label Content</span>
          Default Content
        </col-radio-button>
      `);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.false;

      element.customLabel = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.customLabel).to.be.true;

      const labelElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.label');
      expect(labelElement).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration', () => {
    it('should have name property for form integration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button name="test-radio-button"></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-radio-button');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.name).to.equal('test-radio-button');
    });

    it('should use group as name when name is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button group="test-group"></col-radio-button>`
      );

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.name).to.equal('test-group');
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handlers coverage', () => {
    it('should handle click with event parameter when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-button-container') as HTMLElement;

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });
      clickEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      clickEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      container.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle keydown when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button disabled></col-radio-button>`
      );

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const keyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      keyEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      keyEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(keyEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle click without event parameter', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      (element as any)._handleClick();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Icon slot behavior', () => {
    it('should not render icon container when no icon slot is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button>Just text</col-radio-button>`
      );

      const iconElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon');
      expect(iconElement).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render icon container when icon slot is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`
        <col-radio-button>
          <span slot="icon">⭐</span>
          Text with icon
        </col-radio-button>
      `);

      const iconElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon');
      expect(iconElement).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Group event listener management', () => {
    it('should update event listeners when group changes dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(
        html`<col-radio-button group="initial-group"></col-radio-button>`
      );

      expect(element.group).to.equal('initial-group');

      element.group = 'new-group';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('new-group');
    });

    it('should handle group updates when attributeChangedCallback is called', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioButton>(html`<col-radio-button></col-radio-button>`);

      element.setAttribute('group', 'test-group');
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('test-group');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/radio-button/col-radio-button.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, RadioGroupMixin, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColRadioButtonStyles } from './col-radio-button.styles';
import { GroupsCheckboxRadioStyles } from '@/styles/utils/styles/groups-checkbox-radio.styles';

/**
 * Radio button component styled as a button for enhanced visual presentation.
 *
 * @element col-radio-button
 *
 * @summary A radio button component that appears as a button with support for icons, custom labels, and group selection.
 *
 * @slot - The default label content for the radio button
 * @slot label - Custom label slot for advanced label rendering
 * @slot icon - Optional icon to display alongside the radio button
 *
 * @csspart radio-button - The main radio button container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the radio button is checked
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the radio button is disabled
 * @attr {string} label - The label text for the radio button
 * @attr {boolean} customlabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @attr {string} value - The value of the radio button
 * @attr {string} group - The group identifier for radio button grouping
 * @attr {string} name - The name of the radio button (for form integration)
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the radio button is checked
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the radio button is disabled
 * @property {string} label - The label text for the radio button
 * @property {boolean} customLabel - Whether to use the custom label slot
 * @property {string} value - The value of the radio button
 * @property {string} group - The group identifier for radio button grouping
 * @property {string} name - The name of the radio button (for form integration)
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the radio button state changes. Event detail: { checked, value, name, group }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default label value
 * @default false - Default customLabel state
 * @default '' - Default value
 * @default '' - Default group value
 * @default '' - Default name value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'radio-button' })
export class ColRadioButton extends RadioGroupMixin(SelectableFormComponent) {
  static styles = [ColRadioButtonStyles, GroupsCheckboxRadioStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  label = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customLabel = false;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  value = '';

  @property({ type: String })
  group = '';

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    // Radio buttons can only be selected, not deselected
    if (!this.checked) {
      this.checked = true;
      this._notifyGroup();

      this._syncFormValue();

      this._dispatchChange({
        checked: this.checked,
        value: this.value,
        name: this.name,
        group: this.group,
      });
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="radio-button"
        class="radio-button-container item-groupable"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
        role="radio"
        aria-checked="${this.checked}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-labelledby="label-${this._id}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <input
          type="radio"
          .name=${this.name || this.group}
          .value=${this.value}
          checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
          ?disabled=${this.disabled}
          @focus=${() => this.focus()}
          aria-hidden="true"
          tabindex="-1"
        />

        ${this.hasSlotted('icon')
          ? html`
              <div class="icon">
                <slot name="icon"></slot>
              </div>
            `
          : nothing}
        ${this.customLabel
          ? html` <div id="label-${this._id}" class="label"><slot name="label"></slot></div> `
          : html`
              <div id="label-${this._id}" class="label">${this.label || html`<slot></slot>`}</div>
            `}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-radio-button': ColRadioButton;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColRadioCardStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]).radio-card-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    .title {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    }
    .radio {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .radio-card-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    outline: none;
  }

  /* Default state */
  .radio-card-container:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
  }

  /* States for unchecked */
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .radio-card-container {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
  }

  :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([data-active]:not([checked]):not([disabled])) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  /* States for checked */
  :host([checked]) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary')};
    .title,
    .description,
    .radio {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    }
  }

  :host([checked]:hover:not([disabled])) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  :host([checked]:focus-within) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][data-active]:not([disabled])) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  :host([checked][disabled]) .radio-card-container {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary-light')};
    .title,
    .description,
    .radio {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-light')};
    }
    .radio {
      border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary-light')};
    }
    .radio-dot {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.primary-light')};
    }
  }

  .radio {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    border: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.full')};
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  :host([checked]) .radio {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  /* Radio dot */
  .radio-dot {
    display: none;
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  :host([checked]) .radio-dot {
    display: block;
  }

  /* Content styles */
  .content {
    flex: 1;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .title {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.m')};
    font-weight: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.heading.semibold-m')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  .description {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
  }

  /* Hide native input */
  input[type='radio'] {
    position: absolute;
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Slot styles */
  ::slotted(*) {
    display: block;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/radio-card/col-radio-card.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColRadioCard } from './col-radio-card';

describe('ColRadioCard component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-radio-card')) {
      customElements.define('col-radio-card', ColRadioCard);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-radio-card').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const radioCardContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(radioCardContainer).to.exist;

      const radioInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
      expect(radioInput).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card checked></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card checked></col-radio-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "false" when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle off when clicked while already checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card checked></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card
          value="test-value"
          name="test-name"
          group="test-group"
        ></col-radio-card>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;

      setTimeout(() => container.click());
      const { detail } = await oneEvent(element, 'change');

      expect(detail.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(detail.value).to.equal('test-value');
      expect(detail.name).to.equal('test-name');
      expect(detail.group).to.equal('test-group');
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle checked state when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default when Space key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      let preventDefaultCalled = false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: ' ',
        bubbles: true,
      });

      spaceEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        preventDefaultCalled = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(preventDefaultCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle Space key variation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      const spaceKeyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Space', bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(spaceKeyEvent);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse interactions', () => {
    it('should add data-active attribute on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove data-active attribute on mouseup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card data-active></col-radio-card>`
      );

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.true;

      const mouseUpEvent = new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseUpEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should not add data-active when disabled on mousedown', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;

      const mouseDownEvent = new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true });
      element.dispatchEvent(mouseDownEvent);

      expect(element.hasAttribute('data-active')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Content rendering', () => {
    it('should render title when title property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card title="Card Title"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      expect(element.title).to.equal('Card Title');

      const titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Card Title');
    });

    it('should render description when description property is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card title="Card Title" description="Card Description"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      expect(element.description).to.equal('Card Description');

      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');
      expect(descriptionElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Card Description');
    });

    it('should not render description when description is empty', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card title="Card Title"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');
      expect(descriptionElement).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`
        <col-radio-card customContent>
          <div>Custom Card Content</div>
        </col-radio-card>
      `);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.true;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Custom Card Content');

      const contentElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.content');
      expect(contentElement).to.exist;

      const slotElement = contentElement?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use title/description when customContent is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`
        <col-radio-card title="Default Title" description="Default Description">
          <div>This content should be ignored</div>
        </col-radio-card>
      `);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.false;

      const titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');

      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Title');
      expect(descriptionElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Description');

      const slotElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Icon rendering', () => {
    it('should render radio dot when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card checked></col-radio-card>`);

      const radioDot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-dot');
      expect(radioDot).to.exist;

      const checkedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="checked-icon"]');
      expect(checkedIconSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render unchecked icon slot when unchecked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      const uncheckedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="unchecked-icon"]');
      expect(uncheckedIconSlot).to.exist;

      const radioDot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-dot');
      expect(radioDot).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom checked icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`
        <col-radio-card checked>
          <span slot="checked-icon">✓</span>
        </col-radio-card>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('✓');

      const checkedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="checked-icon"]');
      expect(checkedIconSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should support custom unchecked icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`
        <col-radio-card>
          <span slot="unchecked-icon">○</span>
        </col-radio-card>
      `);

      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('○');

      const uncheckedIconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="unchecked-icon"]');
      expect(uncheckedIconSlot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Radio group behavior', () => {
    it('should uncheck other radio cards in the same group when one is checked', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio-card id="radio1" group="test-group" value="option1"></col-radio-card>
          <col-radio-card id="radio2" group="test-group" value="option2"></col-radio-card>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadioCard;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadioCard;

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      container1.click();

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      container2.click();

      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not affect radio cards in different groups', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio-card id="radio1" group="group1" value="option1"></col-radio-card>
          <col-radio-card id="radio2" group="group2" value="option2"></col-radio-card>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadioCard;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadioCard;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;

      container1.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;

      container2.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should work correctly with multiple radio cards in the same group', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div>
          <col-radio-card id="radio1" group="test-group" value="option1"></col-radio-card>
          <col-radio-card id="radio2" group="test-group" value="option2"></col-radio-card>
          <col-radio-card id="radio3" group="test-group" value="option3"></col-radio-card>
        </div>
      `);

      const radio1 = container.querySelector('#radio1') as ColRadioCard;
      const radio2 = container.querySelector('#radio2') as ColRadioCard;
      const radio3 = container.querySelector('#radio3') as ColRadioCard;

      const container1 = radio1.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container2 = radio2.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;
      const container3 = radio3.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;

      container1.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.false;

      container3.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.true;

      container2.click();
      expect(radio1.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(radio2.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(radio3.checked).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update checked state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-dot')).to.not.exist;

      element.checked = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');

      const radioDot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-dot');
      expect(radioDot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update title dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.title).to.equal('');

      element.title = 'Updated Title';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.title).to.equal('Updated Title');

      const titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Title');
    });

    it('should update description dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card title="Title"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      expect(element.description).to.equal('');
      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description')).to.not.exist;

      element.description = 'New Description';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.description).to.equal('New Description');

      const descriptionElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.description');
      expect(descriptionElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('New Description');
    });

    it('should update value dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('');

      element.value = 'new-value';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('new-value');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.value).to.equal('new-value');
    });

    it('should update group dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('');

      element.group = 'new-group';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('new-group');
    });

    it('should update customContent state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`
        <col-radio-card title="Title" description="Description">
          <div>Custom Content</div>
        </col-radio-card>
      `);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.false;

      let titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Title');

      element.customContent = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.customContent).to.be.true;

      const slotElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.content slot:not([name])');
      expect(slotElement).to.exist;

      titleElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.title');
      expect(titleElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration', () => {
    it('should have name property for form integration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card name="test-radio-card"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-radio-card');

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.name).to.equal('test-radio-card');
    });

    it('should use group as name when name is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card group="test-group"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="radio"]') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input.name).to.equal('test-group');
    });

    it('should update name dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handlers coverage', () => {
    it('should handle click with event parameter when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.radio-card-container') as HTMLElement;

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true });
      clickEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      clickEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      container.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle keydown when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card disabled></col-radio-card>`);

      let eventPrevented = false;
      let eventStopped = false;

      const keyEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
        key: 'Enter',
        bubbles: true,
      });
      keyEvent.preventDefault = () => {
        eventPrevented = true;
      };
      keyEvent.stopPropagation = () => {
        eventStopped = true;
      };

      element.dispatchEvent(keyEvent);

      expect(eventPrevented).to.be.true;
      expect(eventStopped).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle click without event parameter', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;

      (element as any)._handleClick();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Group event listener management', () => {
    it('should update event listeners when group changes dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(
        html`<col-radio-card group="initial-group"></col-radio-card>`
      );

      expect(element.group).to.equal('initial-group');

      element.group = 'new-group';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('new-group');
    });

    it('should handle group updates when attributeChangedCallback is called', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColRadioCard>(html`<col-radio-card></col-radio-card>`);

      element.setAttribute('group', 'test-group');
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.group).to.equal('test-group');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/radio-card/col-radio-card.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, RadioGroupMixin, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColRadioCardStyles } from './col-radio-card.styles';

/**
 * Radio card component for card-style radio button selection.
 *
 * @element col-radio-card
 *
 * @summary A radio button component styled as a card with title, description, and custom content support.
 *
 * @slot - The custom content when customContent is true
 * @slot checked-icon - Icon to display when the radio card is checked
 * @slot unchecked-icon - Icon to display when the radio card is unchecked
 *
 * @csspart radio-card - The main radio card container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the radio card is checked
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the radio card is disabled
 * @attr {string} title - The title text for the radio card
 * @attr {string} description - The description text for the radio card
 * @attr {boolean} customcontent - Whether to use custom content instead of title/description
 * @attr {string} value - The value of the radio card
 * @attr {string} group - The group identifier for radio card grouping
 * @attr {string} name - The name of the radio card (for form integration)
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the radio card is checked
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the radio card is disabled
 * @property {string} title - The title text for the radio card
 * @property {string} description - The description text for the radio card
 * @property {boolean} customContent - Whether to use custom content instead of title/description
 * @property {string} value - The value of the radio card
 * @property {string} group - The group identifier for radio card grouping
 * @property {string} name - The name of the radio card (for form integration)
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the radio card state changes. Event detail: { checked, value, name, group }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default title value
 * @default '' - Default description value
 * @default false - Default customContent state
 * @default '' - Default value
 * @default '' - Default group value
 * @default '' - Default name value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'radio-card' })
export class ColRadioCard extends RadioGroupMixin(SelectableFormComponent) {
  static styles = [ColRadioCardStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  title = '';

  @property({ type: String })
  description = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customContent = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  group = '';

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    // Radio buttons can only be selected, not deselected
    if (!this.checked) {
      this.checked = true;
      this._notifyGroup();

      this._syncFormValue();

      this._dispatchChange({
        checked: this.checked,
        value: this.value,
        name: this.name,
        group: this.group,
      });
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="radio-card"
        class="radio-card-container"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
        role="radio"
        aria-checked="${this.checked}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-labelledby="title-${this._id}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <div class="radio">
          <input
            type="radio"
            .name=${this.name || this.group}
            .value=${this.value}
            checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
            ?disabled=${this.disabled}
            @focus=${() => this.focus()}
            aria-hidden="true"
            tabindex="-1"
          />
          ${this.checked
            ? html`
                <slot name="checked-icon">
                  <div class="radio-dot"></div>
                </slot>
              `
            : html` <slot name="unchecked-icon"></slot> `}
        </div>

        ${this.customContent
          ? html`
              <div class="content">
                <slot></slot>
              </div>
            `
          : html`
              <div class="content">
                <div id="title-${this._id}" class="title">${this.title}</div>
                ${this.description ? html`<div class="description">${this.description}</div>` : ''}
              </div>
            `}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-radio-card': ColRadioCard;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-button/col-site-menu-button.styles.ts

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSiteMenuButtonStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline-block;
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
  }

  :host([selected]) button {
    &::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      left: 0;
      top: 0;
      bottom: 0;
      width: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
    }
  }

  :host([selected]) .site-menu-button.color-primary {
    background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-base-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')});

    &::before {
      background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')});
    }
  }

  :host([selected]) .site-menu-button.color-dark {
    background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-bg-overlay, ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.neutral')});

    &::before {
      background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-ui-inverse, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')});
    }
  }

  :host([selected]) .site-menu-button.color-light {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};

    &::before {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
    }
  }

  button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: none;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xl')};
    width: 100%;

    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      outline: none;
    }

    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      &::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
      }
    }

    &:disabled {
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }
  }

  .color-primary {
    background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-base-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')});
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')});

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: var(
        --col-theme-site-menu-primary-lighter,
        ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-dark')}
      );
    }

    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-base-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')});

      &::before {
        background-color: var(
          --col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark,
          ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')}
        );
      }
    }

    &:disabled {
      background-color: var(
        --col-theme-site-menu-primary-lighter,
        ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')}
      );
      color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')});
    }
  }

  .color-dark {
    background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-bg-overlay, ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.neutral')});
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')};

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: var(
        --col-theme-site-menu-text-default,
        ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.black.light')}
      );
    }

    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-bg-overlay, ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.neutral')});

      &::before {
        background-color: var(
          --col-theme-site-menu-ui-inverse,
          ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')}
        );
      }
    }

    &:disabled {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .color-light {
    background-color: var(
      --col-theme-site-menu-ui-inverse,
      ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')}
    );
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.primary-dark')};

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: var(
        --col-theme-site-menu-primary-lighter,
        ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')}
      );
    }

    &:active:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};

      &::before {
        background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
      }
    }

    &:disabled {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
      color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-info-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.primary-light')});
    }
  }
`;
