FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-button/col-site-menu-button.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSiteMenu } from '@/components';
import { ColSiteMenuButton } from './col-site-menu-button';

customElements.define('col-site-menu-button', ColSiteMenuButton);
if (!customElements.get('col-site-menu')) {
  customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
}

describe('ColSiteMenuButton', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu-button').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render button with slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">
            <span>Test Content</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement).to.exist;
      expect(buttonElement.type).to.equal('button');
      expect(button?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Content');
    });

    it('should apply correct color variant from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark">
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement.className).to.include('color-dark');
    });

    it('should reflect selected state from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="test-action">
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      expect(button?.selected).to.be.true;
      expect(button?.hasAttribute('selected')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle disabled state correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" disabled>Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(button?.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(buttonElement.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('User interactions', () => {
    it('should become selected when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(button?.selected).to.be.false;
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      expect(button?.selected).to.be.true;
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should become unselected when clicked while already selected', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="test-action">
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      await elementUpdated(button!);
      expect(button?.selected).to.be.true;
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('true');

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      expect(button?.selected).to.be.false;
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should not change state when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" disabled>Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(button?.selected).to.be.false;
      expect(button?.disabled).to.be.true;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      expect(button?.selected).to.be.false;
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should fire site-menu-button-click event with correct detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      let eventFired = false;
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      button?.addEventListener('site-menu-button-click', (e: Event) => {
        eventFired = true;
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.true;
      expect(eventDetail).to.deep.equal({ selected: true });
    });

    it('should show warning when action-id is missing', async () => {
      const originalWarn = console.warn;
      let capturedWarnings: string[] = [];

      console.warn = (message: string) => {
        capturedWarnings.push(message);
      };

      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button>Test</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      buttonElement.click();

      expect(capturedWarnings.some(warning => warning.includes('action-id attribute'))).to.be.true;
      console.warn = originalWarn;
    });
  });

  describe('Label and Tooltip Integration', () => {
    it('should render tooltip wrapper when label is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" label="Dashboard">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const tooltip = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-tooltip');

      expect(tooltip).to.exist;
      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('right');

      const tooltipContent = tooltip?.querySelector('[slot="tooltip-content"]');
      expect(tooltipContent?.textContent).to.equal('Dashboard');
    });

    it('should NOT render tooltip wrapper when label is empty', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const tooltip = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-tooltip');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]');

      expect(tooltip).to.not.exist;
      expect(buttonElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should disable tooltip when menu is open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" label="Dashboard">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      const tooltip = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-tooltip');
      await elementUpdated(tooltip!);

      expect(tooltip?.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should enable tooltip when menu is closed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" label="Dashboard">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      const tooltip = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-tooltip');
      await elementUpdated(tooltip!);

      expect(tooltip?.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should always position tooltip to the right', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" label="Dashboard">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const tooltip = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-tooltip');

      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('right');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should use label as aria-label when default aria-label and label provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" label="Dashboard">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Dashboard');
    });

    it('should use explicit aria-label even when label is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" aria-label="Custom Label" label="Dashboard">
            <span>Icon</span>
          </col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Custom Label');
    });

    it('should have correct ARIA attributes for selected state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="test-action">
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" aria-label="Dashboard"
            >Test</col-site-menu-button
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Dashboard');
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('true');
      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should update aria-pressed when selection state changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="test-action" aria-label="Dashboard"
            >Test</col-site-menu-button
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('true');

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(button!);

      expect(buttonElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should be focusable when enabled and not focusable when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="enabled">Enabled</col-site-menu-button>
          <col-site-menu-button action-id="disabled" disabled>Disabled</col-site-menu-button>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const enabledButton = element.querySelector('[action-id="enabled"]');
      const disabledButton = element.querySelector('[action-id="disabled"]');

      const enabledButtonElement = enabledButton?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      const disabledButtonElement = disabledButton?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(enabledButtonElement.tabIndex).to.equal(0);
      expect(enabledButtonElement.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');

      expect(disabledButtonElement.tabIndex).to.equal(-1);
      expect(disabledButtonElement.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-button/col-site-menu-button.ts
================================================
import { html, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, siteMenuContext, SiteMenuContextValue } from '@/config';
import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';
import { ColTooltip } from '@/components/atoms/tooltip';
import { ColSiteMenuButtonStyles } from './col-site-menu-button.styles';

export interface SiteMenuButtonClickDetail {
  selected: boolean;
}

/**
 * Site menu button component for triggering the site navigation menu.
 *
 * @element col-site-menu-button
 *
 * @summary An icon button that serves as the trigger for the site menu, supporting selected states and color variants.
 *          Used within col-site-menu-toolbar to create navigation actions that trigger submenu content changes.
 *
 * @slot - The button content (typically an icon)
 *
 * @csspart button - The main button element
 *
 * @attr {string} action-id - Unique identifier for the action button (REQUIRED for proper operation)
 * @attr {boolean} selected - Whether the button is selected (computed from context)
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the button is disabled
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the button
 * @attr {string} label - Optional label text to display in tooltip on hover
 *
 * @property {string} actionId - Unique identifier for the action button
 * @property {boolean} selected - Whether the button is selected (computed from context)
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the button is disabled
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the button
 * @property {string} label - Optional label text to display in tooltip on hover
 *
 * @fires site-menu-button-click - Fired when the button is clicked
 *
 * @default '' - Default actionId value
 * @default false - Default selected state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default 'Navigation action' - Default ariaLabel value
 * @default '' - Default label value
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
 *   <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24"></col-icon>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-button
 *     slot="actions"
 *     action-id="dashboard"
 *     aria-label="Dashboard">
 *     <col-icon name="dash-board" size="20"></col-icon>
 *   </col-site-menu-button>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="analytics" aria-label="Analytics">
 *     <col-icon name="trending-up-square" size="20"></col-icon>
 *   </col-site-menu-button>
 * </col-site-menu-toolbar>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Color and selection state are provided by Site Menu context
 * Note: action-id attribute is REQUIRED for context coordination to work
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu-button', components: [ColIcon, ColTooltip] })
export class ColSiteMenuButton extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuButtonStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'action-id' })
  actionId: string = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  selected: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'Navigation action';

  @property({ type: String })
  label: string = '';

  @consume({ context: siteMenuContext, subscribe: true })
  private _context?: SiteMenuContextValue;

  @query('button')
  private _buttonElement!: HTMLButtonElement;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this.addEventListener('focus', this._handleFocus);
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    this.removeEventListener('focus', this._handleFocus);
    super.disconnectedCallback();
  }

  private get _color(): SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS {
    return this._context?.color || SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY;
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'site-menu-button': true,
      [`color-${this._color}`]: true,
    };
  }

  private get effectiveAriaLabel(): string {
    return this.ariaLabel === 'Navigation action' && this.label ? this.label : this.ariaLabel;
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    super.willUpdate(changedProperties);

    const newSelected = this.actionId === this._context?.selectedActionId;
    if (this.selected !== newSelected) {
      this.selected = newSelected;
    }
  }

  private _handleFocus = () => {
    this._context?.setFocusedActionElement(this._buttonElement);
  };

  private _handleClick(e: Event) {
    if (this.disabled) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      return;
    }

    if (!this.actionId) {
      console.warn('Site Menu Button must have an action-id attribute');
      return;
    }

    if (this.selected) {
      this._context?.deselectAllActions();
    } else {
      this._context?.selectAction(this.actionId);
    }

    const detail: SiteMenuButtonClickDetail = {
      selected: !this.selected,
    };

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-button-click', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail,
      })
    );
  }

  render() {
    const buttonContent = html`
      <button
        part="button"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        type="button"
        ?disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-label="${this.effectiveAriaLabel}"
        aria-pressed="${this.selected}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? -1 : 0}"
        @click=${this._handleClick}
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </button>
    `;

    return this.label
      ? html`
          <col-tooltip position="right" ?disabled=${!!this._context?.open}>
            ${buttonContent}
            <span slot="tooltip-content">${this.label}</span>
          </col-tooltip>
        `
      : buttonContent;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu-button': ColSiteMenuButton;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-category/col-site-menu-category.styles.ts

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSiteMenuCategoryStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    position: relative;
  }

  .category-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.m')};
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 22px;
    min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xl')};
  }

  .category-content {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    flex-grow: 1;
  }

  .close-button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .color-primary {
    background-color: var(
      --col-theme-site-menu-base-light,
      ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-dark')}
    );
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')});
  }

  .color-primary .close-button {
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')});
  }

  .color-dark {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.overlay')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};
  }

  .color-dark .close-button {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')};
  }

  .color-light {
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-95, transparent),
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-95, transparent)
      ),
      ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
    color: var(
      --col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark,
      var(--col-theme-site-menu-text-base, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-dark')})
    );
  }

  .color-light .close-button {
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-text-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.base')});
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-category/col-site-menu-category.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSiteMenu } from '@/components';
import { ColSiteMenuCategory } from './col-site-menu-category';

customElements.define('col-site-menu-category', ColSiteMenuCategory);
if (!customElements.get('col-site-menu')) {
  customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
}

describe('ColSiteMenuCategory', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu-category').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render category with slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">
            <span>Dashboard Content</span>
          </col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const categoryContainer = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="category"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const contentArea = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="content"]') as HTMLElement;
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(categoryContainer).to.exist;
      expect(contentArea).to.exist;
      expect(closeButton).to.exist;
      expect(category?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Dashboard Content');
      expect(categoryContainer.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('heading');
    });

    it('should apply correct color variant from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark">
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const categoryContainer = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="category"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(categoryContainer.className).to.include('color-dark');
    });

    it('should have default close button aria-label', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(closeButton.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close category');
    });

    it('should use custom aria-label when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard" aria-label="Close dashboard">
            Test
          </col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(closeButton.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close dashboard');
    });

    it('should render close icon in button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      const icon = closeButton?.querySelector('col-icon');

      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('close');
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('size')).to.equal('24');
    });
  });

  describe('User interactions', () => {
    it('should fire site-menu-category-close event when close button clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      let eventFired = false;
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      category?.addEventListener('site-menu-category-close', (e: Event) => {
        eventFired = true;
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      closeButton.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.true;
      expect(eventDetail).to.deep.equal({ categoryName: 'dashboard' });
    });

    it('should fire event with undefined categoryName when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category>Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      category?.addEventListener('site-menu-category-close', (e: Event) => {
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      closeButton.click();

      expect(eventDetail).to.deep.equal({ categoryName: undefined });
    });

    it('should prevent default and stop propagation on close', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      let parentEventFired = false;

      element.addEventListener('click', () => {
        parentEventFired = true;
      });

      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      closeButton.click();

      expect(parentEventFired).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct semantic structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const categoryContainer = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="category"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(categoryContainer.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('heading');

      expect(closeButton.type).to.equal('button');
      expect(closeButton.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.exist;
    });

    it('should support focus method targeting close button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">Test</col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category') as any;
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(typeof category.focus).to.equal('function');

      category.focus();

      expect(closeButton).to.exist;
    });

    it('should have proper button attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-category category-name="settings" aria-label="Close settings panel">
            Settings
          </col-site-menu-category>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(closeButton.type).to.equal('button');
      expect(closeButton.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close settings panel');
      expect(closeButton.className).to.include('close-button');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-category/col-site-menu-category.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, siteMenuContext, SiteMenuContextValue } from '@/config';
import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';
import { ColSiteMenuCategoryStyles } from './col-site-menu-category.styles';

export interface SiteMenuCategoryCloseDetail {
  categoryName?: string;
}

/**
 * Site menu category component for displaying category headers with close functionality.
 *
 * @element col-site-menu-category
 *
 * @summary A category header component with content area and right-aligned close button for site menu sections.
 *          Typically used as the first element in submenu content to provide a title and close action.
 *
 * @slot - The category content (typically text and icons)
 *
 * @csspart category - The main category container
 * @csspart content - The content area of the category
 * @csspart close-button - The close button element
 *
 * @attr {string} category-name - The name identifier for the category
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the close button
 *
 * @property {string} categoryName - The name identifier for the category
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the close button
 *
 * @fires site-menu-category-close - Fired when the close button is clicked
 *
 * @default '' - Default categoryName value
 * @default 'Close category' - Default ariaLabel value
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
 *   <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">
 *     <col-icon name="stats" size="20"></col-icon>
 *     Dashboard
 *   </col-site-menu-category>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">
 *     <col-icon slot="icon" name="sight-on" size="18"></col-icon>
 *     Overview
 *     <!-- subcategory items... -->
 *   </col-site-menu-subcategory>
 * </col-site-menu-submenu>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Color is provided by Site Menu context
 * Note: Close button automatically triggers submenu close through context
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu-category', components: [ColIcon] })
export class ColSiteMenuCategory extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuCategoryStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'category-name' })
  categoryName: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'Close category';

  @query('[part="close-button"]')
  private _closeButton!: HTMLButtonElement;

  @consume({ context: siteMenuContext, subscribe: true })
  private _context?: SiteMenuContextValue;

  focus(options?: FocusOptions) {
    this._closeButton?.focus(options);
  }

  private get _color(): SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS {
    return this._context?.color || SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY;
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      [`color-${this._color}`]: true,
    };
  }

  private _handleClose(e: Event) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    const detail: SiteMenuCategoryCloseDetail = {
      categoryName: this.categoryName || undefined,
    };

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-category-close', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail,
      })
    );
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div part="category" class="category-container ${classMap(this.classes)}" role="heading">
        <div part="content" class="category-content">
          <slot></slot>
        </div>
        <button
          part="close-button"
          type="button"
          class="close-button"
          aria-label="${this.ariaLabel || nothing}"
          @click=${this._handleClose}
        >
          <col-icon name="close" size="24"></col-icon>
        </button>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu-category': ColSiteMenuCategory;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSiteMenuItemStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
  }

  :host([selected]) .color-primary {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-dark')};
  }

  :host([selected]) .color-dark {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.overlay')};
  }

  :host([selected]) .color-light {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
  }

  button,
  a {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xl')};
    border: none;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 16px;
    cursor: pointer;
    width: 100%;
    min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xl')};
    text-decoration: none;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    margin: 0;

    &:disabled {
      cursor: not-allowed;
    }
  }

  a {
    color: inherit;
    outline: none;
  }

  .color-primary {
    position: relative;
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-25, transparent),
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-25, transparent)
      ),
      var(--col-theme-site-menu-base-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')});
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')});

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background:
        linear-gradient(transparent, transparent),
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-ui-inverse, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-dark')});
    }

    &:disabled {
      background-color: var(
        --col-theme-site-menu-primary-lighter,
        ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')}
      );
      color: var(
        --col-theme-site-menu-primary-light,
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-text-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')})
      );
    }
  }

  .color-dark {
    background-color: var(
      --col-theme-site-menu-extended-onyx-light,
      ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.neutral')}
    );
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-text-default, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')});

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.overlay')};
      color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-text-inverse, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')});
    }

    &:disabled {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.black-light')};
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    }
  }

  .color-light {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.inverse')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-dark')};

    &:hover:not(:disabled),
    &:active:not(:disabled),
    &:focus:not(:disabled) {
      background:
        linear-gradient(
          var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-95, transparent),
          var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-95, transparent)
        ),
        ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
    }

    &:disabled {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-light')};
    }
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-item/col-site-menu-item.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSiteMenu } from '@/components';
import { ColSiteMenuItem } from './col-site-menu-item';

customElements.define('col-site-menu-item', ColSiteMenuItem);
if (!customElements.get('col-site-menu')) {
  customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
}

describe('ColSiteMenuItem', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu-item').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render as button when no href provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="action">Action Item</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement).to.exist;
      expect(itemElement.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('button');
      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('type')).to.equal('button');
      expect(item?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Action Item');
    });

    it('should render as link when href provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#dashboard" item-name="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;

      expect(itemElement.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('a');
      expect(itemElement.href).to.include('#dashboard');
      expect(item?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Dashboard');
    });

    it('should apply correct color variant from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark">
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement.className).to.include('color-dark');
    });

    it('should handle disabled state correctly for button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" disabled>Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(item?.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(itemElement.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should handle disabled state correctly for link', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#test" item-name="test" disabled>Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(item?.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(itemElement.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('button');
      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should handle new tab attribute for links', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#test" newtab item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;

      expect(itemElement.target).to.equal('_blank');
      expect(itemElement.rel).to.include('noopener');
    });

    it('should handle router attribute correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#test" router item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;

      expect(item?.router).to.be.true;
      expect(itemElement.href).to.include('test');
    });

    it('should have correct tabindex when parent subcategory is open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="overview">
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" parent-subcategory-id="overview"
            >Test</col-site-menu-item
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      await elementUpdated(item!);

      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have tabindex -1 when parent subcategory is closed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" parent-subcategory-id="overview"
            >Test</col-site-menu-item
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should have tabindex 0 when no parent subcategory specified', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });
  });

  describe('User interactions', () => {
    it('should fire site-menu-item-click event when button clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test-action">Test Action</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      let eventFired = false;
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      item?.addEventListener('site-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        eventFired = true;
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      itemElement.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.true;
      expect(eventDetail).to.deep.equal({
        selected: true,
        href: undefined,
        itemName: 'test-action',
        router: false,
      });
    });

    it('should fire site-menu-item-click event when link clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#dashboard" item-name="dashboard" router
            >Dashboard</col-site-menu-item
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      let eventFired = false;
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      item?.addEventListener('site-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        eventFired = true;
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;
      itemElement.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.true;
      expect(eventDetail).to.deep.equal({
        selected: true,
        href: '#dashboard',
        itemName: 'dashboard',
        router: true,
      });
    });

    it('should fire event with router flag when router attribute set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#dashboard" router item-name="dashboard"
            >Dashboard</col-site-menu-item
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      item?.addEventListener('site-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;
      itemElement.click();

      expect(eventDetail.router).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not fire event when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" disabled>Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      let eventFired = false;

      item?.addEventListener('site-menu-item-click', () => {
        eventFired = true;
      });

      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      itemElement.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should toggle selected state in event detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" selected>Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      item?.addEventListener('site-menu-item-click', (e: Event) => {
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLButtonElement;
      itemElement.click();

      expect(eventDetail.selected).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should prevent default for router links', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#test" router item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;

      let defaultPrevented = false;
      const clickEvent = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true });

      Object.defineProperty(clickEvent, 'preventDefault', {
        value: () => {
          defaultPrevented = true;
        },
      });

      itemElement.dispatchEvent(clickEvent);

      expect(defaultPrevented).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct ARIA attributes for button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" selected>Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('true');
      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have correct ARIA attributes for link', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item href="#test" item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLAnchorElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');
      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have role button for router links without href', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item router item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('button');
    });

    it('should be focusable when enabled and parent subcategory open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="overview">
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="enabled" parent-subcategory-id="overview"
            >Enabled</col-site-menu-item
          >
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="hidden" parent-subcategory-id="hidden"
            >Hidden</col-site-menu-item
          >
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="disabled" parent-subcategory-id="overview" disabled
            >Disabled</col-site-menu-item
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const enabledItem = element.querySelector('[item-name="enabled"]');
      const hiddenItem = element.querySelector('[item-name="hidden"]');
      const disabledItem = element.querySelector('[item-name="disabled"]');

      await elementUpdated(enabledItem!);
      await elementUpdated(hiddenItem!);
      await elementUpdated(disabledItem!);

      const enabledElement = enabledItem?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;
      const hiddenElement = hiddenItem?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;
      const disabledElement = disabledItem?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="item"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(enabledElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
      expect(hiddenElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
      expect(disabledElement.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should update aria-pressed when selected state changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-item item-name="test">Test</col-site-menu-item>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const item = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
      const itemElement = item?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="item"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('false');

      item!.selected = true;
      await elementUpdated(item!);

      expect(itemElement.getAttribute('aria-pressed')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-item/col-site-menu-item.ts
================================================
import { nothing } from 'lit';
import { html, unsafeStatic } from 'lit/static-html.js';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';
import {
  Meta,
  ThemedComponent,
  siteMenuContext,
  SiteMenuContextValue,
  LinkHandlerController,
} from '@/config';
import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColSiteMenuItemStyles } from './col-site-menu-item.styles';

export interface SiteMenuItemClickDetail {
  selected?: boolean;
  href?: string;
  itemName?: string;
  router?: boolean;
}

/**
 * Site Menu Item component for individual menu links and actions
 *
 * @element col-site-menu-item
 *
 * @summary Individual navigation items that can be links, router links, or action buttons.
 *          Automatically handles tabindex based on parent subcategory open state for accessibility.
 *
 * @slot - Content of the menu item (text only)
 *
 * @attr {string} href - The URL for the menu item link
 * @attr {boolean} selected - Whether the menu item is selected
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the menu item is disabled
 * @attr {string} item-name - The name identifier of the menu item
 * @attr {boolean} router - Whether to use SPA router navigation (prevents default link behavior)
 * @attr {boolean} new-tab - Whether to open link in a new tab
 * @attr {string} parent-subcategory-id - ID of parent subcategory for accessibility coordination
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the menu item
 *
 * @csspart item - The button/link element that wraps the menu item content
 *
 * @property {string} href - The URL for the menu item link
 * @property {boolean} selected - Whether the menu item is selected
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the menu item is disabled
 * @property {string} itemName - The name identifier of the menu item
 * @property {boolean} router - Whether to use SPA router navigation
 * @property {boolean} newTab - Whether to open link in a new tab
 * @property {string} parentSubcategoryId - ID of parent subcategory for accessibility coordination
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the menu item
 *
 * @fires site-menu-item-click - Fired when the menu item is clicked
 *
 * @default '' - Default href value
 * @default false - Default selected state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default itemName value
 * @default false - Default router value
 * @default false - Default newTab value
 * @default undefined - Default parentSubcategoryId value
 * @default '' - Default ariaLabel value
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <!-- SPA Router navigation -->
 * <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="/dashboard/home" router item-name="home">
 *   🚀 Home (SPA Router)
 * </col-site-menu-item>
 *
 * <!-- Regular navigation -->
 * <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="/dashboard/activity" item-name="recent-activity">
 *   🌐 Recent Activity (Regular)
 * </col-site-menu-item>
 *
 * <!-- External link -->
 * <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="https://external.com" new-tab item-name="external">
 *   🔗 External Link
 * </col-site-menu-item>
 *
 * <!-- Action button -->
 * <col-site-menu-item slot="items" item-name="quick-stats">
 *   ⚡ Quick Stats (Action)
 * </col-site-menu-item>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Color is provided by Site Menu context
 * Note: Uses LinkHandlerController for link behavior management
 * Note: Automatically manages tabindex based on parent subcategory open state
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu-item' })
export class ColSiteMenuItem extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuItemStyles];

  private linkHandler = new LinkHandlerController(this);

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'item-name' })
  itemName: string = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  selected: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  router = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  get href(): string {
    return this.linkHandler.href;
  }
  set href(value: string) {
    this.linkHandler.href = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  get newTab(): boolean {
    return this.linkHandler.newTab;
  }
  set newTab(value: boolean) {
    this.linkHandler.newTab = value;
  }

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'parent-subcategory-id' })
  parentSubcategoryId?: string;

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = '';

  @consume({ context: siteMenuContext, subscribe: true })
  private _context?: SiteMenuContextValue;

  private get _color(): SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS {
    return this._context?.color || SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY;
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      [`color-${this._color}`]: true,
    };
  }

  private _handleClick(e: Event) {
    if (this.disabled) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      return;
    }

    if (this.router) {
      e.preventDefault();
    }

    const detail: SiteMenuItemClickDetail = {
      selected: !this.selected,
      href: this.href || undefined,
      itemName: this.itemName || undefined,
      router: this.router,
    };

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-item-click', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail,
      })
    );
  }

  private get _isParentSubcategoryOpen(): boolean {
    if (!this.parentSubcategoryId) return true;

    return this._context?.openSubcategoryId === this.parentSubcategoryId;
  }

  render() {
    const isLink = this.href && !this.disabled;
    const elementType = isLink ? 'a' : 'button';
    const tagName = unsafeStatic(elementType);
    const attrs = isLink ? this.linkHandler.getLinkAttributes() : {};
    const isAccessible = this._isParentSubcategoryOpen && !this.disabled;
    const tabIndex = isAccessible ? (attrs.tabindex ?? '0') : '-1';

    return html`
      <${tagName}
        part="item"
        class="${classMap(this.classes)}"
        type=${elementType === 'button' ? 'button' : nothing}
        ?disabled=${this.disabled && elementType === 'button'}
        href=${attrs.href || nothing}
        target=${attrs.target || nothing}
        rel=${attrs.rel || nothing}
        tabindex=${tabIndex}
        role=${this.router && !this.href ? 'button' : attrs.role || nothing}
        aria-label=${this.ariaLabel || nothing}
        @click=${this._handleClick}
        aria-pressed=${this.selected ? 'true' : 'false'}
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </${tagName}>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu-item': ColSiteMenuItem;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSiteMenuSubcategoryStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    position: relative;
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .subcategory-container {
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .color-primary {
    background-color: var(
      --col-theme-site-menu-primary-lighter,
      ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')}
    );
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')});
  }

  :host([disabled]) .color-primary .toggle-button {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')});
  }

  :host([disabled]) .color-dark {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.neutral')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
  }

  :host([disabled]) .color-dark .toggle-button {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.disabled')};
  }

  :host([disabled]) .color-light {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.primary-light')});
  }

  :host([disabled]) .color-light .toggle-button {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.primary-light')});
  }

  .subcategory-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 20px;
    min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xl')};
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .subcategory-content {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    flex-grow: 1;
  }

  .subcategory-label {
    flex: 1;
  }

  .toggle-button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    background: transparent;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: 0;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }

  .toggle-button .arrow {
    transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }

  .toggle-button .arrow.open {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
  }

  .subcategory-items {
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: max-height 0.3s ease;
  }

  .subcategory-items.expanded {
    max-height: 1000px;
  }

  .subcategory-items.collapsed {
    max-height: 0;
  }

  .color-primary {
    background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-base-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.primary')});
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')});
  }

  .color-primary .toggle-button {
    color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-primary-dark, ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')});
  }

  .color-dark {
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-25, transparent),
        var(--col-theme-site-menu-alpha-white-25, transparent)
      ),
      var(--col-theme-site-menu-text-default, ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.overlay')});
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};
  }

  .color-dark .toggle-button {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')};
  }

  .color-light {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary-dark')};
  }

  .color-light .toggle-button {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.primary-dark')};
  }
`;
