FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-subcategory/col-site-menu-subcategory.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSiteMenu } from '@/components';
import { ColSiteMenuSubcategory } from './col-site-menu-subcategory';

customElements.define('col-site-menu-subcategory', ColSiteMenuSubcategory);
if (!customElements.get('col-site-menu')) {
  customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
}

describe('ColSiteMenuSubcategory', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu-subcategory').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render subcategory header with slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">
            <span>Overview</span>
          </col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const content = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="content"]') as HTMLElement;
      const toggleButton = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="toggle-button"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const itemsContainer = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-items"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(header).to.exist;
      expect(content).to.exist;
      expect(toggleButton).to.exist;
      expect(itemsContainer).to.exist;
      expect(subcategory?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Overview');
      expect(header.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('button');
      expect(content.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('heading');
    });

    it('should apply correct color variant from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark">
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.className).to.include('color-dark');
    });

    it('should have default collapsed state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const itemsContainer = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-items"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;
      expect(subcategory?.hasAttribute('open')).to.be.false;
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
      expect(itemsContainer.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
      expect(itemsContainer.className).to.include('collapsed');
    });

    it('should reflect open state from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="overview">
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const itemsContainer = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-items"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.true;
      expect(subcategory?.hasAttribute('open')).to.be.true;
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');
      expect(itemsContainer.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
      expect(itemsContainer.className).to.include('expanded');
    });

    it('should handle disabled state correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview" disabled
            >Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(header.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(header.className).to.include('disabled');
    });

    it('should use default aria-label when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Toggle subcategory');
    });

    it('should use custom aria-label when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview" aria-label="Toggle overview section">
            Overview
          </col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Toggle overview section');
    });

    it('should render chevron icon in toggle button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const toggleButton = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="toggle-button"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const icon = toggleButton?.querySelector('col-icon');

      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('chevron-down');
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('size')).to.equal('16');
      expect(toggleButton.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should update chevron icon state when open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="overview">
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      const icon = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-icon');

      expect(icon?.className).to.include('open');
    });
  });

  describe('User interactions', () => {
    it('should expand when clicked while closed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;

      header.click();
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.true;
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should collapse when clicked while open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="overview">
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.true;

      header.click();
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should not change state when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview" disabled
            >Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;
      expect(subcategory?.disabled).to.be.true;

      header.click();
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should toggle with Enter key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter' });
      header.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should toggle with Space key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;

      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ' });
      header.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not respond to keyboard when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview" disabled
            >Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter' });
      header.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      expect(subcategory?.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should show warning when subcategory-id is missing', async () => {
      const originalWarn = console.warn;
      let capturedWarnings: string[] = [];

      console.warn = (message: string) => {
        capturedWarnings.push(message);
      };

      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory>Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      header.click();

      expect(capturedWarnings.some(warning => warning.includes('subcategory-id attribute'))).to.be
        .true;
      console.warn = originalWarn;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct semantic structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const content = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="content"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('button');
      expect(content.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('heading');
      expect(header.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA attributes for collapsed state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview" aria-label="Toggle overview">
            Overview
          </col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const itemsContainer = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-items"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Toggle overview');
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(itemsContainer.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA attributes for expanded state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="overview">
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">Overview</col-site-menu-subcategory>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
      await elementUpdated(subcategory!);

      const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const itemsContainer = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-items"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');
      expect(itemsContainer.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should be focusable when enabled and not focusable when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="enabled">Enabled</col-site-menu-subcategory>
          <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="disabled" disabled
            >Disabled</col-site-menu-subcategory
          >
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const enabledSubcategory = element.querySelector('[subcategory-id="enabled"]');
      const disabledSubcategory = element.querySelector('[subcategory-id="disabled"]');

      const enabledHeader = enabledSubcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      const disabledHeader = disabledSubcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="subcategory-header"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;

      expect(enabledHeader.tabIndex).to.equal(0);
      expect(enabledHeader.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');

      expect(disabledHeader.tabIndex).to.equal(-1);
      expect(disabledHeader.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/site-menu-subcategory/col-site-menu-subcategory.ts
================================================
import { html, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, siteMenuContext, SiteMenuContextValue } from '@/config';
import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';
import { ColSiteMenuItem } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-item';
import { ColSiteMenuSubcategoryStyles } from './col-site-menu-subcategory.styles';

/**
 * Site menu subcategory component for collapsible subcategory headers that can contain menu items.
 *
 * @element col-site-menu-subcategory
 *
 * @summary A subcategory header component with toggle functionality for expanding/collapsing subcategory sections and their nested items.
 *          Implements single-open accordion behavior where only one subcategory can be open at a time.
 *
 * @slot - The subcategory label text
 * @slot icon - Icon content for the subcategory
 * @slot items - Menu items that belong to this subcategory
 *
 * @csspart subcategory-header - The main subcategory header container
 * @csspart content - The content area of the subcategory header
 * @csspart toggle-button - The toggle button element
 * @csspart subcategory-items - The container for nested menu items
 *
 * @attr {boolean} open - Whether the subcategory is expanded (computed from Site Menu context)
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the subcategory is disabled
 * @attr {string} subcategory-id - The unique identifier for the subcategory (REQUIRED)
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the toggle button
 *
 * @property {boolean} open - Whether the subcategory is expanded (computed from Site Menu context)
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the subcategory is disabled
 * @property {string} subcategoryId - The unique identifier for the subcategory (REQUIRED)
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the toggle button
 *
 * @fires site-menu-subcategory-toggle - Fired when the toggle button is clicked (via Site Menu context)
 *
 * @default false - Default open state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default subcategoryId value (MUST be set for proper operation)
 * @default 'Toggle subcategory' - Default ariaLabel value
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="overview">
 *   <col-icon slot="icon" name="sight-on" size="18"></col-icon>
 *   Overview
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="/dashboard/home" router item-name="home" parent-subcategory-id="overview">
 *     🚀 Home (SPA Router)
 *   </col-site-menu-item>
 *   <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="/dashboard/activity" item-name="recent-activity" parent-subcategory-id="overview">
 *     🌐 Recent Activity (Regular)
 *   </col-site-menu-item>
 *   <col-site-menu-item slot="items" item-name="quick-stats" parent-subcategory-id="overview">
 *     ⚡ Quick Stats (Action)
 *   </col-site-menu-item>
 * </col-site-menu-subcategory>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Color and open state are provided by Site Menu context
 * Note: Enforces single-open accordion behavior through context coordination
 * Note: subcategory-id attribute is REQUIRED for context coordination to work
 * Note: Items automatically inherit parent-subcategory-id for accessibility coordination
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu-subcategory', components: [ColSiteMenuItem, ColIcon] })
export class ColSiteMenuSubcategory extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuSubcategoryStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  get open(): boolean {
    return this.subcategoryId === this._context?.openSubcategoryId;
  }

  set open(value: boolean) {
    if (value && !this.open) {
      this._context?.openSubcategory(this.subcategoryId);
    } else if (!value && this.open) {
      this._context?.closeAllSubcategories();
    }
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'subcategory-id' })
  subcategoryId: string = '';

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'Toggle subcategory';

  @consume({ context: siteMenuContext, subscribe: true })
  private _context?: SiteMenuContextValue;

  private get _color(): SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS {
    return this._context?.color || SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY;
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'subcategory-container': true,
      [`color-${this._color}`]: true,
      disabled: this.disabled,
    };
  }

  private get _effectiveAriaLabel(): string {
    return this.ariaLabel || `Toggle ${this.subcategoryId} subcategory`;
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    super.willUpdate(changedProperties);

    if (changedProperties.has('_context') || changedProperties.has('subcategoryId')) {
      this.requestUpdate('open');
    }
  }

  private _handleToggle(e: Event) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    if (this.disabled) {
      return;
    }

    if (!this.subcategoryId) {
      console.warn(
        'ColSiteMenuSubcategory: subcategory-id attribute is required for proper operation'
      );
      return;
    }

    this._context?.toggleSubcategory(this.subcategoryId);
  }

  private _handleHeaderKeydown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (this.disabled) {
      return;
    }

    const { key } = e;

    if (key === 'Enter' || key === ' ') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this._handleToggle(e);
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        part="subcategory-header"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        role="button"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        aria-expanded="${this.open}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        aria-label="${this._effectiveAriaLabel}"
        @click=${this._handleToggle}
        @keydown=${this._handleHeaderKeydown}
      >
        <div part="content" class="subcategory-content" role="heading">
          <slot name="icon"></slot>
          <span class="subcategory-label">
            <slot></slot>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div part="toggle-button" class="toggle-button" aria-hidden="true">
          <col-icon
            name="chevron-down"
            size="16"
            class="arrow ${this.open ? 'open' : ''}"
          ></col-icon>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div
        part="subcategory-items"
        class="subcategory-items ${this.open ? 'expanded' : 'collapsed'}"
        aria-hidden="${!this.open}"
      >
        <slot name="items"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu-subcategory': ColSiteMenuSubcategory;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/spacer/col-spacer.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSpacer } from './col-spacer';

describe('ColSpacer Basic Tests', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-spacer')) {
      customElements.define('col-spacer', ColSpacer);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-spacer').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render successfully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSpacer>(html` <col-spacer></col-spacer> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const spacer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spacer');
      expect(spacer).to.exist;
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSpacer>(html` <col-spacer></col-spacer> `);

      const spacer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spacer');
      expect(spacer?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('separator');
      expect(spacer?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should have correct CSS classes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSpacer>(html` <col-spacer></col-spacer> `);

      const spacer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spacer');
      expect(spacer?.classList.contains('spacer')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Flex behavior', () => {
    it('should have flex properties on host', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSpacer>(html` <col-spacer></col-spacer> `);

      const hostStyles = getComputedStyle(element);
      expect(hostStyles.display).to.equal('flex');
      expect(hostStyles.flex).to.equal('1 1 0%');
    });

    it('should fill available space in flex container', async () => {
      const container = await fixture(html`
        <div style="display: flex; width: 300px;">
          <span>Left</span>
          <col-spacer></col-spacer>
          <span>Right</span>
        </div>
      `);

      const spacer = container.querySelector('col-spacer') as ColSpacer;
      const spacerStyles = getComputedStyle(spacer);
      expect(spacerStyles.flex).to.equal('1 1 0%');
    });
  });

  describe('Non-interactive behavior', () => {
    it('should not respond to pointer events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSpacer>(html` <col-spacer></col-spacer> `);

      const spacer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spacer') as HTMLElement;
      const spacerStyles = getComputedStyle(spacer);

      expect(spacerStyles.pointerEvents).to.equal('none');
      expect(spacerStyles.userSelect).to.equal('none');
    });
  });

  describe('Integration with toolbar', () => {
    it('should work in toolbar layout', async () => {
      const toolbar = await fixture(html`
        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center;">
          <button>Home</button>
          <col-spacer></col-spacer>
          <button>Contact</button>
        </div>
      `);

      const spacer = toolbar.querySelector('col-spacer');
      expect(spacer).to.exist;

      const spacerStyles = getComputedStyle(spacer as Element);
      expect(spacerStyles.flex).to.equal('1 1 0%');
    });
  });
});

import { html } from 'lit';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColSpacerStyles } from './col-spacer.styles';

/**
 * Spacer component for creating visual spacing between elements.
 *
 * @element col-spacer
 *
 * @summary A simple spacer component that creates visual separation between elements using CSS spacing.
 *
 * @csspart spacer - The main spacer element
 *
 * @default - No properties or attributes
 */
@Meta({ name: 'spacer' })
export class ColSpacer extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSpacerStyles];

  render() {
    return html` <div class="spacer" part="spacer" role="separator" aria-hidden="true"></div> `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-spacer': ColSpacer;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSpinnerStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
  }

  .spinner {
    display: inline-block;
    position: relative;
    width: 16px;
    height: 16px;

    &::before,
    &::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      border-color: transparent transparent ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')} transparent;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border-width: 3px;
      border-style: solid;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    &::before {
      opacity: 0.2;
      border-style: dashed;
      animation: rotate 0.8s linear infinite;
    }

    &::after {
      animation: draw-arc 0.8s linear infinite;
    }

    &.spinner-md {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
    }

    &.spinner-lg {
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
    }
  }

  .visually-hidden {
    position: absolute;
    width: 1px;
    height: 1px;
    margin: -1px;
    padding: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
    border: 0;
  }

  /* ANIMATION KEYFRAMES */

  @keyframes rotate {
    0% {
      transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
    100% {
      transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
  }

  @keyframes draw-arc {
    0% {
      transform: rotate(0deg);
    }
    60% {
      transform: rotate(330deg);
    }
    65% {
      transform: rotate(335deg);
    }
    90% {
      transform: rotate(350deg);
    }
    95% {
      transform: rotate(355deg);
    }
    98% {
      transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
    100% {
      transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/spinner/col-spinner.test.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';

import { ColSpinner } from './col-spinner';

describe('ColSpinner component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-spinner')) {
      customElements.define('col-spinner', ColSpinner);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-spinner').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  it('renders with default properties', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColSpinner>(html`<col-spinner></col-spinner>`);
    expect(el).to.exist;

    const spinnerContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spinner');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.exist;
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.not.have.class('spinner-md');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.not.have.class('spinner-lg');
    expect(el.size).to.equal('16');
    expect(el.accessibilityText).to.equal('Loading');
    expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.visually-hidden')?.textContent).to.include('Loading');
  });

  it('renders with size class "spinner-md" when size is 24', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColSpinner>(html`<col-spinner size="24"></col-spinner>`);
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.size).to.equal('24');
    const spinnerContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spinner');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.exist;
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.have.class('spinner-md');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.not.have.class('spinner-lg');
  });

  it('renders with size class "spinner-lg" when size is 48', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColSpinner>(html`<col-spinner size="48"></col-spinner>`);
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.size).to.equal('48');
    const spinnerContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spinner');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.exist;
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.have.class('spinner-lg');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.not.have.class('spinner-md');
  });

  it('updates accessibility text correctly', async () => {
    const newText = 'Fetching data...';
    const el = await fixture<ColSpinner>(
      html`<col-spinner accessibility-text=${newText}></col-spinner>`
    );
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.accessibilityText).to.equal(newText);
    expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.visually-hidden')?.textContent).to.include(newText);
  });

  it('has appropriate accessibility attributes', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColSpinner>(html`<col-spinner></col-spinner>`);
    const spinnerContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.spinner');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.have.attribute('role', 'status');
    expect(spinnerContainer).to.have.attribute('aria-live', 'polite');
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/spinner/col-spinner.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';

import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { ColSpinnerStyles } from './col-spinner.styles';
import { getEnumValues, SPINNER_SIZES } from '@/types';

/**
 * Spinner component for indicating loading states and processing activities.
 *
 * @element col-spinner
 *
 * @summary A loading indicator that displays an animated spinner with configurable size and accessibility text.
 *
 * @csspart spinner - The main spinner container element
 *
 * @attr {string} size - The size of the spinner (small, medium, large)
 * @attr {string} accessibility-text - The text announced to screen readers
 *
 * @property {string} size - The size of the spinner (small, medium, large)
 * @property {string} accessibilityText - The text announced to screen readers
 *
 * @default 'small' - Default size value
 * @default 'Loading' - Default accessibility text
 */
@Meta({ name: 'spinner' })
export class ColSpinner extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSpinnerStyles];

  // Properties
  @property({ type: String })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(SPINNER_SIZES), SPINNER_SIZES.SMALL)
  size!: string;

  @property({ attribute: 'accessibility-text' })
  accessibilityText: string = 'Loading';

  // Internal properties
  private _sizeClass: Record<string, string> = {
    [SPINNER_SIZES.MEDIUM]: 'spinner-md',
    [SPINNER_SIZES.LARGE]: 'spinner-lg',
  };

  private get classes() {
    return {
      spinner: true,
      [`${this._sizeClass[this.size]}`]: this.size !== '16',
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`<div
      part="spinner"
      class=${classMap(this.classes)}
      role="status"
      aria-live="polite"
    >
      <span class="visually-hidden"> ${this.accessibilityText} </span>
    </div> `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-spinner': ColSpinner;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColStatusStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: flex;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.supporting.label-s')};
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 16px;
  }

  .status-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
  }

  .dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default-lighter')};
  }

  .pending {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.warning-dark')};

    > .dot {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.warning')};
    }

    ::slotted(col-icon) {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.warning')};
    }
  }

  .inprogress {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.information-dark')};

    > .dot {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.info')};
    }

    ::slotted(col-icon) {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.info')};
    }
  }

  .complete {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.success-dark')};

    > .dot {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.success')};
    }

    ::slotted(col-icon) {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.success')};
    }
  }

  .cancel {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger-lighter')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.danger-dark')};

    > .dot {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.danger')};
    }

    ::slotted(col-icon) {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.danger')};
    }
  }

  ::slotted(col-icon) {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default-light')};
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/status/col-status.test.ts

import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { STATUS_STATES } from '@/types';
import { ColStatus } from './col-status';

describe('ColStatus component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-status')) {
      customElements.define('col-status', ColStatus);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-status').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  it('renders with default properties', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(html`<col-status>Test</col-status>`);
    expect(el).to.exist;

    const statusContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container');
    expect(statusContainer).to.exist;
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('pending');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('inprogress');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('complete');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('cancel');
    expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dot')).to.not.exist;
  });

  it('renders with a dot when dot property is true', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(html`<col-status dot>Test</col-status>`);

    expect(el.dot).to.be.true;
    expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dot')).to.exist;
  });

  it('renders with the correct status class when status is PENDING', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(
      html`<col-status status=${STATUS_STATES.PENDING}>Test</col-status>`
    );
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.status).to.equal(STATUS_STATES.PENDING);
    const statusContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container');
    expect(statusContainer).to.exist;
    expect(statusContainer).to.have.class('pending');
  });

  it('renders with the correct status class when status is INPROGRESS', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(
      html`<col-status status=${STATUS_STATES.INPROGRESS}></col-status>`
    );
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.status).to.equal(STATUS_STATES.INPROGRESS);
    const statusContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container');
    expect(statusContainer).to.exist;
    expect(statusContainer).to.have.class('inprogress');
  });

  it('renders with the correct status class when status is COMPLETE', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(
      html`<col-status status=${STATUS_STATES.COMPLETE}></col-status>`
    );
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.status).to.equal(STATUS_STATES.COMPLETE);
    const statusContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container');
    expect(statusContainer).to.exist;
    expect(statusContainer).to.have.class('complete');
  });

  it('renders with the correct status class when status is CANCEL', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(
      html`<col-status status=${STATUS_STATES.CANCEL}></col-status>`
    );
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.status).to.equal(STATUS_STATES.CANCEL);
    const statusContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container');
    expect(statusContainer).to.exist;
    expect(statusContainer).to.have.class('cancel');
  });

  it('does not add a status class for NEUTRAL status', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(
      html`<col-status status=${STATUS_STATES.NEUTRAL}></col-status>`
    );
    await el.updateComplete;

    expect(el.status).to.equal(STATUS_STATES.NEUTRAL);
    const statusContainer = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container');
    expect(statusContainer).to.exist;
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('pending');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('inprogress');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('complete');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('cancel');
    expect(statusContainer).to.not.have.class('neutral');
  });

  it('renders slotted content', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(
      html`<col-status><span>Slotted Content</span></col-status>`
    );
    const slot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
    expect(slot).to.exist;

    // Check if the slotted content is correctly distributed
    const assignedNodes = slot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true });
    if (assignedNodes) {
      expect(assignedNodes[0].textContent).to.equal('Slotted Content');
    }
  });

  it('has a default accessibility role (if applicable to a status component)', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColStatus>(html`<col-status></col-status>`);
    expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.status-container')).to.have.attribute('role', 'status');
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/status/col-status.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';

import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { ColStatusStyles } from './col-status.styles';
import { STATUS_STATES, getEnumValues } from '@/types';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';

/**
 * Status component for displaying status indicators with optional visual dots.
 *
 * @element col-status
 *
 * @summary A status indicator component that displays status information with configurable states and optional visual indicators.
 *
 * @slot - The status content (text, labels, etc.)
 *
 * @csspart status - The main status container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} dot - Whether to display a visual dot indicator
 * @attr {string} status - The status state (neutral, pending, inprogress, complete, cancel)
 *
 * @property {boolean} dot - Whether to display a visual dot indicator
 * @property {string} status - The status state (neutral, pending, inprogress, complete, cancel)
 *
 * @default false - Default dot value
 * @default 'neutral' - Default status value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'status' })
export class ColStatus extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColStatusStyles];

  // Properties
  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  dot: boolean = false;

  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(STATUS_STATES), STATUS_STATES.NEUTRAL)
  status!: string;

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'status-container': true,
      [`${this.status.toLowerCase()}`]: this.status !== STATUS_STATES.NEUTRAL,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`<div part="status" role="status" class=${classMap(this.classes)}>
      ${this.dot ? html`<div class="dot" aria-hidden="true"></div>` : nothing}
      <slot></slot>
    </div>`;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-status': ColStatus;
  }
}

import { expect, fixture, html } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColStep } from './col-step';

customElements.define('col-step', ColStep);

describe('ColStep', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-step').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering & properties', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step></col-step>`);
      const circle = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('.step-circle');
      const label = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('.step-label');

      expect(el.state).to.equal('pending');
      expect(el.orientation).to.equal('horizontal');
      expect(circle).to.exist;
      expect(label).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render the correct label when set', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step label="Step 1"></col-step>`);
      const label = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('.step-label');
      expect(label).to.exist;
      expect(label!.textContent).to.equal('Step 1');
    });
  });

  describe('Connector behavior', () => {
    it('should show connector when hasConnector is true', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step hasConnector></col-step>`);
      const connector = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('.step-connector');
      expect(connector).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not show connector when hasConnector is false', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step></col-step>`);
      const connector = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('.step-connector');
      expect(connector).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('State & icons', () => {
    it('should render check icon in completed state', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step state="completed"></col-step>`);
      const icon = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('col-icon[name="check"]');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render alert icon in completed_error state', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step state="completed_error"></col-step>`);
      const icon = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('col-icon[name="alert-circle"]');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Orientation & layout', () => {
    it('should switch layout when orientation changes to vertical', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStep>(html`<col-step orientation="vertical"></col-step>`);
      const container = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('.step-container');
      expect(container?.classList.contains('vertical')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/step/col-step.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, TemplateResult } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta } from '@/config';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';
import { ThemedComponent } from '@/config/components/themed-component/themed-component';
import { ColStepStyles } from './col-step.styles';

/**
 * Step component used to represent a single step in a horizontal or vertical stepper.
 *
 * @element col-step
 *
 * @summary A flexible step indicator that can be used to build steppers or progress trackers.
 *
 * @csspart step-circle - The step circle element displaying the number or icon
 * @csspart step-connector - The connector line between steps
 * @csspart step-label - The label element associated with the step
 *
 * @attr {'pending'|'active'|'completed'|'error'|'completed_error'} state - Defines the visual state of the step.
 * @attr {'horizontal'|'vertical'} orientation - Defines how the step is oriented.
 * @attr {string} step - Text or number displayed inside the circle when not completed or in error state.
 * @attr {string} label - Text label displayed next to or below the step icon depending on orientation.
 * @attr {boolean} hasconnector - Whether a connector line should be rendered after the step.
 *
 * @property {'pending'|'active'|'completed'|'error'|'completed_error'} state - The current visual state of the step.
 * @property {'horizontal'|'vertical'} orientation - The orientation of the step.
 * @property {string} step - Text or number displayed inside the step circle.
 * @property {string} label - The label displayed next to or below the step.
 * @property {boolean} hasConnector - Whether the connector line is shown after the step.
 **/

@Meta({ name: 'step', components: [ColIcon] })
export class ColStep extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColStepStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  state: 'pending' | 'active' | 'completed' | 'error' | 'completed_error' = 'pending';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  orientation: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal';

  /* Number displayed inside the step circle. */
  @property({ type: String })
  step = '1';

  /* Label displayed next to or below the step circle. */
  @property({ type: String })
  label = '';

  /* Whether a connector line should be rendered after the step. */
  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  hasConnector = false;

  private getStateClass(type: 'circle' | 'connector' | 'label'): string {
    return `step-${type} step-${type}--${this.state}`;
  }

  private renderIcon(): TemplateResult {
    switch (this.state) {
      case 'completed_error':
        return html` <col-icon name="alert-circle" size="24px" color="var(--col-theme-danger-base)">
        </col-icon>`;
      case 'completed':
        return html` <div class="${this.getStateClass('circle')}">
          <col-icon name="check" size="20px" color="var(--col-theme-primary-base)"> </col-icon>
        </div>`;
      default:
        return html`<div class="${this.getStateClass('circle')}">${this.step}</div>`;
    }
  }

  private renderConnector(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return this.hasConnector
      ? html`<div class="${this.getStateClass('connector')}"></div>`
      : nothing;
  }

  private renderHorizontal(): TemplateResult {
    return html`
      <div class="step-container horizontal">
        <div class="step-block">
          <div class="step-icon-line-wrapper">
            <div class="step-icon-wrapper">${this.renderIcon()}</div>
            ${this.renderConnector()}
          </div>
          <span class="${this.getStateClass('label')}">${this.label}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  private renderVertical(): TemplateResult {
    return html`
      <div class="step-container vertical">
        <div class="step-icon-column">
          <div class="step-icon-wrapper">${this.renderIcon()}</div>
          ${this.renderConnector()}
        </div>
        <div class="step-label-column">
          <span class="${this.getStateClass('label')}">${this.label}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  render(): TemplateResult {
    return this.orientation === 'horizontal' ? this.renderHorizontal() : this.renderVertical();
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-step': ColStep;
  }
}

import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTableBody } from './col-table-body';
import { ColTableRow } from '@/components/atoms/table-row';
import { ColTableCell } from '@/components/atoms/table-cell';

describe('ColTableBody', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-table-body')) {
      customElements.define('col-table-body', ColTableBody);
      customElements.define('col-table-row', ColTableRow);
      customElements.define('col-table-cell', ColTableCell);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-body').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-row').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-cell').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('Table body with default props', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableBody>(html` <col-table-body></col-table-body> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="rowgroup"]');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('part')).to.equal('table-body');
    });

    it('Empty table body', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableBody>(html` <col-table-body></col-table-body> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.empty-body');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.textContent?.includes('No data to be displayed')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Table body with a single row', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableBody>(html`
        <col-table-body>
          <col-table-row id="row1" row-index="1">
            <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
          </col-table-row>
        </col-table-body>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const row = element?.querySelector('col-table-row') as ColTableRow;
      expect(row).to.exist;
      expect(row.rowIndex).to.equal(1);
      const cell = element?.querySelector('col-table-cell') as ColTableCell;
      expect(cell).to.exist;
      expect(cell.header).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/table-body/col-table-body.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColTableBodyStyles } from './col-table-body.styles';
import { ColTypography } from '@/components/atoms/typography';

/**
 * Table body component that contains the main data rows of a table.
 *
 * @element col-table-body
 *
 * @summary Container for table data rows, providing semantic structure and styling for the table body section.
 *
 * @slot - Table rows (col-table-row elements)
 *
 * @csspart body - The table body container element
 */
@Meta({ name: 'table-body', components: [ColTypography] })
export class ColTableBody extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTableBodyStyles];

  @state()
  private _isEmpty: boolean = true;

  /**
   * When there is no rows on the body it updates the @state _isEmpty
   */
  private _handleSlotChange(e: Event) {
    const slot = e.target as HTMLSlotElement;
    const assignedElements = slot.assignedElements({ flatten: true });

    this._isEmpty = assignedElements.length === 0;
  }

  render() {
    return html` <div role="rowgroup" aria-label="Table body" class="table-body" part="table-body">
      <slot @slotchange=${this._handleSlotChange}></slot>
      ${this._isEmpty
        ? html`<div class="empty-body">
            <col-typography variant="helper" size="xs"> No data to be displayed </col-typography>
          </div>`
        : nothing}
    </div>`;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-table-body': ColTableBody;
  }
}

`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/table-cell/col-table-cell.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColTableCellStyles } from './col-table-cell.styles';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';

/**
 * Table cell component that represents an individual cell within a table row.
 *
 * @element col-table-cell
 *
 * @summary Individual table cell component for displaying data or header content within table rows.
 *
 * @slot - The cell content (text, numbers, or other elements)
 *
 * @csspart cell - The table cell element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} header - Whether the cell is the the TableHead
 *
 * @property {boolean} header - Whether the cell is the the TableHead
 *
 * @default false - Default header value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'table-cell' })
export class ColTableCell extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTableCellStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  header: boolean = false;

  connectedCallback(): void {
    super.connectedCallback();

    if (this.header) {
      this.style.setProperty('--cell-height', '44px');
    }
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'table-cell': true,
      header: this.header,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div role="cell" class=${classMap(this.classes)} part="table-cell">
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-table-cell': ColTableCell;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColTableHeadStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    position: sticky;
    width: 100%;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .table-head {
    display: flex;
    min-width: max-content;
    border-bottom: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid
      ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    font-weight: 600;
  }
`;

import { html } from 'lit';

import { ColTableHeadStyles } from './col-table-head.styles';

/**
 * Table head component that contains header rows of a table.
 *
 * @element col-table-head
 *
 * @summary Container for table header rows, providing semantic structure and styling for column headers.
 *
 * @slot - Table header rows (col-table-row elements containing header cells)
 *
 * @csspart table-head - The table head container element
 */
@Meta({ name: 'table-head' })
export class ColTableHead extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTableHeadStyles];

  render() {
    return html` <div
      class="table-head"
      role="rowgroup"
      aria-label="Table header"
      part="table-head"
    >
      <slot></slot>
    </div>`;
  }
}

import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTableRow } from './col-table-row';

describe('ColTableRow', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-table-row')) {
      customElements.define('col-table-row', ColTableRow);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-row').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('Table row with default props', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableRow>(html` <col-table-row></col-table-row> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.selected).to.be.false;
      expect(element.selectable).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="row"]');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('Table row with rowIndex', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableRow>(html`
        <col-table-row row-index="1"></col-table-row>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.rowIndex).to.equal(1);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="row"]');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-rowindex')).to.equal('1');
    });

    it('Table row with selectable and selected props', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableRow>(html`
        <col-table-row selectable selected></col-table-row>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.selected).to.be.true;
      expect(element.selectable).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="row"]');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interaction', () => {
    it('Table row click select a row', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTableRow>(html`
        <col-table-row selectable></col-table-row>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.selected).to.be.false;
      expect(element.selectable).to.be.true;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.table-row') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.selected).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/table-row/col-table-row.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColTableRowStyles } from './col-table-row.styles';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { ColCheckbox } from '@/components/atoms/checkbox';

/**
 * Table row component that represents a horizontal row within a table.
 *
 * @element col-table-row
 *
 * @summary Container for table cells, forming a single row in the table structure.
 *
 * @slot - Table cells (col-table-cell elements)
 *
 * @csspart table-row - The table row container element
 *
 * @attr {number} row-index - The index of this row in the table
 * @attr {number} selectable - Wheter the row is allowed to be selected or not.
 * @attr {number} selected - Wheter the row is selected
 *
 * @property {number} rowIndex - The index of this row in the table
 * @property {boolean} selectable - Whether the row is allowed to be selected or not.
 * @property {boolean} selected - Whether the row is selected
 *
 * @default false - Default selectable value
 * @default false - Default selected value
 *
 * @fires row-selected - Fired when a row is clicked/selected
 */
@Meta({ name: 'table-row' })
export class ColTableRow extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTableRowStyles];

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'row-index' })
  rowIndex?: number;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  selected: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  selectable: boolean = false;

  @state()
  checkbox: ColCheckbox | undefined;

  private _handleClick(e: MouseEvent) {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (this.selectable) {
      this.selected = !this.selected;
      // When a checkbox is rendered within the component it must change the state of the checked prop
      if (this.checkbox) {
        this.selected
          ? this.checkbox.setAttribute('checked', '')
          : this.checkbox.removeAttribute('checked');
      }
      const detail = {
        rowIndex: this.rowIndex,
        selectable: this.selectable,
        selected: this.selected,
        element: this,
      };
      this._dispatchClickEvent(detail);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Verifies if there is a checkbox in the component to assigned to the @state checkbox
   */
  private _handleSlotChange(e: Event) {
    const target = e.target as HTMLSlotElement;
    const assignedElements = target.assignedElements();
    this.checkbox = assignedElements[0].firstChild as ColCheckbox;
  }

  private _dispatchClickEvent(detail: Record<string, any>) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('row-selected', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'table-row': true,
      'row-selected': this.selected && this.selectable,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`<div
      class="${classMap(this.classes)}"
      role="row"
      tabindex="0"
      aria-selected=${this.selected}
      aria-rowindex="${this.rowIndex || nothing}"
      @click=${this._handleClick}
    >
      <slot @slotchange=${this._handleSlotChange}></slot>
    </div>`;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-table-row': ColTableRow;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/atoms/tag/col-tag.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, triggerFocusFor } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTag } from './col-tag';

describe('ColTag component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-tag')) {
      customElements.define('col-tag', ColTag);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-tag').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('Tag with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag></col-tag> `);

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container');
      expect(tag).to.exist;
      expect(tag?.classList.contains('multi-select')).to.be.false;
      expect(tag?.classList.contains('gray')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Tag with custom text', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag text="Custom Option"></col-tag> `);

      const span = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('span');
      expect(span).to.exist;
      expect(span?.textContent).to.equal('Custom Option');

      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-close-button');
      expect(closeButton?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Tag close button');
    });

    it('Tag with custom variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag variant="purple"></col-tag> `);

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container');
      expect(tag?.classList.contains('purple')).to.be.true;
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Tag of variant purple');
    });

    it('Tag with multi-select and read-only properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag multiselect readonly></col-tag> `);

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container');
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('true');
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('aria-readonly')).to.equal('true');
      expect(tag?.classList.contains('multi-select')).to.be.true;

      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-close-button');
      expect(closeButton).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('Tag disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag disabled></col-tag> `);

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container');
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });
  });

  describe('Click actions', () => {
    it('should apply multi-select prop when tag container clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag></col-tag> `);
      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.false;

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container') as HTMLElement;
      tag.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.true;
      expect(tag?.classList.contains('multi-select')).to.be.true;
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should remove multi-select prop when tag close button clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag .onRemove=${() => {}}></col-tag> `);
      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.tag-close-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      closeButton.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.false;

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tag?.classList.contains('multi-select')).to.be.false;
      expect(tag?.getAttribute('aria-selected')).to.equal('false');
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard interactions', () => {
    it('Tag should be selected when Enter key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag></col-tag> `);

      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.false;

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container') as HTMLElement;
      const selectedEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      tag.dispatchEvent(selectedEvent);

      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Tag should be un-selected when Backspace key is pressed on close button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag multiselect></col-tag> `);

      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.true;

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-close-button') as HTMLButtonElement;
      const selectedEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Backspace', bubbles: true });
      tag.dispatchEvent(selectedEvent);

      expect(element.multiSelect).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Focused tag should be blur when Escape key is pressed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTag>(html` <col-tag></col-tag> `);

      const tag = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tag-container') as HTMLElement;
      await triggerFocusFor(tag);

      const selectedEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', bubbles: true });
      tag.dispatchEvent(selectedEvent);

      expect(document.activeElement === tag).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/tag/col-tag.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { ColTagStyles } from './col-tag.styles';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { getEnumValues, TAG_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

interface TagDetail {
  text: string;
  variant: string;
  selected: boolean;
  readonly?: boolean;
  draggable?: boolean;
  category?: string;
  element: HTMLElement;
}

/**
 * Tag component for displaying selectable, removable, and draggable labels.
 *
 * @element col-tag
 *
 * @summary A versatile tag component that supports selection, removal, and drag-and-drop functionality with various visual variants.
 *
 * @slot - The tag content (text is provided via the text property)
 * @slot icon - Optional icon to display alongside the tag content
 *
 * @csspart tag-container - The main tag container element
 * @csspart tag-close-button - The close button for removing the tag
 *
 * @attr {string} variant - The visual variant of the tag
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the tag is disabled and cannot be interacted with
 * @attr {boolean} readonly - Whether the tag is readonly (cannot be removed)
 * @attr {boolean} multiselect - Whether the tag supports multi-selection
 * @attr {string} text - The text content displayed in the tag
 * @attr {string} category - The category for filtering purposes
 * @attr {boolean} draggable - Whether the tag can be dragged
 *
 * @property {string} variant - The visual variant of the tag
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the tag is disabled and cannot be interacted with
 * @property {boolean} readonly - Whether the tag is read-only (cannot be removed)
 * @property {boolean} multiSelect - Whether the tag supports multi-selection
 * @property {string} text - The text content displayed in the tag
 * @property {string} category - The category for filtering purposes
 * @property {boolean} draggable - Whether the tag can be dragged
 * @property {Function} onRemove - Callback function called when the tag is removed
 *
 * @fires tag-selected - Fired when the tag is selected. Event detail: TagDetail object
 * @fires tag-removed - Fired when the tag is removed. Event detail: TagDetail object
 * @fires tag-dragstart - Fired when dragging starts. Event detail: TagDetail object
 * @fires tag-dragend - Fired when dragging ends. Event detail: TagDetail object
 *
 * @default 'gray' - Default variant value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default readonly state
 * @default false - Default multiSelect state
 * @default 'Option' - Default text value
 * @default false - Default draggable state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'tag' })
export class ColTag extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTagStyles];

  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(TAG_VARIANTS), TAG_VARIANTS.GRAY)
  variant!: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  readonly: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  multiSelect: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  text: string = 'Option';

  /* Prop for filter purposes */
  @property({ type: String })
  category?: string = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  draggable: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Function })
  onRemove?: Function;

  //ARIA IDs in order to identify and access each element of the component
  private _tagContainerId = `tag-container-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  private _tagCloseButtonId = `tag-close-button-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'tag-container': true,
      'multi-select': this.multiSelect,
      [`${this.variant}`]: this.variant ? this.variant : 'gray',
    };
  }

  /**
   * Pass all the details related to the removal of the component
   * @returns
   */
  private _handleRemoval(e: Event) {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    const detail: TagDetail = {
      text: this.text,
      variant: this.variant,
      selected: false,
      readonly: this.readonly,
      element: this,
    };

    if (this.onRemove) {
      this.onRemove(detail);
    }
    this._dispatchRemovalEvent(detail);
  }

  /**
   * Pass all the details related to the selection of the component
   * @returns
   */
  private _handleSelected() {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    this.multiSelect = !this.multiSelect;

    const detail: TagDetail = {
      text: this.text,
      variant: this.variant,
      selected: this.multiSelect,
      category: this.category,
      element: this,
    };

    this._dispatchSelectedEvent(detail);
  }

  /**
   *
   * @param e
   * Receives a Keyboard event to handle the selection or removal of the component
   * depending of the keyword.
   * @returns
   */
  private _handleKeyword(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
    const targetRole = target.getAttribute('part');

    switch (e.key) {
      case 'Enter':
      case ' ':
        // Keywords for selection
        if (targetRole === 'tag-container') {
          this.multiSelect = !this.multiSelect;
          const selectedDetail: TagDetail = {
            text: this.text,
            variant: this.variant,
            selected: this.multiSelect,
            category: this.category,
            element: this,
          };
          this._dispatchSelectedEvent(selectedDetail);
        }
        break;
      case 'Delete':
      case 'Backspace':
        // Keywords for removal
        if (targetRole === 'tag-close-button') {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.stopPropagation();

          const removedDetail: TagDetail = {
            text: this.text,
            variant: this.variant,
            selected: false,
            readonly: this.readonly,
            element: this,
          };

          this._dispatchRemovalEvent(removedDetail);
        }
        break;
      case 'Escape':
        target.blur();
    }
  }

  /**
   *
   * @param detail
   *
   * Not only dispatches the event when the component is selected but also
   * changes the state of the prop multi-select to apply styles
   *
   */
  private _dispatchSelectedEvent(detail: TagDetail) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('tag-selected', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _dispatchRemovalEvent(detail: TagDetail) {
    this.multiSelect = false;
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('tag-removed', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _handleDrag(e: DragEvent) {
    if (e.dataTransfer) {
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plan', this.text);
      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
    }
    const detail: TagDetail = {
      text: this.text,
      variant: this.variant,
      selected: this.multiSelect,
      readonly: this.readonly,
      draggable: this.draggable,
      element: this,
    };
    this._dispatchDragStartEvent(detail);
  }

  private _dispatchDragStartEvent(detail: TagDetail) {
    this.draggable = true;
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('tag-dragstart', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _dispatchDragEndEvent() {
    this.draggable = false;
    const detail: TagDetail = {
      text: this.text,
      variant: this.variant,
      selected: this.multiSelect,
      readonly: this.readonly,
      draggable: this.draggable,
      element: this,
    };
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('tag-dragend', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  protected render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id=${this._tagContainerId}
        part="tag-container"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        role="option"
        aria-disabled=${this.disabled}
        aria-grabbed=${this.draggable}
        aria-selected=${this.multiSelect}
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        aria-readonly=${this.readonly}
        aria-label=${`Tag of variant ${this.variant}`}
        @keydown=${this._handleKeyword}
        @click=${this._handleSelected}
        @dragstart=${this._handleDrag}
        @dragend=${this._dispatchDragEndEvent}
      >
        <div class="tag-content">
          <slot ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('icon')} name="icon"></slot>
          <col-typography ?disabled=${this.disabled} variant="label" element="label">
            <span class="${this.variant}">${this.text}</span>
          </col-typography>
        </div>
        ${!this.readonly
          ? html`<button
              id=${this._tagCloseButtonId}
              part="tag-close-button"
              type="button"
              class="tag-close-button"
              aria-label="Tag close button"
              ?disabled=${this.disabled}
              @click=${this._handleRemoval}
              @keydown=${this._handleKeyword}
            >
              <col-icon size="10px" name="close"></col-icon>
            </button>`
          : html`<div></div>`}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-tag': ColTag;
  }
}
