import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColToggleStyles = css`
  :host {
    align-items: center;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .toggle-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    outline: none;
    width: max-content;
  }

  .toggle-container:focus {
    outline: none;
  }

  .switch {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block;
    width: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.6xl')};
    height: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xl')};
  }

  /* Disabled only the switch not all host */
  .switch[disabled] {
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
  }

  .switch input {
    opacity: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
  }

  .slider {
    position: absolute;
    cursor: pointer;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.base-light')};
    -webkit-transition: 0.4s;
    transition: 0.4s;
  }

  /* Creation of the circle inside de toggle */
  .slider:before {
    position: absolute;
    content: '';
    height: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.m')};
    width: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.m')};
    left: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    bottom: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};
    -webkit-transition: 0.3s;
    transition: 0.3s;
  }

  /* Disabled and not checked color styles */
  input:disabled + .slider {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
  }

  input:disabled + .slider:before {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default-lighter')};
  }

  /* Disabled and checked color styles */
  input:disabled:checked + .slider {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-light')};
  }

  input:disabled:checked + .slider:before {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.inverse')};
  }

  /* Checked and not disabled color styles */
  input:checked + .slider {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')};
  }

  /* Transformation for left to right and viceverse of the slider */
  input:checked + .slider:before {
    -webkit-transform: translateX(${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')});
    -ms-transform: translateX(${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')});
    transform: translateX(${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')});
  }

  /* Rounded sliders */
  .slider.round {
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.m')};
  }

  .slider.round:before {
    border-radius: 50%;
  }

  /*Only for switch. Not disabled styles for hover and focus*/
  :host(:hover:not([checked]):not([disabled])) :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .switch,
  :host(:focus-within:not([checked])) .switch,
  :host([checked]:focus-within) .switch {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.m')};
  }

  /* Label text */
  .label {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  /* Help text bellow the toggle container */
  .help-text {
    display: flex;
    position: relative;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    margin-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/toggle/col-toggle.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColToggle } from './col-toggle';

describe('ColToggle component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-toggle')) {
      customElements.define('col-toggle', ColToggle);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-toggle').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic Rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle>Label</col-toggle>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const toggleContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toggle-container');
      expect(toggleContainer).to.exist;

      const toggleInput = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
      expect(toggleInput).to.exist;

      //Aria labels check
      expect(toggleContainer?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('false');
      expect(toggleContainer?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should not be checked by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle></col-toggle>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be checked when checked attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle checked></col-toggle>`);

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle disabled></col-toggle>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should be disabled and checked when disabled and checked attributes are set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle disabled checked></col-toggle>`);

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('checked')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('The label should be align to the left side of the toggle when labelfirst attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle labelfirst></col-toggle>`);

      expect(element.labelfirst).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('labelfirst')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should apply aria-disabled when disabled is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle disabled></col-toggle>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toggle-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should set aria-checked to "true" when checked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle checked></col-toggle>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toggle-container');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-checked')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('should toggle checked state when clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle>Label</col-toggle>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not toggle when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToggle>(html`<col-toggle disabled></col-toggle>`);

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLElement;
      container.click();

      expect(element.checked).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/toggle/col-toggle.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, SelectableFormComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColToggleStyles } from './col-toggle.styles';

/**
 * Toggle component for binary state switching with visual feedback.
 *
 * @element col-toggle
 *
 * @summary A toggle switch component that provides on/off functionality with customizable label positioning.
 *
 * @slot - The label content for the toggle
 * @slot help-text - Additional help text displayed below the toggle
 *
 * @csspart toggle - The main toggle container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} checked - Whether the toggle is in the checked/on state
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the toggle is disabled
 * @attr {string} name - The name attribute for form integration
 * @attr {boolean} labelleft - Whether to position the label to the left of the toggle
 *
 * @property {boolean} checked - Whether the toggle is in the checked/on state
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the toggle is disabled
 * @property {string} name - The name attribute for form integration
 * @property {boolean} labelfirst - Whether to position the label on the left side of the toggle
 *
 * @fires change - Fired when the toggle state changes. Event detail: { checked }
 *
 * @default false - Default checked state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default '' - Default name value
 * @default false - Default labelfirst state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'toggle' })
export class ColToggle extends SelectableFormComponent {
  static styles = [ColToggleStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  labelfirst = false;

  constructor() {
    super();
    this.type = 'toggle';
  }

  protected _performSelection(): void {
    this.checked = !this.checked;

    this._syncFormValue();

    this._dispatchChange({
      checked: this.checked,
    });
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        id="${this._id}"
        part="toggle"
        class="toggle-container"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        aria-checked="${this.checked}"
        aria-labelledby="label-${this._id}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        role="checkbox"
        @click="${(e: Event) => this._handleClick(e)}"
      >
        ${this.labelfirst ? html` <label class="label"><slot></slot></label> ` : nothing}
        <div class="switch">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            tabindex="-1"
            name=${this.name}
            ?disabled=${this.disabled}
            ?checked=${this.checked ?? nothing}
            @focus=${() => this.focus()}
          />
          <span class="slider round"></span>
        </div>
        ${this.labelfirst ? nothing : html` <label class="label"><slot></slot></label>`}
      </div>
      <div class="help-text">
        <slot name="help-text"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-toggle': ColToggle;
  }
}

import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';
import { css } from 'lit';

export const ColTooltipStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: flex;
    position: relative;
    --tooltip-arrow-size: 8px;
  }

  .tooltip-content {
    position: fixed;
    margin: 0;
    border: 0;
    overflow: visible;
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.black')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.inverse')};
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.xs')};
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    line-height: 16px;

    &[multiline] {
      white-space: normal;
      max-width: var(--tooltip-width, 320px);
      word-break: break-word;
      text-align: center;
    }
  }

  .tooltip-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    width: var(--tooltip-arrow-size);
    height: var(--tooltip-arrow-size);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: -1;
  }

  .tooltip-arrow::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: var(--tooltip-arrow-size);
    height: var(--tooltip-arrow-size);
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.black')};
    transform: rotate(45deg);
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
  }

  .tooltip-content[data-placement^='top'] .tooltip-arrow {
    bottom: calc(var(--tooltip-arrow-size) / -2);
  }

  .tooltip-content[data-placement^='bottom'] .tooltip-arrow {
    top: calc(var(--tooltip-arrow-size) / -2);
  }

  .tooltip-content[data-placement^='left'] .tooltip-arrow {
    right: calc(var(--tooltip-arrow-size) / -2);
  }

  .tooltip-content[data-placement^='right'] .tooltip-arrow {
    left: calc(var(--tooltip-arrow-size) / -2);
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/tooltip/col-tooltip.test.ts

import { expect, fixture, html, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTooltip } from './col-tooltip';

customElements.define('col-tooltip', ColTooltip);

describe('ColTooltip component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
    if (!customElements.get('col-tooltip')) {
      customElements.define('col-tooltip', ColTooltip);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    const tooltip = document.querySelector('col-tooltip');
    if (tooltip) {
      tooltip.remove();
    }
  });

  it('should render a tooltip', async () => {
    const tooltip = await fixture(
      html`<col-tooltip>
        Tooltip
        <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
      </col-tooltip>`
    );
    expect(tooltip).to.exist;
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render a tooltip', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(html`<col-tooltip> Tooltip </col-tooltip>`);
      expect(tooltip).to.exist;
      expect(tooltip?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Tooltip');
    });

    it('should render a tooltip with multiline', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip multiline>
          Tooltip
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );
      expect(tooltip).to.exist;
      expect(tooltip?.hasAttribute('multiline')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render a tooltip with position', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip position="top">
          Tooltip
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );
      expect(tooltip).to.exist;
      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('top');
    });

    it('should render a tooltip with width', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip width=${100}>
          Tooltip
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );
      expect(tooltip).to.exist;
      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('width')).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('should render a tooltip with all properties', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip multiline width=${100} position="top">
          Tooltip
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );
      expect(tooltip).to.exist;
      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('width')).to.equal('100');
      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('top');
      expect(tooltip?.hasAttribute('multiline')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should adjust width and height when multiline is true', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html` <col-tooltip multiline>
          Tooltip
          <div slot="tooltip-content">
            Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed felis ex, pellentesque sit
            amet aliquet vel, hendrerit in turpis.
          </div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );
      expect(tooltip?.hasAttribute('multiline')).to.be.true;

      const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(tooltip!);
      expect(computedStyle.whiteSpace).to.equal('normal');
      expect(computedStyle.textAlign).to.equal('start');
    });

    it('should adjust width property when specified and multiline is true', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html` <col-tooltip multiline width=${200}>
          Tooltip
          <div slot="tooltip-content">
            Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed felis ex, pellentesque sit
            amet aliquet vel, hendrerit in turpis.
          </div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );
      expect(tooltip?.hasAttribute('multiline')).to.be.true;
      expect(tooltip?.getAttribute('width')).to.equal('200');

      const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(tooltip!);
      expect(computedStyle.whiteSpace).to.equal('normal');
      expect(computedStyle.textAlign).to.equal('start');
    });
  });

  describe('Mouse and Keyboard events', () => {
    it('should show tooltip on mouse hover component', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseenter', { bubbles: true }));

      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should hide tooltip on mouse remove component', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;

      // Show tooltip first
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseenter', { bubbles: true }));
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      // Then hide it
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseleave', { bubbles: true }));
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should show tooltip when key Enter is pressed', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should hide tooltip when key Esc is pressed and component is showing', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;

      // Show tooltip first
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      // Then hide with Escape
      const escEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', bubbles: true });
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(escEvent);
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('hideArrow property', () => {
    it('should show arrow element when hideArrow is false (default)', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const arrowElement = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-arrow') as HTMLElement;
      expect(arrowElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should hide arrow element when hideArrow is true', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip hidearrow>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const arrowElement = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-arrow') as HTMLElement;
      expect(arrowElement).to.not.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('distance property', () => {
    it('should use default 8px distance when not specified', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      expect(tooltip.distance).to.equal(8);
    });

    it('should apply custom distance offset', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip distance=${20}>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      expect(tooltip.distance).to.equal(20);
    });
  });

  describe('Popover API integration', () => {
    it('should have popover="manual" attribute on tooltip content', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.getAttribute('popover')).to.equal('manual');
    });

    it('should open tooltip in top layer when shown', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      await tooltip.show();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should close popover when hidden', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      // Show tooltip first
      await tooltip.show();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      // Then hide it
      tooltip.hide();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Click behavior (showOnClick)', () => {
    it('should not respond to clicks by default (showOnClick=false)', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const triggerElement = triggerSlot?.assignedElements()[0] as HTMLElement;

      triggerElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should toggle tooltip on click when showOnClick=true', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip showonclick>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const triggerElement = triggerSlot?.assignedElements()[0] as HTMLElement;
      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;

      triggerElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;

      triggerElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should work with hover when showOnClick=true', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip showonclick>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const triggerElement = triggerSlot?.assignedElements()[0] as HTMLElement;

      triggerElement.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseenter', { bubbles: true }));
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Focus/blur accessibility', () => {
    it('should show tooltip when trigger element receives focus', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const triggerElement = triggerSlot?.assignedElements()[0] as HTMLElement;

      triggerElement.focus();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should hide tooltip when trigger element loses focus', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const triggerElement = triggerSlot?.assignedElements()[0] as HTMLElement;

      // Focus to show tooltip
      triggerElement.focus();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      // Blur to hide tooltip
      triggerElement.blur();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle Space key to trigger tooltip', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const triggerSlot = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      triggerSlot.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Extended FloatingUI placements', () => {
    it('should render tooltip with top-start position', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip position="top-start">
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      expect(tooltip.position).to.equal('top-start');
      expect(tooltip.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('top-start');
    });

    it('should render tooltip with bottom-end position', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip position="bottom-end">
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      expect(tooltip.position).to.equal('bottom-end');
      expect(tooltip.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('bottom-end');
    });

    it('should render tooltip with left-start position', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip position="left-start">
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      expect(tooltip.position).to.equal('left-start');
      expect(tooltip.getAttribute('position')).to.equal('left-start');
    });
  });

  describe('PositioningService integration', () => {
    it('should apply positioning styles to tooltip content when shown', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      await tooltip.show();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;

      // PositioningService should apply left and top styles
      expect(tooltipContent?.style.left).to.not.be.empty;
      expect(tooltipContent?.style.top).to.not.be.empty;
    });

    it('should set data-placement attribute based on computed position', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip position="top">
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      await tooltip.show();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;

      // data-placement should be set (could be 'top' or flipped to 'bottom' based on space)
      const dataPlacement = tooltipContent?.getAttribute('data-placement');
      expect(dataPlacement).to.exist;
      expect(dataPlacement).to.match(/^(top|bottom|left|right)/);
    });
  });

  describe('Tooltip Methods Usage', () => {
    it('should show tooltip after calling show()', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip>
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      await tooltip.show();
      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should show tooltip after calling handleKeydown() with Enter', async () => {
      const tooltip = await fixture<ColTooltip>(
        html`<col-tooltip position="top">
          <button>Trigger</button>
          <div slot="tooltip-content">Tooltip Content</div>
        </col-tooltip>`
      );

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      tooltip.handleKeydown(enterEvent);

      await elementUpdated(tooltip);

      const tooltipContent = tooltip.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.tooltip-content') as HTMLElement;
      expect(tooltipContent?.matches(':popover-open')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/tooltip/col-tooltip.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property, query, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { type Placement, autoUpdate } from '@floating-ui/dom';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { PositioningService } from '@/services';
import { ColTooltipStyles } from './col-tooltip.styles';

/**
 * Tooltip component for displaying contextual information on hover, focus, or keyboard interaction.
 *
 * @element col-tooltip
 *
 * @summary A tooltip component that displays contextual information with automatic positioning, accessibility features,
 * and FloatingUI integration. Supports hover, focus, optional click triggering, Enter key, and Escape key dismissal (WCAG 2.1 compliant).
 * Uses the Popover API for top-layer rendering and FloatingUI for intelligent positioning with automatic flip/shift.
 *
 * @slot - The trigger element that shows the tooltip
 * @slot tooltip-content - The content to display in the tooltip
 *
 * @csspart tooltip - The trigger element
 * @csspart tooltip-content - The tooltip content container
 * @csspart arrow - The tooltip arrow element
 *
 * @cssprop --tooltip-width - The width of the tooltip (default: 300px, customizable via width property)
 * @cssprop --tooltip-arrow-size - The size of the tooltip arrow (default: 8px)
 *
 * @attr {Placement} position - The preferred position of the tooltip (top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end, left, left-start, left-end, right, right-start, right-end)
 * @attr {number} width - The width of the tooltip in pixels
 * @attr {boolean} multiline - Whether the tooltip supports multiline content
 * @attr {boolean} hidearrow - Whether to hide the tooltip arrow
 * @attr {number} distance - Distance in pixels between the tooltip and trigger element
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the tooltip is disabled (prevents showing)
 * @attr {boolean} showonclick - Whether to enable click-to-toggle behavior (default: false, hover/focus only)
 *
 * @property {Placement} position - The preferred position of the tooltip relative to the trigger element. Supports 12 placements from FloatingUI
 * @property {number} width - The width of the tooltip in pixels
 * @property {boolean} multiLine - Whether the tooltip supports multiline content
 * @property {boolean} hideArrow - Whether to hide the tooltip arrow
 * @property {number} distance - Distance in pixels between the tooltip and trigger element (offset)
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the tooltip is disabled (prevents showing)
 * @property {boolean} showOnClick - Whether to enable click-to-toggle behavior (useful for touch devices or when trigger has no other click action)
 *
 * @fires show - Fired when the tooltip becomes visible
 * @fires hide - Fired when the tooltip becomes hidden
 *
 * @default 'bottom' - Default position value
 * @default 300 - Default width value
 * @default true - Default multiLine state
 * @default false - Default hideArrow state
 * @default 8 - Default distance value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default showOnClick state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'tooltip' })
export class ColTooltip extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTooltipStyles];

  @state()
  private isVisible: boolean = false;

  private cleanupAutoUpdate?: () => void;
  private previousTrigger?: HTMLElement;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  position: Placement = 'bottom';

  @property({ type: Number })
  width = 300;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  multiLine: boolean = true;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  hideArrow: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Number })
  distance = 8;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  showOnClick: boolean = false;

  @query('slot:not([name])')
  triggerSlot!: HTMLSlotElement;

  @query('.tooltip-content')
  tooltipContent!: HTMLElement;

  @query('.tooltip-arrow')
  arrowElement!: HTMLElement;

  firstUpdated() {
    this.hide();
  }

  updated(changeProps: Map<string, unknown>) {
    if (changeProps.has('width')) {
      this.style.setProperty('--tooltip-width', `${this.width}px`);
    }
  }

  handleSlotChange(e: Event) {
    const slot = e.target as HTMLSlotElement;
    const slottedElements = slot.assignedElements();
    const newTrigger = slottedElements[0] as HTMLElement;

    if (this.previousTrigger) {
      this.previousTrigger.removeEventListener('focus', this.show);
      this.previousTrigger.removeEventListener('blur', this.hide);
      if (this.showOnClick) {
        this.previousTrigger.removeEventListener('click', this.toggleTooltip);
      }
    }

    if (newTrigger) {
      newTrigger.addEventListener('focus', this.show);
      newTrigger.addEventListener('blur', this.hide);
      if (this.showOnClick) {
        newTrigger.addEventListener('click', this.toggleTooltip);
      }
      this.previousTrigger = newTrigger;
    }
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();

    if (this.previousTrigger) {
      this.previousTrigger.removeEventListener('focus', this.show);
      this.previousTrigger.removeEventListener('blur', this.hide);
      if (this.showOnClick) {
        this.previousTrigger.removeEventListener('click', this.toggleTooltip);
      }
    }
  }

  handleKeydown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
      this.show();
    }
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      this.hide();
    }
  }

  show = async () => {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    this.isVisible = true;
    if (!this.tooltipContent || !this.triggerSlot) return;

    const slottedElements = this.triggerSlot.assignedElements();
    const triggerElement = slottedElements[0] as HTMLElement;

    if (!triggerElement) {
      console.warn('No trigger element found in tooltip slot');
      return;
    }

    this.tooltipContent.showPopover();

    const updatePosition = async () => {
      const result = await PositioningService.computePosition(triggerElement, this.tooltipContent, {
        placement: this.position,
        offset: this.distance,
        flip: true,
        shift: true,
        arrow: this.hideArrow ? undefined : this.arrowElement,
        strategy: 'fixed',
      });

      PositioningService.applyPosition(this.tooltipContent, result);

      if (result.middlewareData?.arrow && this.arrowElement) {
        const { x: arrowX, y: arrowY } = result.middlewareData.arrow;

        Object.assign(this.arrowElement.style, {
          left: arrowX != null ? `${arrowX}px` : '',
          top: arrowY != null ? `${arrowY}px` : '',
        });
      }

      this.tooltipContent.setAttribute('data-placement', result.placement);
    };

    await updatePosition();

    this.cleanupAutoUpdate = autoUpdate(triggerElement, this.tooltipContent, updatePosition);
  };

  hide = () => {
    this.isVisible = false;
    if (!this.tooltipContent) return;

    this.cleanupAutoUpdate?.();
    this.cleanupAutoUpdate = undefined;

    this.tooltipContent.hidePopover();
  };

  toggleTooltip = () => {
    if (this.isVisible) {
      this.hide();
    } else {
      this.show();
    }
  };

  render() {
    return html`
      <slot
        part="tooltip"
        class="tooltip"
        role="button"
        tabindex="0"
        aria-describedby="tooltip-content"
        aria-expanded=${this.isVisible ? 'true' : 'false'}
        @mouseenter=${this.show}
        @mouseleave=${this.hide}
        @keydown=${this.handleKeydown}
        @slotchange=${this.handleSlotChange}
      ></slot>
      <div
        part="tooltip-content"
        class="tooltip-content"
        popover="manual"
        role="tooltip"
        aria-hidden=${this.isVisible ? 'false' : 'true'}
        position=${this.position}
        ?multiLine=${this.multiLine}
        ?hidearrow=${this.hideArrow}
      >
        ${!this.hideArrow ? html`<div class="tooltip-arrow" part="arrow"></div>` : ''}
        <slot name="tooltip-content"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-tooltip': ColTooltip;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColTypographyStyles = css`
  :host {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
  }

  :host([variant='display']),
  :host([variant='heading']),
  :host([variant='subheading']) {
    display: block;
  }

  :host([variant='caption']),
  :host([variant='code']),
  :host([variant='helper']),
  :host([variant='label']),
  :host([variant='link']) {
    display: inline-block;
    line-height: 0;
  }

  :host > * {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  :host([align='center']) > * {
    justify-content: center;
  }

  :host([align='end']) > * {
    justify-content: flex-end;
  }

  :host([align='start']) > * {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  :host([variant='link']:hover) .link,
  .link:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  .with-ellipsis {
    display: inline-block;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .multi-line-ellipsis {
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: normal;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .align-start {
    text-align: left;
  }

  .align-center {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .align-end {
    text-align: right;
  }

  .align-inherit {
    text-align: inherit;
  }

  .caption {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-xs')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 16px;

    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};

  }

  .subheading {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.heading.semibold-m')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 22px;
  }

  .display,
  .display-xl,
  .display-lg,

  .display-sm {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  .display-xl {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.heading.semilight-7xl')};
    font-weight: 350;
    line-height: 64px;
  }

  .display-lg {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.heading.semilight-5xl')};
    font-weight: 350;
    line-height: 50px;
  }

  .display-md {

    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.supporting.helper-text-xs')};
    font-weight: 400;
    line-height: 16px;
  }

  .helper-error {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.danger')};
  }

  .label {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.supporting.label-xs')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-darker')};
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 16px;
  }

  .label-disabled {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
  }

  .link {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.primary')};
    text-decoration: none;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .link-md {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-s')};
    line-height: 20px;
  }

  .link-sm {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-xs')};
    line-height: 16px;
  }

  .link-hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  .label-disabled,
  .link-disabled {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
  }

  .required-indicator {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.danger')};
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/atoms/typography/col-typography.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTypography } from './col-typography';

describe('ColTypography component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-typography')) {
      customElements.define('col-typography', ColTypography);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-typography').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography>Default Typography</col-typography>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Default Typography');

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement).to.exist;
      expect(paragraphElement?.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('p');

      const className = paragraphElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('display');
      expect(className).to.include('align-start');
    });

    it('should render with specified variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="heading">Heading Typography</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('heading');
    });

    it('should render with specified element type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography element="h2">H2 Element</col-typography>`
      );

      const h2Element = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('h2');
      expect(h2Element).to.exist;
      expect(h2Element?.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('h2');
    });

    it('should render with specified alignment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography align="center">Centered Text</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('align-center');
    });
  });

  describe('State and disabled properties', () => {
    it('should render with specified state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="label" state="disabled">Disabled State</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('label-disabled');
    });

    it('should apply disabled state when disabled attribute is set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography disabled>Disabled Typography</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('display-disabled');
    });

    it('should override state with disabled when both are set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="label" state="error" disabled
          >Disabled Override</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('label-disabled');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('label-error');
    });
  });

  describe('Required indicator', () => {
    it('should render required indicator for label variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="label" required>Required Label</col-typography>`
      );

      const requiredIndicator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.required-indicator');
      expect(requiredIndicator).to.exist;
      expect(requiredIndicator?.textContent).to.equal('*');

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.getAttribute('aria-required')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should not render required indicator for non-label variants', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display" required>Required Display</col-typography>`
      );

      const requiredIndicator = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.required-indicator');
      expect(requiredIndicator).to.not.exist;

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.getAttribute('aria-required')).to.be.null;
    });
  });

  describe('Ellipsis functionality', () => {
    it('should apply single-line ellipsis', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography ellipsis>Text with ellipsis</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('with-ellipsis');
    });

    it('should apply multi-line ellipsis', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography ellipsis max-lines="2">Text with multi-line ellipsis</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('multi-line-ellipsis');

      const webkitLineClamp = paragraphElement?.style.getPropertyValue('-webkit-line-clamp');
      expect(webkitLineClamp).to.equal('2');
    });

    it('should use single-line ellipsis when maxLines is 1', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography ellipsis max-lines="1">Text with single-line ellipsis</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('with-ellipsis');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('multi-line-ellipsis');
    });
  });

  describe('Link functionality', () => {
    it('should render link variant with href', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="link" element="a" href="https://example.com"
          >Link Text</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement).to.exist;
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('https://example.com');
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('rel')).to.equal('noopener noreferrer');
    });

    it('should render link variant with newTab', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="link" element="a" href="https://example.com" newtab
          >New Tab Link</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('target')).to.equal('_blank');
    });

    it('should render downloadable link', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="link" element="a" href="/assets/example.pdf" downloadable
          >Download Link</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement?.hasAttribute('download')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render downloadable link with custom filename', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography
          variant="link"
          element="a"
          href="/assets/example.pdf"
          downloadable
          filename="custom-name.pdf"
          >Download Link with Custom Filename</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('download')).to.equal('custom-name.pdf');
    });

    it('should apply correct attributes for non-anchor link variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="link" element="span" href="https://example.com"
          >Span Link</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const spanElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('span');
      expect(spanElement?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('link');
      expect(spanElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should not apply link attributes for non-link variants', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display" href="https://example.com"
          >Display Text</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.getAttribute('role')).to.be.null;
      expect(paragraphElement?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.be.null;
      expect(paragraphElement?.getAttribute('href')).to.be.null;
    });
  });

  describe('Icon slot functionality', () => {
    it('should render with icon slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(html`
        <col-typography>
          <span slot="icon">Icon</span>
          Text with icon
        </col-typography>
      `);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
      expect(iconSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should hide icon slot when no icon is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography>Text without icon</col-typography>`
      );

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
      expect(iconSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Size functionality', () => {
    it('should use specified size when valid for variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display" size="sm">Display with small size</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('display-sm');
    });

    it('should ignore invalid size and use default size', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display" size="invalid-size"
          >Display with invalid size</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('display-lg');
    });

    it('should not apply size class for variants without sizes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="caption" size="lg">Caption with size</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('caption-lg');
    });

    it('should use default large size for display variant with invalid size', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display" size="invalid"
          >Display with invalid size</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('display-lg');
    });

    it('should not apply size class for variants without size support', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="heading" size="lg"
          >Heading without size support</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('heading');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('heading-lg');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update when alignment changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography>Update Alignment</col-typography>`
      );

      let paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('align-start');

      element.align = 'end';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('align-end');
    });

    it('should update when element type changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography>Update Element</col-typography>`
      );

      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p')).to.exist;

      element.element = 'h3';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('h3')).to.exist;
      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p')).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should update when variant changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display">Update Variant</col-typography>`
      );

      let paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('display');

      element.variant = 'heading';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('heading');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('display');
    });

    it('should update when disabled changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography>Update Disabled</col-typography>`
      );

      let paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('display-disabled');

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('display-disabled');
    });

    it('should update when required changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="label">Update Required</col-typography>`
      );

      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.required-indicator')).to.not.exist;

      element.required = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.required-indicator')).to.exist;
    });

    it('should update ellipsis properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography>Update Ellipsis</col-typography>`
      );

      let paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('with-ellipsis');

      element.ellipsis = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('with-ellipsis');

      element.maxLines = 3;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('multi-line-ellipsis');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('with-ellipsis');
    });

    it('should update link properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="link" element="a">Update Link</col-typography>`
      );

      let anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('href')).to.be.null;

      element.href = 'https://example.com';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('https://example.com');

      element.newTab = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      anchorElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('a');
      expect(anchorElement?.getAttribute('target')).to.equal('_blank');
    });
  });

  describe('CSS class combinations', () => {
    it('should apply multiple classes correctly for variants with size support', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="display" align="center" size="lg" ellipsis
          >Multiple Classes</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      const className = paragraphElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('display');
      expect(className).to.include('align-center');
      expect(className).to.include('display-lg');
      expect(className).to.include('with-ellipsis');
    });

    it('should apply classes correctly for variants without size support', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="caption" align="center" ellipsis
          >Caption Classes</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      const className = paragraphElement?.className;
      expect(className).to.include('caption');
      expect(className).to.include('align-center');
      expect(className).to.include('with-ellipsis');
      expect(className).to.not.include('caption-lg');
    });

    it('should handle state and disabled combinations', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography variant="label" state="error" disabled
          >State and Disabled</col-typography
        >`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('label-disabled');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('label-error');
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle empty content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(html`<col-typography></col-typography>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement).to.exist;
    });

    it('should handle maxLines of 0', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography ellipsis max-lines="0">Zero Lines</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('with-ellipsis');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.not.include('multi-line-ellipsis');
    });

    it('should handle large maxLines value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTypography>(
        html`<col-typography ellipsis max-lines="10">Many Lines</col-typography>`
      );

      const paragraphElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('p');
      expect(paragraphElement?.className).to.include('multi-line-ellipsis');
      expect(paragraphElement?.style.getPropertyValue('-webkit-line-clamp')).to.equal('10');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/atoms/typography/col-typography.ts
================================================
import { nothing } from 'lit';
import { html, unsafeStatic } from 'lit/static-html.js';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { styleMap } from 'lit/directives/style-map.js';
import { Meta, Validate, ThemedComponent, LinkHandlerController } from '@/config';
import {
  TYPOGRAPHY_ELEMENTS,
  TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS,
  ALIGNMENTS,
  STATES,
  VARIANTS_WITH_SIZES,
  VARIANT_STATES,
  getEnumValues,
} from '@/types';
import { ColTypographyStyles } from './col-typography.styles';

/**
 * Typography component for displaying text with various styles, sizes, and interactive features.
 *
 * @element col-typography
 *
 * @summary A comprehensive typography component that supports multiple text variants, sizes, alignments, states, and link functionality.
 *
 * @slot - The text content to display
 * @slot icon - Optional icon to display alongside the text
 *
 * @csspart typography - The main typography element
 *
 * @attr {string} variant - The typography variant (display, heading, subheading, label, helper, link, code, caption)
 * @attr {string} element - The HTML element to render (p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, span, div, a, label)
 * @attr {string} state - The state of the typography (default, error, disabled, hover, active, focus, visited)
 * @attr {string} align - The text alignment (start, center, end, justify)
 * @attr {string} size - The size of the typography (only applies to variants with sizes)
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the typography is disabled
 * @attr {boolean} required - Whether the typography is required (for labels)
 * @attr {boolean} ellipsis - Whether to truncate text with ellipsis
 * @attr {number} max-lines - Maximum number of lines for multi-line ellipsis
 * @attr {string} href - The URL for link variants
 * @attr {boolean} newtab - Whether to open link in new tab
 * @attr {boolean} downloadable - Whether the link is downloadable
 * @attr {string} filename - The filename for downloadable links
 *
 * @property {string} variant - The typography variant (display, heading, subheading, label, helper, link, code, caption)
 * @property {string} element - The HTML element to render (p, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, span, div, a, label)
 * @property {string} state - The state of the typography (default, error, disabled, hover, active, focus, visited)
 * @property {string} align - The text alignment (start, center, end, justify)
 * @property {string} size - The size of the typography (only applies to variants with sizes)
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the typography is disabled
 * @property {boolean} required - Whether the typography is required (for labels)
 * @property {boolean} ellipsis - Whether to truncate text with ellipsis
 * @property {number} maxLines - Maximum number of lines for multi-line ellipsis
 * @property {string} href - The URL for link variants
 * @property {boolean} newTab - Whether to open link in new tab
 * @property {boolean} downloadable - Whether the link is downloadable
 * @property {string} filename - The filename for downloadable links
 *
 * @fires click - Fired when the typography is clicked (for link variants)
 *
 * @default 'display' - Default variant value
 * @default 'p' - Default element value
 * @default 'default' - Default state value
 * @default 'start' - Default align value
 * @default 'md' - Default size value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default required state
 * @default false - Default ellipsis state
 * @default 1 - Default maxLines value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'typography' })
export class ColTypography extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTypographyStyles];

  private linkHandler = new LinkHandlerController(this);

  @property({ reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS), TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.DISPLAY)
  variant!: string;

  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(TYPOGRAPHY_ELEMENTS), TYPOGRAPHY_ELEMENTS.P)
  element!: string;

  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(STATES), STATES.DEFAULT)
  state!: string;

  @property({ reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(ALIGNMENTS), ALIGNMENTS.START)
  align!: string;

  @property({ reflect: true })
  size: string = 'md';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  get disabled(): boolean {
    return this._disabled;
  }
  set disabled(value: boolean) {
    this._disabled = value;
    this.linkHandler.disabled = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  required = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  ellipsis = false;

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'max-lines' })
  maxLines = 1;

  @property({ type: String })
  get href(): string {
    return this.linkHandler.href;
  }
  set href(value: string) {
    this.linkHandler.href = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  get newTab(): boolean {
    return this.linkHandler.newTab;
  }
  set newTab(value: boolean) {
    this.linkHandler.newTab = value;
  }

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  get downloadable(): boolean {
    return this.linkHandler.downloadable;
  }
  set downloadable(value: boolean) {
    this.linkHandler.downloadable = value;
  }

  @property({ type: String })
  get filename(): string {
    return this.linkHandler.filename;
  }
  set filename(value: string) {
    this.linkHandler.filename = value;
  }

  private _disabled = false;

  private get effectiveSize(): string {
    const sizes = VARIANTS_WITH_SIZES[this.variant];
    if (!sizes) return '';

    if (sizes.includes(this.size)) {
      return this.size;
    }

    return this.variant === TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.DISPLAY ? 'lg' : 'md';
  }

  private get classes() {
    const isValidState = (VARIANT_STATES[this.variant] || [STATES.DEFAULT]).includes(this.state);
    const effectiveState = this.disabled
      ? STATES.DISABLED
      : isValidState
        ? this.state
        : STATES.DEFAULT;

    const hasSize = this.variant in VARIANTS_WITH_SIZES;

    return {
      [this.variant]: true,
      [`align-${this.align}`]: true,
      'with-ellipsis': this.ellipsis && this.maxLines === 1,
      'multi-line-ellipsis': this.ellipsis && this.maxLines > 1,
      [`${this.variant}-${this.effectiveSize}`]: hasSize && this.effectiveSize,
      [`${this.variant}-${effectiveState}`]: effectiveState !== STATES.DEFAULT,
    };
  }

  private get styles() {
    if (this.ellipsis && this.maxLines > 1) {
      return {
        '-webkit-line-clamp': `${this.maxLines}`,
      };
    }

    return {};
  }

  private getElementAttributes(): Record<string, string | undefined> {
    const linkAttrs =
      this.variant === TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.LINK ? this.linkHandler.getLinkAttributes() : {};

    return {
      'aria-required':
        this.required && this.variant === TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.LABEL ? 'true' : undefined,
      href: linkAttrs['href'],
      target: linkAttrs['target'],
      rel: linkAttrs['rel'],
      download: linkAttrs['download'],
      role: linkAttrs['role'],
      tabindex: linkAttrs['tabindex'],
    };
  }

  render() {
    const tagName = unsafeStatic(this.element);
    const attrs = this.getElementAttributes();

    return html`
      <${tagName}
        part="typography"
        class=${classMap(this.classes)}
        style=${styleMap(this.styles)}
        href=${attrs.href || nothing}
        target=${attrs.target || nothing}
        rel=${attrs.rel || nothing}
        download=${attrs.download !== undefined ? attrs.download : nothing}
        aria-required=${attrs['aria-required'] || nothing}
        role=${attrs.role || nothing}
        tabindex=${attrs.tabindex || nothing}
      >
        <slot></slot>
        ${
          this.required && this.variant === TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.LABEL
            ? html`<span class="required-indicator">*</span>`
            : nothing
        }
        <slot ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('icon')} name="icon"></slot>
      </${tagName}>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-typography': ColTypography;
  }
}

export * from './stepper';

FILE: src/components/molecules/banner/col-banner.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColBannerStyles = css`
  :host {
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    cursor: default;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.supporting.underlined-s')};
    font-weight: 400;
  }

  .banner {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    padding: 0px ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    border: 0.5px solid;
  }

  .banner-vertical-line {
    width: 4px;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 1;
    border-top-left-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    border-bottom-left-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')};
    &.info {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info')};
    }
    &.success {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success')};
    }
    &.warning {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning')};
    }
    &.danger {
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger')};
    }
  }

  .banner-container {
    display: inline-flex;
    width: 100%;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} 0px;
    padding-right: var(--col-spacing-size-l);
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .banner-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .banner-icon {
    padding-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='title']) {
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.supporting.underlined-m')};
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='actions']) {
    display: flex;
    margin-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  @media (max-width: 350px) {
    ::slotted([slot='actions']) {
      flex-direction: column;
    }
  }

  .alert-close-button {
    position: absolute;
    top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    right: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    padding-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    background: none;
    border: none;
    height: fit-content;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .info {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.info')};
  }
  .success {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.success')};
  }
  .danger {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
  }
  .warning {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning-lighter')};
    border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.warning')};
  }
`;
