FILE: src/components/molecules/banner/col-banner.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent, triggerFocusFor } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColBanner } from './col-banner';

describe('ColBanner component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-banner')) {
      customElements.define('col-banner', ColBanner);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-banner').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('Banner element with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner></col-banner>`);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const banner = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="banner"]');
      expect(banner?.classList.contains('info')).to.be.true;

      const bannerIcon = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.banner-icon');
      expect(bannerIcon).to.exist;

      const bannerCloseButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.alert-close-button');
      expect(bannerCloseButton).to.exist;
    });

    it('Banner element with danger variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner variant="danger"></col-banner>`);

      const banner = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="banner"]');
      expect(banner).to.exist;
      expect(banner?.classList.contains('danger')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Banner element with warning variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner variant="warning"></col-banner>`);

      const banner = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="banner"]');
      expect(banner).to.exist;
      expect(banner?.classList.contains('warning')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Banner element with warning variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner variant="success"></col-banner>`);

      const banner = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="banner"]');
      expect(banner).to.exist;
      expect(banner?.classList.contains('success')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Banner element should be removed after duration prop timeout', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner duration="1"></col-banner>`);

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const closeEvent = await oneEvent(element, 'alert-closed');
      expect(closeEvent).to.exist;

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Banner element with custom Title slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(
        html`<col-banner><span slot="title">Title</span></col-banner>`
      );

      const bannerTitle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="title"]');

      expect(bannerTitle).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Title');
    });

    it('Banner element with custom Title and default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(
        html`<col-banner
          ><span slot="title">Title</span>
          <span>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit.</span></col-banner
        >`
      );

      const bannerTitle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="title"]');
      expect(bannerTitle).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Title');

      const bannerBody = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(bannerBody).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include(
        'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit.'
      );
    });

    it('Banner element with title, default and actions slots', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(
        html`<col-banner variant="success">
          <span slot="title">Title</span>
          <span>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit.</span>
          <div slot="actions">
            <col-button color="success" variant="outlined"> Button </col-button>
          </div>
        </col-banner>`
      );

      const bannerTitle = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="title"]');
      expect(bannerTitle).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Title');

      const bannerBody = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(bannerBody).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include(
        'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit.'
      );

      const bannerButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(bannerButton).to.exist;
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.include('Button');
    });
  });

  describe('Click actions', () => {
    it('Banner element should hide after button close clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner></col-banner>`);

      const bannerCloseButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.alert-close-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      bannerCloseButton.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard actions', () => {
    it('Banner element should be removed after pressing Escape when focused', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner variant="success"></col-banner>`);

      const banner = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="banner"]') as HTMLElement;
      await triggerFocusFor(banner);

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', bubbles: true });
      banner.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Banner element should be removed after pressing Enter when focused close button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner variant="success"></col-banner>`);

      const bannerButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.alert-close-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true });
      bannerButton.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Banner element should be removed after pressing Space when focused close button', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColBanner>(html`<col-banner variant="success"></col-banner>`);

      const bannerButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.alert-close-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true });
      bannerButton.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/banner/col-banner.ts
================================================
import { CSSResult, html, nothing, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { Meta } from '@/config';
import { ALERT_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColBannerStyles } from './col-banner.styles';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';
import { AlertComponent } from '@/config/components/alert-component/alert-component';

/**
 * Banner component is a visual tool used to grab the user's attention and communicate important messages in a prominent way.
 *
 * @element col-banner
 *
 * @summary A customizable banner component with optional title, content and actions.
 *
 * @slot - The banner body
 * @slot title - The banner title
 * @slot actions - The banner actions section
 *
 * @csspart banner - The main banner element
 * @csspart banner-container - The banner container inside the main element which handles content, icon and close-button
 * @csspart banner-content - The banner content element which handles title, body and actions
 *
 * @attr {string} variant - The semantic variant that determines the banner's appearance and color
 * @attr {number} duration  - The banner visibility time before it automatically closes
 *
 * @property {string} variant - The banner style variant (info, success, danger and warning)
 * @property {number} duration  - The banner visibility time before it automatically closes
 * @state {boolean} open - Whether the banner is open or close
 *
 * @fires close - Fired when the banner is close with either mouse click or keyboard action
 *
 * @default 'info' - Default variant value
 *
 */
@Meta({ name: 'banner' })
export class ColBanner extends AlertComponent {
  static styles = [ColBannerStyles];

  updated(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    super.updated(changedProps);
  }

  private _getIconByVariant(variant: string) {
    return variant === ALERT_VARIANTS.SUCCESS
      ? 'check-circle-fill'
      : this.variant === ALERT_VARIANTS.WARNING
        ? 'info-major-triangle-up-fill'
        : 'info-circle-fill';
  }

  private _getColorByVariant(variant: string): CSSResult {
    switch (variant) {
      case ALERT_VARIANTS.INFO:
        return getThemeVar('colors.icon.info');
      case ALERT_VARIANTS.SUCCESS:
        return getThemeVar('colors.icon.success');
      case ALERT_VARIANTS.WARNING:
        return getThemeVar('colors.icon.warning');
      case ALERT_VARIANTS.DANGER:
        return getThemeVar('colors.icon.danger');
    }
    return getThemeVar('colors.icon.info');
  }

  protected override _handleClose(e: Event) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    const details = {
      open: this.open,
      variant: this.variant,
      duration: this.duration,
      element: this,
    };
    this._dispatchClose(details);
  }

  private _handleEscapeKeyClose(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    switch (e.key) {
      case 'Escape':
        this._handleClose(e);
    }
  }

  protected override _handleKeyboardClose(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    switch (e.key) {
      case 'Enter':
      case ' ':
        this._handleClose(e);
    }
  }

  protected render() {
    const attrs = this._getCommonAttributes();

    return html`
      ${this.open
        ? html` <div
            id=${attrs.id}
            class="banner ${this.variant}"
            role=${attrs.role}
            part="banner"
            aria-describedby=${this.open ? 'banner-content' : nothing}
            aria-hidden=${attrs.ariaHidden}
            aria-live=${attrs.ariaLive}
            tabindex=${attrs.tabIndex}
            @keydown=${this._handleEscapeKeyClose}
          >
            <div class="banner-vertical-line ${this.variant}"></div>
            <div class="banner-container" part="banner-container">
              <div class="banner-icon" aria-hidden="true">
                <col-icon
                  size="16px"
                  name="${this._getIconByVariant(this.variant)}"
                  .color="${this._getColorByVariant(this.variant)}"
                ></col-icon>
              </div>
              <div class="banner-content" part="banner-content">
                <slot name="title"></slot>
                <slot></slot>
                <slot name="actions"></slot>
              </div>
            </div>
            ${this.renderCloseButton()}
          </div>`
        : nothing}
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-banner': ColBanner;
  }
}

export * from './col-banner';

FILE: src/components/molecules/collapse-footer/col-collapse-footer.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColCollapseFooter } from './col-collapse-footer';
import { ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

// Define custom elements if not already defined
if (!customElements.get('col-typography')) {
  customElements.define('col-typography', ColTypography);
}
if (!customElements.get('col-collapse-footer')) {
  customElements.define('col-collapse-footer', ColCollapseFooter);
}

describe('ColCollapseFooter component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-collapse-footer').forEach((el) => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('col-collapse-footer');
      expect(element.text).to.equal('');
      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render with text property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer text content"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      expect(element.text).to.equal('Footer text content');
      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Footer text content');
    });

    it('should render slotted content when text property is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer>Slotted footer content</col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      expect(element.text).to.equal('');
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Slotted footer content');
    });

    it('should prioritize text property over slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Property text">
          <span>Slotted content</span>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Property text');
    });

    it('should render footer container with correct structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer).to.exist;
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('part')).to.equal('collapse-footer');
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
    });
  });

  describe('Actions slot', () => {
    it('should render actions slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer text">
          <button slot="actions">Action Button</button>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot).to.exist;

      const actionsContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer-actions');
      expect(actionsContainer).to.exist;
      expect(actionsContainer?.getAttribute('part')).to.equal('collapse-footer-actions');

      const button = element.querySelector('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(button).to.exist;
      expect(button?.textContent).to.equal('Action Button');
    });

    it('should not render actions container when no actions are provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer text"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const actionsContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer-actions');
      expect(actionsContainer).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should handle multiple action buttons', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer text">
          <button slot="actions">Cancel</button>
          <button slot="actions">Save</button>
          <button slot="actions">Delete</button>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const actionButtons = element.querySelectorAll('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(actionButtons.length).to.equal(3);
      expect(actionButtons[0].textContent).to.equal('Cancel');
      expect(actionButtons[1].textContent).to.equal('Save');
      expect(actionButtons[2].textContent).to.equal('Delete');
    });

    it('should handle complex content in actions slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer text">
          <div slot="actions" class="button-group">
            <button>Primary</button>
            <a href="#">Link</a>
          </div>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const buttonGroup = element.querySelector('.button-group');
      expect(buttonGroup).to.exist;
      expect(buttonGroup?.getAttribute('slot')).to.equal('actions');

      const button = buttonGroup?.querySelector('button');
      const link = buttonGroup?.querySelector('a');
      expect(button?.textContent).to.equal('Primary');
      expect(link?.textContent).to.equal('Link');
    });
  });

  describe('Disabled state', () => {
    it('should not be disabled by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.false;

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.false;
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should apply disabled state correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer disabled></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.true;
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(footer?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.true;
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');

      element.disabled = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(footer?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.false;
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should maintain disabled state with actions', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer" disabled>
          <button slot="actions">Action</button>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.true;

      // Actions should still render but visually appear disabled via CSS
      const actionsContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer-actions');
      expect(actionsContainer).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('CSS parts', () => {
    it('should expose collapse-footer part', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer></col-collapse-footer>`
      );
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="collapse-footer"]');
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });

    it('should expose collapse-footer-content part', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="collapse-footer-content"]');
      expect(content).to.exist;
    });

    it('should expose collapse-footer-actions part when actions are provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer">
          <button slot="actions">Action</button>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );
      const actions = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="collapse-footer-actions"]');
      expect(actions).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Component integration', () => {
    it('should render ColTypography for text content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Test Footer"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );
      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.getAttribute('variant')).to.equal(TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.HEADING);
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Footer');
    });

    it('should maintain typography component with slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer>
          <span>Custom footer content</span>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );
      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.getAttribute('variant')).to.equal(TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.HEADING);

      const slot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update text dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Initial text"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Initial text');

      element.text = 'Updated text';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated text');
    });

    it('should switch between text property and slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer>
          <span>Slotted content</span>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      let typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      let slot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slot).to.exist;

      element.text = 'Property text';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Property text');
      slot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slot).to.not.exist;

      element.text = '';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      slot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should handle empty text property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text=""></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      // Should show slot when text is empty
      const slot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Accessible footer"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should update ARIA attributes when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should maintain semantic structure with actions', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Footer information">
          <button slot="actions" aria-label="Close panel">Close</button>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-footer');
      expect(footer).to.exist;

      const button = element.querySelector('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(button?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close panel');
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle long text content gracefully', async () => {
      const longText = 'This is a very long footer text that might overflow in certain scenarios and should be handled appropriately with text overflow styles';
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="${longText}"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal(longText);
    });

    it('should handle mixed HTML content in default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer>
          <span>Regular text</span>
          <strong>Bold text</strong>
          <em>Italic text</em>
        </col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const span = element.querySelector('span');
      const strong = element.querySelector('strong');
      const em = element.querySelector('em');

      expect(span?.textContent).to.equal('Regular text');
      expect(strong?.textContent).to.equal('Bold text');
      expect(em?.textContent).to.equal('Italic text');
    });

    it('should handle undefined text property with fallback to slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      // Should render the slot when text is undefined or empty
      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should handle rapid property updates', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseFooter>(
        html`<col-collapse-footer text="Initial"></col-collapse-footer>`
      );

      const updates = ['First', 'Second', 'Third', 'Final'];

      for (const text of updates) {
        element.text = text;
        await elementUpdated(element);
      }

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-footer-text');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Final');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/collapse-footer/col-collapse-footer.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColCollapseFooterStyles } from './col-collpase-footer.styles';

/**
 * Collapse footer component that provides a footer for accordion/collapse panels.
 *
 * @element col-collapse-footer
 *
 * @summary A flexible collapse footer component with text content and optional action buttons.
 *
 * @slot - The default slot for footer text content (used when text property is not provided)
 * @slot actions - Optional actions to display on the right side (e.g., buttons, links)
 *
 * @csspart collapse-footer - The main footer container element
 * @csspart collapse-footer-content - The content area containing the text
 * @csspart collapse-footer-actions - The actions container
 *
 * @attr {string} text - The footer text content
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the collapse footer is disabled
 *
 * @property {string} text - The footer text content
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the collapse footer is disabled
 *
 * @default '' - Default text value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'collapse-footer', components: [ColTypography] })
export class ColCollapseFooter extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColCollapseFooterStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  text = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled = false;

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        class="collapse-footer ${this.disabled ? 'disabled' : ''}"
        part="collapse-footer"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <div class="collapse-footer-content" part="collapse-footer-content">
          <col-typography variant=${TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.HEADING} class="collapse-footer-text">
            ${this.text ? this.text : html`<slot></slot>`}
          </col-typography>
        </div>

        ${this.hasSlotted('actions')
      ? html`
              <div class="collapse-footer-actions" part="collapse-footer-actions">
                <slot name="actions"></slot>
              </div>
            `
      : nothing}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-collapse-footer': ColCollapseFooter;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColCollapseFooterStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
  }

  .collapse-footer {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-top: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    min-height: 48px;
  }

  .collapse-footer.disabled {
    opacity: 0.5;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .collapse-footer-content {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .collapse-footer-text {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
  }

  .collapse-footer-actions {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  ::slotted([slot='actions']) {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  /* Ensure proper alignment when there are multiple action buttons */
  ::slotted([slot='actions'] > *) {
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
`;

import { css } from 'lit';

export const ColCollapseHeaderStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
  }

  .collapse-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    cursor: pointer;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    transition:
      background-color 0.2s ease,
      border-color 0.2s ease,
      box-shadow 0.2s ease;
    user-select: none;
  }

  .collapse-header.outlined {
    border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
  }

  .collapse-header:focus-visible {
    outline: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.focus')};
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .collapse-header.disabled {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }

    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
  }

    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;

    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
  }

  .collapse-header.expanded .collapse-header-icon {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
  }

  .collapse-header.disabled .collapse-header-icon {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.disabled')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='subtitle']) {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='actions']) {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-left: auto;
  }
`;



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/collapse-header/col-collapse-header.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, waitUntil } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColCollapseHeader } from './col-collapse-header';
import { ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';

// Define custom elements if not already defined
if (!customElements.get('col-icon')) {
  customElements.define('col-icon', ColIcon);
}
if (!customElements.get('col-typography')) {
  customElements.define('col-typography', ColTypography);
}
if (!customElements.get('col-collapse-header')) {
  customElements.define('col-collapse-header', ColCollapseHeader);
}

function once<E extends Event = Event>(target: EventTarget, type: string): Promise<E> {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    target.addEventListener(type, (e) => resolve(e as E), { once: true });
  });
}


function makeCounter<T extends Event = Event>() {
  let count = 0;
  let lastEvent: T | null = null;
  const handler = (e: Event) => {
    count++;
    lastEvent = e as T;
  };
  return {
    handler,
    get count() {
      return count;
    },
    get last() {
      return lastEvent;
    },
    reset() {
      count = 0;
      lastEvent = null;
    },
  };
}

describe('ColCollapseHeader component', () => {
  const originalWarn = console.warn;
  let warnCalls: any[] = [];

  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
    // capture console.warn
    warnCalls = [];
    console.warn = (...args: any[]) => {
      warnCalls.push(args);
      originalWarn(...args);
    };
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-collapse-header').forEach((el) => el.remove());
    console.warn = originalWarn;
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('col-collapse-header');
      expect(element.title).to.equal('');
      expect(element.expanded).to.be.false;
      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
      expect(element.variant).to.equal('default');
    });

    it('should render with title property', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Test Title"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element.title).to.equal('Test Title');
      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-header-title');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Title');
    });

    it('should render slotted content when title property is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header>Slotted Title Content</col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element.title).to.equal('');
      expect(element.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Slotted Title Content');
    });

    it('should render subtitle slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Main Title">
          <span slot="subtitle">Subtitle Content</span>
        </col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const subtitleSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="subtitle"]');
      expect(subtitleSlot).to.exist;

      const subtitleTypography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'col-typography.collapse-header-subtitle'
      );
      expect(subtitleTypography).to.exist;
    });

    it('should hide subtitle typography when no subtitle slot is provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Main Title"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const subtitleTypography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'col-typography.collapse-header-subtitle'
      );
      expect(subtitleTypography).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should render actions slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Title">
          <button slot="actions">Action Button</button>
        </col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot).to.exist;
      expect(actionsSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should hide actions slot when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Title"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Variant property', () => {
    it('should apply default variant class', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('default')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply outlined variant class', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header variant="outlined"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('outlined')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should validate variant property and fallback to default for invalid values', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header variant="invalid-variant"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(warnCalls.length).to.be.greaterThan(0);
      expect(element.variant).to.equal('default');
    });
  });

  describe('Expanded state', () => {
    it('should not be expanded by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element.expanded).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('expanded')).to.be.false;

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.false;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
    });

    it('should apply expanded state correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header expanded></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element.expanded).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('expanded')).to.be.true;

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.true;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should rotate chevron icon when expanded (via CSS)', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');

      expect(header?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.false;

      element.expanded = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(header?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Disabled state', () => {
    it('should not be disabled by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.false;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.false;

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.false;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should apply disabled state correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header disabled></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.true;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should prevent click events when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header disabled></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      header.click();

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(0);
    });

    it('should prevent keyboard events when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header disabled></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true, cancelable: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(0);
    });
  });

  describe('Toggle event', () => {
    it('should emit toggle event on click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      header.click();

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(1);
      expect((toggleCounter.last as CustomEvent).detail).to.deep.equal({ expanded: true });
    });

    it('should emit toggle event with correct expanded state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header expanded></col-collapse-header>`);

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      header.click();

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(1);
      expect((toggleCounter.last as CustomEvent).detail).to.deep.equal({ expanded: false });
    });

    it('should emit toggle event on Enter key press', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true, cancelable: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(1);
      expect((toggleCounter.last as CustomEvent).detail).to.deep.equal({ expanded: true });
    });

    it('should emit toggle event on Space key press', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      const spaceEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', bubbles: true, cancelable: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(spaceEvent);

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(1);
      expect((toggleCounter.last as CustomEvent).detail).to.deep.equal({ expanded: true });
    });

    it('should not emit toggle event on other key presses', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      const escEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape', bubbles: true, cancelable: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(escEvent);

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.equal(0);
    });
  });

  describe('Event properties', () => {
    it('should emit events that bubble', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);

      const docCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      document.addEventListener('toggle', docCounter.handler as EventListener, { once: true });

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      header.click();

      // wait for event loop to dispatch
      await waitUntil(() => docCounter.count === 1, 'toggle did not bubble to document');
      expect(docCounter.count).to.equal(1);
      expect((docCounter.last as CustomEvent).bubbles).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should emit events that are composed', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const evtP = once<CustomEvent>(element, 'toggle');
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;
      header.click();
      const event = await evtP;

      expect(event.composed).to.be.true;
    });

  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Accessible Header"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('button');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('false');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('false');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('should update ARIA attributes when expanded', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header title="Header"></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');

      element.expanded = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should update ARIA attributes when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header title="Header"></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
    });

    it('should have aria-hidden on chevron icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const iconContainer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header-icon');
      expect(iconContainer?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should be keyboard accessible', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;

      expect(header.tabIndex).to.equal(0);

      const toggleCounter = makeCounter<CustomEvent>();
      element.addEventListener('toggle', toggleCounter.handler as EventListener);

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', bubbles: true, cancelable: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);

      expect(toggleCounter.count).to.be.greaterThan(0);
    });
  });

  describe('CSS parts', () => {
    it('should expose collapse-header part', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="collapse-header"]');
      expect(header).to.exist;
    });

    it('should expose collapse-header-icon part', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const icon = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="collapse-header-icon"]');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
    });

    it('should expose collapse-header-content part', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="collapse-header-content"]');
      expect(content).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Component integration', () => {
    it('should render ColIcon component for chevron', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const icon = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-icon');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('chevron-down');
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('size')).to.equal('16');
    });

    it('should render ColTypography for title', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header title="Test Title"></col-collapse-header>`);
      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-header-title');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.getAttribute('variant')).to.equal('heading');
    });

    it('should render ColTypography for subtitle when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header>
          <span slot="subtitle">Subtitle</span>
        </col-collapse-header>`);
      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-header-subtitle');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.getAttribute('variant')).to.equal('subheading');
    });
  });

  describe('Dynamic property updates', () => {
    it('should update title dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(
        html`<col-collapse-header title="Initial Title"></col-collapse-header>`
      );

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography.collapse-header-title');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Initial Title');

      element.title = 'Updated Title';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Title');
    });

    it('should update expanded state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.false;

      element.expanded = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(header?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.true;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should update disabled state dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header');
      expect(header?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.false;

      element.disabled = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(header?.classList.contains('disabled')).to.be.true;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-disabled')).to.equal('true');
    });
  });

  describe('Event prevention', () => {
    it('should prevent default on Enter key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;

      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter', cancelable: true, bubbles: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(event);

      expect(event.defaultPrevented).to.equal(true);
    });

    it('should prevent default on Space key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;

      const event = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: ' ', cancelable: true, bubbles: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(event);

      expect(event.defaultPrevented).to.equal(true);
    });

    it('should stop propagation when disabled and clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColCollapseHeader>(html`<col-collapse-header disabled></col-collapse-header>`);
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.collapse-header') as HTMLElement;

      let docClickCount = 0;
      const docListener = () => {
        docClickCount++;
      };
      document.addEventListener('click', docListener);

      const click = new MouseEvent('click', { cancelable: true, bubbles: true, composed: true });
      header.dispatchEvent(click);

      // If stopPropagation was called inside, the event won’t reach document.
      await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 0));
      document.removeEventListener('click', docListener);

      expect(docClickCount).to.equal(0);
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/collapse-header/col-collapse-header.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate } from '@/config';
import { ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS, COLLAPSE_HEADER_VARIANTS, getEnumValues } from '@/types';
import { ColCollapseHeaderStyles } from './col-collapse-header.styles';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';

/**
 * Collapse header component that provides a header for accordion/collapse panels.
 *
 * @element col-collapse-header
 *
 * @summary A flexible collapse header component with title, optional subtitle, prefix icon, and expandable chevron indicator.
 *
 * @slot - The default slot for title content (used when title property is not provided)
 * @slot subtitle - Optional subtitle to display below the title
 * @slot actions - Optional actions to display on the right side (e.g., buttons, icons)
 *
 * @csspart collapse-header - The main header container element
 * @csspart collapse-header-content - The content area containing title and subtitle
 * @csspart collapse-header-icon - The chevron icon container
 *
 * @attr {string} title - The header title text
 * @attr {boolean} expanded - Whether the collapse panel is expanded
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the collapse header is disabled
 * @attr {string} variant - The header style variant (default, outlined)
 *
 * @property {string} title - The header title text
 * @property {boolean} expanded - Whether the collapse panel is expanded
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the collapse header is disabled
 * @property {string} variant - The header style variant (default, outlined)
 *
 * @fires toggle - Fired when the header is clicked to toggle expansion state
 *
 * @default '' - Default title value
 * @default false - Default expanded state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'collapse-header', components: [ColTypography, ColIcon] })
export class ColCollapseHeader extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColCollapseHeaderStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  title = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  expanded = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled = false;

  @Validate(getEnumValues(COLLAPSE_HEADER_VARIANTS), COLLAPSE_HEADER_VARIANTS.DEFAULT)
  @property({ type: String })
  variant!: COLLAPSE_HEADER_VARIANTS;

  private _handleClick(e: Event) {
    if (this.disabled) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      return;
    }

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: {
          expanded: !this.expanded,
        },
      })
    );
  }

  private _handleKeyDown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this._handleClick(e);
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        class="collapse-header ${this.variant} ${this.expanded ? 'expanded' : ''} ${this.disabled
          ? 'disabled'
          : ''}"
        part="collapse-header"
        role="button"
        aria-expanded="${this.expanded}"
        aria-disabled="${this.disabled}"
        tabindex="${this.disabled ? '-1' : '0'}"
        @click=${this._handleClick}
        @keydown=${this._handleKeyDown}
      >
        <div class="collapse-header-icon" part="collapse-header-icon" aria-hidden="true">
          <col-icon name="chevron-down" size="16"></col-icon>
        </div>

        <div class="collapse-header-content" part="collapse-header-content">
          <col-typography variant=${TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.HEADING} class="collapse-header-title">
            ${this.title ? this.title : html`<slot></slot>`}
          </col-typography>

          ${this.hasSlotted('subtitle')
            ? html`
                <col-typography
                  variant=${TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.SUBHEADING}
                  class="collapse-header-subtitle"
                >
                  <slot name="subtitle"></slot>
                </col-typography>
              `
            : nothing}
        </div>

        <slot name="actions" ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('actions')}></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-collapse-header': ColCollapseHeader;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColListMenuStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: inline;
    width: 100%;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} 0px;
  }

  ::slotted([slot='header']),
  ::slotted([slot='footer']) {
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    width: fill-available;
    width: -webkit-fill-available;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='header']) {
    border-bottom: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.base-light')};
  }

  ::slotted([slot='footer']) {
    border-top: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.base-light')};
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/list-menu/col-list-menu.test.ts

import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColListMenu } from './col-list-menu';

describe('ColListMenu', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-list-menu')) {
      customElements.define('col-list-menu', ColListMenu);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-list-menu').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  it('should render with default properties', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`<col-list-menu></col-list-menu>`);
    expect(el).to.exist;
    expect(el.multiSelectable).to.be.false;
    expect(el.role).to.equal('listbox');
    expect(el.shadowRoot).to.exist;
    const container = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="listbox"]');
    expect(container).to.exist;
    expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('List Menu');
    expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-multiselectable')).to.equal('false');
  });

  it('should reflect multiSelectable and role properties', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(
      html`<col-list-menu multiSelectable role="menu"></col-list-menu>`
    );
    expect(el.multiSelectable).to.be.true;
    expect(el.role).to.equal('menu');
    const container = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="menu"]');
    expect(container).to.exist;
    expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-multiselectable')).to.equal('false');
  });

  it('should set aria-multiselectable to true when multiSelectable and role="listbox"', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(
      html`<col-list-menu multiSelectable role="listbox"></col-list-menu>`
    );
    await elementUpdated(el);
    const container = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="listbox"]');
    expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-multiselectable')).to.equal('true');
  });

  it('should render all slots', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`
      <col-list-menu>
        <div slot="banner">Banner Content</div>
        <div slot="header">Header Content</div>
        <span>Default Slot Content</span>
        <div slot="footer">Footer Content</div>
      </col-list-menu>
    `);
    const bannerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="banner"]');
    const headerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="header"]');
    const defaultSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
    const footerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="footer"]');
    expect(bannerSlot).to.exist;
    expect(headerSlot).to.exist;
    expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;
    expect(footerSlot).to.exist;
  });

  it('should render content in the "banner" slot', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`
      <col-list-menu>
        <div slot="banner">Banner Content</div>
      </col-list-menu>
    `);
    const bannerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="banner"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    expect(bannerSlot).to.exist;
    const assignedNodes = bannerSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true });
    expect(assignedNodes).to.have.lengthOf(1);
    expect(assignedNodes[0].textContent).to.equal('Banner Content');
  });

  it('should render content in the "header" slot', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`
      <col-list-menu>
        <h2 slot="header">Header Title</h2>
      </col-list-menu>
    `);
    const headerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="header"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    expect(headerSlot).to.exist;
    const assignedNodes = headerSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true });
    expect(assignedNodes).to.have.lengthOf(1);
    expect(assignedNodes[0].textContent).to.equal('Header Title');
  });

  it('should render content in the default slot', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`
      <col-list-menu>
        <span>Default List Item 1</span>
        <span>Default List Item 2</span>
      </col-list-menu>
    `);
    const defaultSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
    expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;
    const assignedElements =
      defaultSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true }).filter(n => n.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) ??
      [];
    expect(assignedElements).to.have.lengthOf(2);
    expect((assignedElements[0] as HTMLElement).textContent).to.equal('Default List Item 1');
    expect((assignedElements[1] as HTMLElement).textContent).to.equal('Default List Item 2');
  });

  it('should render content in the "footer" slot', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`
      <col-list-menu>
        <div slot="footer">Footer Info</div>
      </col-list-menu>
    `);
    const footerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="footer"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    expect(footerSlot).to.exist;
    const assignedNodes = footerSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true });
    expect(assignedNodes).to.have.lengthOf(1);
    expect(assignedNodes[0].textContent).to.equal('Footer Info');
  });

  it('renders content in multiple slots simultaneously', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`
      <col-list-menu>
        <div slot="banner">Test Banner</div>
        <h3 slot="header">Test Header</h3>
        <span>Default Item</span>
        <p slot="footer">Test Footer</p>
      </col-list-menu>
    `);
    const bannerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="banner"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    const headerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="header"]') as HTMLSlotElement;
    const defaultSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])') as HTMLSlotElement;
    const footerSlot = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="footer"]') as HTMLSlotElement;

    const defaultElements =
      defaultSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true }).filter(n => n.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) ??
      [];
    expect(bannerSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Test Banner');
    expect(headerSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Test Header');
    expect(defaultElements[0].textContent).to.equal('Default Item');
    expect(footerSlot?.assignedNodes({ flatten: true })[0].textContent).to.equal('Test Footer');
  });

  it('should update role and aria-multiselectable dynamically', async () => {
    const el = await fixture<ColListMenu>(html`<col-list-menu></col-list-menu>`);
    el.role = 'menu';
    el.multiSelectable = true;
    await elementUpdated(el);
    const container = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="menu"]');
    expect(container).to.exist;
    expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-multiselectable')).to.equal('false');
    el.role = 'listbox';
    await elementUpdated(el);
    const containerListbox = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="listbox"]');
    expect(containerListbox?.getAttribute('aria-multiselectable')).to.equal('true');
  });
});

FILE: src/components/molecules/list-menu/col-list-menu.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property, queryAssignedElements } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { provide } from '@lit/context';

import { ColListMenuItem } from '@/components/atoms';
import { listMenuContext, ListMenuContextValue, Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';

import { ColListMenuStyles } from './col-list-menu.styles';

/**
 * List menu component for organizing menu items with optional sections.
 *
 * @element col-list-menu
 *
 * @summary A list menu component that provides structure for organizing menu items, supporting banner, header, and footer sections, ARIA roles, and multi-selection.
 *
 * @slot - The main menu items (add <col-list-menu-item> elements here).
 * @slot banner - Optional <col-banner> content at the top of the menu.
 * @slot header - Optional header content below the banner.
 * @slot footer - Optional footer content at the bottom of the menu.
 *
 * @csspart list-menu - The main menu container element.
 *
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the menu.
 * @attr {boolean} multiselectable - Enables multi-selection mode (only for role="listbox").
 * @attr {string} role - ARIA role for the menu (`listbox` or `menu`).
 *
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the menu.
 * @property {boolean} multiSelectable - Enables multi-selection mode (only for role="listbox").
 * @property {'listbox'|'menu'} role - ARIA role for the menu.
 * @property {ColListMenuItem[]} menuItems - The menu items in the menu.
 *
 * @default 'List Menu' ariaLabel - Default accessible label.
 * @default false multiSelectable - Default multi-selection state.
 * @default 'listbox' role - Default ARIA role.
 *
 * @summary
 * - Use `role="listbox"` for selectable lists, optionally with `multiselectable`.
 * - Use `role="menu"` for navigation/action menus (do not use `multiselectable`).
 * - Banner, header, and footer slots provide additional
 */
@Meta({ name: 'list-menu' })
export class ColListMenu extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColListMenuStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'List Menu';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  multiSelectable: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  role: 'listbox' | 'menu' = 'listbox';

  @queryAssignedElements({ slot: '', flatten: true })
  public menuItems!: ColListMenuItem[];

  @provide({ context: listMenuContext })
  contextValue: ListMenuContextValue = {
    role: this.role,
    multiSelectable: this.multiSelectable,
    menuItems: [],
  };

  updated() {
    this.contextValue.role = this.role;
    this.contextValue.multiSelectable = this.multiSelectable;
    this.contextValue.menuItems = this.menuItems;
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        role=${this.role}
        aria-label=${this.ariaLabel}
        aria-multiselectable=${this.multiSelectable && this.role === 'listbox'}
      >
        <slot name="banner"></slot>
        <slot name="header"></slot>
        <slot></slot>
        <slot name="footer"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-list-menu': ColListMenu;
  }
}

  }

  ::part(typography) {

  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/modal-footer/col-modal-footer.test.ts
