import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColModalFooter } from './col-modal-footer';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

describe('ColModalFooter component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-modal-footer')) {
      customElements.define('col-modal-footer', ColModalFooter);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-modal-footer').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html` <col-modal-footer></col-modal-footer> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.description).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element.customDescription).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render the toolbar container', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html` <col-modal-footer></col-modal-footer> `);

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.modal-footer');
      expect(footer).to.exist;
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('part')).to.equal('modal-footer');
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('contentinfo');
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Modal footer');
    });

    it('should render col-spacer when not in custom mode', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html` <col-modal-footer></col-modal-footer> `);

      const spacer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-spacer');
      expect(spacer).to.exist;
      expect(spacer?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render actions slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer>
          <button slot="actions">Action Button</button>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot).to.exist;

      const button = element.querySelector('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(button).to.exist;
      expect(button?.textContent).to.equal('Action Button');
    });
  });

  describe('Description property', () => {
    it('should render description text when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Footer description text"></col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.textContent).to.equal('Footer description text');
      expect(typography?.getAttribute('variant')).to.equal(TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.HELPER);
    });

    it('should update description dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Initial text"></col-modal-footer>
      `);

      let typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography?.textContent).to.equal('Initial text');

      element.description = 'Updated text';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography?.textContent).to.equal('Updated text');
    });

    it('should render default slot when description is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer>
          <span>Default content</span>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;

      const content = element.querySelector('span');
      expect(content?.textContent).to.equal('Default content');
    });

    it('should prioritize description property over default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Property text">
          <span>Slot content</span>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography?.textContent).to.equal('Property text');

      // The slot content should not be visible when description is provided
      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should handle empty description', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description=""></col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.textContent).to.equal('');
    });

    it('should handle undefined description with fallback to slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html` <col-modal-footer></col-modal-footer> `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      // Should render the slot when description is undefined
      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Slots', () => {
    it('should render multiple action buttons', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Footer text">
          <button slot="actions">Cancel</button>
          <button slot="actions">Save</button>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const actionButtons = element.querySelectorAll('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(actionButtons.length).to.equal(2);
      expect(actionButtons[0].textContent).to.equal('Cancel');
      expect(actionButtons[1].textContent).to.equal('Save');
    });

    it('should handle empty actions slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Footer text"></col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot).to.exist;

      const actionElements = element.querySelectorAll('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(actionElements.length).to.equal(0);
    });

    it('should render complex content in actions slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Footer text">
          <div slot="actions" class="button-group">
            <button>Primary</button>
            <button>Secondary</button>
          </div>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const buttonGroup = element.querySelector('.button-group');
      expect(buttonGroup).to.exist;
      expect(buttonGroup?.getAttribute('slot')).to.equal('actions');

      const buttons = buttonGroup?.querySelectorAll('button');
      expect(buttons?.length).to.equal(2);
    });

    it('should handle mixed content in default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer>
          <span>Text content</span>
          <strong>Bold text</strong>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      const span = element.querySelector('span');
      const strong = element.querySelector('strong');
      expect(span?.textContent).to.equal('Text content');
      expect(strong?.textContent).to.equal('Bold text');
    });

    it('should render custom description with complex HTML', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer customdescription>
          <div class="custom-layout">
            <h3>Custom Title</h3>
            <p>Custom paragraph</p>
          </div>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const customLayout = element.querySelector('.custom-layout');
      expect(customLayout).to.exist;

      const title = customLayout?.querySelector('h3');
      const paragraph = customLayout?.querySelector('p');
      expect(title?.textContent).to.equal('Custom Title');
      expect(paragraph?.textContent).to.equal('Custom paragraph');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Footer info">
          <button slot="actions">Close</button>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.modal-footer');
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('contentinfo');
      expect(footer?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Modal footer');
    });

    it('should maintain semantic structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalFooter>(html`
        <col-modal-footer description="Information">
          <button slot="actions" aria-label="Close dialog">Close</button>
        </col-modal-footer>
      `);

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[role="contentinfo"]');
      expect(footer).to.exist;

      const button = element.querySelector('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(button?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close dialog');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/modal-footer/col-modal-footer.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColSpacer, ColToolbar, ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { ColModalFooterStyles } from '@/components/molecules/modal-footer/col-modal-footer.styles';

/**
 * Modal footer component that provides a consistent footer layout for modals and dialogs.
 *
 * @element col-modal-footer
 *
 * @summary A flexible modal footer component with description text and action buttons.
 *
 * @slot - The default slot for description content (used when description property is not provided or in custom mode)
 * @slot actions-left - Action buttons to display on the left side of the footer (before the spacer)
 * @slot actions - Action buttons to display on the right side of the footer
 *
 * @csspart modal-footer - The main footer toolbar element
 *
 * @attr {string} description - The footer description text
 * @attr {boolean} custom-description - Enable custom description mode for full control over left content
 * @attr {boolean} hidden-actions-button - Hide the actions slot (deprecated - use CSS or conditional rendering instead)
 *
 * @property {string} description - The footer description text
 * @property {boolean} customDescription - Enable custom description mode for full control over left content
 * @property {boolean} hiddenActionsButton - Hide the actions slot (deprecated - use CSS or conditional rendering instead)
 *
 * @default '' - Default description value
 * @default false - Default customDescription state
 * @default false - Default hiddenActionsButton state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'modal-footer', components: [ColToolbar, ColSpacer, ColTypography] })
export class ColModalFooter extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColModalFooterStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  description!: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  customDescription = false;

  render() {
    return html`
      <div class="modal-footer" part="modal-footer" role="contentinfo" aria-label="Modal footer">
        ${this.customDescription
          ? html`<slot></slot>`
          : html`
              <col-typography variant=${TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.HELPER}
                >${this.description ?? html`<slot></slot>`}</col-typography
              >
            `}
        <slot name="actions-left"></slot>
        <col-spacer ?hidden=${this.customDescription}></col-spacer>
        <slot name="actions"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-modal-footer': ColModalFooter;
  }
}

    display: flex;
    flex: 1 0 0;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
  }

  ::part(typography) {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/modal-header/col-modal-header.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColModalHeader } from './col-modal-header';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS } from '@/types';

describe('ColModalHeader component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-modal-header')) {
      customElements.define('col-modal-header', ColModalHeader);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-modal-header').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html` <col-modal-header></col-modal-header> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.title).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element.customHeader).to.be.false;
      expect(element.noCloseButton).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render the toolbar container', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html` <col-modal-header></col-modal-header> `);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.modal-header');
      expect(header).to.exist;
      expect(header?.getAttribute('part')).to.equal('modal-header');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('banner');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Modal header');
    });

    it('should render close button by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html` <col-modal-header></col-modal-header> `);

      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-button');
      expect(closeButton).to.exist;
      expect(closeButton?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close modal');
      expect(closeButton?.getAttribute('title')).to.equal('Close modal');

      const icon = closeButton?.querySelector('col-icon');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('close');
    });

    it('should render spacer in normal mode', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html` <col-modal-header></col-modal-header> `);

      const spacer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-spacer');
      expect(spacer).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Title property', () => {
    it('should render title when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Modal Title"></col-modal-header>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Modal Title');
      expect(typography?.getAttribute('variant')).to.equal(TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.SUBHEADING);
    });

    it('should update title dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Initial Title"></col-modal-header>
      `);

      let typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Initial Title');

      element.title = 'Updated Title';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Updated Title');
    });

    it('should render default slot when title is not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header>
          <span>Custom Title Content</span>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;

      const content = element.querySelector('span');
      expect(content?.textContent).to.equal('Custom Title Content');
    });

    it('should prioritize title property over default slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Property Title">
          <span>Slot Content</span>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Property Title');

      // Slot content should not be visible when title is provided
      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should handle empty title', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title=""></col-modal-header>
      `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;
      expect(typography?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('');
    });

    it('should handle undefined title with fallback to slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html` <col-modal-header></col-modal-header> `);

      const typography = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-typography');
      expect(typography).to.exist;

      const defaultSlot = typography?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(defaultSlot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Named slots', () => {
    it('should render icon slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Title">
          <col-icon slot="icon" name="info"></col-icon>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
      expect(iconSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;

      const icon = element.querySelector('[slot="icon"]');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('info');
    });

    it('should hide icon slot when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Title"></col-modal-header>
      `);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
      expect(iconSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render badge slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Title">
          <span slot="badge" class="badge">New</span>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const badgeSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="badge"]');
      expect(badgeSlot).to.exist;
      expect(badgeSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;

      const badge = element.querySelector('[slot="badge"]');
      expect(badge).to.exist;
      expect(badge?.textContent).to.equal('New');
    });

    it('should hide badge slot when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Title"></col-modal-header>
      `);

      const badgeSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="badge"]');
      expect(badgeSlot).to.exist;
      expect(badgeSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render actions slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Title">
          <button slot="actions">Action 1</button>
          <button slot="actions">Action 2</button>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot).to.exist;
      expect(actionsSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;

      const actions = element.querySelectorAll('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(actions.length).to.equal(2);
      expect(actions[0].textContent).to.equal('Action 1');
      expect(actions[1].textContent).to.equal('Action 2');
    });

    it('should hide actions slot when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Title"></col-modal-header>
      `);

      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');
      expect(actionsSlot).to.exist;
      expect(actionsSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render all slots together', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Complete Header">
          <col-icon slot="icon" name="star"></col-icon>
          <span slot="badge">Premium</span>
          <button slot="actions">Settings</button>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      const badgeSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="badge"]');
      const actionsSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="actions"]');

      expect(iconSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
      expect(badgeSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
      expect(actionsSlot?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;

      const icon = element.querySelector('[slot="icon"]');
      const badge = element.querySelector('[slot="badge"]');
      const action = element.querySelector('[slot="actions"]');

      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(badge?.textContent).to.equal('Premium');
      expect(action?.textContent).to.equal('Settings');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Accessible Header"></col-modal-header>
      `);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.modal-header');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('banner');
      expect(header?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Modal header');

      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-button');
      expect(closeButton?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close modal');
      expect(closeButton?.getAttribute('title')).to.equal('Close modal');
    });

    it('should maintain semantic structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColModalHeader>(html`
        <col-modal-header title="Header">
          <button slot="actions" aria-label="Settings">Settings</button>
        </col-modal-header>
      `);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[role="banner"]');
      expect(header).to.exist;

      const actionButton = element.querySelector('[slot="actions"]');
      expect(actionButton?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Settings');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/modal-header/col-modal-header.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColButton, ColSpacer, ColToolbar, ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColModalHeaderStyles } from '@/components/molecules/modal-header/col-modal-header.styles';

/**
 * Modal header component that provides a consistent header layout for modals and dialogs.
 *
 * @element col-modal-header
 *
 * @summary A flexible modal header component with title, optional icon, badge, actions, and close button.
 *
 * @slot - The default slot for title content (used when title property is not provided)
 * @slot icon - Optional icon to display before the title
 * @slot badge - Optional badge to display after the title
 * @slot actions - Optional action buttons to display before the close button
 *
 * @csspart modal-header - The main header toolbar element
 *
 * @attr {string} title - The header title text
 * @attr {boolean} custom-header - Enable custom header mode for full control over layout
 * @attr {boolean} hidden-close-button - Hide the default close button
 *
 * @property {string} title - The header title text
 * @property {boolean} customHeader - Enable custom header mode for full control over layout
 * @property {boolean} noCloseButton - Hide the default close button
 *
 * @default '' - Default title value
 * @default false - Default customHeader state
 * @default false - Default hiddenCloseButton state
 *
 * @fire on-close when click in close button
 */
@Meta({ name: 'modal-header', components: [ColToolbar, ColSpacer, ColButton, ColTypography] })
export class ColModalHeader extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColModalHeaderStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  title!: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean, attribute: 'customheader' })
  customHeader = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, attribute: 'noclosebutton' })
  noCloseButton = false;

  private _handleClose(e: Event) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('on-close', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div class="modal-header" part="modal-header" role="banner" aria-label="Modal header">
        ${this.customHeader
          ? html`<slot></slot><col-spacer></col-spacer>`
          : html`
              <slot name="icon" ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('icon')}></slot>
              <col-typography variant=${TYPOGRAPHY_VARIANTS.SUBHEADING}>
                ${this.title ?? html`<slot></slot>`}
              </col-typography>
              <slot name="badge" ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('badge')}></slot>
              <col-spacer></col-spacer>
              <slot name="actions" ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('actions')}></slot>
            `}
        ${!this.noCloseButton
          ? html`
              <col-button aria-label="Close modal" title="Close modal" @click=${this._handleClose}>
                <col-icon name="close" size="16"></col-icon>
              </col-button>
            `
          : nothing}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-modal-header': ColModalHeader;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColNumberFieldStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    width: var(--input-width, auto);
    --border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    --border-width: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')};
    --inner-border-radius: calc(var(--border-radius) - var(--border-width));
    --focus-outline-offset: calc(-1 * var(--border-width));
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container.size-large .number-input {
    border-radius: var(--inner-border-radius);
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container.size-small .number-input {
    border-radius: 0 var(--inner-border-radius) var(--inner-border-radius) 0;
    border-left: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  :host([disabled]) .number-button,
  :host([disabled]) .button-container,
  :host([readonly]) .number-button,
  :host([readonly]) .button-container {
    display: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container {
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
  }

  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-small .leading-icon {
    display: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container.size-large,
  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-large {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    grid-template-areas: 'input';
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container.size-small,
  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-small {
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
    grid-template-areas: 'icon input';
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container.size-small:not(.has-icon),
  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-small:not(.has-icon) {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    grid-template-areas: 'input';
  }

  :host([disabled]) .input-container.size-small .leading-icon,
  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-small .leading-icon {
    border: none;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-small,
  :host([readonly]) .input-container.size-large {
    border: none;
    background: transparent;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([error]) .number-input.input-error {
    outline: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
    border: none;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  :host([inactive]) .number-input {
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    cursor: default;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([inactive]) .number-input:focus,
  :host([inactive]) .number-input:focus-visible {
    outline: none;
    border: none;
    box-shadow: none;
  }

  :host(:not([variant='plain'])) .leading-icon {
    border-right: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  :host(:not([variant='plain'])) .button-container {
    border-left: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  :host([variant='plain']) .size-small .decrement-button {
    border-radius: 0 0 var(--inner-border-radius) 0;
  }

  :host([variant='plain']) .size-small .increment-button {
    border-radius: 0 var(--inner-border-radius) 0 0;
  }

  input:not([readonly]) {
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} 0;
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  .input-container {
    display: grid;
    align-items: center;
    border: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    height: 32px;
  }

  .input {
    display: block;
  }

  .input-variant-outline input,
  .input-variant-plain .input-container {
    border: none;
  }

  .input-container.size-large {
    grid-template-columns: 32px 1fr 32px;
    grid-template-areas: 'decrement input increment';
  }

  .input-container.size-large button {
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .input-container.size-large input {
    text-align: center;
  }

  .input-container.size-small {
    grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
    grid-template-areas: 'icon input buttons';
  }

  .input-container.size-small button {
    padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .input-container.size-small:not(.has-icon) {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
    grid-template-areas: 'input buttons';
  }

  .number-input {
    grid-area: input;
    min-width: 0;
    appearance: textfield;
    -moz-appearance: textfield;
  }

  .number-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
  .number-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .leading-icon {
    grid-area: icon;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 32px;
    height: 100%;
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: var(--inner-border-radius) 0 0 var(--inner-border-radius);
  }

  .size-large .increment-button {
    grid-area: increment;
  }

  .size-large .decrement-button {
    grid-area: decrement;
  }

  .size-large .decrement-button:focus,
  .size-large .decrement-button:active {
    border-radius: var(--inner-border-radius) 0 0 var(--inner-border-radius);
  }

  .size-large .increment-button {
    border-radius: 0 var(--inner-border-radius) var(--inner-border-radius) 0;
  }

  .size-small .increment-button {
    border-radius: 0 var(--inner-border-radius) 0 0;
  }

  .size-small .decrement-button:focus,
  .size-small .decrement-button:active {
    border-radius: 0 0 var(--inner-border-radius) 0;
  }

  .size-large .increment-button:focus,
  .size-large .increment-button:active {
    border-radius: 0 var(--inner-border-radius) var(--inner-border-radius) 0;
  }

  .size-small .decrement-button {
    border-radius: 0 0 var(--inner-border-radius) 0;
  }

  .size-large .decrement-button {
    border-radius: var(--inner-border-radius) 0 0 var(--inner-border-radius);
  }

  .size-small .increment-button:focus,
  .size-small .increment-button:active {
    border-radius: 0 var(--inner-border-radius) 0 0;
  }

  .size-small .button-container {
    grid-area: buttons;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .size-small .number-input {
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .size-small:not(.has-icon) .number-input {
    border-top-left-radius: var(--inner-border-radius);
    border-bottom-left-radius: var(--inner-border-radius);
  }

  .number-button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 32px;
    height: 100%;
    border: none;
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .number-button:hover:not(:disabled) {
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default-dark')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.xs')};
  }

  .number-button:focus,
  .number-button:active,
  .number-input:focus {
    outline: var(--border-width) solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
    outline-offset: var(--focus-outline-offset);
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .number-button:focus {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
  }

  .number-button:active {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.active')};
  }

  .number-button:disabled {
    opacity: 0.5;
    cursor: not-allowed;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/number-field/col-number-field.test.ts

import { expect, fixture, html, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColNumberField } from './col-number-field.js';

customElements.define('col-number-field', ColNumberField);

describe('ColNumberField', () => {
  let element: ColNumberField;

  beforeEach(async () => {
    element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    if (element) {
      element['_clearAccelerationTimers']?.();
    }
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('renders with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;
    });

    it('renders input element', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input).to.exist;
      expect(input?.type).to.equal('text');
    });

    it('renders with default size variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);

      expect(element.size).to.equal('large');
    });

    it('renders with default variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);

      expect(element.variant).to.equal('outline');
    });
  });

  describe('Button layouts', () => {
    it('renders increment/decrement buttons in large size', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field size="large"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const buttons = element.shadowRoot?.querySelectorAll('button');

      expect(buttons).to.have.length(2);
      expect(buttons?.[0]?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.include('Decrease');
      expect(buttons?.[1]?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.include('Increase');
    });

    it('renders increment/decrement buttons in small size', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field size="small"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const buttons = element.shadowRoot?.querySelectorAll('button');

      expect(buttons).to.have.length(2);
      expect(buttons?.[0]?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.include('Increase');
      expect(buttons?.[1]?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.include('Decrease');
    });

    it('has proper button styling classes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);
      const buttons = element.shadowRoot?.querySelectorAll('button');

      buttons?.forEach(button => {
        expect(button).to.have.class('number-button');
      });
    });
  });

  describe('Properties and attributes', () => {
    it('displays label when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field label="Test Label"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const label = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-label');

      expect(label).to.exist;
      expect(label?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Test Label');
    });

    it('displays helper text when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field helper="Helper text"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const helper = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-helper');

      expect(helper).to.exist;
      expect(helper?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Helper text');
    });

    it('displays placeholder when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          display-type="placeholder"
          placeholder="Enter number"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input?.placeholder).to.equal('Enter number');
    });

    it('displays value when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.45"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input?.value).to.equal('123.45');
    });

    it('updates display when value changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input?.value).to.equal('100');

      element.value = '200';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(input?.value).to.equal('200');
    });
  });

  describe('Component states', () => {
    it('handles empty value gracefully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value=""></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input?.value).to.equal('');
      expect(element.value).to.equal('');
    });

    it('handles undefined value gracefully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input?.value).to.equal('');
      expect(element.value).to.equal('');
    });

    it('displays error state when error is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field error></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(input).to.have.class('input-error');
      expect(element.error).to.be.true;
    });

    it('displays error message when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field error error-message="Invalid input"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const errorMessage = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-error-message');

      expect(errorMessage).to.exist;
      expect(errorMessage?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Invalid input');
    });

    it('handles disabled state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field disabled></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      const buttons = element.shadowRoot?.querySelectorAll('button');

      expect(element.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(input?.disabled).to.be.true;
      buttons?.forEach(button => {
        expect(button?.disabled).to.be.true;
      });
    });

    it('handles readonly state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field readonly></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');

      expect(element.readOnly).to.be.true;
      expect(input?.readOnly).to.be.true;
    });

    it('handles inactive state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field inactive></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element.inactive).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Component formatting logic', () => {
    it('handles unsupported currency codes gracefully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="1234.56"
          format="currency"
          currency-code="INVALID"
          locale="en-US"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(input?.value).to.equal('1234.56');
    });

    it('uses effective precision from step and format', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.456" step="0.01" format="currency"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(input?.value).to.match(/\d+\.\d{2}/);
    });

    it('prioritizes explicit precision over calculated precision', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="123.456"
          step="0.01"
          precision="1"
          format="currency"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(input?.value).to.match(/\d+\.\d{1}/);
    });

    it('formats values correctly when changed via increment/decrement', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="100"
          format="currency"
          currency-code="USD"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(input?.value).to.include('$');
      expect(input?.value).to.include('101');
    });

    it('handles default precision for different formats', async () => {
      const currencyElement = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.456" format="currency"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const currencyInput = currencyElement.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(currencyInput?.value).to.match(/\d+\.\d{2}/);

      const percentageElement = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.456" format="percentage"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const percentageInput = percentageElement.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(percentageInput?.value).to.equal('123.456');

      const numberElement = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.456" format="number"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const numberInput = numberElement.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(numberInput?.value).to.equal('123.456');
    });
  });

  describe('Increment/decrement logic', () => {
    it('increments value by step when increment button is clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('105');
    });

    it('decrements value by step when decrement button is clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const decrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.decrement-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      decrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('95');
    });

    it('respects min/max constraints during increment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="98" step="5" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('respects min/max constraints during decrement', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="2" step="5" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const decrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.decrement-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      decrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('disables increment button when at maximum', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(incrementButton.disabled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('disables decrement button when at minimum', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="0" step="5" min="0"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const decrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.decrement-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(decrementButton.disabled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('handles custom step values correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="0.5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100.5');
    });

    it('adjusts step precision based on effective precision', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="0.123" precision="2"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100.12');
    });
  });

  describe('Keyboard navigation and events', () => {
    it('handles ArrowUp key for increment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp' }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('105');
    });

    it('handles ArrowDown key for decrement', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown' }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('95');
    });

    it('handles Shift+ArrowUp for larger increment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp', shiftKey: true }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('150');
    });

    it('handles Shift+ArrowDown for larger decrement', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowDown', shiftKey: true }));

      expect(element.value).to.equal('50');
    });

    it('handles PageUp key for larger increment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );

      input.focus();

      await elementUpdated(element);
