      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'PageDown' }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('50');
    });

    it('ignores keyboard events when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5" disabled></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp' }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('respects min/max constraints during keyboard navigation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="98" step="5" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp' }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('handles unknown keys without errors', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter' }));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });
  });

  describe('Form integration and validation', () => {
    it('handles form reset correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" default-value="50"></col-number-field>`
      );

      element.value = '200';
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element.value).to.equal('200');

      element._handleFormReset();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('50');
    });

    it('handles form reset without default value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100"></col-number-field>`
      );

      element._handleFormReset();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('');
    });

    it('validates percentage format constraints', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="150" format="percentage"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.true;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.false;
    });

    it('validates percentage format constraints for negative values', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="-10" format="percentage"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.true;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.false;
    });

    it('validates currency format constraints', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="100"
          format="currency"
          currency-code="INVALID"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.true;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.false;
    });

    it('validates min/max constraints', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="150" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.true;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.false;
    });

    it('validates decimal precision constraints', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.456" precision="2"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.false;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.true;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('123.46');
    });

    it('updates validation state when value changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="150" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.true;

      element.value = '50';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.false;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.true;
    });

    it('handles input blur with formatting', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="123.456"
          format="currency"
          currency-code="USD"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.value = '456.789';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));

      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.include('$');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility and advanced interactions', () => {
    it('handles button mouse events correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="1" size="large"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown'));
      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup'));
      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseleave'));

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('handles acceleration timer cleanup', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="1" size="large"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown'));
      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup'));

      expect(element).to.exist;
    });

    it('handles acceleration when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="1" disabled></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown'));

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 600));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('provides correct ARIA value text', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="50" label="Quantity" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[role="spinbutton"]');
      const ariaValueText = container?.getAttribute('aria-valuetext');

      expect(ariaValueText).to.include('quantity set to 50');
      expect(ariaValueText).to.include('can be any number between 0 and 100');
    });

    it('provides correct button descriptions', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="50" label="Quantity" step="5" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );

      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.increment-button');
      const decrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.decrement-button');

      const incrementDesc = incrementButton?.getAttribute('aria-describedby');
      const decrementDesc = decrementButton?.getAttribute('aria-describedby');

      expect(incrementDesc).to.exist;
      expect(decrementDesc).to.exist;
    });

    it('handles display type placeholder correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="100"
          display-type="placeholder"
          placeholder="Enter amount"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      expect(input.placeholder).to.equal('Enter amount');
      expect(input.value).to.equal('');
    });

    it('handles display type placeholder with default value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="100"
          display-type="placeholder"
          default-value="50"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      expect(input.value).to.equal('50');
    });

    it('handles large size variant correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" size="large"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-container');

      expect(container).to.have.class('size-large');
    });

    it('handles small size variant with icon', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" size="small">
          <div slot="icon">💰</div>
        </col-number-field>`
      );
      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-container');
      const leadingIcon = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.leading-icon');

      expect(container).to.have.class('size-small');
      expect(container).to.have.class('has-icon');
      expect(leadingIcon).to.exist;
    });

    it('handles input type correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      expect(input.type).to.equal('text');
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases and boundary conditions', () => {
    it('handles exactly at minimum value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="0" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const decrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.decrement-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(decrementButton.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('handles exactly at maximum value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" min="0" max="100"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      expect(incrementButton.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('100');
    });

    it('handles zero step value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="0"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('101');
    });

    it('handles negative step value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" step="-5"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.value).to.equal('101');
    });

    it('handles very large numbers', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="999999999999999"></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('999999999999999');
    });

    it('handles very small decimal numbers', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="0.0000001"></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('0.0000001');
    });

    it('handles scientific notation input', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="1e-10"></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('1e-10');
    });

    it('handles empty string value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value=""></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('');
    });

    it('handles undefined value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(html`<col-number-field></col-number-field>`);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('');
    });

    it('handles extreme precision values', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="123.456789" precision="10"></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('123.456789');
    });

    it('handles percentage at exactly 0%', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="0" format="percentage"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.false;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.true;
    });

    it('handles percentage at exactly 100%', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" format="percentage"></col-number-field>`
      );
      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;

      input.focus();
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur'));
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.error).to.be.false;
      expect(element.valid).to.be.true;
    });

    it('handles currency with zero value', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="0" format="currency" currency-code="USD"></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('handles locale with special characters', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="1234.56"
          locale="de-DE"
          format="currency"
          currency-code="EUR"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('1234.56');
    });

    it('handles component with all properties set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field
          value="50"
          min="0"
          max="100"
          step="5"
          precision="2"
          format="currency"
          currency-code="USD"
          locale="en-US"
          size="large"
          variant="outline"
          label="Amount"
          helper="Enter amount"
          required
          placeholder="Enter amount"
          display-type="placeholder"
          default-value="25"
        ></col-number-field>`
      );

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.value).to.equal('50');
      expect(element.min).to.equal(0);
      expect(element.max).to.equal(100);
      expect(element.step).to.equal(5);
      expect(element.precision).to.equal(2);
      expect(element.format).to.equal('currency');
      expect(element.currencyCode).to.equal('USD');
      expect(element.locale).to.equal('en-US');
      expect(element.size).to.equal('large');
      expect(element.variant).to.equal('outline');
      expect(element.label).to.equal('Amount');
      expect(element.helper).to.equal('Enter amount');
      expect(element.required).to.be.true;
      expect(element.placeholder).to.equal('Enter amount');
      expect(element.displayType).to.equal('placeholder');
      expect(element.defaultValue).to.equal(25);
    });
  });

  describe('Performance & Optimization', () => {
    it('should not create memory leaks with rapid property changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100"></col-number-field>`
      );

      for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
        element.value = (100 + i).toString();
        element.step = i % 10;
        await elementUpdated(element);
      }

      expect(element.value).to.equal('199');
      expect(element.step).to.equal(9);
    });

    it('should efficiently handle large numbers without performance degradation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="999999999999999"></col-number-field>`
      );

      const startTime = performance.now();

      for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
        element.value = (999999999999999 + i).toString();
        await elementUpdated(element);
      }

      const endTime = performance.now();
      const duration = endTime - startTime;

      expect(duration).to.be.below(1000);
      expect(element.value).to.equal('1000000000000048');
    });

    it('should clear acceleration timers properly to prevent memory leaks', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100" size="large"></col-number-field>`
      );

      const incrementButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.increment-button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown'));

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));

      incrementButton.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup'));

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));

      expect(element['_accelerationTimer']).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element['_accelerationInterval']).to.be.undefined;
    });

    it('should handle rapid keyboard events efficiently', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100"></col-number-field>`
      );

      const input = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      input.focus();

      const startTime = performance.now();

      for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) {
        input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'ArrowUp' }));
        await elementUpdated(element);
      }

      const endTime = performance.now();
      const duration = endTime - startTime;

      expect(duration).to.be.below(500);
      expect(element.value).to.equal('120');
    });

    it('should optimize rendering by avoiding unnecessary updates', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColNumberField>(
        html`<col-number-field value="100"></col-number-field>`
      );

      let updateCount = 0;
      const originalUpdate = element['updated'];
      element['updated'] = function (changedProperties: Map<string, unknown>) {
        updateCount++;
        return originalUpdate.call(this, changedProperties);
      };

      for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        element.value = '100';
        await elementUpdated(element);
      }

      expect(updateCount).to.be.below(15);
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/number-field/col-number-field.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { Meta, CurrencyConfig } from '@/config';
import { TextInputBase, InputFormComponentStyles } from '@/config/components/input-form-component';
import { ColNumberFieldStyles } from './col-number-field.styles';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';
import {
  formatNumber,
  formatCurrency,
  formatPercentage,
  parseFormattedValue,
  countDecimalPlaces,
  getStepPrecision,
  adjustStepToPrecision,
  clampValue,
} from '@/utils/number';
import { getDefaultLocale } from '@/utils/locale';

/**
 * Number field component for numeric input with increment/decrement controls.
 *
 * @element col-number-field
 *
 * @summary A comprehensive number input component with increment/decrement buttons, validation, theming support, and accessibility features. Supports different formats (number, currency, percentage) with locale-specific formatting and parsing.
 *
 * @slot icon - Icon displayed before the input in small size variant
 *
 * @csspart input - The main number input element
 * @csspart label - The label element
 * @csspart helper-text - The helper text element
 * @csspart error-message - The error message element
 * @csspart leading-icon - The leading icon container (small size only)
 * @csspart number-button - The increment/decrement button elements
 * @csspart button-container - The container for increment/decrement buttons (small size)
 *
 * @cssprop --input-width - Controls the host element's width. Set via the `custom-width` attribute (e.g., 320px, 50%, min(280px, 100%)). Defaults to `auto` when not provided.
 *
 * @attr {string} name - The name attribute for form field identification
 * @attr {string} type - The form control type (always 'text' for number fields)
 * @attr {string} value - The current value of the input
 * @attr {string} variant - The visual variant of the input field (outline, plain)
 * @attr {string} label - The main label text displayed above the input
 * @attr {string} helper - Helper text displayed below the input
 * @attr {boolean} required - Whether the field is required for form submission
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the input is disabled and cannot be interacted with
 * @attr {boolean} error - Whether the input is in an error state
 * @attr {string} error-message - Error message displayed when the input is in an error state
 * @attr {string} validation-timing - When to trigger validation (blur, change, input, submit)
 * @attr {string} input-mode - HTML inputmode attribute for mobile keyboard optimization
 * @attr {string} placeholder - Placeholder text displayed when the input is empty
 * @attr {boolean} readonly - Whether the input is read-only and cannot be modified
 * @attr {string} size - The size variant of the number field (large, small)
 * @attr {number} min - The minimum allowed numeric value
 * @attr {number} max - The maximum allowed numeric value
 * @attr {number} step - The increment/decrement step value
 * @attr {boolean} inactive - Whether the component is inactive
 * @attr {number} default-value - The default value for the field on reset
 * @attr {number} precision - Number of decimal places to display
 * @attr {string} format - The format type (number, currency, percentage)
 * @attr {string} currency-code - The currency code for currency format (e.g., USD, EUR)
 * @attr {string} locale - The locale for number formatting (e.g., en-US, de-DE)
 * @attr {string} display-type - The display mode for the input field (placeholder, text)
 * @attr {object} tokens - Custom design tokens that override default theme values
 * @attr {string} custom-width - Custom width for the component host (e.g., "320px", "50%", "min(280px, 100%)"). Applied via the `--input-width` CSS variable; defaults to `auto` when omitted.
 *
 * @property {string} name - The name attribute for form field identification
 * @property {string} type - The form control type (always 'text' for number fields)
 * @property {string} value - The current value of the input
 * @property {string} variant - The visual variant of the input field (outline, plain)
 * @property {string} label - The main label text displayed above the input
 * @property {string} helper - Helper text displayed below the input
 * @property {boolean} required - Whether the field is required for form submission
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the input is disabled and cannot be interacted with
 * @property {boolean} error - Whether the input is in an error state
 * @property {string} errorMessage - Error message displayed when the input is in an error state
 * @property {string} validationTiming - When to trigger validation (blur, change, input, submit)
 * @property {string} inputMode - HTML inputmode attribute for mobile keyboard optimization
 * @property {boolean} touched - Whether the input has been touched (focused and blurred)
 * @property {boolean} dirty - Whether the input value has been modified from its initial state
 * @property {boolean} valid - Whether the input value passes validation
 * @property {boolean} focused - Whether the input currently has focus
 * @property {string} placeholder - Placeholder text displayed when the input is empty
 * @property {boolean} readOnly - Whether the input is read-only and cannot be modified
 * @property {string} size - The size variant of the number field (large, small)
 * @property {number} min - The minimum allowed numeric value
 * @property {number} max - The maximum allowed numeric value
 * @property {number} step - The increment/decrement step value
 * @property {boolean} inactive - Whether the component is inactive
 * @property {number} defaultValue - The default value for the field on reset
 * @property {number} precision - Number of decimal places to display
 * @property {string} format - The format type (number, currency, percentage)
 * @property {string} currencyCode - The currency code for currency format (e.g., USD, EUR)
 * @property {string} locale - The locale for number formatting (e.g., en-US, de-DE)
 * @property {string} displayType - The display mode for the input field (placeholder, text)
 * @property {string} customWidth - Custom width for the component host, reflected using the `--input-width` CSS variable. Accepts any valid CSS width token per MDN.
 *
 * @fires input - Fired when the input value changes during user interaction
 * @fires change - Fired when the input value is committed (blur or Enter key)
 * @fires focus - Fired when the input receives focus
 * @fires blur - Fired when the input loses focus
 * @fires invalid - Fired when validation fails with detailed validation information
 * @fires validation-change - Fired when validation state changes with comprehensive validation details
 *
 * @default 'large' - Default size value
 * @default undefined - Default min value
 * @default undefined - Default max value
 * @default 1 - Default step value
 * @default false - Default readOnly state
 * @default false - Default inactive state
 * @default undefined - Default defaultValue
 * @default 'blur' - Default validationTiming value
 * @default '' - Default value
 * @default '' - Default placeholder
 * @default '' - Default name
 * @default false - Default required state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default error state
 * @default '' - Default errorMessage
 * @default true - Default valid state
 * @default false - Default touched state
 * @default false - Default dirty state
 * @default false - Default focused state
 * @default 'text' - Default displayType value
 */
@Meta({ name: 'number-field', components: [ColIcon] })
export class ColNumberField extends TextInputBase {
  static styles = [InputFormComponentStyles, ColNumberFieldStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  size: 'large' | 'small' = 'large';

  @property({ type: Number })
  min?: number;

  @property({ type: Number })
  max?: number;

  @property({ type: Number })
  step: number = 1;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  inactive = false;

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'default-value' })
  defaultValue?: number;

  @property({ type: Number })
  precision?: number;

  @property({ type: String })
  format: 'number' | 'currency' | 'percentage' = 'number';

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'currency-code' })
  currencyCode?: string;

  @property({ type: String })
  locale: string = getDefaultLocale();

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'display-type' })
  displayType: 'placeholder' | 'text' = 'text';

  private _internalValue: number = 0;
  private _accelerationTimer: number | undefined = undefined;
  private _accelerationInterval: number | undefined = undefined;

  protected override _uniqueId = `number-field-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this._setDefaultInputMode();

    if (!this.value && this.defaultValue !== undefined) {
      this._internalValue = this.defaultValue;
      this.value = this._formatValue(this.defaultValue);
      this._syncFormValue();
    } else {
      this._syncInternalValue();
    }
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    this._handleButtonMouseUp();
  }

  public validate(value: unknown): boolean {
    const stringValue = String(value || '');

    if (!stringValue.trim()) {
      const isValid = !this.required;
      this.error = !isValid;
      this.valid = isValid;
      return isValid;
    }

    const numValue = parseFormattedValue(stringValue, this.format, this.locale);
    if (isNaN(numValue)) {
      this.error = true;
      this.valid = false;
      return false;
    }

    if (this.format === 'percentage') {
      if (numValue < 0 || numValue > 100) {
        this.error = true;
        this.valid = false;
        return false;
      }
    }

    if (this.format === 'currency' && this.currencyCode) {
      if (!CurrencyConfig.isSupported(this.currencyCode)) {
        this.error = true;
        this.valid = false;
        return false;
      }
    }

    const effectiveMin = this.min;
    const effectiveMax = this.max;

    if (effectiveMin !== undefined && numValue < effectiveMin) {
      this.error = true;
      this.valid = false;
      return false;
    }

    if (effectiveMax !== undefined && numValue > effectiveMax) {
      this.error = true;
      this.valid = false;
      return false;
    }

    const maxDecimalPlaces = this.effectivePrecision;
    if (maxDecimalPlaces >= 0) {
      const decimalPart = countDecimalPlaces(numValue);
      if (decimalPart > maxDecimalPlaces) {
        this.error = true;
        this.valid = false;
        return false;
      }
    }

    this.error = false;
    this.valid = true;
    return true;
  }

  public override updated(changedProperties: Map<string, unknown>) {
    super.updated(changedProperties);
    if (changedProperties.has('value')) {
      this._syncInternalValue();
    }
  }

  protected override _handleInput(e: Event & { target: HTMLInputElement }) {
    if (this.inactive) return;

    const target = e.target as HTMLInputElement;
    this.value = target.value;

    super._handleInput(e);
  }

  protected override _handleBlur = () => {
    const originalValue = this.value;

    if (originalValue && originalValue.trim() !== '') {
      const parsedValue = parseFormattedValue(originalValue, this.format, this.locale);
      if (!isNaN(parsedValue)) {
        this._internalValue = parsedValue;
        this.value = this._formatValue(parsedValue);
      }
    }

    this.focused = false;

    if (this._shouldValidate('blur')) {
      this._updateValidState();
    }

    this._syncFormValue();
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new Event('blur', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  };

  protected override get _supportsPrefix(): boolean {
    return false;
  }

  protected override get _supportsSuffix(): boolean {
    return false;
  }

  protected _getInputType(): string {
    return 'text';
  }

  protected override _updateFormValue(): void {
    if (!this._internals) return;

    let formValue: string | null = null;

    if (!this.value || this.value.trim() === '') {
      formValue = null;
    } else {
      const numValue = parseFormattedValue(this.value, this.format, this.locale);
      if (isNaN(numValue)) {
        formValue = null;
      } else {
        formValue =
          this.format === 'percentage' ? (numValue / 100).toString() : numValue.toString();
      }
    }

    this._internals.setFormValue(formValue);
  }

  public override _handleFormReset(): void {
    super._handleFormReset();

    if (this.defaultValue !== undefined) {
      this._internalValue = this.defaultValue;
      this.value = this._formatValue(this.defaultValue);
    } else {
      this._internalValue = 0;
      this.value = '';
    }
  }

  private get defaultPrecision(): number {
    switch (this.format) {
      case 'currency':
        return this.currencyCode ? CurrencyConfig.getCurrencyPrecision(this.currencyCode) : 2;
      case 'percentage':
        return 1;
      case 'number':
      default:
        return 0;
    }
  }

  private get effectivePrecision(): number {
    if (this.precision !== undefined) {
      return this.precision;
    }

    const stepPrecision = getStepPrecision(this.step);
    const formatPrecision = this.defaultPrecision;

    return Math.max(stepPrecision, formatPrecision);
  }

  private _formatValue(value: number): string {
    switch (this.format) {
      case 'currency':
        if (this.currencyCode && !CurrencyConfig.isSupported(this.currencyCode)) {
          return value.toString();
        }
        return formatCurrency(
          value,
          this.currencyCode || 'USD',
          this.locale,
          this.effectivePrecision
        );
      case 'percentage':
        return formatPercentage(value, this.locale, this.effectivePrecision);
      case 'number':
      default:
        return formatNumber(value, this.locale, this.effectivePrecision);
    }
  }

  private _syncInternalValue(): void {
    const numValue = parseFormattedValue(this.value || '', this.format, this.locale);
    this._internalValue = isNaN(numValue) ? 0 : numValue;
  }

  private _increment(stepValue?: number): void {
    let step = stepValue || this.step;

    const precision = this.effectivePrecision;
    const adjustedStep = adjustStepToPrecision(step, precision);

    step = adjustedStep;

    const newValue = this._clampValue(this.internalValue + step);
    this._setValue(newValue);
  }

  private _decrement(stepValue?: number): void {
    let step = stepValue || this.step;

    const precision = this.effectivePrecision;
    const adjustedStep = adjustStepToPrecision(step, precision);

    step = adjustedStep;

    const newValue = this._clampValue(this.internalValue - step);
    this._setValue(newValue);
  }

  private _clampValue(value: number): number {
    return clampValue(value, this.min, this.max);
  }

  private _setValue(value: number): void {
    this.internalValue = value;
    this.value = this._formatValue(value);
    this.dirty = true;
    this._updateValidState();
    this._dispatchChange(this.value);
    this._syncFormValue();
  }

  private _handleIncrement = (e: Event) => {
    if (this.disabled) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    this._increment();
  };

  private _handleDecrement = (e: Event) => {
    if (this.disabled) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    this._decrement();
  };

  private _handleButtonMouseDown = (action: 'increment' | 'decrement') => {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    this._accelerationTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
      this._accelerationInterval = window.setInterval(() => {
        this._performAction(action);
      }, 100);
    }, 500);
  };

  private _handleButtonMouseUp = () => {
    this._clearAccelerationTimers();
  };

  private _clearAccelerationTimers() {
    if (this._accelerationTimer) {
      clearTimeout(this._accelerationTimer);
      this._accelerationTimer = undefined;
    }
    if (this._accelerationInterval) {
      clearInterval(this._accelerationInterval);
      this._accelerationInterval = undefined;
    }
  }

  private _performAction(action: 'increment' | 'decrement') {
    if (action === 'increment' && !this.isAtMax) {
      this._increment();
    } else if (action === 'decrement' && !this.isAtMin) {
      this._decrement();
    }
  }

  private _handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent): void => {
    if (this.disabled) return;

    switch (e.key) {
      case 'ArrowUp': {
        e.preventDefault();
        const upStep = e.shiftKey ? this.step * 10 : this.step;
        this._increment(upStep);
        break;
      }
      case 'ArrowDown': {
        e.preventDefault();
        const downStep = e.shiftKey ? this.step * 10 : this.step;
        this._decrement(downStep);
        break;
      }
      case 'PageUp':
        e.preventDefault();
        this._increment(this.step * 10);
        break;
      case 'PageDown':
        e.preventDefault();
        this._decrement(this.step * 10);
        break;
    }
  };

  private _setDefaultInputMode(): void {
    if (!this.hasAttribute('input-mode')) {
      switch (this.format) {
        case 'currency':
        case 'percentage':
          this.inputMode = 'decimal';
          break;
        case 'number':
        default:
          this.inputMode = 'numeric';
          break;
      }
    }
  }

  private get internalValue(): number {
    return this._internalValue;
  }

  private set internalValue(value: number) {
    this._internalValue = value;
  }

  private get isAtMin(): boolean {
    if (this.min === undefined) return false;

    const minValue = this.min;
    return this.internalValue <= minValue;
  }

  private get isAtMax(): boolean {
    if (this.max === undefined) return false;

    const maxValue = this.max;
    return this.internalValue >= maxValue;
  }

  private get containerClasses() {
    return {
      'input-container': true,
      [`size-${this.size}`]: true,
      'has-icon': this.size === 'small' && !!this.hasSlotted('icon'),
    };
  }

  private _getAriaValueText(): string {
    const value = parseFloat(this.value || '0');
    if (isNaN(value)) return '';

    let text = '';

    if (this.label) {
      text = `${this.label.toLowerCase()} set to ${value}`;
    } else {
      text = `${value}`;
    }

    if (this.min !== undefined && this.max !== undefined) {
      text += ` (can be any number between ${this.min} and ${this.max})`;
    } else if (this.min !== undefined) {
      text += ` (can be any number greater than ${this.min})`;
    } else if (this.max !== undefined) {
      text += ` (can be any number less than ${this.max})`;
    }

    return text;
  }

  private _getButtonDescription(action: 'increase' | 'decrease'): string {
    const currentValue = parseFloat(this.value || '0');
    const step = this.step;
    const newValue = action === 'increase' ? currentValue + step : currentValue - step;

    let description = '';

    if (this.label) {
      description = `${action === 'increase' ? 'Increase' : 'Decrease'} ${this.label.toLowerCase()} by ${step}`;
    } else {
      description = `${action === 'increase' ? 'Increase' : 'Decrease'} by ${step}`;
    }

    if (action === 'increase' && this.max !== undefined && newValue > this.max) {
      description += ' (at maximum)';
    } else if (action === 'decrease' && this.min !== undefined && newValue < this.min) {
      description += ' (at minimum)';
    }

    return description;
  }

  private get _displayValue(): string {
    if (this.displayType === 'placeholder') {
      if (this.focused || this.dirty) {
        return this.value || '';
      }

      if (this.defaultValue !== undefined) {
        return this._formatValue(this.defaultValue);
      }

      return '';
    }

    return this.value || '';
  }

  private _renderLeadingIcon() {
    if (this.size !== 'small' || !this.hasSlotted('icon')) {
      return nothing;
    }

    return html`
      <div class="leading-icon">
        <slot ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('icon')} name="icon"></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  private _renderLeftAction() {
    const decrementDisabled = this.disabled || this.isAtMin;

    return html`
      <button
        type="button"
        class="number-button decrement-button"
        ?disabled=${decrementDisabled}
        @click=${this._handleDecrement}
        @mousedown=${() => this._handleButtonMouseDown('decrement')}
        @mouseup=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
        @mouseleave=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
        aria-label="Decrease value"
        aria-controls="${this.inputId}"
        aria-describedby="${this._getButtonDescription('decrease')}"
      >
        <col-icon name="chevron-down" size="16px" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
      </button>
    `;
  }

  private _renderRightAction() {
    const incrementDisabled = this.disabled || this.isAtMax;

    if (this.size === 'large') {
      return html`
        <button
          type="button"
          class="number-button increment-button"
          ?disabled=${incrementDisabled}
          @click=${this._handleIncrement}
          @mousedown=${() => this._handleButtonMouseDown('increment')}
          @mouseup=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
          @mouseleave=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
          aria-label="Increase value"
          aria-controls="${this.inputId}"
          aria-describedby="${this._getButtonDescription('increase')}"
        >
          <col-icon name="chevron-up" size="16px" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
        </button>
      `;
    } else {
      const decrementDisabled = this.disabled || this.isAtMin;

      return html`
        <div class="button-container">
          <button
            type="button"
            class="number-button increment-button"
            ?disabled=${incrementDisabled}
            @click=${this._handleIncrement}
            @mousedown=${() => this._handleButtonMouseDown('increment')}
            @mouseup=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
            @mouseleave=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
            aria-label="Increase value"
            aria-controls="${this.inputId}"
            aria-describedby="${this._getButtonDescription('increase')}"
          >
            <col-icon name="chevron-up" size="16px" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            class="number-button decrement-button"
            ?disabled=${decrementDisabled}
            @click=${this._handleDecrement}
            @mousedown=${() => this._handleButtonMouseDown('decrement')}
            @mouseup=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
            @mouseleave=${this._handleButtonMouseUp}
            aria-label="Decrease value"
            aria-controls="${this.inputId}"
            aria-describedby="${this._getButtonDescription('decrease')}"
          >
            <col-icon name="chevron-down" size="16px" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
          </button>
        </div>
      `;
    }
  }

  protected override renderInput() {
    const attrs = this._getCommonInputAttributes();
    const events = this._getCommonInputEventHandlers();

    return html`
      <div
        class=${classMap(this.containerClasses)}
        role="spinbutton"
        aria-label="${attrs.label || 'Number input field'}"
        aria-labelledby="${this._getAriaLabelledBy() || ''}"
        title="${attrs.label || 'Number input field'}"
        aria-valuemin="${this.min ?? ''}"
        aria-valuemax="${this.max ?? ''}"
        aria-valuenow="${this.value || ''}"
        aria-valuetext="${this._getAriaValueText()}"
        aria-live="polite"
      >
        ${this._renderLeadingIcon()} ${this.size === 'large' ? this._renderLeftAction() : nothing}
        <input
          type=${this._getInputType() as any}
          class="${attrs.errorClass} number-input"
          name="${attrs.name}"
          id="${attrs.id}"
          aria-labelledby=${attrs.ariaLabelledby}
          aria-describedby=${attrs.ariaDescribedby}
          aria-invalid=${attrs.ariaInvalid === 'spelling' || attrs.ariaInvalid === 'grammar'
            ? attrs.ariaInvalid
            : attrs.ariaInvalid === 'true'
              ? 'true'
              : 'false'}
          aria-required=${attrs.ariaRequired ? 'true' : 'false'}
          ?required=${attrs.required}
          .value="${this._displayValue}"
          placeholder="${this.displayType === 'placeholder' ? this.placeholder : ''}"
          ?disabled=${attrs.disabled}
          ?readonly=${this.readOnly}
          min="${this.min ?? ''}"
          max="${this.max ?? ''}"
          step="${this.step}"
          inputmode="${attrs.inputMode}"
          @focus=${events.onFocus}
          @blur=${this._handleBlur}
          @change=${events.onChange}
          @input=${this._handleInput}
          @keydown=${this._handleKeyDown}
          @invalid=${this._handleInvalid}
        />
        ${this._renderRightAction()}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-number-field': ColNumberField;
  }
}
