import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColPaginatorStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    flex-grow: 1;
  }

  .paginator {
    width: 100%;
    .paginator-list {
      width: calc(100% - ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')});
      display: flex;
      list-style: none;
      align-items: center;
      gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
      padding-inline-start: 0;
      &.paginator-center {
        justify-content: center;
      }
      &.paginator-start {
        justify-content: start;
      }
      &.paginator-end {
        justify-content: end;
      }
    }

    .paginator-list-item {
      &.paginator-current {
        .paginator-link {
          color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.base')};
          border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default')};
          border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
          user-select: none;
          cursor: default;
        }
      }

      &.paginator-disabled {
        .paginator-button,
        .paginator-link {
          user-select: none;
          cursor: default;
        }
      }

      &:not(.paginator-disabled):hover {
        .paginator-button,
        .paginator-link {
          color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.base')};
        }
      }

      .paginator-button,
      .paginator-link,
      .paginator-button-text {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        width: 32px;
        height: 32px;
        background: none;
        border: none;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        text-decoration: none;
        line-height: 1;
        cursor: pointer;
      }

      .paginator-link,
      .paginator-button-text {
        color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
      }

      .paginator-button {
        color: ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default-light')};
      }
    }
  }
`;



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/paginator/col-paginator.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { BREAKPOINTS } from '@/types/breakpoints';
import { ColPaginator } from './col-paginator';

describe('ColPaginator Responsive Features', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-paginator')) {
      customElements.define('col-paginator', ColPaginator);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-paginator').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Responsive configuration', () => {
    it('should use default responsive config when responsive has at least one config', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50" .responsive=${{ [BREAKPOINTS.WIDESCREEN]: 7 }}></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Simulate different container widths
      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 300, configurable: true });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();
      expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(3); // mobile default

      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 700, configurable: true });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();
      expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(5); // tablet default
    });

    it('should use custom responsive config when provided', async () => {
      const customConfig = {
        [BREAKPOINTS.MOBILE]: 5,
        [BREAKPOINTS.TABLET]: 7,
        [BREAKPOINTS.DESKTOP]: 11,
      };

      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50" .responsive=${customConfig}></col-paginator>
      `);

      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 300, configurable: true });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();
      expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(5); // custom mobile

      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 700, configurable: true });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();
      expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(7); // custom tablet
    });

    it('should calculate pages automatically when responsive is not set', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Mock container width
      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 500, configurable: true });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();

      // Should calculate based on available width
      const calculatedPages = element['calculateMaxVisiblePages'](500);
      expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(calculatedPages);
    });

    it('should never show more pages than length', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="5" .responsive=${{ [BREAKPOINTS.DESKTOP]: 10 }}></col-paginator>
      `);

      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 1000, configurable: true });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();

      expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(5); // Limited by length
    });

    it('should handle all breakpoints correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50" .responsive=${{ [BREAKPOINTS.FULLHD]: 15 }}></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Test each breakpoint
      const breakpoints = [
        { width: 320, expected: 3 }, // mobile
        { width: 768, expected: 5 }, // tablet
        { width: 960, expected: 7 }, // desktop
        { width: 1152, expected: 9 }, // widescreen
        { width: 1400, expected: 15 }, // fullhd
      ];

      breakpoints.forEach(({ width, expected }) => {
        Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: width, configurable: true });
        element['updateVisiblePages']();
        expect(element['visiblePages']).to.equal(expected);
      });
    });
  });

  describe('Auto-calculation of visible pages', () => {
    it('should calculate max visible pages based on container width', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="100"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Test various widths
      const testCases = [
        { width: 200, minExpected: 1 }, // Very narrow
        { width: 400, minExpected: 5 }, // Narrow
        { width: 800, minExpected: 10 }, // Medium
        { width: 1200, minExpected: 15 }, // Wide
      ];

      testCases.forEach(({ width, minExpected }) => {
        const calculated = element['calculateMaxVisiblePages'](width);
        expect(calculated).to.be.at.least(minExpected);
        expect(calculated).to.be.at.most(100); // Never more than length
      });
    });

    it('should use custom size config for calculations', async () => {
      const customSizes = {
        pageItemWidth: 60,
        navButtonWidth: 50,
        gap: 10,
      };

      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50" .sizeConfig=${customSizes}></col-paginator>
      `);

      const calculated = element['calculateMaxVisiblePages'](500);

      // With larger sizes, fewer pages should fit
      expect(calculated).to.be.lessThan(10);
    });

    it('should ensure minimum of 3 pages when space is limited', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      const calculated = element['calculateMaxVisiblePages'](100); // Very narrow
      expect(calculated).to.equal(3);
    });
  });

  describe('Page number generation with ellipsis', () => {
    it('should show ellipsis for small visible counts', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="20" value="10"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Force small visible count
      element['visiblePages'] = 5;
      const pages = element['getPageNumbers']();

      expect(pages).to.include(1); // First page
      expect(pages).to.include(20); // Last page
      expect(pages).to.include(10); // Current page
      expect(pages).to.include(-1); // At least one ellipsis
      expect(pages.length).to.be.at.most(5);
    });

    it('should handle edge cases for very small visible counts', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="20" value="1"></col-paginator>
      `);

      element['visiblePages'] = 3;
      let pages = element['getPageNumbers']();

      expect(pages).to.deep.equal([1, -1, 20]);

      // Last page
      element.value = 20;
      pages = element['getPageNumbers']();
      expect(pages).to.include(1);
      expect(pages).to.include(20);
      expect(pages).to.include(-1);
    });

    it('should show all pages when visible >= length', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="5"></col-paginator>
      `);

      element['visiblePages'] = 10;
      const pages = element['getPageNumbers']();

      expect(pages).to.deep.equal([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]);
      expect(pages).to.not.include(-1); // No ellipsis
    });
  });

  describe('ResizeObserver functionality', () => {
    it('should setup ResizeObserver on connect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      expect(element['resizeObserver']).to.exist;
    });

    it('should disconnect ResizeObserver on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      const observer = element['resizeObserver'];
      expect(observer).to.exist;

      // Track if disconnect was called
      let disconnectCalled = false;
      const originalDisconnect = observer!.disconnect;
      observer!.disconnect = function () {
        disconnectCalled = true;
        originalDisconnect.call(this);
      };

      element.disconnectedCallback();

      expect(disconnectCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update visible pages on resize', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      const initialVisible = element['visiblePages'];

      // Simulate resize
      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', {
        value: 1200,
        configurable: true,
      });
      element['updateVisiblePages']();

      const newVisible = element['visiblePages'];
      expect(newVisible).to.not.equal(initialVisible);
    });
  });

  describe('Property updates', () => {
    it('should recalculate visible pages when length changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="10"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Track if updateVisiblePages was called
      let updateCalled = false;
      const originalUpdate = element['updateVisiblePages'];
      element['updateVisiblePages'] = function () {
        updateCalled = true;
        originalUpdate.call(this);
      };

      element.length = 50;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(updateCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should recalculate when responsive config changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Track if updateVisiblePages was called
      let updateCalled = false;
      const originalUpdate = element['updateVisiblePages'];
      element['updateVisiblePages'] = function () {
        updateCalled = true;
        originalUpdate.call(this);
      };

      element.responsive = { [BREAKPOINTS.MOBILE]: 5, [BREAKPOINTS.TABLET]: 7 };
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(updateCalled).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Event handling', () => {
    it('should emit page-change event with correct detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="10" value="5"></col-paginator>
      `);

      let eventDetail: any;
      element.addEventListener('page-change', (e: Event) => {
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      // Click on page 7
      const pageLinks = element.shadowRoot?.querySelectorAll('.paginator-link');
      const page7 = Array.from(pageLinks || []).find(link => link.textContent?.trim() === '7');

      if (page7) {
        (page7 as HTMLElement).click();

        expect(eventDetail).to.deep.equal({
          oldValue: 5,
          newValue: 7,
        });
        expect(element.value).to.equal(7);
      }
    });

    it('should handle navigation button clicks correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="10" value="5"></col-paginator>
      `);

      let eventCount = 0;
      element.addEventListener('page-change', () => eventCount++);

      // Test previous button
      const prevButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'button[aria-label="Previous page"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      prevButton?.click();
      expect(element.value).to.equal(4);

      // Test next button
      const nextButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'button[aria-label="Next page"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      nextButton?.click();
      expect(element.value).to.equal(5);

      // Test first button
      const firstButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'button[aria-label="First page"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      firstButton?.click();
      expect(element.value).to.equal(1);

      // Test last button
      const lastButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'button[aria-label="Last page"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      lastButton?.click();
      expect(element.value).to.equal(10);

      expect(eventCount).to.equal(4);
    });

    it('should not emit events when disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="10" value="5" disabled></col-paginator>
      `);

      let eventFired = false;
      element.addEventListener('page-change', () => {
        eventFired = true;
      });

      const pageLink = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.paginator-link');
      (pageLink as HTMLElement)?.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.false;
      expect(element.value).to.equal(5); // Value unchanged
    });

    it('should not emit events when clicking current page', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="10" value="5"></col-paginator>
      `);

      let eventFired = false;
      element.addEventListener('page-change', () => {
        eventFired = true;
      });

      const currentPageLink = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.paginator-current .paginator-link'
      );
      (currentPageLink as HTMLElement)?.click();

      expect(eventFired).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Ellipsis rendering', () => {
    it('should render ellipsis elements correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50" value="25"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Force a scenario with ellipsis
      element['visiblePages'] = 7;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const ellipsisElements = element.shadowRoot?.querySelectorAll('.paginator-ellipsis');
      expect(ellipsisElements?.length).to.be.greaterThan(0);

      ellipsisElements?.forEach(el => {
        const span = el.querySelector('.paginator-ellipsis-text');
        expect(span?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('...');
        expect(span?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
      });
    });
  });

  describe('Alignment property', () => {
    it('should apply alignment class correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="10" align="start"></col-paginator>
      `);

      const list = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.paginator-list');
      expect(list?.classList.contains('paginator-start')).to.be.true;

      element.align = 'end';
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(list?.classList.contains('paginator-end')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Initial setup and edge cases', () => {
    it('should initialize responsive as empty object if null', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="20"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Force null responsive
      (element as any).responsive = null;
      element.connectedCallback();

      expect(element.responsive).to.deep.equal({});
    });

    it('should handle zero length edge case', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="0"></col-paginator>
      `);

      const pages = element['getPageNumbers']();
      expect(pages).to.deep.equal([]);
    });

    it('should handle negative length edge case', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="-5"></col-paginator>
      `);

      const pages = element['getPageNumbers']();
      expect(pages).to.deep.equal([]);
    });

    it('should calculate with ellipsis when maxPages < length', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="100"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Force a narrow width that requires ellipsis calculation
      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 250, configurable: true });

      const calculated = element['calculateMaxVisiblePages'](250);
      expect(calculated).to.be.at.least(3);
      expect(calculated).to.be.lessThan(100);
    });

    it('should handle firstUpdated lifecycle', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="20"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // Track if updateVisiblePages was called
      let updateCalled = false;
      const originalUpdate = element['updateVisiblePages'];
      element['updateVisiblePages'] = function () {
        updateCalled = true;
        originalUpdate.call(this);
      };

      element.firstUpdated();
      expect(updateCalled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle empty responsive config as auto-calculate mode', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50"></col-paginator>
      `);

      // No responsive config means enableResponsive should be false
      const enableResponsive = Object.keys(element.responsive).length > 0;
      expect(enableResponsive).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should merge size configs correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColPaginator>(html`
        <col-paginator length="50" .sizeConfig=${{ pageItemWidth: 50, gap: 10 }}></col-paginator>
      `);

      // The component should merge with defaults
      const calculated = element['calculateMaxVisiblePages'](500);

      // With larger page items, fewer should fit
      expect(calculated).to.be.lessThan(12);
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/paginator/col-paginator.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { map } from 'lit/directives/map.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColPaginatorStyles } from './col-paginator.styles';
import { BREAKPOINTS } from '@/types/breakpoints';

export interface ResponsiveConfig {
  [BREAKPOINTS.MOBILE]?: number; // 320px
  [BREAKPOINTS.TABLET]?: number; // 769px
  [BREAKPOINTS.DESKTOP]?: number; // 960px
  [BREAKPOINTS.WIDESCREEN]?: number; // 1152px
  [BREAKPOINTS.FULLHD]?: number; // 1344px
}

export interface SizeConfig {
  pageItemWidth?: number;
  navButtonWidth?: number;
  gap?: number;
  ellipsisWidth?: number;
  padding?: number;
}

/**
 * Paginator component for navigating through paginated content.
 *
 * @element col-paginator
 *
 * @summary A comprehensive pagination component with responsive design, customizable sizing, and accessibility features.
 *
 * @csspart paginator - The main paginator navigation container
 *
 * @attr {number} length - The total number of pages
 * @attr {number} value - The current active page
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the paginator is disabled
 * @attr {string} align - The alignment of the paginator (center, start, end)
 * @attr {object} responsive - Configuration for responsive behavior at different breakpoints
 * @attr {object} size-config - Configuration for component sizing and spacing
 *
 * @property {number} length - The total number of pages
 * @property {number} value - The current active page
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the paginator is disabled
 * @property {string} align - The alignment of the paginator (center, start, end)
 * @property {ResponsiveConfig} responsive - Configuration for responsive behavior at different breakpoints
 * @property {SizeConfig} sizeConfig - Configuration for component sizing and spacing
 *
 * @fires page-change - Fired when the page changes. Event detail: { oldValue, newValue }
 *
 * @default 1 - Default length value
 * @default 1 - Default value
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default 'center' - Default align value
 * @default {} - Default responsive configuration
 * @default {} - Default sizeConfig configuration
 */
@Meta({ name: 'paginator' })
export class ColPaginator extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColPaginatorStyles];

  @property({ type: Number })
  length = 1;

  @property({ type: Number })
  value = 1;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  align: 'center' | 'start' | 'end' = 'center';

  // Responsive configuration
  @property({ type: Object })
  responsive: ResponsiveConfig = {};

  @property({ type: Object, attribute: 'size-config' })
  sizeConfig: SizeConfig = {};

  @state()
  private visiblePages = 7;

  // Default responsive configuration
  private defaultResponsive: ResponsiveConfig = {
    [BREAKPOINTS.MOBILE]: 3,
    [BREAKPOINTS.TABLET]: 5,
    [BREAKPOINTS.DESKTOP]: 7,
    [BREAKPOINTS.WIDESCREEN]: 9,
    [BREAKPOINTS.FULLHD]: 11,
  };

  // Default size configuration for auto-calculation
  private defaultSizeConfig: SizeConfig = {
    pageItemWidth: 38,
    navButtonWidth: 38,
    gap: 4,
    ellipsisWidth: 30,
    padding: 0,
  };

  private resizeObserver?: ResizeObserver;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    if (!this.responsive) {
      this.responsive = {};
    }
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    if (this.resizeObserver) {
      this.resizeObserver.disconnect();
    }
  }

  firstUpdated() {
    // Ensure responsive config is initialized
    this.setupResizeObserver();
    // Initial update
    this.updateVisiblePages();
  }

  willUpdate(changedProperties: Map<string, unknown>) {
    if (
      changedProperties.has('length') ||
      changedProperties.has('responsive') ||
      changedProperties.has('sizeConfig')
    ) {
      this.updateVisiblePages();
    }
  }

  private setupResizeObserver() {
    this.resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      this.updateVisiblePages();
    });
    this.resizeObserver.observe(this);
  }

  private updateVisiblePages() {
    const containerWidth = this.offsetWidth;
    const enableResponsive = Object.keys(this.responsive).length > 0;

    if (!enableResponsive) {
      // Calculate how many pages fit in the container
      this.visiblePages = this.calculateMaxVisiblePages(containerWidth);
      return;
    }

    // Use responsive breakpoints
    const config = { ...this.defaultResponsive, ...this.responsive };

    // Determine visible pages based on container width
    if (containerWidth <= 320) {
      this.visiblePages = config[BREAKPOINTS.MOBILE]!;
    } else if (containerWidth <= 768) {
      this.visiblePages = config[BREAKPOINTS.TABLET]!;
    } else if (containerWidth <= 960) {
      this.visiblePages = config[BREAKPOINTS.DESKTOP]!;
    } else if (containerWidth <= 1152) {
      this.visiblePages = config[BREAKPOINTS.WIDESCREEN]!;
    } else {
      this.visiblePages = config[BREAKPOINTS.FULLHD]!;
    }

    // Ensure we don't show more pages than actually exist
    this.visiblePages = Math.min(this.visiblePages, this.length);
  }

  private calculateMaxVisiblePages(containerWidth: number): number {
    // Merge default sizes with user configuration
    const sizes = { ...this.defaultSizeConfig, ...this.sizeConfig };

    // Calculate available width for page numbers
    let availableWidth = containerWidth - sizes.padding!;

    // If we have more than 1 page, subtract navigation buttons
    if (this.length > 1) {
      const navButtonsCount = 4; // first, prev, next, last
      availableWidth -= navButtonsCount * sizes.navButtonWidth! + navButtonsCount * sizes.gap!;
    }

    // Calculate maximum pages that can fit
    let maxPages = Math.floor(availableWidth / (sizes.pageItemWidth! + sizes.gap!));

    // If we need ellipsis
    if (maxPages < this.length) {
      availableWidth -= sizes.ellipsisWidth!;
      maxPages = Math.floor(availableWidth / sizes.pageItemWidth!);
    }

    // Ensure at least 3 pages are shown (first, current, last)
    maxPages = Math.max(3, maxPages);

    // Don't show more pages than we have
    return Math.min(maxPages, this.length);
  }

  private getPageNumbers(): number[] {
    const pages: number[] = [];
    const current = this.value;
    const total = this.length;
    const visible = Math.min(this.visiblePages, total);

    if (total <= visible) {
      // Show all pages if total is less than visible
      return Array.from({ length: total }, (_, i) => i + 1);
    }

    // For very small visible counts, show strategic pages
    if (visible <= 5) {
      pages.push(1);

      if (visible > 2) {
        if (current > 2 && current < total - 1) {
          if (current > 3) pages.push(-1);
          pages.push(current);
          if (current < total - 2) pages.push(-1);
        } else if (current <= 2) {
          if (visible > 3) pages.push(2);
          if (visible > 4 && total > 3) pages.push(3);
          pages.push(-1);
        } else {
          pages.push(-1);
          if (visible > 4 && total > 3) pages.push(total - 2);
          if (visible > 3) pages.push(total - 1);
        }
      } else {
        pages.push(-1);
      }

      if (total > 1) {
        pages.push(total);
      }

      return pages;
    }

    // Standard algorithm for larger visible counts
    // Always show first page
    pages.push(1);

    // Calculate start and end of visible range
    let start = Math.max(2, current - Math.floor((visible - 4) / 2));
    let end = Math.min(total - 1, start + visible - 4);

    // Adjust start if end is at maximum
    if (end === total - 1) {
      start = Math.max(2, end - (visible - 4) + 1);
    }

    // Add ellipsis before range if needed
    if (start > 2) {
      pages.push(-1); // -1 represents ellipsis
    }

    // Add visible range
    for (let i = start; i <= end; i++) {
      pages.push(i);
    }

    // Add ellipsis after range if needed
    if (end < total - 1) {
      pages.push(-1); // -1 represents ellipsis
    }

    // Always show last page
    if (total > 1) {
      pages.push(total);
    }

    return pages;
  }

  private handlePageClick(page: number, event: Event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (page === this.value || this.disabled) return;

    const detail = {
      oldValue: this.value,
      newValue: page,
    };

    this.value = page;
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('page-change', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private handlePrevClick(event: Event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (this.value > 1 && !this.disabled) {
      this.handlePageClick(this.value - 1, event);
    }
  }

  private handleNextClick(event: Event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (this.value < this.length && !this.disabled) {
      this.handlePageClick(this.value + 1, event);
    }
  }

  private handleFirstClick(event: Event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (this.value !== 1 && !this.disabled) {
      this.handlePageClick(1, event);
    }
  }

  private handleLastClick(event: Event) {
    event.preventDefault();
    if (this.value !== this.length && !this.disabled) {
      this.handlePageClick(this.length, event);
    }
  }

  protected render() {
    const pageNumbers = this.getPageNumbers();
    const showNavButtons = this.length > 1;

    return html`
      <nav
        part="paginator"
        class="paginator"
        role="navigation"
        aria-label="Pagination"
        ?disabled="${this.disabled}"
      >
        <ol
          role="list"
          class=${classMap({
            'paginator-list': true,
            [`paginator-${this.align}`]: this.align,
          })}
        >
          ${showNavButtons
            ? html`
                <li
                  role="listitem"
                  class=${classMap({
                    'paginator-list-item': true,
                    'paginator-nav-item': true,
                    'paginator-disabled': this.value === 1 || this.disabled,
                  })}
                >
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    class="paginator-button"
                    aria-label="First page"
                    ?disabled="${this.value === 1 || this.disabled}"
                    @click="${this.handleFirstClick}"
                  >
                    <col-icon name="chevron-double-left" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
                  </button>
                </li>

                <li
                  role="listitem"
                  class=${classMap({
                    'paginator-list-item': true,
                    'paginator-nav-item': true,
                    'paginator-disabled': this.value === 1 || this.disabled,
                  })}
                >
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    class="paginator-button"
                    aria-label="Previous page"
                    ?disabled="${this.value === 1 || this.disabled}"
                    @click="${this.handlePrevClick}"
                  >
                    <col-icon name="chevron-left" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
                  </button>
                </li>
              `
            : nothing}
          ${map(pageNumbers, pageNum => {
            if (pageNum === -1) {
              // Render ellipsis
              return html`
                <li role="listitem" class="paginator-list-item paginator-ellipsis">
                  <span class="paginator-ellipsis-text" aria-hidden="true">...</span>
                </li>
              `;
            }

            return html`
              <li
                role="listitem"
                class=${classMap({
                  'paginator-list-item': true,
                  'paginator-number-item': true,
                  'paginator-current': pageNum === this.value,
                  'paginator-disabled': this.disabled,
                })}
              >
                <a
                  role="button"
                  href="#"
                  aria-label="${pageNum === this.value
                    ? `Current page, page ${pageNum}`
                    : `Go to page ${pageNum}`}"
                  aria-current="${pageNum === this.value ? 'page' : nothing}"
                  class="paginator-link"
                  @click="${(e: Event) => this.handlePageClick(pageNum, e)}"
                  >${pageNum}</a
                >
              </li>
            `;
          })}
          ${showNavButtons
            ? html`
                <li
                  role="listitem"
                  class=${classMap({
                    'paginator-list-item': true,
                    'paginator-nav-item': true,
                    'paginator-disabled': this.value === this.length || this.disabled,
                  })}
                >
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    class="paginator-button"
                    aria-label="Next page"
                    ?disabled="${this.value === this.length || this.disabled}"
                    @click="${this.handleNextClick}"
                  >
                    <col-icon name="chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
                  </button>
                </li>

                <li
                  role="listitem"
                  class=${classMap({
                    'paginator-list-item': true,
                    'paginator-nav-item': true,
                    'paginator-disabled': this.value === this.length || this.disabled,
                  })}
                >
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    class="paginator-button"
                    aria-label="Last page"
                    ?disabled="${this.value === this.length || this.disabled}"
                    @click="${this.handleLastClick}"
                  >
                    <col-icon name="chevron-double-right" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
                  </button>
                </li>
              `
            : nothing}
        </ol>
      </nav>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-paginator': ColPaginator;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSearchBarStyles = css`
  /* Group styling for adjacent radio buttons */
  :host([data-grouped]) col-button::part(button) {
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  :host([data-grouped][data-item='first']) col-button::part(button) {
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    border-top-right-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  }

  :host([data-grouped][data-item='last']) col-button::part(button) {
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    border-top-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/search-bar/col-search-bar.test.ts

import { expect, fixture, html, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSearchBar } from './col-search-bar';
import { ColButton, ColTextField } from '@/components';

customElements.define('col-search-bar', ColSearchBar);

describe('ColSearchBar', () => {
  describe('Rendering', () => {
    it('renders with default properties', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar></col-search-bar>`);
      expect(el).to.exist;
    });

    it('displays placeholder text', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(
        html`<col-search-bar mode="expanded"></col-search-bar>`
      );
      const textField = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field') as ColTextField;
      expect(textField?.placeholder).to.equal('Enter your search...');
    });

    it('shows input if mode is expanded', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(
        html`<col-search-bar mode="expanded"></col-search-bar>`
      );
      const textField = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field');
      expect(textField).to.exist;
    });

    it('shows search button if mode is static', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-button');
      expect(button).to.exist;
    });
    it('respects loading and disabled props', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(
        html`<col-search-bar mode="expanded" loading disabled></col-search-bar>`
      );
      const textField = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field')!;

      expect(textField.hasAttribute('loading')).to.be.true;
      expect(textField.hasAttribute('disabled')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Behavior', () => {
    it('clicking button reveals text field', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-button') as ColButton;
      button.click();
      await elementUpdated(el);

      const textField = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field');
      expect(textField).to.exist;
    });

    it('updates when mode changes dynamically', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-button')).to.exist;

      el.mode = 'expanded';
      await elementUpdated(el);

      const textField = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field');
      expect(textField).to.exist;
    });

    it('toggles to expanded state when search button is clicked', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      const button = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-button') as ColButton;
      button.click();
      await elementUpdated(el);
      const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field');
      expect(input).to.exist;
    });

    it('updates internal state when mode changes dynamically', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      el.mode = 'expanded';
      await elementUpdated(el);
      const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-text-field');
      expect(input).to.exist;
    });

    it('expands input if mode is not static on connectedCallback', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(
        html`<col-search-bar mode="expanded"></col-search-bar>`
      );
      expect(el['_isExpanded']).to.be.true;
    });

    it('updates internal _isExpanded when mode changes', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      el.mode = 'expanded';
      await elementUpdated(el);
      expect(el['_isExpanded']).to.be.true;
    });

    it('toggles _isExpanded when button is clicked', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColSearchBar>(html`<col-search-bar mode="static"></col-search-bar>`);
      const button = el.shadowRoot!.querySelector('col-button') as ColButton;
      button.click();
      await elementUpdated(el);
      expect(el['_isExpanded']).to.be.true;
    });

    it('connectedCallback sets _isExpanded based on mode', async () => {
      const el = new ColSearchBar();
      el.mode = 'expanded';

      el.connectedCallback();
      expect(el['_isExpanded']).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});

FILE: src/components/molecules/search-bar/col-search-bar.ts
================================================
import { html, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta } from '@/config';
import { InputFormComponent } from '@/config/components/input-form-component/input-form-component';
import { ColButton, ColTextField } from '@/components';
import { ColSearchBarStyles } from './col-search-bar.styles';

/**
 * Search bar component for entering and clearing search text.
 *
 * @element col-search-bar
 *
 * @summary A search input component with an optional toggle button to expand or collapse the input field.
 *
 * @csspart text-field - The internal text field element
 * @csspart button - The button used to toggle the search bar
 *
 * @attr {'static'|'expanded'} mode - Display mode for the search bar
 * @attr {boolean} loading - Whether the input should show a loading indicator
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the input is disabled
 * @attr {string} placeholder - Placeholder text inside the search input
 * @attr {string} value - Current value of the input
 * @attr {string} custom-width - Custom width applied to the inner text field when expanded (e.g., "320px", "50%", "min(280px, 100%)"). Defaults to auto when omitted.
 *
 * @property {'static'|'expanded'} mode - Display mode for the search bar
 * @property {boolean} loading - Whether the input should show a loading indicator
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the input is disabled
 * @property {string} placeholder - Placeholder text inside the search input
 * @property {string} value - Current value of the input
 * @property {string} customWidth - Custom width applied to the inner text field when expanded. Accepts any valid CSS width token per MDN.
 *
 * @fires input - Fired when the user types in the input field. Returns `{ value: string }`.
 * @fires input-cleared - Fired when the clear icon is clicked and the input is cleared
 * @fires change - Fired when the input value is committed
 * @fires focus - Fired when the input receives focus
 * @fires blur - Fired when the input loses focus
 * @fires keydown - Fired when a key is pressed down
 * @fires keyup - Fired when a key is released
 * @fires paste - Fired when content is pasted into the input
 * @fires invalid - Fired when validation fails
 * @fires validation-change - Fired when validation state changes
 */

@Meta({ name: 'search-bar', components: [ColButton, ColTextField] })
export class ColSearchBar extends InputFormComponent {
  static styles = [ColSearchBarStyles];

  /**
   * Optional form id to associate this control when placed outside the form.
   * Reflects to allow platform association for form-associated custom elements.
   */
  @property({ type: String })
  form: string = '';

  @property({ type: String })
  mode: 'static' | 'expanded' = 'static';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  loading = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  disabled = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  placeholder = 'Enter your search...';

  /**
   * Custom width for the inner text field. Applied only when the search bar is expanded.
   * Maps to the `custom-width` attribute and forwards to the internal <col-text-field>.
   */
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'custom-width' })
  customWidth = '';

  @state()
  private _isExpanded = false;

  protected override _uniqueId = `search-bar-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this._isExpanded = this.mode !== 'static';
    // Ensure initial form value sync
    this._syncFormValue();
  }

  updated(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    if (changedProps.has('mode')) {
      this._isExpanded = this.mode !== 'static';
    }
  }

  public validate(_value: unknown): boolean {
    return true;
  }

  private _toggleInitialButton() {
    this._isExpanded = !this._isExpanded;
  }

  private _clearInput() {
    if (this.mode === 'static') {
      this._isExpanded = false;
    }
    this.value = '';
    // Keep form association up to date
    this._syncFormValue();

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('input-cleared', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _onInput(e: InputEvent) {
    const target = e.target as ColTextField;
    this.value = target.value;
    // Update form value and emit standard input
    this._syncFormValue();
    this._dispatchInput(target.value ?? '');
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('search-input', {
        detail: { value: this.value },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      ${!this._isExpanded
        ? html` <col-button part="button" @click=${this._toggleInitialButton}>
            <col-icon name="search" size="16px"></col-icon>
          </col-button>`
        : html`
            <col-text-field
              part="text-field"
              .id=${this._uniqueId}
              .value=${this.value}
              ?loading=${this.loading}
              ?disabled=${this.disabled}
              .placeholder=${this.placeholder}
              .customWidth=${this.customWidth}
              @input=${this._onInput}
              @input-cleared=${this._clearInput}
            >
              <col-icon
                slot="icon"
                name="search"
                size="16px"
                color="var(--col-colors-icon-default-light)"
              ></col-icon>
            </col-text-field>
          `}
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-search-bar': ColSearchBar;
  }
}



================================================

export * from './col-search-bar';

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSelectStyles = [
  css`
    :host {
      display: block;
      width: var(--input-width);
    }

    .dropdown-arrow {
      transition: transform 0.2s ease;
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .dropdown-arrow.open {
      transform: rotate(180deg);
    }

    .dropdown-arrow-container {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      background: transparent;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .loading-indicator {
      z-index: 1;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .spinner {
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      border: 2px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default-light')};
      border-radius: 50%;
      border-top-color: transparent;
      animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
    }

    .select-badge {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      height: 20px;
      padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
      background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.base-light')};
      border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
      font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
      font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-xs')};
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 16px;
      z-index: 1;
      pointer-events: none;
    }

    .input-group {
      position: relative;
    }

    .select-trigger-wrapper {
      position: relative;
      width: 100%;
    }

    .select-empty-state {
      padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
      font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
      font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-size.s')};
      line-height: 20px;
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default')};
    }

    ::part(content) {
      margin: 0;
    }

    @keyframes spin {
      to {
        transform: rotate(360deg);
      }
    }
  `,
];



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/select/col-select.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues, TemplateResult } from 'lit';
import { property, query, queryAssignedElements, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, TAG_PREFIX } from '@/config';
import {
  InputFormComponent,
  InputFormComponentStyles,
} from '@/config/components/input-form-component';
import { ColDropdown, ColListMenu, ColListMenuItem, ColTypography } from '@/components';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';
import { ColSelectStyles } from './col-select.styles';

export interface SelectOption {
  value: string;
  text: string;
  disabled?: boolean;
}

const LIST_MENU_ITEM_TAG_NAME = `${TAG_PREFIX}-${ColListMenuItem.tagName.toLowerCase()}`;
const LIST_MENU_ITEM_CUSTOM_EVENT = `list-menu-item-click`;

/**
 * Select component for dropdown selection with customizable options.
 *
 * @element col-select
 *
 * @summary A select component that provides dropdown functionality with loading states, badges, form
 * integration, and validation support. Supports both static selection and searchable/filterable modes.
 *
 * @description
 * The select component offers two modes of operation:
 *
 * **Static Mode (default)**: Input is readonly, users click to open dropdown and select from list.
 *
 * **Searchable Mode**: When `searchable` attribute is set, input becomes editable and options are
 * filtered as user types.
 *
 * @slot - The selectable options for the dropdown (e.g., `col-list-menu-item` or custom elements with `data-value`).
 * @slot label - The label content for the select field.
 * @slot sub-label - Additional sub-label content below the main label.
 * @slot prefix - Content to display before the input (e.g., icons).
 *
 * @csspart input-group - The main container for the input group.
 * @csspart input - The main input element.
 * @csspart input-label - The label element.
 * @csspart input-sublabel - The sub-label element.
 * @csspart input-error-message - The error message element.
 * @csspart input-helper - The helper text element.
 * @csspart prefix - The prefix slot container.
 * @csspart suffix - The suffix slot container.
 *
 * @cssprop --input-width - Controls the host element's width. Set via the `custom-width` attribute (e.g., 320px, 50%, min(280px, 100%)). Defaults to `auto` when not provided.
 *
 * @attr {string} value - The current selected value. Can be used to reset the field to a previous value.
 * @attr {string} placeholder - Placeholder text for the select input.
 * @attr {boolean} searchable - Enable search/filter functionality. When true, input becomes editable and options are filtered as user types.
 * @attr {string} empty-state-text - Text to display when searchable mode has no matching results. Defaults to "No results found".
 * @attr {boolean} loading - Whether the select is in a loading state.
 * @attr {boolean} badge - Whether to display a badge with the selected count.
 * @attr {boolean} counter - Whether to display a character counter.
 * @attr {string} placement - The placement of the dropdown ('start' | 'end').
 * @attr {string} name - The name attribute for form integration.
 * @attr {boolean} required - Whether the field is required.
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the select is disabled.
 * @attr {boolean} error - Whether the select is in an error state.
 * @attr {string} error-message - The custom error message.
 * @attr {boolean} valid - Whether the select is valid.
 * @attr {boolean} touched - Whether the select has been touched.
 * @attr {boolean} dirty - Whether the select value has changed.
 * @attr {boolean} focused - Whether the select is focused.
 * @attr {boolean} clearable - Whether the clear button should be shown when a value is selected. Defaults to true.
 * @attr {string} variant - The visual variant of the input ('outline' | 'plain').
 * @attr {string} label - The main label text.
 * @attr {string} sub-label - Additional sub-label text.
 * @attr {string} helper - Helper text displayed below the input.
 * @attr {string} custom-width - Custom width for the select host (e.g., "320px", "50%", "min(280px, 100%)"). Applied to the host via the `--input-width` CSS variable; defaults to `auto` when omitted.
 *
 * @property {string} type - The input type (always 'select').
 * @property {string} value - The current selected value.
 * @property {string} placeholder - Placeholder text for the select input.
 * @property {boolean} searchable - Enable search/filter functionality.
 * @property {string} emptyStateText - Text to display when searchable mode has no matching results.
 * @property {boolean} loading - Whether the select is in a loading state.
 * @property {boolean} badge - Whether to display a badge with the selected count.
 * @property {boolean} counter - Whether to display a character counter.
 * @property {string} placement - The placement of the dropdown ('start' | 'end').
 * @property {string} name - The name attribute for form integration.
 * @property {boolean} required - Whether the field is required.
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the select is disabled.
 * @property {boolean} error - Whether the select has an error state.
 * @property {string} errorMessage - The custom error message.
 * @property {boolean} valid - Whether the select is valid.
 * @property {boolean} touched - Whether the select has been touched.
 * @property {boolean} dirty - Whether the select value has changed.
 * @property {boolean} focused - Whether the select is focused.
 * @property {boolean} clearable - Controls visibility of the clear button when a value is selected.
 * @property {string} variant - The visual variant of the input ('outline' | 'plain').
 * @property {string} label - The main label text.
 * @property {string} subLabel - Additional sub-label text.
 * @property {string} helper - Helper text displayed below the input.
 * @property {string} customWidth - Custom width for the select host. When set, updates the `--input-width` CSS variable used by the component's host; accepts any valid CSS width token per MDN.
 *
 * @fires input - Fired when the select value changes.
 * @fires change - Fired when the select value is committed.
 * @fires focus - Fired when the select receives focus.
 * @fires blur - Fired when the select loses focus.
 * @fires select-option-selected - Fired when an option is selected.
 * @fires select-cleared - Fired when the select value is cleared.
 * @fires select-opened - Fired when the dropdown opens.
 * @fires select-closed - Fired when the dropdown closes.
 *
 * @method selectOption - Programmatically selects an option.
 * @method validate - Validates the current value.
 * @method getValidationState - Gets the current validation state.
 *
 * @example
 * <!-- Static select -->
 * <col-select value="option1" clearable>
 *   <col-list-menu-item value="option1">Option 1</col-list-menu-item>
 *   <col-list-menu-item value="option2">Option 2</col-list-menu-item>
 * </col-select>
 *
 * @example
 * <!-- Searchable select -->
 * <col-select searchable clearable placeholder="Search options...">
 *   <col-list-menu-item value="apple">Apple</col-list-menu-item>
 *   <col-list-menu-item value="banana">Banana</col-list-menu-item>
 *   <col-list-menu-item value="cherry">Cherry</col-list-menu-item>
 * </col-select>
 */
@Meta({ name: 'select', components: [ColTypography, ColDropdown, ColIcon] })
export class ColSelect extends InputFormComponent {
  static styles = [InputFormComponentStyles, ColSelectStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  type: 'text' | 'checkbox' | 'radio' | 'select' | 'textarea' | 'toggle' = 'select';

  @property({ type: String })
  placeholder = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  badge = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  counter = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  clearable = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  placement: 'start' | 'end' = 'start';

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  searchable = false;

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'empty-state-text' })
  emptyStateText = 'No results found';

  @state()
  private open = false;

  @state()
  private _selectedOption: SelectOption | null = null;

  @state()
  private filterText = '';

  @state()
  private isFiltering = false;

  @state()
  private _visibleOptionsCount = 0;

  @query('input', true)
  private inputElement?: HTMLInputElement;

  @query('col-dropdown', true)
  private dropdownElement?: ColDropdown;

  @queryAssignedElements({ flatten: true })
  private _listMenu!: Array<HTMLElement | ColListMenu>;

  protected override _uniqueId = `select-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  private _syncFrame?: number;

  private _disabledBeforeLoading: boolean | null = null;

  firstUpdated(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    super.firstUpdated(changedProperties);
    this._setupStateSync();
    this._setupOptionListeners();
    this._syncSelectionState();
    this._syncFormValue();
  }

  updated(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    super.updated(changedProps);
    if (changedProps.has('open')) {
      const wasOpen = changedProps.get('open');
      if (wasOpen !== this.open) {
        this._dispatchStateChangeEvent(this.open ? 'opened' : 'closed');
      }
    }
    if (changedProps.has('subLabel')) {
      this._updateInputPadding();
    }
    if (changedProps.has('value')) {
      this._syncSelectionState();
    }
    if (changedProps.has('filterText')) {
      this._filterOptions();
    }
    this._updateDropdownWidth();

    if (changedProps.has('loading')) {
      if (this.loading) {
        if (this._disabledBeforeLoading === null) this._disabledBeforeLoading = this.disabled;
        if (!this._disabledBeforeLoading) this.disabled = true;
      } else {
        if (this._disabledBeforeLoading === false) this.disabled = false;
        this._disabledBeforeLoading = null;
      }
    }
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    this._cleanupOptionListeners();
    if (this._syncFrame) {
      cancelAnimationFrame(this._syncFrame);
    }
  }

  public selectOption(option: SelectOption): void {
    if (option.disabled) {
      return;
    }

    const options = this._getAllOptions();
    const actualOption = options.find(opt => opt.value === option.value);

    if (actualOption?.disabled) {
      return;
    }

    if (!actualOption && options.length > 0) {
      return;
    }

    const oldValue = this.value;
    const oldOption = this._selectedOption;

    this.value = option.value;
    this.open = false;

    if (this.searchable) {
      this.filterText = '';
      this.isFiltering = false;
      this._filterOptions();
    }

    this._syncSelectionState();
    this._updateDirtyState();
    this._updateValidState();
    this._dispatchInput(option.value);
    this._handleChange();
    this._syncFormValue();

    if (this.valid) {
      this.error = false;
    }

    const selectedOptionForEvent = actualOption || option;

    // Dispatch custom event for select-specific behavior
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('select-option-selected', {
        detail: {
          value: option.value,
          oldValue,
          selectedOption: selectedOptionForEvent,
          previousOption: oldOption,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  public validate(value: unknown): boolean {
    if (!this.inputElement) return true;

    let isValid = this.inputElement.checkValidity();

    if (isValid && this.required && !value) {
      isValid = false;
    }

    this.error = !isValid;
    this.valid = isValid;
    return isValid;
  }

  public override getValidationState() {
    const baseState = super.getValidationState();
    if (!baseState) return null;

    return {
      ...baseState,
      isOpen: this.open,
      hasSelection: !!this.value,
      selectedOption: this.selectedOption,
    };
  }

  public override _handleFormReset(): void {
    super._handleFormReset();
    this.open = false;
    if (this.searchable) {
      this.filterText = '';
      this.isFiltering = false;
      this._filterOptions();
    }
    this._syncSelectionState();
  }

  private get _isDisabled(): boolean {
    return this.disabled || this.loading;
  }

  private get _showEmptyState(): boolean {
    return this.searchable && this.isFiltering && this._visibleOptionsCount === 0;
  }

  get badgeCount(): number {
    return this._selectedOption ? 1 : 0;
  }

  get isOpen(): boolean {
    return this.open;
  }

  get hasSelection(): boolean {
    return !!this._selectedOption;
  }

  get selectedOption(): SelectOption | null {
    return this._selectedOption;
  }

  protected override get _supportsClearing(): boolean {
    return this.clearable;
  }

  protected override get _hasValue(): boolean {
    return !!this._selectedOption;
  }

  private _setupStateSync() {
    if (this.dropdownElement) {
      const syncState = () => {
        if (this.dropdownElement && this.dropdownElement.open !== this.open) {
          const wasOpen = this.open;
          this.open = this.dropdownElement.open;

          if (wasOpen !== this.open) {
            this._dispatchStateChangeEvent(this.open ? 'opened' : 'closed');
          }
        }
        if (this.isConnected) {
          this._syncFrame = requestAnimationFrame(syncState);
        }
      };
      this._syncFrame = requestAnimationFrame(syncState);
    }
  }

  private _getAllOptions(): (SelectOption & { element: HTMLElement })[] {
    const slottedElements = this._listMenu || [];
    if (slottedElements.length === 0) {
      return [];
    }

    let itemsToSearch: Element[] = [];

    for (const el of slottedElements) {
      if (el instanceof ColListMenu) {
        itemsToSearch.push(...(el.menuItems || []));
      } else if (el.matches(LIST_MENU_ITEM_TAG_NAME) || el.hasAttribute('data-value')) {
        itemsToSearch.push(el);
      } else {
        itemsToSearch.push(...Array.from(el.children));
      }
    }

    return itemsToSearch
      .map(element => {
        const isListItem = element.tagName.toLowerCase() === LIST_MENU_ITEM_TAG_NAME;
        const customEl = element as HTMLElement;

        if (isListItem) {
          const listItem = element as ColListMenuItem;
          return {
            value: listItem.value,
            text: listItem.textContent?.trim() || '',
            disabled: listItem.disabled || false,
            element: listItem,
          };
        } else if (customEl.dataset?.value) {
          return {
            value: customEl.dataset.value,
            text: customEl.textContent?.trim() || '',
            disabled: customEl.hasAttribute('disabled') || customEl.dataset.disabled === 'true',
            element: customEl,
          };
        }
        return null;
      })
      .filter(Boolean) as (SelectOption & { element: HTMLElement })[];
  }

  private _filterOptions() {
    if (!this.searchable) return;

    const options = this._getAllOptions();
    const searchText = this.filterText.toLowerCase().trim();
    let visibleCount = 0;

    options.forEach(option => {
      const optionText = option.text.toLowerCase();
      const matches = optionText.includes(searchText);

      if (searchText === '') {
        option.element.style.display = '';
        if (!option.disabled) visibleCount++;
      } else if (matches && !option.disabled) {
        option.element.style.display = '';
        visibleCount++;
      } else {
        option.element.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });

    this._visibleOptionsCount = visibleCount;

    this._listMenu?.forEach(el => {
      (el as HTMLElement).style.display = this._showEmptyState ? 'none' : '';
    });
  }

  private _handleSlotChange = () => {
    this._syncSelectionState();
  };

  private _syncSelectionState() {
    const options = this._getAllOptions();
    const selectedOption = options.find(opt => opt.value === this.value && !opt.disabled) || null;

    const matchingDisabledOption = options.find(opt => opt.value === this.value && opt.disabled);
    if (matchingDisabledOption && this.value) {
      this.value = '';
      this._selectedOption = null;
    } else {
      this._selectedOption = selectedOption;
    }

    this._updateSelectedState(this._selectedOption?.value || '');
  }

  private _updateSelectedState(selectedValue: string) {
    const options = this._getAllOptions();
    options.forEach(({ element, value }) => {
      const isSelected = value === selectedValue;
      if (element.tagName.toLowerCase() === LIST_MENU_ITEM_TAG_NAME) {
        (element as ColListMenuItem).selected = isSelected;
      } else {
        element.classList.toggle('selected', isSelected);
        element.toggleAttribute('data-selected', isSelected);
        element.setAttribute('aria-selected', String(isSelected));
      }
    });
  }

  private _updateDropdownWidth() {
    if (this.inputElement) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        const width = this.inputElement?.getBoundingClientRect().width;
        this.style.setProperty('--dropdown-trigger-width', `${width}px`);
      });
    }
  }

  private _dispatchStateChangeEvent(type: 'opened' | 'closed'): void {
    const eventName = `select-${type}` as const;
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent(eventName, {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { open: this.open },
      })
    );
  }

  private _handleListMenuItemClick = (e: Event) => {
    const customEvent = e as CustomEvent<{ value: string }>;
    const { value } = customEvent.detail;

    if (value) {
      this.selectOption({
        value,
        text: (e.target as HTMLElement)?.textContent?.trim() || '',
        disabled: false,
      });
    }
  };

  private _handleCustomOptionClick = (e: Event) => {
    const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
    const optionElement = target.closest('[data-value]') as HTMLElement;

    if (!optionElement) return;

    const value = (optionElement as HTMLElement).dataset.value;
    const text = optionElement.textContent?.trim() || '';
    const disabled =
      optionElement.hasAttribute('disabled') || optionElement.dataset.disabled === 'true';

    if (value && !disabled) {
      this.selectOption({
        value,
        text,
        disabled,
      });
    }
  };

  private _setupOptionListeners() {
    this.addEventListener(LIST_MENU_ITEM_CUSTOM_EVENT, this._handleListMenuItemClick);

    this.addEventListener('click', this._handleCustomOptionClick);

    this.addEventListener('keydown', (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
      const isCustomElement =
        target.closest('[data-value]') && !target.closest(LIST_MENU_ITEM_TAG_NAME);

      if (isCustomElement && (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ')) {
        e.preventDefault();
        this._handleCustomOptionClick(e);
      }
    });
  }

  private _cleanupOptionListeners() {
    this.removeEventListener(LIST_MENU_ITEM_CUSTOM_EVENT, this._handleListMenuItemClick);
    this.removeEventListener('click', this._handleCustomOptionClick);
  }

  private _handleFilterInput = (e: Event) => {
    if (!this.searchable) return;

    const input = e.target as HTMLInputElement;
    const newValue = input.value;

    this.filterText = newValue;
    this.isFiltering = true;

    if (!this.open) {
      this.open = true;
    }
  };

  protected _updateDirtyState() {
    this.dirty = this.value !== this.initialValue;
  }

  protected _updateValidState(): void {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this.validate(this.value);
    });
  }

  protected override _handleClear(): void {
    const oldOption = this._selectedOption;

    this.value = '';
    this._selectedOption = null;
    this.open = false;

    if (this.searchable) {
      this.filterText = '';
      this.isFiltering = false;
      this._filterOptions();
    }

    this._updateSelectedState('');
    this._updateDirtyState();
    this._updateValidState();
    this._dispatchInput('');
    this._handleChange();
    this._syncFormValue();

    //Custom event for select-specific behavior
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('select-cleared', {
        detail: {
          previousOption: oldOption,
          value: this.value,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  protected override renderInput() {
    const attrs = this._getCommonInputAttributes();
    const events = this._getCommonInputEventHandlers();

    const displayValue =
      this.searchable && this.isFiltering ? this.filterText : this._selectedOption?.text || '';

    return html`
      <input
        class=${attrs.errorClass}
        type="text"
        name="${attrs.name}"
        id="${attrs.id}"
        aria-labelledby=${attrs.ariaLabelledby}
        aria-describedby=${attrs.ariaDescribedby}
        aria-invalid=${attrs.ariaInvalid}
        aria-required=${attrs.ariaRequired}
        aria-expanded="${this.open}"
        aria-haspopup="listbox"
        role="combobox"
        ?required=${attrs.required}
        placeholder="${this.placeholder || ''}"
        .value="${displayValue}"
        ?disabled=${this._isDisabled}
        ?readonly=${!this.searchable}
        @input=${this.searchable ? this._handleFilterInput : nothing}
        @focus=${events.onFocus}
        @blur=${events.onBlur}
      />
    `;
  }

  protected override renderSuffix(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return html`<div
      id="${this.inputId}-suffix-container"
      class="adornment-container suffix-container"
    >
      ${this.badge
        ? html`
            <div class="select-badge" aria-label="Selected items: ${this.badgeCount}">
              ${this.badgeCount > 99 ? '99+' : this.badgeCount}
            </div>
          `
        : nothing}
      ${this._supportsClearing && this._hasValue && !this.loading
        ? html`
            <button
              type="button"
              aria-label="Clear input"
              class="icon-close-container"
              id="${this.inputId}-clear"
              aria-controls="${this.inputId}"
              aria-describedby="${this.inputId}"
              data-dropdown-ignore="true"
              @click=${this._handleClear}
            >
              <col-icon
                size="12px"
                name="close"
                aria-hidden="true"
                id="${this.inputId}-clear-icon"
                data-dropdown-ignore="true"
              ></col-icon>
            </button>
          `
        : nothing}
      ${this.loading
        ? html`
            <div class="loading-indicator">
              <div class="spinner"></div>
            </div>
          `
        : html`
            <button
              type="button"
              aria-label="Open dropdown"
              class="dropdown-arrow-container"
              id="${this.inputId}-dropdown-arrow"
            >
              <col-icon
                name="chevron-down"
                size="16px"
                class="dropdown-arrow ${this.open ? 'open' : ''}"
                aria-hidden="true"
              ></col-icon>
            </button>
          `}
    </div>`;
  }

  protected override renderHint(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return html`
      <div class="input-hint">
        ${this.error && this.errorMessage
          ? html`
              <col-typography
                class="input-error-message"
                id="${this.inputId}-error"
                role="alert"
                aria-live="assertive"
                variant="helper"
                element="span"
              >
                ${this.errorMessage}
              </col-typography>
            `
          : this.helper
            ? html`
                <col-typography
                  class="input-helper"
                  id="${this.inputId}-helper"
                  aria-live="polite"
                  aria-atomic="true"
                  variant="helper"
                  element="span"
                >
                  ${this.helper}
                </col-typography>
              `
            : html`<span></span>`}
        ${this.counter
          ? html`
              <span
                aria-live="polite"
                class="input-selection-count"
                id="${this.inputId}-selection-count"
                aria-label="Selected items"
              >
                ${this.badgeCount}/1
              </span>
            `
          : nothing}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  protected override render(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return html`
      ${this.renderLabel()}
      <div
        class="input-group input ${this.hasSlotted('icon') ? 'input-icon-left' : ''} ${this.subLabel
          ? 'input-sublabel'
          : ''} input-variant-${this.variant}"
      >
        <col-dropdown
          ?open=${this.open}
          ?disabled=${this._isDisabled}
          ?suppressTriggerKeys=${this.searchable}
          placement=${this.placement}
          keepopen
        >
          <div slot="trigger" class="select-trigger-wrapper">
            ${this.renderPrefix()} ${this.renderInput()} ${this.renderSuffix()}
          </div>
          <slot @slotchange=${this._handleSlotChange}></slot>
          ${this._showEmptyState
            ? html`<div class="select-empty-state">${this.emptyStateText}</div>`
            : nothing}
        </col-dropdown>
      </div>
      ${this.renderHint()}
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-select': ColSelect;
  }
}

export * from './col-select';

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColSiteMenuSubmenuStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: flex;
    width: var(--col-site-menu-submenu-width, 242px);
  }

  :host([hidden]) {
    display: none;
  }

  .submenu-container {
    width: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
    scrollbar-width: none;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease-out;
  }

  .submenu-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    overflow-y: auto;
  }

  .submenu-hidden {
    transform: translateX(-100%);
  }

  .submenu-visible {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }

  .color-primary {
    background-color: var(--col-theme-site-menu-base-light, ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary')});
  }

  .color-dark {
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.bg.neutral')};
  }

  .color-light {
    background-color: var(
      --col-theme-site-menu-ui-inverse,
      ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.primary-lighter')}
    );
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/site-menu-submenu/col-site-menu-submenu.test.ts
