import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import {
  ColSiteMenu,
  ColSiteMenuToolbar,
  ColSiteMenuSubmenu,
  ColSiteMenuCategory,
  ColSiteMenuItem,
  ColSiteMenuButton,
} from '@/components';

customElements.define('col-site-menu-submenu', ColSiteMenuSubmenu);
customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-toolbar', ColSiteMenuToolbar);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-category', ColSiteMenuCategory);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-item', ColSiteMenuItem);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-button', ColSiteMenuButton);

describe('ColSiteMenuSubmenu', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu-submenu').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render submenu with correct structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <span>Submenu Content</span>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;
      const content = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="content"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside).to.exist;
      expect(content).to.exist;
      expect(aside.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('aside');
      expect(content.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('main');
      expect(submenu?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Submenu Content');
    });

    it('should apply correct color variant from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark">
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.className).to.include('color-dark');
      expect(aside.className).to.include('submenu-container');
    });

    it('should have hidden state by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.className).to.include('submenu-hidden');
      expect(aside.className).to.not.include('submenu-visible');
      expect(aside.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
      expect(aside.hasAttribute('inert')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should show visible state when context is open', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      await elementUpdated(submenu!);

      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.className).to.include('submenu-visible');
      expect(aside.className).to.not.include('submenu-hidden');
      expect(aside.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
      expect(aside.hasAttribute('inert')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle empty slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu"></col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;
      const content = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="content"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside).to.exist;
      expect(content).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use default color when no context provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenuSubmenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu-submenu>Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
      `);

      const aside = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.className).to.include('color-primary');
    });
  });

  describe('Context integration', () => {
    it('should respond to context open state changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.className).to.include('submenu-hidden');

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu!);

      expect(aside.className).to.include('submenu-visible');
    });

    it('should respond to color changes from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="light">
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.className).to.include('color-light');
    });
  });

  describe('Event handling', () => {
    it('should handle category close events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <span data-testid="category">Category</span>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      let submenuCloseEventFired = false;
      let eventDetail: any = null;

      submenu?.addEventListener('submenu-close', (e: Event) => {
        submenuCloseEventFired = true;
        eventDetail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      const categoryCloseEvent = new CustomEvent('site-menu-category-close', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { categoryName: 'test' },
      });

      submenu?.dispatchEvent(categoryCloseEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(submenuCloseEventFired).to.be.true;
      expect(eventDetail.reason).to.equal('category-close');
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle escape key to close submenu', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape' });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should handle escape key to close subcategories first', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open open-subcategory-id="test">
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('test');

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape' });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;
    });

    it('should ignore escape key when submenu is hidden', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      const escapeEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Escape' });
      document.dispatchEvent(escapeEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should ignore non-escape key events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const enterEvent = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'Enter' });
      document.dispatchEvent(enterEvent);
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Focus management', () => {
    it('should focus category component when opened with complete structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="dashboard" aria-label="Dashboard">
              <col-icon name="dash-board" size="20"></col-icon>
            </col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category category-name="dashboard">
              <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
              Dashboard Category
            </col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu')!;
      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
      const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLElement;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      const category = submenu.querySelector('col-site-menu-category') as HTMLElement;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(category);
    });

    it('should focus first button when no category available', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="settings" aria-label="Settings">
              <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
            </col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <button data-testid="first-button">First Button</button>
            <button>Second Button</button>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu')!;
      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
      const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLElement;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      const firstButton = submenu.querySelector('[data-testid="first-button"]') as HTMLElement;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(firstButton);
    });

    it('should focus anchor with href when available', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="navigation" aria-label="Navigation">
              <col-icon name="navigation" size="20"></col-icon>
            </col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <a href="#test" data-testid="link">Test Link</a>
            <span>Non-focusable</span>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu')!;
      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
      const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLElement;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      const link = submenu.querySelector('[data-testid="link"]') as HTMLElement;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(link);
    });

    it('should focus menu item when available', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="dashboard" aria-label="Dashboard">
              <col-icon name="dash-board" size="20"></col-icon>
            </col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-item item-name="test" data-testid="menu-item" tabindex="0"
              >Test Item</col-site-menu-item
            >
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu')!;
      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
      const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLElement;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      const menuItem = submenu.querySelector('[data-testid="menu-item"]') as HTMLElement;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(menuItem);
    });

    it('should maintain focus on button when no focusable content available', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="fallback" aria-label="Fallback">
              <col-icon name="fallback" size="20"></col-icon>
            </col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <span>Non-focusable content</span>
            <div>More non-focusable content</div>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu')!;
      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
      const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLElement;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const activeElement = document.activeElement;
      expect(activeElement === buttonElement || activeElement === document.body).to.be.true;
    });
    it('should focus elements with valid tabindex and skip invalid ones', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button
              slot="actions"
              action-id="tabindex-priority"
              aria-label="Tabindex Priority"
            >
              <col-icon name="test" size="20"></col-icon>
            </col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <div tabindex="-1">Should be skipped</div>
            <span>No tabindex - should be skipped</span>
            <div tabindex="0" data-testid="should-focus">Should be focused</div>
            <div tabindex="1">Comes after</div>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu')!;
      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
      const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="button"]') as HTMLElement;

      buttonElement.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await elementUpdated(submenu);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const shouldFocusElement = submenu.querySelector(
        '[data-testid="should-focus"]'
      ) as HTMLElement;
      expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(shouldFocusElement);
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct semantic structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;
      const content = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="content"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('complementary');
      expect(aside.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Site navigation submenu');
      expect(aside.getAttribute('tabindex')).to.equal('-1');
      expect(content.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('main');
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA attributes for hidden state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
      expect(aside.hasAttribute('inert')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA attributes for visible state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      await elementUpdated(submenu!);

      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(aside.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
      expect(aside.hasAttribute('inert')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Event listeners lifecycle', () => {
    it('should add event listeners on connect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenuSubmenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu-submenu>Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
      `);

      expect(element.isConnected).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should remove event listeners on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenuSubmenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu-submenu>Content</col-site-menu-submenu>
      `);

      expect(element.isConnected).to.be.true;

      element.remove();

      expect(element.isConnected).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/site-menu-submenu/col-site-menu-submenu.ts
================================================
import { html, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';
import { queryAssignedElements } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, siteMenuContext, SiteMenuContextValue } from '@/config';
import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColSiteMenuCategory } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-category';
import { ColSiteMenuSubcategory } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-subcategory';
import { ColSiteMenuSubmenuStyles } from './col-site-menu-submenu.styles';

export interface SubmenuCloseDetail {
  reason: 'category-close' | 'user-action';
}

const SITE_MENU_CATEGORY_TAG = 'col-site-menu-category';
const SITE_MENU_ITEM_TAG = 'col-site-menu-item';

/**
 * Site Menu Submenu component for containing submenu content
 *
 * @element col-site-menu-submenu
 *
 * @summary The right side panel of the site menu that contains dynamic submenu content.
 *          Handles keyboard navigation, focus management, and visibility based on Site Menu context.
 *
 * @slot - Submenu content (category, subcategories, items)
 *
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the submenu
 *
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the submenu
 *
 * @csspart submenu - The main submenu container
 * @csspart content - The content area container
 *
 * @fires submenu-close - Fired when the submenu should be closed
 *
 * @default 'Site navigation submenu' - Default ariaLabel value
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
 *   <col-site-menu-category category-name="settings">
 *     <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
 *     Settings
 *   </col-site-menu-category>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="account">
 *     <col-icon slot="icon" name="person" size="18"></col-icon>
 *     Account
 *
 *     <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="/settings/profile" router item-name="profile" parent-subcategory-id="account">
 *       Profile
 *     </col-site-menu-item>
 *     <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="/settings/security" item-name="security" parent-subcategory-id="account">
 *       Security
 *     </col-site-menu-item>
 *   </col-site-menu-subcategory>
 * </col-site-menu-submenu>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Visibility and color are provided by Site Menu context
 * Note: Automatically handles Escape key to close submenu or subcategories
 * Note: Manages focus when submenu opens (focuses first focusable element)
 * Note: Handles category close events to trigger submenu closure
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu-submenu', components: [ColSiteMenuCategory, ColSiteMenuSubcategory] })
export class ColSiteMenuSubmenu extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuSubmenuStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'Site navigation submenu';

  @queryAssignedElements()
  private _slottedElements!: HTMLElement[];

  @consume({ context: siteMenuContext, subscribe: true })
  private _context?: SiteMenuContextValue;

  private _previousOpenState: boolean = false;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this.addEventListener('site-menu-category-close', this._handleCategoryClose as EventListener);
    document.addEventListener('keydown', this._handleKeydown);
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    this.removeEventListener(
      'site-menu-category-close',
      this._handleCategoryClose as EventListener
    );
    document.removeEventListener('keydown', this._handleKeydown);
    super.disconnectedCallback();
  }

  protected updated(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    super.updated(changedProperties as Map<string, unknown>);

    const currentOpenState = this._context?.open || false;
    const submenuJustOpened = !this._previousOpenState && currentOpenState;

    if (submenuJustOpened) {
      this._focusFirstFocusableElement();
    }

    this._previousOpenState = currentOpenState;
  }

  private get _isVisible(): boolean {
    return this._context?.open || false;
  }

  private get _color(): SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS {
    return this._context?.color || SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY;
  }

  private _handleCategoryClose = (e: Event) => {
    e.stopPropagation();

    if (this._context) {
      this._context.closeSubmenu();
    }

    const detail: SubmenuCloseDetail = {
      reason: 'category-close',
    };

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('submenu-close', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail,
      })
    );
  };

  private _handleKeydown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (!this._isVisible) return;
    if (e.key !== 'Escape') return;

    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();

    if (this._context?.openSubcategoryId) {
      this._context.closeAllSubcategories();
    } else {
      this._context?.closeSubmenu();
    }
  };

  private _focusFirstFocusableElement() {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const categoryComponent = this._slottedElements.find(
        el => el.tagName.toLowerCase() === SITE_MENU_CATEGORY_TAG
      );

      if (categoryComponent) {
        categoryComponent.focus();
        return;
      }

      const focusableElement = this._slottedElements.find(el => {
        const tagName = el.tagName.toLowerCase();

        if (tagName === 'button' && !el.hasAttribute('disabled')) return true;
        if (tagName === 'a' && el.hasAttribute('href')) return true;
        if (tagName === SITE_MENU_ITEM_TAG && !el.hasAttribute('disabled')) return true;
        if (el.hasAttribute('tabindex') && el.getAttribute('tabindex') !== '-1') return true;

        return false;
      });

      if (focusableElement) {
        focusableElement.focus();
        return;
      }

      this.focus();
    });
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'submenu-container': true,
      [`color-${this._color}`]: true,
      'submenu-visible': this._isVisible,
      'submenu-hidden': !this._isVisible,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <aside
        part="submenu"
        class="${classMap(this.classes)}"
        role="complementary"
        aria-label="${this.ariaLabel}"
        aria-hidden=${!this._isVisible}
        ?inert=${!this._isVisible}
        tabindex="-1"
      >
        <main part="content" class="submenu-content" role="main">
          <slot></slot>
        </main>
      </aside>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu-submenu': ColSiteMenuSubmenu;
  }
}

      --col-theme-site-menu-ui-inverse,

FILE: src/components/molecules/site-menu-toolbar/col-site-menu-toolbar.test.ts

import { html, fixture, expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColSiteMenu } from '@/components';
import { ColSiteMenuToolbar } from './col-site-menu-toolbar';

customElements.define('col-site-menu-toolbar', ColSiteMenuToolbar);
if (!customElements.get('col-site-menu')) {
  customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
}

describe('ColSiteMenuToolbar', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu-toolbar').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render toolbar with correct structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
            <span slot="actions">Actions</span>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;
      const logoSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="logo"]') as HTMLElement;
      const actionsSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="actions"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav).to.exist;
      expect(logoSection).to.exist;
      expect(actionsSection).to.exist;
      expect(nav.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('nav');
    });

    it('should apply correct color variant from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark">
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav.className).to.include('color-dark');
      expect(nav.className).to.include('toolbar-container');
    });

    it('should render logo slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <div slot="logo" data-testid="logo">Company Logo</div>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const logoContent = toolbar?.querySelector('[data-testid="logo"]');

      expect(logoContent).to.exist;
      expect(logoContent?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Company Logo');
    });

    it('should render actions slot content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <div slot="actions" data-testid="action1">Action 1</div>
            <div slot="actions" data-testid="action2">Action 2</div>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const action1 = toolbar?.querySelector('[data-testid="action1"]');
      const action2 = toolbar?.querySelector('[data-testid="action2"]');

      expect(action1).to.exist;
      expect(action2).to.exist;
      expect(action1?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Action 1');
      expect(action2?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Action 2');
    });

    it('should handle empty slots gracefully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar"></col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;
      const logoSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="logo"]') as HTMLElement;
      const actionsSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="actions"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav).to.exist;
      expect(logoSection).to.exist;
      expect(actionsSection).to.exist;
    });

    it('should use default color when no context provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenuToolbar>(html`
        <col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
        </col-site-menu-toolbar>
      `);

      const nav = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav.className).to.include('color-primary');
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have correct semantic structure', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
            <span slot="actions">Actions</span>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;
      const logoSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="logo"]') as HTMLElement;
      const actionsSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="actions"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('navigation');
      expect(nav.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Site navigation');
      expect(logoSection.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('banner');
      expect(actionsSection.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('menubar');
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA structure for navigation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <div slot="logo" aria-label="Company Logo">Logo</div>
            <button slot="actions" aria-label="Dashboard">Dashboard</button>
            <button slot="actions" aria-label="Settings">Settings</button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;
      const actionsSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="actions"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('nav');
      expect(actionsSection.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('menubar');

      const buttons = toolbar?.querySelectorAll('button');
      expect(buttons?.length).to.equal(2);
      buttons?.forEach(button => {
        expect(button.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.exist;
      });
    });

    it('should maintain semantic hierarchy', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <h1 slot="logo">Site Title</h1>
            <nav slot="actions" aria-label="Primary navigation">
              <button>Action 1</button>
              <button>Action 2</button>
            </nav>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const logoSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="logo"]') as HTMLElement;
      const actionsSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="actions"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(logoSection.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('banner');
      expect(actionsSection.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('menubar');

      const h1 = toolbar?.querySelector('h1');
      const nav = toolbar?.querySelector('nav');
      expect(h1).to.exist;
      expect(nav).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Integration with Site Menu context', () => {
    it('should respond to color changes from context', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="primary">
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav.className).to.include('color-primary');
    });

    it('should maintain correct structure regardless of context state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="dashboard" open>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
            <span slot="actions">Actions</span>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;
      const logoSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="logo"]') as HTMLElement;
      const actionsSection = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="actions"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(nav).to.exist;
      expect(logoSection).to.exist;
      expect(actionsSection).to.exist;
      expect(nav.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('navigation');
    });

    it('should work with different color variants', async () => {
      const variants = ['primary', 'dark', 'light'];

      for (const variant of variants) {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu color="${variant}">
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <span slot="logo">Logo</span>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
        const nav = toolbar?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="toolbar"]') as HTMLElement;

        expect(nav.className).to.include(`color-${variant}`);
      }
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/site-menu-toolbar/col-site-menu-toolbar.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { consume } from '@lit/context';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, siteMenuContext, SiteMenuContextValue } from '@/config';

import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColSiteMenuButton } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-button';
import { ColSiteMenuToolbarStyles } from './col-site-menu-toolbar.styles';

/**
 * Site Menu Toolbar component for organizing logo and action items
 *
 * @element col-site-menu-toolbar
 *
 * @summary The left side toolbar of the site menu containing logo and navigation action buttons.
 *          Provides structured layout for branding and main navigation triggers.
 *
 * @slot logo - Logo content at the top of the toolbar (typically an icon)
 * @slot actions - Action items (col-site-menu-button components)
 *
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the toolbar navigation
 *
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the toolbar navigation
 *
 * @csspart toolbar - The main toolbar container
 * @csspart logo - The logo section container
 * @csspart actions - The actions section container
 *
 * @default 'Site navigation' - Default ariaLabel value
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
 *   <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-button
 *     slot="actions"
 *     action-id="dashboard"
 *     aria-label="Dashboard">
 *     <col-icon name="dash-board" size="20"></col-icon>
 *   </col-site-menu-button>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="analytics" aria-label="Analytics">
 *     <col-icon name="trending-up-square" size="20"></col-icon>
 *   </col-site-menu-button>
 *
 *   <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="settings" aria-label="Settings">
 *     <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
 *   </col-site-menu-button>
 * </col-site-menu-toolbar>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Color is provided by Site Menu context
 * Note: Action selection is handled directly by Site Menu context through buttons
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu-toolbar', components: [ColSiteMenuButton] })
export class ColSiteMenuToolbar extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuToolbarStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'Site navigation';

  @consume({ context: siteMenuContext, subscribe: true })
  private _context?: SiteMenuContextValue;

  private get _color(): SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS {
    return this._context?.color || SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY;
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      'toolbar-container': true,
      [`color-${this._color}`]: true,
    };
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <nav
        part="toolbar"
        class="${classMap(this.classes)}"
        role="navigation"
        aria-label="${this.ariaLabel}"
      >
        <div part="logo" class="logo-section" role="banner">
          <slot name="logo"></slot>
        </div>

        <div part="actions" class="actions-section" role="menubar">
          <slot name="actions"></slot>
        </div>
      </nav>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu-toolbar': ColSiteMenuToolbar;
  }
}

  }

  :host([orientation='horizontal']) .stepper {
    flex-direction: row;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  :host([orientation='vertical']) .stepper {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }
`;

import { expect, fixture, html } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColStepper } from './col-stepper';

customElements.define('col-stepper', ColStepper);

describe('ColStepper', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-stepper').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering & properties', () => {
    it('renders with default orientation horizontal', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStepper>(html`<col-stepper></col-stepper>`);
      expect(el.orientation).to.equal('horizontal');

    it('renders with vertical orientation when set', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStepper>(
        html`<col-stepper orientation="vertical"></col-stepper>`
      );
      expect(el.orientation).to.equal('vertical');
    });

    it('renders children passed into slot', async () => {
      const el = await fixture<ColStepper>(html`
        <col-stepper>
          <div id="step1">Step 1</div>
        </col-stepper>
      `);
      const child = el.querySelector('#step1');
      expect(child).to.exist;
      expect(child!.textContent).to.equal('Step 1');
    });
  });
});

FILE: src/components/molecules/stepper/col-stepper.ts
================================================
import { html, TemplateResult } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColStepperStyles } from './col-stepper.styles';

/**
 * Stepper container component used to arrange multiple <col-step> components
 * in a horizontal or vertical layout.
 *
 * @element col-stepper
 *
 * @summary Container for step components. Controls the layout direction of the steps.
 *
 * @attr {'horizontal'|'vertical'} orientation - Defines how the steps are laid out.
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Provides an accessible label for the stepper group.
 *
 * @property {'horizontal'|'vertical'} orientation - The orientation of the stepper.
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label describing the group of steps.
 *
 * @slot - Slot to place <col-step> elements.
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 *  <col-stepper orientation="horizontal">
 *    <col-step step="0" label="Step 0" hasconnector></col-step>
 *    <col-step step="1" state="completed" label="Step 1" hasconnector></col-step>
 *    <col-step step="2" state="active" label="Step 2" hasconnector></col-step>
 *    <col-step step="3" state="error" label="Step 3"></col-step>
 *  </col-stepper>
 * ```
 */
@Meta({ name: 'stepper' })
export class ColStepper extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColStepperStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  orientation: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' = 'horizontal';

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel = 'stepper';

  render(): TemplateResult {
    return html`
      <nav
        class="stepper"
        role="group"
        aria-label=${this.ariaLabel}
        aria-orientation=${this.orientation}
        part="stepper"
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </nav>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-stepper': ColStepper;
  }
}

      font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    }

    .adornment-container {
      top: var(--col-spacing-size-m);
    }

FILE: src/components/molecules/text-area/col-text-area.test.ts

import { expect, fixture, html, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTextArea } from './col-text-area';

customElements.define('col-text-area', ColTextArea);

describe('ColTextArea', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-text-area').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('renders with default properties', async () => {
      const textArea = await fixture(html`<col-text-area></col-text-area>`);
      expect(textArea).to.exist;
    });

    it('displays placeholder text', async () => {
      const textArea = await fixture(
        html`<col-text-area placeholder="Enter your bio"></col-text-area>`
      );
      const input = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('textarea');
      expect(input?.placeholder).to.equal('Enter your bio');
    });

    it('shows character count when specified', async () => {
      const textArea = await fixture<ColTextArea>(
        html`<col-text-area char-count=${50}></col-text-area>`
      );
      const charCount = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('0/50');
    });
  });

  describe('Character counting and limiting', () => {
    it('updates character count when user types', async () => {
      const textArea = await fixture<ColTextArea>(
        html`<col-text-area char-count=${10}></col-text-area>`
      );
      const input = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('textarea')!;
      input.value = 'hello';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      const charCount = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('5/10');
      expect(textArea.value).to.equal('hello');
    });

    it('trims input when exceeding character limit', async () => {
      const textArea = await fixture<ColTextArea>(
        html`<col-text-area char-count=${4}></col-text-area>`
      );
      const input = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('textarea')!;
      input.value = 'testing';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      expect(textArea.value).to.equal('test');
      const charCount = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('4/4');
    });
  });

  describe('Event dispatching', () => {
    it('dispatches focus, blur, change, paste, and invalid events', async () => {
      const textArea = await fixture<ColTextArea>(html`<col-text-area></col-text-area>`);
      const input = textArea.shadowRoot?.querySelector('textarea')!;

      let focusFired = false;
      textArea.addEventListener('focus', () => (focusFired = true));
      input.focus();
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      expect(focusFired).to.be.true;

      let blurFired = false;
      textArea.addEventListener('blur', () => (blurFired = true));
      input.blur();
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      expect(blurFired).to.be.true;

      let changeFired = false;
      textArea.addEventListener('change', () => (changeFired = true));
      input.value = 'abc';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      expect(changeFired).to.be.true;

      let pasteFired = false;
      textArea.addEventListener('paste', e => {
        pasteFired = true;
        if (e instanceof CustomEvent && e.detail) {
          expect(e.detail.clipboardData).to.equal('test-paste');
        }
      });
      const clipboardData = new DataTransfer();
      clipboardData.setData('text/plain', 'test-paste');
      input.dispatchEvent(
        new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData, bubbles: true, composed: true })
      );
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      expect(pasteFired).to.be.true;

      let invalidFired = false;
      textArea.addEventListener('invalid', e => {
        invalidFired = true;
        if (e instanceof CustomEvent && e.detail) {
          expect(e.detail.validationMessage).to.be.a('string');
        }
      });
      textArea.required = true;
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      input.value = '';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('invalid', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textArea);
      expect(invalidFired).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/text-area/col-text-area.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing } from 'lit';
import { property, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta } from '@/config';
import {
  InputFormComponent,
  InputFormComponentStyles,
} from '@/config/components/input-form-component';
import { ColTextAreaStyles } from './col-text-area.styles';

/**
 * Text area component for multi-line user input with validation and form integration.
 *
 * @element col-text-area
 *
 * @summary A flexible textarea input component supporting validation, error handling, and accessibility features.
 *
 * @slot - The label content for the text area
 * @slot sub-label - Additional sub-label content below the main label
 * @slot helper-text - Helper text displayed below the textarea
 * @slot error-message - Custom error message content
 * @slot prefix - Content to display before the textarea (icons, text, etc.)
 * @slot suffix - Content to display after the textarea (icons, text, etc.)
 *
 * @csspart textarea - The main textarea element
 * @csspart label - The label element
 * @csspart sub-label - The sub-label element
 * @csspart helper-text - The helper text element
 * @csspart error-message - The error message element
 * @csspart prefix - The prefix slot container
 * @csspart suffix - The suffix slot container
 *
 * @cssprop --input-width - Controls the host element's width. Set via the `custom-width` attribute (e.g., 320px, 50%, min(280px, 100%)). Defaults to `auto` when not provided.
 *
 * @attr {string} autocomplete - Autocomplete attribute for the textarea
 * @attr {string} autocapitalize - Autocapitalize attribute for the textarea
 * @attr {number} maxlength - Maximum length of input
 * @attr {number} minlength - Minimum length of input
 * @attr {string} placeholder - Placeholder text for the textarea
 * @attr {boolean} readonly - Whether the textarea is read-only
 * @attr {number} rows - Number of visible text lines
 * @attr {string} wrap - Text wrapping mode (hard, soft, off)
 * @attr {number} char-count - Maximum character count allowed
 * @attr {string} custom-width - Custom width for the component host (e.g., "320px", "50%", "min(280px, 100%)"). Applied via the `--input-width` CSS variable; defaults to `auto` when omitted.
 *
 * @property {string} autocomplete - Autocomplete attribute for the textarea
 * @property {string} autocapitalize - Autocapitalize attribute for the textarea
 * @property {number} maxLength - Maximum length of input
 * @property {number} minLength - Minimum length of input
 * @property {string} placeholder - Placeholder text for the textarea
 * @property {boolean} readOnly - Whether the textarea is read-only
 * @property {number} rows - Number of visible text lines
 * @property {boolean} validateOnly - Whether to validate only on specific triggers
 * @property {'hard'|'soft'|'off'} wrap - Text wrapping mode
 * @property {number} charCount - Maximum character count allowed
 * @property {boolean} spellcheck - Whether spellcheck is enabled
 * @property {string} customWidth - Custom width for the component host, reflected using the `--input-width` CSS variable. Accepts any valid CSS width token per MDN.
 *
 * @fires input - Fired when the textarea value changes
 * @fires change - Fired when the textarea value is committed
 * @fires focus - Fired when the textarea receives focus
 * @fires blur - Fired when the textarea loses focus
 * @fires paste - Fired when content is pasted into the textarea
 * @fires invalid - Fired when validation fails
 * @fires validation-change - Fired when validation state changes
 *
 * @default '' - Default placeholder value
 * @default false - Default readOnly state
 * @default 2 - Default rows value
 * @default false - Default validateOnly state
 * @default 'soft' - Default wrap value
 * @default true - Default spellcheck state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'text-area' })
export class ColTextArea extends InputFormComponent {
  static styles = [InputFormComponentStyles, ColTextAreaStyles];

  @property()
  public autocomplete!: string;

  @property()
  public override autocapitalize!: 'off' | 'none' | 'on' | 'sentences' | 'words' | 'characters';

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'max-length' })
  public maxLength!: number;

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'min-length' })
  public minLength!: number;

  @property({ type: String })
  placeholder = '';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  readOnly = false;

  @property({ type: Number })
  rows = 2;

  @property()
  public wrap: 'hard' | 'soft' | 'off' = 'soft';

  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'char-count' })
  charCount?: number;

  @query('textarea')
  private textareaElement!: HTMLTextAreaElement;

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  public override spellcheck = true;

  protected override _uniqueId = `text-area-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  public validate(value: unknown): boolean {
    const input = this.textareaElement;
    if (!input) return true;

    let isValid = input.checkValidity();
    const stringValue = String(value ?? '');
    if (isValid && this.minLength && stringValue.length < this.minLength) {
      isValid = false;
    }
    return isValid;
  }

  protected override _handleInput(e: Event & { target: HTMLInputElement | HTMLTextAreaElement }) {
    const oldValue = this.value;
    let inputValue = e.target.value;

    if (typeof this.charCount === 'number' && inputValue.length > this.charCount) {
      inputValue = inputValue.slice(0, this.charCount);
      e.target.value = inputValue;
    }

    this.value = inputValue;
    this.countValue = inputValue.length;
    this.dirty = this.value !== this.initialValue;

    this._dispatchInput(this.value);
    this._syncFormValue();
    this._dispatchChange(this.value);

    if ((!oldValue && this.value) || (oldValue && !this.value)) {
      this._updateInputPadding();
    }

    if (this._shouldValidate('input')) {
      this._updateValidState();
    }
  }

  protected _handleBlur = (_e: FocusEvent) => {
    this.focused = false;
    if (this._shouldValidate('blur')) {
      this._updateValidState();
    }
    this._syncFormValue();
    this.dispatchEvent(new Event('blur', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
  };

  private _handlePaste(e: ClipboardEvent) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('paste', {
        detail: {
          clipboardData: e.clipboardData?.getData('text/plain') ?? '',
          types: Array.from(e.clipboardData?.types ?? []),
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _handleInvalid(e: Event) {
    const input = e.target as HTMLTextAreaElement;
    this.valid = false;
    this.error = true;
    const validationMessage = input.validationMessage;
    if (!this.errorMessage && validationMessage) {
      this.errorMessage = validationMessage;
    }
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('invalid', {
        detail: {
          validationMessage,
          validity: input.validity,
          value: this.value,
          touched: this.touched,
          dirty: this.dirty,
          focused: this.focused,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _updateValidState() {
    const input = this.textareaElement;
    if (!input) return;

    this.valid = this.validate(this.value);

    if (!this.valid) {
      const browserMessage = input.validationMessage;
      const fallbackMessage = 'Invalid input';
      const message = this.errorMessage || browserMessage || fallbackMessage;

      this.errorMessage = message;
      this.error = true;

      this._internals.setValidity({ customError: true }, message, input);
    } else {
      this.error = false;
      this._internals.setValidity({}, '');
    }

    this._dispatchValidationState(input);
  }

  private _dispatchValidationState(input: HTMLTextAreaElement) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('validation-change', {
        detail: {
          valid: this.valid,
          validationMessage: input.validationMessage,
          validity: input.validity,
          value: this.value,
          touched: this.touched,
          dirty: this.dirty,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  protected override renderInput() {
    const attrs = this._getCommonInputAttributes();
    const events = this._getCommonInputEventHandlers();

    return html`
      <textarea
        class=${attrs.errorClass}
        name="${attrs.name}"
        id="${attrs.id}"
        part="textarea"
        aria-labelledby=${attrs.ariaLabelledby}
        aria-describedby=${attrs.ariaDescribedby}
        aria-invalid=${attrs.ariaInvalid}
        aria-required=${attrs.ariaRequired}
        autocomplete="${this.autocomplete ?? nothing}"
        autocapitalize="${this.autocapitalize ?? nothing}"
        inputmode="${this.inputMode ?? nothing}"
        minlength="${this.minLength ?? nothing}"
        maxlength="${this.maxLength ?? nothing}"
        placeholder="${this.placeholder}"
        spellcheck="${this.spellcheck ?? nothing}"
        .rows=${this.rows}
        .value="${this.value}"
        .wrap=${this.wrap}
        ?disabled=${attrs.disabled}
        ?readonly=${this.readOnly}
        ?required=${attrs.required}
        @focus=${events.onFocus}
        @blur=${this._handleBlur}
        @change=${events.onChange}
        @input=${this._handleInput}
        @paste=${this._handlePaste}
        @invalid=${this._handleInvalid}
      ></textarea>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-text-area': ColTextArea;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/molecules/text-field/col-text-field.test.ts

import { expect, fixture, html, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTextField } from './col-text-field';

customElements.define('col-text-field', ColTextField);

describe('ColTextField', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-text-field').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('renders with default properties', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture(html`<col-text-field input-type="text"></col-text-field>`);
      expect(textField).to.exist;
    });

    it('displays placeholder text', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" placeholder="Enter your name"></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(input?.placeholder).to.equal('Enter your name');
    });

    it('supports password input type', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="password" label="Password"></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
      expect(input?.type).to.equal('password');
    });

    it('shows character count when specified', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Bio" char-count=${50}></col-text-field>`
      );
      const charCount = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('0/50');
    });

    it('displays slotted icon content', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Search">
          <col-icon slot="icon" name="search"></col-icon>
        </col-text-field>`
      );
      const icon = textField.querySelector('[slot="icon"]');
      expect(icon).to.exist;
      expect(icon?.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('search');
    });
  });

  describe('Character counting and limiting', () => {
    it('updates character count when user types', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Bio" char-count=${10}></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      input.value = 'hello';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);

      const charCount = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('5/10');
      expect(textField.value).to.equal('hello');
    });

    it('trims input when exceeding character limit', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Bio" char-count=${4}></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      input.value = 'testing';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);

      expect(textField.value).to.equal('test');
      let charCount = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('4/4');
    });

    it('shows clear button when input has value', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Search"></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      let clearButton = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container');
      expect(clearButton).to.be.null;

      input.value = 'test';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);

      clearButton = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container');
      expect(clearButton).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Clear functionality', () => {
    it('clears input value when clear button is clicked', async function () {
      this.timeout(2000);
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Search" char-count=${10}></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      input.value = 'test';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.value).to.equal('test');

      const clearButton = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.icon-close-container'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      expect(clearButton, 'Clear button should exist after input').to.exist;
      clearButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(textField);

      expect(textField.value).to.equal('');
      expect(textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container')).to.be.null;
    });

    it('resets character count when cleared', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field inputType="text" label="Bio" char-count=${10}></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      input.value = 'hello';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);

      let charCount = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('5/10');

      const clearButton = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.icon-close-container'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      clearButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(textField);

      charCount = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
      expect(charCount?.textContent).to.equal('0/10');
    });
  });

  describe('Validation timing strategies', () => {
    it('validates at the correct time based on validationTiming', async () => {
      const form = await fixture(html`
        <form>
          <col-text-field name="test" input-type="text" label="Test"></col-text-field>
        </form>
      `);
      const textField = form.querySelector('col-text-field') as ColTextField;
      expect(textField).to.exist;
      textField.required = true;
      textField.minLength = 5;
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input).to.exist;

      // validationTiming: 'input'
      textField.validationTiming = 'input';
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      input.value = 'abc';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      textField.validateField();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.false;
      input.value = 'abcde';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      textField.validateField();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.true;

      // Reset to valid state before next scenario
      input.value = 'abcde';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      input.blur();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      textField.validateField();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.true;

      // validationTiming: 'blur'
      textField.value = '';
      input.value = '';
      textField.validationTiming = 'blur';
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      input.value = 'abc';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      // Should not validate until blur
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.true;
      input.blur();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      textField.validateField();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.false;

      // Reset to valid state before next scenario
      input.value = 'abcde';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      input.blur();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      textField.validateField();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.true;

      // validationTiming: 'change'
      textField.value = '';
      input.value = '';
      textField.validationTiming = 'change';
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      input.value = 'abc';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      // Should not validate until change
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.true;
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      textField.validateField();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(textField.valid).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Event dispatching', () => {
    it('dispatches focus, blur, change, keydown, keyup, paste, and invalid events', async () => {
      const textField = await fixture<ColTextField>(
        html`<col-text-field input-type="text" label="Test"></col-text-field>`
      );
      const input = textField.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
      expect(input).to.exist;

      // Focus event
      let focusFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('focus', () => {
        focusFired = true;
      });
      input.focus();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(focusFired).to.be.true;

      // Blur event
      let blurFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('blur', () => {
        blurFired = true;
      });
      input.blur();
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(blurFired).to.be.true;

      // Change event
      let changeFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('change', () => {
        changeFired = true;
      });
      input.value = 'abc';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(changeFired).to.be.true;

      // Keydown event
      let keydownFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
        keydownFired = true;
        if (e instanceof CustomEvent && e.detail) {
          expect(e.detail.key).to.equal('A');
        }
      });
      input.dispatchEvent(
        new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'A', bubbles: true, composed: true })
      );
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(keydownFired).to.be.true;

      // Keyup event
      let keyupFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('keyup', e => {
        keyupFired = true;
        if (e instanceof CustomEvent && e.detail) {
          expect(e.detail.key).to.equal('A');
        }
      });
      input.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', { key: 'A', bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(keyupFired).to.be.true;

      // Paste event
      let pasteFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('paste', e => {
        pasteFired = true;
        if (e instanceof CustomEvent && e.detail) {
          expect(e.detail.clipboardData).to.equal('test-paste');
        }
      });
      const clipboardData = new DataTransfer();
      clipboardData.setData('text/plain', 'test-paste');
      input.dispatchEvent(
        new ClipboardEvent('paste', { clipboardData, bubbles: true, composed: true })
      );
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(pasteFired).to.be.true;

      // Invalid event
      let invalidFired = false;
      textField.addEventListener('invalid', e => {
        invalidFired = true;
        if (e instanceof CustomEvent && e.detail) {
          expect(e.detail.validationMessage).to.be.a('string');
        }
      });
      // Set required and trigger invalid
      textField.required = true;
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      input.value = '';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('invalid', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(textField);
      expect(invalidFired).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});

FILE: src/components/molecules/text-field/col-text-field.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta } from '@/config';
import { TextInputBase } from '@/config/components/input-form-component/text-input-base';
import { ColTextFieldStyles } from './col-text-field.styles';

/**
 * Text field component for user input with validation and form integration.
 *
 * @element col-text-field
 *
 * @summary A comprehensive text input component with validation, error handling, and accessibility features.
 *
 * @slot - The label content for the text field
 * @slot sub-label - Additional sub-label content below the main label
 * @slot helper-text - Helper text displayed below the input
 * @slot error-message - Custom error message content
 * @slot prefix - Content to display before the input (icons, text, etc.)
 * @slot suffix - Content to display after the input (icons, text, etc.)
 *
 * @csspart input - The main input element
 * @csspart label - The label element
 * @csspart sub-label - The sub-label element
 * @csspart helper-text - The helper text element
 * @csspart error-message - The error message element
 * @csspart prefix - The prefix slot container
 * @csspart suffix - The suffix slot container
 *
 * @cssprop --input-width - Controls the host element's width. Set via the `custom-width` attribute (e.g., 320px, 50%, min(280px, 100%)). Defaults to `auto` when not provided.
 *
 * @attr {string} input-type - The type of input (text, password)
 * @attr {string} validation-timing - When to trigger validation (blur, change, input, submit)
 * @attr {string} value - The current value of the input
 * @attr {string} placeholder - Placeholder text for the input
 * @attr {string} name - The name attribute for form integration
 * @attr {boolean} required - Whether the field is required
 * @attr {boolean} disabled - Whether the input is disabled
 * @attr {boolean} readonly - Whether the input is read-only
 * @attr {string} pattern - HTML5 pattern for validation
 * @attr {number} min-length - Minimum length requirement
 * @attr {string} input-mode - The input mode for mobile keyboards
 * @attr {boolean} error - Whether the input has an error state
 * @attr {string} error-message - Custom error message
 * @attr {boolean} valid - Whether the input is valid
 * @attr {boolean} touched - Whether the input has been touched
 * @attr {boolean} dirty - Whether the input value has changed
 * @attr {boolean} focused - Whether the input is focused
 * @attr {string} custom-width - Custom width for the component host (e.g., "320px", "50%", "min(280px, 100%)"). Applied via the `--input-width` CSS variable; defaults to `auto` when omitted.
 *
 * @property {string} inputType - The type of input (text, password)
 * @property {string} validationTiming - When to trigger validation (blur, change, input, submit)
 * @property {string} value - The current value of the input
 * @property {string} placeholder - Placeholder text for the input
 * @property {string} name - The name attribute for form integration
 * @property {boolean} required - Whether the field is required
 * @property {boolean} disabled - Whether the input is disabled
 * @property {boolean} readOnly - Whether the input is read-only
 * @property {string} pattern - HTML5 pattern for validation
 * @property {number} minLength - Minimum length requirement
 * @property {boolean} error - Whether the input has an error state
 * @property {string} errorMessage - Custom error message
 * @property {boolean} valid - Whether the input is valid
 * @property {boolean} touched - Whether the input has been touched
 * @property {boolean} dirty - Whether the input value has changed
 * @property {boolean} focused - Whether the input is focused
 * @property {string} customWidth - Custom width for the component host, reflected using the `--input-width` CSS variable. Accepts any valid CSS width token per MDN.
 *
 * @fires input - Fired when the input value changes
 * @fires change - Fired when the input value is committed
 * @fires focus - Fired when the input receives focus
 * @fires blur - Fired when the input loses focus
 * @fires keydown - Fired when a key is pressed down
 * @fires keyup - Fired when a key is released
 * @fires paste - Fired when content is pasted into the input
 * @fires invalid - Fired when validation fails
 * @fires input-cleared - Fired when the input value is cleared
 * @fires validation-change - Fired when validation state changes
 *
 * @default 'text' - Default inputType value
 * @default 'blur' - Default validationTiming value
 * @default '' - Default value
 * @default '' - Default placeholder
 * @default '' - Default name
 * @default false - Default required state
 * @default false - Default disabled state
 * @default false - Default readOnly state
 * @default '' - Default pattern
 * @default 0 - Default minLength
 * @default false - Default error state
 * @default '' - Default errorMessage
 * @default true - Default valid state
 * @default false - Default touched state
 * @default false - Default dirty state
 * @default false - Default focused state
 */
@Meta({ name: 'text-field' })
export class ColTextField extends TextInputBase {
  static styles = [ColTextFieldStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'input-type' })
  inputType: 'text' | 'password' = 'text';

  protected override _uniqueId = `text-field-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  firstUpdated() {
    (this as any).initialValue = this.value;
    this._syncFormValue();
  }

  updated(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    super.updated(changedProps);
    if (changedProps.has('subLabel')) {
      this._updateInputPadding();
    }
  }

  public validate(value: string): boolean {
    const input = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
    if (!input) return true;

    let isValid = input.checkValidity();
    if (isValid && this.minLength && value.length < this.minLength) {
      isValid = false;
    }
    return isValid;
  }

  private _handleKeyDown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('keydown', {
        detail: {
          key: e.key,
          code: e.code,
          altKey: e.altKey,
          ctrlKey: e.ctrlKey,
          metaKey: e.metaKey,
          shiftKey: e.shiftKey,
          repeat: e.repeat,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _handleKeyUp(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('keyup', {
        detail: {
          key: e.key,
          code: e.code,
          altKey: e.altKey,
          ctrlKey: e.ctrlKey,
          metaKey: e.metaKey,
          shiftKey: e.shiftKey,
          repeat: e.repeat,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _handlePaste(e: ClipboardEvent) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('paste', {
        detail: {
          clipboardData: e.clipboardData?.getData('text/plain') || '',
          types: Array.from(e.clipboardData?.types || []),
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  protected override _getInputType(): string {
    return this.inputType;
  }

  protected override _handleInput(e: globalThis.Event & { target: globalThis.HTMLInputElement }) {
    super._handleInput(e);
  }

  protected override _handleClear(): void {
    super._handleClear();
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      this._updateValidState();
    });
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('input-cleared', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  protected override renderInput() {
    const attrs = this._getCommonInputAttributes();
    const events = this._getCommonInputEventHandlers();

    return html`
      <input
        class=${attrs.errorClass}
        type="${this._getInputType()}"
        name="${attrs.name}"
        id="${attrs.id}"
        aria-labelledby=${attrs.ariaLabelledby}
        aria-describedby=${attrs.ariaDescribedby}
        aria-invalid=${attrs.ariaInvalid}
        aria-required=${attrs.ariaRequired}
        ?required=${attrs.required}
        placeholder="${this.placeholder}"
        .value="${this.value}"
        ?disabled=${attrs.disabled}
        ?readonly=${this.readOnly}
        pattern="${this.pattern || nothing}"
        minlength="${this.minLength || nothing}"
        inputmode="${attrs.inputMode}"
        @focus=${events.onFocus}
        @blur=${events.onBlur}
        @change=${events.onChange}
        @input=${this._handleInput}
        @keydown=${this._handleKeyDown}
        @keyup=${this._handleKeyUp}
        @paste=${this._handlePaste}
        @invalid=${this._handleInvalid}
      />
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-text-field': ColTextField;
  }
}

export * from './col-text-field';
