import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const colToastStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  .toast {
    width: 398px;
    display: inline-grid;
    grid-template-columns: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xl')} 1fr auto;
    align-items: stretch;

    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.l')};

    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    box-sizing: border-box;

    /* For animation */
    opacity: 0;
  }

  /* Variant styles */

  .toast.information {
    border-left: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info')};
  }

  .toast.information .toast-icon {
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info-lighter')};
  }

  .toast.information .toast-icon col-icon,
  .toast.information .toast-icon ::slotted(col-icon) {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.info')};
  }

  .toast.success {
    border-left: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success')};
  }

  .toast.success .toast-icon {
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success-lighter')};
  }

  .toast.success .toast-icon col-icon,
  .toast.success .toast-icon ::slotted(col-icon) {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.success')};
  }

  .toast.warning {
    border-left: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning')};
  }

  .toast.warning .toast-icon {
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning-lighter')};
  }

  .toast.warning .toast-icon col-icon,
  .toast.warning .toast-icon ::slotted(col-icon) {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.warning')};
  }

  .toast.danger {
    border-left: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger')};
  }

  .toast.danger .toast-icon {
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger-lighter')};
  }

  .toast.danger .toast-icon col-icon,
  .toast.danger .toast-icon ::slotted(col-icon) {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.danger')};
  }

  /* Icon */

  .toast-icon {
    height: calc(100% - ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} - ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')});
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
  }

  /* Content */

  .toast-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    min-width: 0;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
  }

  .toast-text {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
  }

  .toast-title ::slotted(*) {
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.heading.semibold-m')};
    line-height: 22px;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.darker-default')};

    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    line-clamp: 1;
  }

  .toast-title:empty {
    display: none;
  }

  .toast-body ::slotted(*) {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-s')};
    line-height: 20px;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};

    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    display: -webkit-box;
    -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    line-clamp: 2;
    max-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xl')};
  }

  /* Close button */

  .toast-close {
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')}
      ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
    & button {
      border: none;
      background: transparent;
      cursor: pointer;
    }
  }

  /* Ensure no focus stealing */

  :host(:not([open])) {
    display: none;
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/toast/col-toast.test.ts

import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColToast } from './col-toast';

describe('ColToast component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-toast')) {
      customElements.define('col-toast', ColToast);
    }
  });

  afterEach(async () => {
    const toasts = document.querySelectorAll('col-toast');
    for (const toast of toasts) {
      if (toast instanceof ColToast) {
        toast.dismiss('programmatic');
      }
      toast.remove();
    }

    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 0));
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast><span>Test message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      expect(element.variant).to.equal('information');
      expect(element.type).to.equal('informative');
      expect(element.duration).to.equal(4);
      expect(element.position).to.equal('bottom-right');
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render with custom variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast variant="success"><span>Success message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      expect(element.variant).to.equal('success');
    });

    it('should render with custom type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast type="action-close"><span>Action message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      expect(element.type).to.equal('action-close');
    });

    it('should render with custom duration', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast duration="5"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      expect(element.duration).to.equal(5);
    });

    it('should clamp duration between 3 and 6 seconds', async () => {
      const elementLow = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast duration="1"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );
      expect(elementLow.duration).to.equal(3);

      const elementHigh = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast duration="10"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );
      expect(elementHigh.duration).to.equal(6);
    });

    it('should render with custom position', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast position="top-left"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      expect(element.position).to.equal('top-left');
    });
  });

  describe('Content slots', () => {
    it('should render slotted message content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast><span>Test message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot:not([name])');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render slotted title', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast>
          <span slot="title">Title</span>
          <span>Message</span>
        </col-toast>`
      );

      const titleSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="title"]');
      expect(titleSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render icon slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast>
          <span slot="icon">🔔</span>
          <span>Message</span>
        </col-toast>`
      );

      const iconSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Close button', () => {
    it('should render close button for action-close type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast type="action-close" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast-close');
      expect(closeButton).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not render close button for informative type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast type="informative" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast-close');
      expect(closeButton).to.not.exist;
    });

    it('should dismiss toast when close button is clicked', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast type="action-close" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.toast-close button'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;

      const dismissPromise = oneEvent(element, 'dismiss');
      closeButton.click();
      const { detail } = await dismissPromise;

      expect(detail.source).to.equal('button');
    });
  });

  describe('Dismiss functionality', () => {
    it('should fire dismiss event when dismiss method is called', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(html`<col-toast><span>Message</span></col-toast>`);

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const dismissPromise = oneEvent(element, 'dismiss');
      element.dismiss('programmatic');
      const { detail } = await dismissPromise;

      expect(detail.source).to.equal('programmatic');
    });
  });

  describe('Open state', () => {
    it('should be hidden when open is false', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(html`<col-toast><span>Message</span></col-toast>`);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should be visible when open is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update open state programmatically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(html`<col-toast><span>Message</span></col-toast>`);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have role="status" for information variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast variant="information" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
      expect(toast?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('status');
    });

    it('should have role="alert" for danger variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast variant="danger" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
      expect(toast?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('alert');
    });

    it('should have aria-live="polite" for information variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast variant="information" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
      expect(toast?.getAttribute('aria-live')).to.equal('polite');
    });

    it('should have aria-live="assertive" for warning variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast variant="warning" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
      expect(toast?.getAttribute('aria-live')).to.equal('assertive');
    });

    it('should have aria-atomic="true"', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
      expect(toast?.getAttribute('aria-atomic')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('close button should have aria-label', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast type="action-close" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const closeButton = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast-close button');
      expect(closeButton?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Close notification');
    });
  });

  describe('CSS classes', () => {
    it('should apply variant class', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast variant="success" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);
      const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
      expect(toast?.classList.contains('success')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply all variant classes correctly', async () => {
      const variants: Array<'information' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'> = [
        'information',
        'success',
        'warning',
        'danger',
      ];

      for (const variant of variants) {
        const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
          html`<col-toast variant="${variant}" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
        );

        await elementUpdated(element);
        const toast = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast');
        expect(toast?.classList.contains(variant)).to.be.true;
      }
    });
  });

  describe('Animation transitions', () => {
    it('should get correct entry translation for bottom-right', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast position="bottom-right"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      // Animation should be triggered
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should get correct entry translation for top-left', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast position="top-left"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should get correct entry translation for top-right', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast position="top-right"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should get correct entry translation for bottom-left', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast position="bottom-left"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should get correct exit translation for positions', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast position="bottom-right" open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      element.open = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Lifecycle methods', () => {
    it('should clear timeout on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open type="informative" duration="3"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));

      element.remove();

      // Should not throw error
      expect(element.isConnected).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should reschedule auto-close on duration change', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open type="informative" duration="4"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      element.duration = 5;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.duration).to.equal(5);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
    });

    it('should reschedule auto-close on type change', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open type="informative"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      element.type = 'action-close';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.type).to.equal('action-close');

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
    });
  });

  describe('Slot change handling', () => {
    it('should detect title slot changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(html`<col-toast><span>Message</span></col-toast>`);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const titleEl = document.createElement('span');
      titleEl.slot = 'title';
      titleEl.textContent = 'New Title';
      element.appendChild(titleEl);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const titleSlot = element.querySelector('[slot="title"]');
      expect(titleSlot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should detect icon slot changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(html`<col-toast><span>Message</span></col-toast>`);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const iconEl = document.createElement('span');
      iconEl.slot = 'icon';
      iconEl.textContent = '🔔';
      element.appendChild(iconEl);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const iconSlot = element.querySelector('[slot="icon"]');
      expect(iconSlot).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle open state change while closing', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      element.open = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));

      // Try to open again immediately
      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not schedule auto-close for action-close type', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(
        html`<col-toast open type="action-close"><span>Message</span></col-toast>`
      );

      await elementUpdated(element);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));

      // Should remain open (no auto-dismiss)
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.type).to.equal('action-close');
    });

    it('should handle multiple rapid open/close changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToast>(html`<col-toast><span>Message</span></col-toast>`);

      element.open = true;
      element.open = false;
      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/toast/col-toast.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta } from '@/config';
import { ThemedComponent } from '@/config/components/themed-component/themed-component';
import { colToastStyles } from './col-toast.styles';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';

export type ToastVariant = 'information' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger';
export type ToastType = 'informative' | 'action-close';
export type ToastPosition = 'top-left' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-right';
export type DismissSource = 'timer' | 'button' | 'programmatic';

/**
 * Toast notification component for displaying temporary messages.
 *
 * @element col-toast
 *
 * @slot icon - Custom icon to replace the default variant icon
 * @slot title - Short title text
 * @slot - Body/description text (default slot)
 * @slot actions - Optional inline buttons/links
 *
 * @fires dismiss - Fired after exit animation completes with detail: { source: 'timer' | 'button' | 'programmatic' }
 *
 * @csspart toast - The main toast card element
 * @csspart icon - The variant icon circle
 * @csspart content - The content area
 * @csspart close - The close button (when type="action-close")
 */
@Meta({ name: 'toast', components: [ColIcon] })
export class ColToast extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [colToastStyles];

  /**
   * Visual variant that controls icon and accent color
   * @default "information"
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  variant: ToastVariant = 'information';

  /**
   * Toast behavior type
   * @default "informative"
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  type: ToastType = 'informative';

  /**
   * Auto-dismiss duration in seconds (clamped to 3-6s)
   * Ignored when type="action-close"
   * @default 4
   */
  @property({ type: Number })
  duration: number = 4;

  /**
   * Position for entry/exit animation direction
   * @default "bottom-right"
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  position: ToastPosition = 'bottom-right';

  /**
   * Controls visibility with animations
   */
  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  open: boolean = false;

  @state()
  private _closing: boolean = false;

  @state()
  private _hasTitle: boolean = false;

  @state()
  private _hasCustomIcon: boolean = false;

  private _closeTimeout?: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>;
  private _animation?: Animation;
  private _uniqueId = `toast-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this._scheduleAutoClose();
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    this._clearTimeout();
    this._animation?.cancel();
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    super.willUpdate(changedProps);

    // Clamp duration to 3-6 seconds
    if (changedProps.has('duration')) {
      this.duration = Math.max(3, Math.min(6, this.duration));
    }

    // Handle open state changes
    if (changedProps.has('open')) {
      const wasOpen = changedProps.get('open');

      // Opening: was false/undefined, now true
      if (this.open && !wasOpen && !this._closing) {
        this._playEntryAnimation();
        this._scheduleAutoClose();
      }
      // Closing: was true, now false
      else if (!this.open && wasOpen && !this._closing) {
        this._playExitAnimation();
      }
    }

    // Reschedule auto-close on duration/type changes
    if (changedProps.has('duration') || changedProps.has('type')) {
      this._scheduleAutoClose();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Programmatically dismiss the toast
   */
  dismiss(source: DismissSource = 'programmatic') {
    if (!this._closing) {
      this._closing = true;
      this._clearTimeout();
      this._playExitAnimation(source);
    }
  }

  private _scheduleAutoClose() {
    this._clearTimeout();

    if (this.type === 'informative' && this.open && this.duration > 0) {
      this._closeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        this.dismiss('timer' as DismissSource);
      }, this.duration * 1000);
    }
  }

  private _clearTimeout() {
    if (this._closeTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(this._closeTimeout);
      this._closeTimeout = undefined;
    }
  }

  private _playEntryAnimation() {
    this.updateComplete
      .then(() => {
        const toast = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast') as HTMLElement;
        if (!toast) return;

        const { x, y } = this._getEntryTranslation();

        this._animation = toast.animate(
          [
            { transform: `translate(${x}px, ${y}px)`, opacity: 0 },
            { transform: 'translate(0, 0)', opacity: 1 },
          ],
          {
            duration: 200,
            easing: 'ease-out',
            fill: 'forwards',
          }
        );
      })
      .catch(() => {
        // Ignore promise rejections during cleanup
      });
  }

  private _playExitAnimation(source: DismissSource = 'programmatic') {
    const toast = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toast') as HTMLElement;
    if (!toast) {
      this._dispatchDismiss(source);
      return;
    }

    const x = this.position.includes('right') ? 12 : -12;

    this._animation = toast.animate(
      [
        { transform: 'translate(0, 0)', opacity: 1 },
        { transform: `translateX(${x}px)`, opacity: 0 },
      ],
      {
        duration: 200,
        easing: 'ease-out',
        fill: 'forwards',
      }
    );

    this._animation.finished
      .then(() => {
        this._closing = false;
        this.open = false;
        this._dispatchDismiss(source);
      })
      .catch(() => {
        // Ignore promise rejections when animation is cancelled during cleanup
        this._closing = false;
        this.open = false;
        this._dispatchDismiss(source);
      });
  }

  private _getEntryTranslation(): { x: number; y: number } {
    switch (this.position) {
      case 'bottom-right':
        return { x: 16, y: 16 };
      case 'bottom-left':
        return { x: -16, y: 16 };
      case 'top-right':
        return { x: 16, y: -16 };
      case 'top-left':
        return { x: -16, y: -16 };
    }
  }

  private _dispatchDismiss(source: DismissSource) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('dismiss', {
        detail: { source },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private _handleCloseClick(e: Event) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    this.dismiss('button' as DismissSource);
  }

  private _handleCloseKeydown(e: KeyboardEvent) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
      e.preventDefault();
      this.dismiss('button' as DismissSource);
    }
  }

  private _handleTitleSlotChange(e: Event) {
    const slot = e.target as HTMLSlotElement;
    this._hasTitle = slot.assignedNodes().length > 0;
  }

  private _handleIconSlotChange(e: Event) {
    const slot = e.target as HTMLSlotElement;
    this._hasCustomIcon = slot.assignedNodes().length > 0;
  }

  private _getAriaRole() {
    return this.variant === 'warning' || this.variant === 'danger' ? 'alert' : 'status';
  }

  private _getAriaLive() {
    return this.variant === 'warning' || this.variant === 'danger' ? 'assertive' : 'polite';
  }

  private _renderIcon() {
    return html`
      <div class="toast-icon" part="icon">
        <slot name="icon" @slotchange=${this._handleIconSlotChange}>
          ${!this._hasCustomIcon ? this._renderDefaultIcon() : nothing}
        </slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  private _renderDefaultIcon() {
    const iconName = this._getIconName();
    return html`<col-icon name="${iconName}"></col-icon>`;
  }

  private _getIconName() {
    switch (this.variant) {
      case 'success':
        return 'check-circle-fill';
      case 'warning':
        return 'info-major-triangle-up-fill';
      case 'danger':
        return 'close-circle-fill';
      case 'information':
      default:
        return 'info-circle-fill';
    }
  }

  private _renderCloseButton() {
    if (this.type !== 'action-close') return nothing;

    return html`
      <div class="toast-close" part="close">
        <button
          type="button"
          aria-label="Close notification"
          @click=${this._handleCloseClick}
          @keydown=${this._handleCloseKeydown}
        >
          <col-icon name="close" size="16px"></col-icon>
        </button>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  protected render() {
    const titleId = `${this._uniqueId}-title`;

    return html`
      <div
        class="toast ${this.variant}"
        part="toast"
        role="${this._getAriaRole()}"
        aria-live="${this._getAriaLive()}"
        aria-atomic="true"
        aria-labelledby=${this._hasTitle ? titleId : nothing}
      >
        ${this._renderIcon()}
        <div class="toast-content" part="content">
          <div class="toast-text">
            <div class="toast-title" id=${titleId}>
              <slot name="title" @slotchange=${this._handleTitleSlotChange}></slot>
            </div>
            <div class="toast-body">
              <slot></slot>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        ${this._renderCloseButton()}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-toast': ColToast;
  }
}

export type { ToastVariant, ToastType, ToastPosition, DismissSource } from './col-toast';

FILE: src/components/molecules/toast/toast-service.test.ts

import { expect } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ToastService } from './toast-service';
import { ColToast } from './col-toast';

describe('ToastService', () => {
  before(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-toast')) {
      customElements.define('col-toast', ColToast);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    // Clean up all toasts and containers
    document.querySelectorAll('col-toast').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('.col-toast-container').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  it('should create toast with show()', () => {
    const toast = ToastService.show({ message: 'Test', type: 'action-close' });
    expect(toast).to.be.instanceOf(ColToast);
    toast.remove();
  });

  it('should create success toast', () => {
    const toast = ToastService.success('Success');
    expect(toast.variant).to.equal('success');
    toast.remove();
  });

  it('should create error toast', () => {
    const toast = ToastService.error('Error');
    expect(toast.variant).to.equal('danger');
    toast.remove();
  });

  it('should create warning toast', () => {
    const toast = ToastService.warning('Warning');
    expect(toast.variant).to.equal('warning');
    toast.remove();
  });

  it('should create info toast', () => {
    const toast = ToastService.info('Info');
    expect(toast.variant).to.equal('information');
    toast.remove();
  });

  it('should accept options in convenience methods', () => {
    const toast = ToastService.success('Test', { title: 'Title' });
    const titleSlot = toast.querySelector('[slot="title"]');
    expect(titleSlot?.textContent).to.equal('Title');
    toast.remove();
  });

  it('should create toasts for different positions', () => {
    const toast1 = ToastService.show({
      message: 'BR',
      position: 'bottom-right',
      type: 'action-close',
    });
    const toast2 = ToastService.show({ message: 'TL', position: 'top-left', type: 'action-close' });

    expect(toast1.position).to.equal('bottom-right');
    expect(toast2.position).to.equal('top-left');

    toast1.remove();
    toast2.remove();
  });

  it('should call onDismiss callback', done => {
    const toast = ToastService.show({
      message: 'Test',
      type: 'action-close',
      onDismiss: source => {
        expect(source).to.equal('programmatic');
        done();
      },
    });
    toast.dismiss('programmatic');
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/toast/toast-service.ts
================================================
import { ColToast, ToastVariant, ToastType, ToastPosition, DismissSource } from './col-toast';

export interface ToastOptions {
  /**
   * Title text (optional)
   */
  title?: string;

  /**
   * Body/description text
   */
  message: string;

  /**
   * Visual variant
   * @default "information"
   */
  variant?: ToastVariant;

  /**
   * Toast behavior type
   * @default "informative"
   */
  type?: ToastType;

  /**
   * Auto-dismiss duration in seconds (clamped to 3-6s)
   * @default 4
   */
  duration?: number;

  /**
   * Position on screen
   * @default "bottom-right"
   */
  position?: ToastPosition;

  /**
   * Callback when toast is dismissed
   */
  onDismiss?: (source: DismissSource) => void;
}

/**
 * Singleton service for managing toast notifications.
 *
 * Provides a clean, imperative API for showing toasts without
 * needing to manage container components manually.
 *
 * @example
 * ```typescript
 * import { ToastService } from '@telesign/colibri';
 *
 * // Simple toast
 * ToastService.show({
 *   message: 'Settings saved successfully',
 *   variant: 'success'
 * });
 *
 * // Toast with title and actions
 * ToastService.show({
 *   title: 'New message',
 *   message: 'You have a new message from John',
 *   variant: 'information',
 *   type: 'action-close',
 *   position: 'top-right'
 * });
 *
 * // Convenience methods
 * ToastService.success('Operation completed');
 * ToastService.error('Something went wrong');
 * ToastService.warning('Please review your input');
 * ToastService.info('New feature available');
 * ```
 */
export class ToastService {
  private static instance: ToastService;
  private containers: Map<ToastPosition, HTMLElement> = new Map();
  private toasts: Set<ColToast> = new Set();

  private constructor() {
    // Private constructor for singleton
  }

  /**
   * Get the singleton instance
   */
  private static getInstance(): ToastService {
    if (!ToastService.instance) {
      ToastService.instance = new ToastService();
    }
    return ToastService.instance;
  }

  /**
   * Show a toast notification
   */
  static show(options: ToastOptions): ColToast {
    return ToastService.getInstance()._show(options);
  }

  /**
   * Show a success toast
   */
  static success(message: string, options?: Partial<ToastOptions>): ColToast {
    return ToastService.show({
      message,
      variant: 'success',
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Show an error/danger toast
   */
  static error(message: string, options?: Partial<ToastOptions>): ColToast {
    return ToastService.show({
      message,
      variant: 'danger',
      type: 'action-close',
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Show a warning toast
   */
  static warning(message: string, options?: Partial<ToastOptions>): ColToast {
    return ToastService.show({
      message,
      variant: 'warning',
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Show an information toast
   */
  static info(message: string, options?: Partial<ToastOptions>): ColToast {
    return ToastService.show({
      message,
      variant: 'information',
      ...options,
    });
  }

  /**
   * Dismiss all toasts
   */
  static dismissAll(): void {
    ToastService.getInstance()._dismissAll();
  }

  /**
   * Dismiss all toasts at a specific position
   */
  static dismissByPosition(position: ToastPosition): void {
    ToastService.getInstance()._dismissByPosition(position);
  }

  private _show(options: ToastOptions): ColToast {
    const {
      title,
      message,
      variant = 'information',
      type = 'informative',
      duration = 4,
      position = 'bottom-right',
      onDismiss,
    } = options;

    // Get or create container for position
    const container = this._getOrCreateContainer(position);

    // Create toast element
    const toast = document.createElement('col-toast') as ColToast;

    // Set properties but NOT open yet
    toast.variant = variant;
    toast.type = type;
    toast.duration = duration;
    toast.position = position;
    // Don't set open=true until after it's in the DOM!

    // Set content
    if (title) {
      const titleEl = document.createElement('span');
      titleEl.slot = 'title';
      titleEl.textContent = title;
      toast.appendChild(titleEl);
    }

    const messageEl = document.createElement('span');
    messageEl.textContent = message;
    toast.appendChild(messageEl);

    // Handle dismiss event
    toast.addEventListener('dismiss', (e: Event) => {
      const customEvent = e as CustomEvent<{ source: 'timer' | 'button' | 'programmatic' }>;
      this._removeToast(toast);
      onDismiss?.(customEvent.detail.source);
    });

    // Add to container
    this._addToastToContainer(container, toast, position);
    this.toasts.add(toast);

    // Open with animation after microtask
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      toast.open = true;
    });

    return toast;
  }

  private _getOrCreateContainer(position: ToastPosition): HTMLElement {
    let container = this.containers.get(position);

    if (!container) {
      container = document.createElement('div');
      container.className = `col-toast-container col-toast-container--${position}`;
      this._applyContainerStyles(container, position);

      // Ensure body exists before appending
      if (!document.body) {
        throw new Error(
          'ToastService: document.body is not available. Make sure to call ToastService after DOM is ready.'
        );
      }

      document.body.appendChild(container);
      this.containers.set(position, container);
    }

    return container;
  }

  private _applyContainerStyles(container: HTMLElement, position: ToastPosition) {
    const style = container.style;
    style.position = 'fixed';
    style.zIndex = '9999';
    style.pointerEvents = 'none';
    style.display = 'flex';
    style.gap = '10px';
    style.maxHeight = '60vh';
    style.overflow = 'hidden';
    style.padding = '24px';

    // Position anchoring
    if (position.includes('bottom')) {
      style.bottom = '0';
      style.flexDirection = 'column-reverse'; // Newest on bottom
    } else {
      style.top = '0';
      style.flexDirection = 'column'; // Newest on top
    }

    if (position.includes('right')) {
      style.right = '0';
      style.alignItems = 'flex-end';
    } else {
      style.left = '0';
      style.alignItems = 'flex-start';
    }

    // Scrollbar styling
    style.scrollbarWidth = 'thin';
  }

  private _addToastToContainer(container: HTMLElement, toast: ColToast, position: ToastPosition) {
    // For bottom positions, add at end (appears at visual bottom due to column-reverse)
    // For top positions, add at start (appears at visual top)
    if (position.includes('bottom')) {
      container.appendChild(toast);
    } else {
      container.insertBefore(toast, container.firstChild);
    }
    // Limit visible toasts (optional enforcement)
    this._enforceMaxToasts(container);
  }

  private _enforceMaxToasts(container: HTMLElement) {
    const maxVisible = 3;
    const toasts = Array.from(container.children);

    if (toasts.length > maxVisible) {
      // Auto-dismiss oldest toast
      const oldest = toasts[0] as ColToast;
      oldest.dismiss('programmatic');
    }
  }

  private _removeToast(toast: ColToast) {
    this.toasts.delete(toast);
    toast.remove();

    // Clean up empty containers
    this.containers.forEach((container, position) => {
      if (container.children.length === 0) {
        container.remove();
        this.containers.delete(position);
      }
    });
  }

  private _dismissAll() {
    this.toasts.forEach(toast => {
      toast.dismiss('programmatic');
    });
  }

  private _dismissByPosition(position: ToastPosition) {
    const container = this.containers.get(position);
    if (container) {
      Array.from(container.children).forEach(child => {
        (child as ColToast).dismiss('programmatic');
      });
    }
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/toolbar/col-toolbar.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColToolbarStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    width: auto;
  }

  .toolbar {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xl')}; /* 48px - standard toolbar height */
    padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    box-sizing: border-box;
    transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease-in-out;
    width: 100%;
  }

  /* Alignment styles */
  .align-left {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .align-center {
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .align-right {
    justify-content: flex-end;
  }

  .align-space-between {
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .align-space-around {
    justify-content: space-around;
  }

  /* Gap styles */
  .gap-none {
    gap: 0;
  }

  .gap-small {
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .gap-medium {
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
  }

  .gap-large {
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
  }

  /* Border styles */
  .border-top {
    border-top: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  .border-bottom {
    border-bottom: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  .border-all {
    border: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  /* Elevation styles */
  .elevated {
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.s')};
  }

  /* fixed positioning */
  .fixed-top {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 100;
  }

  .fixed-bottom {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 100;
  }

  /* Wrap behavior */
  .wrap {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  /* Responsive behavior for non-wrapping toolbars */
  .toolbar:not(.wrap) {
    scrollbar-width: thin;
  }

  /* Ensure slotted content has proper spacing */
  ::slotted(*) {
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* Responsive adjustments */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .toolbar {
      padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
      min-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xl')}; /* Slightly smaller on mobile */
    }

    .gap-small {
      gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
    }

    .gap-medium {
      gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')};
    }

    .gap-large {
      gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    }

    /* Force wrapping on very small screens if content overflows */
    .toolbar:not(.wrap) {
      white-space: nowrap;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .toolbar {
      padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
    }
  }

  /* Reduced motion */
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .toolbar {
      transition: none;
    }
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/molecules/toolbar/col-toolbar.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColToolbar } from './col-toolbar';

describe('ColToolbar', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-toolbar')) {
      customElements.define('col-toolbar', ColToolbar);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-toolbar').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar).to.exist;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-left')).to.be.true; // default alignment
    });

    it('should render slotted content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar>
          <button>Test Button</button>
          <span>Test Text</span>
        </col-toolbar>
      `);

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;

      // Check that slotted content is present
      const button = element.querySelector('button');
      const span = element.querySelector('span');
      expect(button?.textContent).to.equal('Test Button');
      expect(span?.textContent).to.equal('Test Text');
    });

    it('should have proper ARIA attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('toolbar');
    });
  });

  describe('Alignment property', () => {
    it('should apply left alignment by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-left')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply center alignment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar align="center"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-center')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-left')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should apply right alignment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar align="right"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-right')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply space-between alignment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar align="space-between"></col-toolbar>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-space-between')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply space-around alignment', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar align="space-around"></col-toolbar>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-space-around')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update alignment dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar align="left"></col-toolbar> `);

      let toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-left')).to.be.true;

      element.align = 'center';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-center')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-left')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Gap property', () => {
    it('should apply small gap', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar gap="small"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-small')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply medium gap', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar gap="medium"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-medium')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply large gap', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar gap="large"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-large')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update gap dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar gap="small"></col-toolbar> `);

      let toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-small')).to.be.true;

      element.gap = 'large';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-large')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-small')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Border property', () => {
    it('should apply top border', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar border="top"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-top')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply bottom border', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar border="bottom"></col-toolbar>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-bottom')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply all borders', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar border="all"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-all')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update border dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar border="top"></col-toolbar> `);

      let toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-top')).to.be.true;

      element.border = 'bottom';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-bottom')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-top')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Elevation property', () => {
    it('should apply elevation when set to true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar elevation></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('elevated')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not apply elevation by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('elevated')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should update elevation dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      let toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('elevated')).to.be.false;

      element.elevation = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('elevated')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Position property', () => {
    it('should apply sticky-top position', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar sticky="top"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('sticky-top')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply sticky-bottom position', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar sticky="bottom"></col-toolbar>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('sticky-bottom')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply fixed-top position', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar fixed="top"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('fixed-top')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply fixed-bottom position', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar fixed="bottom"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('fixed-bottom')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Wrap property', () => {
    it('should apply wrap class when wrap is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar wrap></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('wrap')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should not apply wrap class by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('wrap')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should update wrap dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      let toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('wrap')).to.be.false;

      element.wrap = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('wrap')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Combined properties', () => {
    it('should apply multiple properties simultaneously', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar
          align="center"
          gap="large"
          border="all"
          elevation
          sticky="top"
          wrap
        ></col-toolbar>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-center')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-large')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-all')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('elevated')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('sticky-top')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('wrap')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle property changes independently', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar align="left" gap="small" border="top"></col-toolbar>
      `);

      // Change only align
      element.align = 'right';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-right')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-small')).to.be.true; // unchanged
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('border-top')).to.be.true; // unchanged
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should have proper role attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('toolbar');
    });

    it('should maintain accessibility with custom content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar>
          <button aria-label="Save">Save</button>
          <button aria-label="Delete">Delete</button>
        </col-toolbar>
      `);

      const buttons = element.querySelectorAll('button');
      expect(buttons).to.have.length(2);
      expect(buttons[0].getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Save');
      expect(buttons[1].getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Delete');
    });
  });

  describe('Edge cases', () => {
    it('should handle empty content gracefully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar).to.exist;

      const slot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot');
      expect(slot).to.exist;
    });

    it('should handle invalid alignment values gracefully', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      // Set invalid alignment
      (element as any).align = 'invalid-alignment';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      // Should not break, might fall back to default or no alignment class
      expect(toolbar).to.exist;
    });

    it('should handle rapid property changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      // Rapid changes
      element.align = 'center';
      element.gap = 'large';
      element.elevation = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('align-center')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-large')).to.be.true;
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('elevated')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Responsive behavior', () => {
    it('should maintain layout on different container sizes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar>
          <button>Button 1</button>
          <button>Button 2</button>
          <button>Button 3</button>
        </col-toolbar>
      `);

      // Simulate narrow container
      Object.defineProperty(element, 'offsetWidth', { value: 200, configurable: true });

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar).to.exist;

      // Check that buttons are still present
      const buttons = element.querySelectorAll('button');
      expect(buttons).to.have.length(3);
    });

    it('should handle wrap behavior with many items', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html`
        <col-toolbar wrap>
          <button>1</button>
          <button>2</button>
          <button>3</button>
          <button>4</button>
          <button>5</button>
        </col-toolbar>
      `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('wrap')).to.be.true;

      const buttons = element.querySelectorAll('button');
      expect(buttons).to.have.length(5);
    });
  });

  describe('Styling integration', () => {
    it('should have proper CSS custom properties support', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      const styles = getComputedStyle(toolbar as Element);

      // Check that basic styles are applied
      expect(styles.display).to.equal('flex');
      expect(styles.alignItems).to.equal('center');
    });

    it('should apply theme variables correctly', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColToolbar>(html` <col-toolbar gap="medium"></col-toolbar> `);

      const toolbar = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.toolbar');
      expect(toolbar?.classList.contains('gap-medium')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/molecules/toolbar/col-toolbar.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColToolbarStyles } from './col-toolbar.styles';

/**
 * Toolbar component for organizing action buttons and controls.
 *
 * @element col-toolbar
 *
 * @summary A toolbar component that provides flexible layout options for organizing action buttons and controls with various alignment and positioning options.
 *
 * @slot - The toolbar items (buttons, controls, etc.)
 *
 * @csspart toolbar - The main toolbar container element
 *
 * @attr {string} align - The alignment of toolbar items (left, center, right, space-between, space-around)
 * @attr {string} border - The border style for the toolbar (none, top, bottom, all)
 * @attr {boolean} elevation - Whether to add elevation/shadow to the toolbar
 * @attr {string} sticky - The sticky positioning of the toolbar (none, top, bottom)
 * @attr {string} fixed - The fixed positioning of the toolbar (none, top, bottom)
 * @attr {boolean} wrap - Whether toolbar items should wrap to multiple lines
 * @attr {string} gap - The gap between toolbar items (none, small, medium, large)
 *
 * @property {string} align - The alignment of toolbar items (left, center, right, space-between, space-around)
 * @property {string} border - The border style for the toolbar (none, top, bottom, all)
 * @property {boolean} elevation - Whether to add elevation/shadow to the toolbar
 * @property {string} sticky - The sticky positioning of the toolbar (none, top, bottom)
 * @property {string} fixed - The fixed positioning of the toolbar (none, top, bottom)
 * @property {boolean} wrap - Whether toolbar items should wrap to multiple lines
 * @property {string} gap - The gap between toolbar items (none, small, medium, large)
 *
 * @default 'left' - Default align value
 * @default 'none' - Default border value
 * @default false - Default elevation state
 * @default 'none' - Default sticky value
 * @default 'none' - Default fixed value
 * @default false - Default wrap state
 * @default 'medium' - Default gap value ("none" applies no spacing)
 */
@Meta({ name: 'toolbar' })
export class ColToolbar extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColToolbarStyles];

  @property({ type: String })
  align: 'left' | 'center' | 'right' | 'space-between' | 'space-around' = 'left';

  @property({ type: String })
  border: 'none' | 'top' | 'bottom' | 'all' = 'none';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  elevation: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  sticky: 'none' | 'top' | 'bottom' = 'none';

  @property({ type: String })
  fixed: 'none' | 'top' | 'bottom' = 'none';

  @property({ type: Boolean })
  wrap: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String })
  gap: 'none' | 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' = 'medium';

  private get _containerClasses() {
    return {
      toolbar: true,
      [`align-${this.align}`]: true,
      [`border-${this.border}`]: this.border !== 'none',
      elevated: this.elevation,
      [`sticky-${this.sticky}`]: this.sticky !== 'none',
      [`fixed-${this.fixed}`]: this.fixed !== 'none',
      wrap: this.wrap,
      [`gap-${this.gap}`]: true,
    };
  }

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    if (this.sticky !== 'none') {
      this.style.position = 'sticky';
      this.style.zIndex = '100';
      this.sticky === 'top' ? (this.style.top = '0') : (this.style.bottom = '0');
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        class="${classMap(this._containerClasses)}"
        part="toolbar"
        role="toolbar"
        aria-label="Toolbar"
      >
        <slot></slot>
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-toolbar': ColToolbar;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/organism/dialog/col-dialog.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColDialogStyles = css`
  :host {
    --dialog-margin: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.ml')};
    --dialog-available-width: calc(100vw - (var(--dialog-margin) * 2));
  }
  .dialog {
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    overflow: hidden;
    flex-direction: column;
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.l')};
    transition:
      transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
      opacity 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1),
      box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.95) translateY(-8px);
    &.dialog-active {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: scale(1) translateY(0);
    }
    &.dialog-small {
      width: min(var(--dialog-width, 448px), var(--dialog-available-width));
      height: var(--dialog-height, 311px);
    }
    &.dialog-medium {
      width: min(var(--dialog-width, 640px), var(--dialog-available-width));
      height: var(--dialog-height, 311px);
    }
    &.dialog-large {
      width: min(var(--dialog-width, 960px), var(--dialog-available-width));
      height: var(--dialog-height, 311px);
    }
    &.dialog-full {
      width: min(var(--dialog-width, 1280px), var(--dialog-available-width));
      height: var(--dialog-height, 720px);
    }
    .dialog-content {
      height: 100%;
      padding: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
      overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .dialog-header {
      border-bottom: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    }
    .dialog-footer {
      border-top: 1px solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
    }
  }
`;
