FILE: src/components/organism/dialog/col-dialog.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, waitUntil } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColDialog } from './col-dialog';
import { ColModalFooter, ColModalHeader } from '@/components/molecules';

describe('ColDialog component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-dialog')) {
      customElements.define('col-dialog', ColDialog);
      customElements.define('col-modal-header', ColModalHeader);
      customElements.define('col-modal-footer', ColModalFooter);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-dialog').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('Dialog with default props', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html` <col-dialog></col-dialog> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element.preventClose).to.be.false;
      expect(element.size).to.equal('small');
      expect(element.layout).to.equal('default');
    });

    it('Dialog with content slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog>
          <p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.</p>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const content = element.querySelector('p');
      expect(content).to.exist;
      expect(content?.textContent).to.equal(
        'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.'
      );
    });

    it('Dialog with header slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog>
          <div slot="header">Header content</div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-header');
      expect(header).to.exist;
    });

    it('Dialog with footer slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog>
          <div slot="footer">Footer content</div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-footer');
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });

    it('Dialog hidden when not active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html` <col-dialog></col-dialog> `);

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog');
      expect(dialog?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
      expect(dialog?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('Dialog visible when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html` <col-dialog active></col-dialog> `);

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog');
      expect(dialog?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
      expect(dialog?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
    });
  });

  describe('Size property', () => {
    it('Dialog with medium size by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog size="medium" active></col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog');
      expect(dialog?.classList.contains('dialog-medium')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Dialog with large size by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog size="large" active></col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog');
      expect(dialog?.classList.contains('dialog-large')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Dialog with full size by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog size="full" active></col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog');
      expect(dialog?.classList.contains('dialog-full')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Layout property', () => {
    it('Dialog with default layout', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active>
          <div slot="header">Content</div>
          <div slot="footer">Content</div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-header');
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-footer');
      expect(header).to.exist;
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });

    it('Dialog with noheader layout', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog layout="noheader" active>
          <div slot="header"></div>
          <div slot="footer"></div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-header');
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-footer');
      expect(header).to.be.null;
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });

    it('Dialog with nofooter layout', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog layout="nofooter" active>
          <div slot="header"></div>
          <div slot="footer"></div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-header');
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog-footer');
      expect(header).to.exist;
      expect(footer).to.be.null;
    });
  });

  describe('Custom width and height properties', () => {
    it('should apply custom width when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog width="500" active>Content</col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog') as HTMLElement;
      expect(dialog?.style.cssText).to.include('--dialog-width: 500px;');
    });

    it('should not apply custom width when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog height="500" active>Content</col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const dialog = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.dialog') as HTMLElement;
      expect(dialog?.style.cssText).to.include('--dialog-height: 500px;');
    });
  });

  describe('Active state management', () => {
    it('Dialog initial inactive to active state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html` <col-dialog></col-dialog> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element['_isDialogActive']).to.be.false;

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      // Wait for the animation timeout
      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      expect(element['_isDialogActive']).to.be.true;
      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Overlay interaction', () => {
    it('Dialog should close when clicking outside', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html` <col-dialog active></col-dialog> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      overlay?.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('overlay-click-outside'));

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Dialog should close on escape key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html` <col-dialog active></col-dialog> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      overlay?.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('overlay-escape'));

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Dialog should pass correct props to overlay', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active preventclose></col-dialog>
      `);

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      expect(overlay?.hasAttribute('active')).to.be.true;
      expect(overlay?.hasAttribute('preventclose')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Dialog should not close on preventclose true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active preventclose></col-dialog>
      `);

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      overlay?.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('overlay-escape'));
      expect(element.active).to.be.true;

      overlay?.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('overlay-click-outside'));
      expect(element.active).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Dialog should destroy focusTrap on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active> <button>Focusable button</button> </col-dialog>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDialogActive'], 'Dialog should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));

      const focusTrap = element['_focusTrap'];
      expect(focusTrap).to.exist;

      // Mock destroy method to track if it's called
      let destroyCalled = false;
      if (focusTrap) {
        const originalDestroy = focusTrap.destroy;
        focusTrap.destroy = function () {
          destroyCalled = true;
          originalDestroy.call(this);
        };
      }

      element.disconnectedCallback();

      expect(destroyCalled).to.be.true;
      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;
    });
  });

  describe('Close event handling', () => {
    it('Dialog with ColModalHeader closes with close button click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active>
          <div slot="header">
            <col-modal-header slot="header" title="Passive Dialog"></col-modal-header>
          </div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const header = element.querySelector('col-modal-header');
      header?.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('on-close', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          cancelable: true,
        })
      );
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Dialog with custom header closes with close button click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active>
          <div slot="header">
            <button data-action="close">Close button</button>
          </div>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const closeButton = element.querySelector('button');
      closeButton?.dispatchEvent(
        new MouseEvent('click', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          cancelable: true,
        })
      );
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Dialog with ColModalFooter closes with cancel button click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active>
          <col-modal-footer slot="footer">
            <col-button slot="actions" id="button" data-action="cancel">Cancel</col-button>
            <col-button slot="actions" data-action="confirm" color="primary">Save</col-button>
          </col-modal-footer>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const cancelButton = element.querySelector('#button');
      cancelButton?.dispatchEvent(
        new MouseEvent('click', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          cancelable: true,
        })
      );
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('Dialog with ColModalFooter confirms with save button click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDialog>(html`
        <col-dialog active>
          <p>Content</p>
          <col-modal-footer slot="footer">
            <col-button slot="actions" data-action="cancel">Cancel</col-button>
            <col-button slot="actions" data-action="confirm" id="button" color="primary">
              Save
            </col-button>
          </col-modal-footer>
        </col-dialog>
      `);

      const confirmsButton = element.querySelector('#button');
      confirmsButton?.dispatchEvent(
        new MouseEvent('click', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          cancelable: true,
        })
      );
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/organism/dialog/col-dialog.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property, state, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColDialogStyles } from './col-dialog.styles';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { FocusTrap } from '@/utils/accessibility';
import { ColOverlay } from '@/components/atoms';
import { styleMap } from 'lit/directives/style-map.js';

/**
 * Dialog component is a pop-up window that requests the user's attention to perform a specific action or provide important information.
 *
 * @element col-dialog
 *
 * @summary A pop-up modal component for forms or supplementary content that overlays the main content.
 *
 * @slot - The dialog content
 * @slot header - Optional header section with bottom border
 * @slot footer - Optional footer section with top border
 *
 * @csspart dialog - The dialog container element
 * @csspart content - The dialog content container element
 *
 * @attr {boolean} active - Whether the dialog is active/visible
 * @attr {'default' | 'noheader' | 'nofooter'} layout - Defines whether the dialog has no header, no footer or contains both
 * @attr {'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | 'full'} size - Preset dialog size
 * @attr {number} width - Custom width in pixels (overrides size preset)
 * @attr {number} height - Custom height in pixels (overrides size preset)
 * @attr {boolean} preventclose - Wheter the dialog closes with a click or Esc on overlay
 * @attr {boolean} keepopen - Wheter the dialog closes at submit or waits for another action to be completed
 *
 * @property {boolean} active - Whether the dialog is active/visible
 * @property {string} layout - Defines whether the dialog has no header, no footer or contains both
 * @property {string} size - Preset dialog size
 * @property {number} height - Custom dialog height
 * @property {number} width - Custom dialog width
 * @property {boolean} preventclose - Wheter the dialog closes with a click or Esc on overlay
 * @property {boolean} keepopen - Wheter the dialog closes at submit or waits for another action to be completed
 *
 * @default false - Default active value
 * @default 'default' - Default layout value
 * @default 'small' - Default size value
 * @default false - Default preventClose value
 * @default false - Default keepOpen value
 *
 * @state {boolean} _isDialogActive - enables animation when the dialog is active
 * @state {HTMLFormElement | null} _contentForm - the form within the default slot
 *
 * @fires dialog-action - Fired for 'cancel' and 'confirm' dialog actions
 * @fires dialog-close - Fired when dialog closes
 * @fires dialog-prevented - Fired when action is prevented
 */
@Meta({ name: 'dialog', components: [ColOverlay] })
export class ColDialog extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColDialogStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  active: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  layout: 'default' | 'noheader' | 'nofooter' = 'default';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | 'full' = 'small';

  @property({ type: Number, reflect: true })
  height!: number;

  @property({ type: Number, reflect: true })
  width!: number;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  preventClose: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  keepOpen: boolean = false;

  @query('.dialog')
  private _dialogElement!: HTMLElement;

  @state()
  private _isDialogActive: boolean = false;

  // In case there is a Form so it can be handle by the component
  @state()
  private _contentForm?: HTMLFormElement | null;

  private _focusTrap: FocusTrap | null = null;
  private _animationTimeout: number | null = null;

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();

    // Clean up timeout
    if (this._animationTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(this._animationTimeout);
      this._animationTimeout = null;
    }

    // Clean up focus trap
    if (this._focusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.destroy();
      this._focusTrap = null;
    }
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    if (changedProperties.has('active')) {
      /**
       * Identifies whether the component has a form element and updates @state _contentForm
       */
      this._contentForm = this.querySelector('form') as HTMLFormElement | null;
      this._handleActiveChange();
    }
  }

  protected updated(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    // Initialize or update focus trap when dialog becomes active
    if (changedProperties.has('active') && this.active && this._dialogElement) {
      // Wait for dialog animation to complete
      setTimeout(() => {
        this._initializeFocusTrap();
      }, 500); // Match CSS transition duration
    }
  }

  private _handleActiveChange() {
    // Clear any existing timeout
    if (this._animationTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(this._animationTimeout);
      this._animationTimeout = null;
    }

    if (this.active) {
      // Small delay for smooth slide transition on show dialog
      this._animationTimeout = window.setTimeout(() => {
        this._isDialogActive = true;
      }, 10);
    } else {
      this._isDialogActive = false;

      // Deactivate focus trap immediately when closing
      if (this._focusTrap) {
        this._focusTrap.deactivate();
        // Clean up the scroll block for the case: Multiple dialogs open at the same time
        setTimeout(() => {
          document.body.style.overflow = '';
        }, 100);
      }
    }
  }

  private _initializeFocusTrap() {
    if (!this._dialogElement) return;

    // Clean up existing focus trap
    if (this._focusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.destroy();
      this._focusTrap = null;
    }

    // Create new focus trap
    // Pass the shadow root to focus trap so it can properly query focusable elements
    this._focusTrap = new FocusTrap(this._dialogElement, this.shadowRoot as ShadowRoot);

    if (this.active && this._isDialogActive) {
      this._focusTrap.activate();
    }
  }

  private _handleOverlayClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {
    if (this.preventClose) {
      this._dispatchPreventedEvent(e);
      return;
    }
    this._dispatchCloseEvent('backdrop-click');
    this.active = false;
  };

  private _handleOverlayEscape = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (this.preventClose) {
      this._dispatchPreventedEvent(e);
      return;
    }
    this._dispatchCloseEvent('escape-key');
    this.active = false;
  };

  /**
   * The Header can only dispatch a close event
   */
  private _handleHeaderClose(e: Event) {
    const target = e.target as HTMLElement;

    // Retrieve the value of the attribute data-action in the component
    const action = target?.dataset.action;

    // Handle close when the header slot is the 'col-modal-header' component
    if (e.type === 'on-close') {
      this._handleActions('close', e);
    }

    // Handle close when the header slot is any other component (such as div, col-group...)
    if (e.type === 'click' && target?.tagName !== 'col-modal-header') {
      // Only dispatch the event and close the dialog when 'close' value of data-action attribute set
      if (action === 'close') {
        this._handleActions('close', e);
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * The Footer can only dispatch a cancel and confirm event according to the
   * action buttons
   */
  private _handleFooterClick(e: Event) {
    const target = e.target as HTMLElement;

    // Retrieve the value of the attribute data-action in the component
    const action = target?.dataset.action;

    switch (action) {
      // Dispatch event only if the data-action value is 'cancel'
      case 'cancel':
        this._handleActions('cancel', e);
        break;
      // Dispatch event only if the data-action value is 'confirm'
      case 'confirm':
        this._handleActions('confirm', e);
        break;
    }
  }

  /**
   *
   * According to the value of the data-action this handler dispatch the appropiate event
   *
   * @param reason in order to filter the data-action value defined in the slots
   * @param e as the original event received
   */
  private _handleActions(reason: string, e: Event) {
    switch (reason) {
      case 'close':
        this._dispatchCloseEvent('header-close');
        this.active = false;
        break;
      case 'cancel':
        // If there is a form, it should be cleaned before the next re-render
        this._contentForm?.reset();
        this._dispatchActionEvent('footer-cancel', e);
        this.active = false;
        break;
      case 'confirm': {
        if (this._contentForm && !this._contentForm.checkValidity()) {
          this._contentForm.reportValidity();
          return;
        }

        const actionType = this._contentForm ? 'footer-submit' : 'footer-confirm';
        this._dispatchActionEvent(actionType, e);

        if (this._contentForm && !this.keepOpen) {
          this._contentForm.reset();
        }

        if (!this.keepOpen) this.active = false;
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  // Ony dispatches an action event from footer cancel button or footer confirm button
  // (can be confirm or submit if there is a Form)
  private _dispatchActionEvent(action: string, e: any) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('dialog-action', {
        detail: {
          action,
          originalEvent: e,
          element: this,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  // Only dispatches a close event from the header close button or overlay
  private _dispatchCloseEvent(reason: string) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('dialog-close', {
        detail: {
          reason,
          element: this,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  /**
   * Only dispatches a prevented event when the @prop preventclose is active
   */
  private _dispatchPreventedEvent(e: Event) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('dialog-prevented', {
        detail: {
          originalEvent: e,
          element: this,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  private get dialogStyles() {
    return {
      ...(this.width && { '--dialog-width': `${this.width}px` }),
      ...(this.height && { '--dialog-height': `${this.height}px` }),
    };
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      dialog: true,
      [`dialog-${this.size}`]: this.size,
      'dialog-active': this._isDialogActive,
    };
  }

  protected render() {
    const noHeader = this.layout === 'noheader';
    const noFooter = this.layout === 'nofooter';

    return html`
      <col-overlay
        ?active=${this.active}
        ?preventclose=${this.preventClose}
        @overlay-click-outside=${this._handleOverlayClickOutside}
        @overlay-escape=${this._handleOverlayEscape}
      >
        <div
          part="dialog"
          role="dialog"
          aria-modal="true"
          ?hidden=${!this.active}
          aria-hidden=${!this.active}
          aria-label="Dialog modal"
          class="${classMap(this.classes)}"
          style=${styleMap(this.dialogStyles)}
        >
          ${!noHeader && this.hasSlotted('header')
            ? html`
                <header class="dialog-header" role="contentinfo">
                  <slot
                    name="header"
                    @on-close=${this._handleHeaderClose}
                    @click=${this._handleHeaderClose}
                  ></slot>
                </header>
              `
            : nothing}

          <div part="content" class="dialog-content" role="main">
            <slot></slot>
          </div>

          ${!noFooter && this.hasSlotted('footer')
            ? html`
                <footer class="dialog-footer" role="contentinfo">
                  <slot name="footer" @click=${this._handleFooterClick}></slot>
                </footer>
              `
            : nothing}
        </div>
      </col-overlay>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-dialog': ColDialog;
  }
}

FILE: src/components/organism/drawer/col-drawer.styles.ts
================================================
import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColDrawerStyles = css`
  :host {
    position: relative;
    display: contents;
  }
  .drawer {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    width: 0;
    height: 100%;
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
    overflow: hidden;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: max-content auto max-content;
    box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.l')};
    transition: transform 0.3s ease-out;
    &.drawer-active {
      transform: translateX(0) !important;
    }
    &.drawer-left {
      left: 0;
      border-radius: 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} 0;
      transform: translateX(-100%);
    }
    &.drawer-right {
      right: 0;
      border-radius: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')} 0 0 ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.2xs')};
      transform: translateX(100%);
    }
    &.drawer-small {
      width: var(--col-drawer-width, 448px);
    }
    &.drawer-medium {
      width: var(--col-drawer-width, 640px);
    }
    &.drawer-large {
      width: var(--col-drawer-width, 960px);
    }
    .drawer-content {
      width: calc(100% - ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')} * 2);
      padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.s')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
      overflow-y: auto;
      box-shadow: 0 1px 1px 0 ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')} inset;
    }
    .drawer-footer {
      box-shadow: 0 1px 1px 0 ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')} inset;
    }
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/organism/drawer/col-drawer.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, waitUntil } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColDrawer } from './col-drawer';

describe('ColDrawer component', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-drawer')) {
      customElements.define('col-drawer', ColDrawer);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-drawer').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render with default properties', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer>Drawer content</col-drawer> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element.position).to.equal('right');
      expect(element.size).to.equal('small');
      expect(element.noFocusTrap).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should render content slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer>
          <div id="test-content">Test content</div>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      const content = element.querySelector('#test-content');
      expect(content).to.exist;
      expect(content?.textContent).to.equal('Test content');
    });

    it('should render header slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer>
          <div slot="header">Header content</div>
          <div>Body content</div>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer-header');
      expect(header).to.exist;
    });

    it('should render footer slot when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer>
          <div>Body content</div>
          <div slot="footer">Footer content</div>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer-footer');
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });

    it('should be hidden when not active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer>Content</col-drawer> `);

      const aside = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('aside');
      expect(aside?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
    });

    it('should be visible when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      const aside = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('aside');
      expect(aside?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.false;
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
    });
  });

  describe('Position property', () => {
    it('should render on the right by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-right')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should render on the left when position is left', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer position="left" active>Content</col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-left')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update position dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      element.position = 'left';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-left')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Size property', () => {
    it('should have small size by default', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-small')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply medium size', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer size="medium" active>Content</col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-medium')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply large size', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer size="large" active>Content</col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-large')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Width property', () => {
    it('should apply custom width when provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer width="500" active>Content</col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer') as HTMLElement;
      expect(drawer?.style.cssText).to.include('--col-drawer-width: 500px');
    });

    it('should not apply custom width when not provided', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer') as HTMLElement;
      expect(drawer?.style.cssText).to.not.include('--col-drawer-width');
    });
  });

  describe('Active state management', () => {
    it('should toggle active state', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer>Content</col-drawer> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
      expect(element['_isDrawerActive']).to.be.false;

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;

      // Wait for the animation timeout
      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      expect(element['_isDrawerActive']).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should handle active state changes with animation', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer>Content</col-drawer> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      // _isDrawerActive should be false initially
      expect(element['_isDrawerActive']).to.be.false;

      // Wait for animation timeout
      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      expect(element['_isDrawerActive']).to.be.true;

      // Deactivate
      element.active = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      expect(element['_isDrawerActive']).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should clear animation timeout on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer>Content</col-drawer> `);

      element.active = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      // Store the timeout reference
      const timeoutRef = element['_animationTimeout'];
      expect(timeoutRef).to.not.be.null;

      // Disconnect the element
      element.disconnectedCallback();

      // Timeout should be cleared
      expect(element['_animationTimeout']).to.be.null;
    });
  });

  describe('Overlay interaction', () => {
    it('should close drawer when clicking outside', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      overlay?.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('overlay-click-outside'));

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should close drawer on escape key', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      expect(element.active).to.be.true;

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      overlay?.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('overlay-escape'));

      expect(element.active).to.be.false;
    });

    it('should pass correct props to overlay', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      const overlay = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('col-overlay');
      expect(overlay?.getAttribute('nocentered')).to.exist;
      expect(overlay?.getAttribute('nofocustrap')).to.exist;
      expect(overlay?.hasAttribute('active')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Focus trap', () => {
    it('should initialize focus trap when active and not disabled', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      // Wait for drawer to be active and focus trap to initialize
      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 400)); // Wait for focus trap initialization

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.exist;
    });

    it('should not initialize focus trap when noFocusTrap is true', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active nofocustrap>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 400));

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;
    });

    it('should destroy focus trap on disconnect', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 400));

      const focusTrap = element['_focusTrap'];
      expect(focusTrap).to.exist;

      // Mock destroy method to track if it's called
      let destroyCalled = false;
      if (focusTrap) {
        const originalDestroy = focusTrap.destroy;
        focusTrap.destroy = function () {
          destroyCalled = true;
          originalDestroy.call(this);
        };
      }

      element.disconnectedCallback();

      expect(destroyCalled).to.be.true;
      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;
    });

    it('should handle focus trap property changes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 400));

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.exist;

      // Disable focus trap
      element.noFocusTrap = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.be.null;

      // Re-enable focus trap
      element.noFocusTrap = false;
      await elementUpdated(element);
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 400));

      expect(element['_focusTrap']).to.exist;
    });

    it('should provide updateFocusTrap method', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active>
          <button>Focusable button</button>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 400));

      const focusTrap = element['_focusTrap'];
      expect(focusTrap).to.exist;

      // Mock updateTrap method to track if it's called
      let updateCalled = false;
      if (focusTrap) {
        focusTrap.updateTrap = function () {
          updateCalled = true;
        };
      }

      element.updateFocusTrap();
      expect(updateCalled).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('ARIA attributes', () => {
    it('should have correct ARIA attributes when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      const aside = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('aside');
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('dialog');
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('aria-modal')).to.equal('true');
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('false');
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Drawer panel');
    });

    it('should have correct ARIA attributes when inactive', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer>Content</col-drawer> `);

      const aside = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('aside');
      expect(aside?.getAttribute('aria-hidden')).to.equal('true');
      expect(aside?.hasAttribute('hidden')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should have correct role attributes for sections', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active>
          <div slot="header">Header</div>
          <div>Content</div>
          <div slot="footer">Footer</div>
        </col-drawer>
      `);

      const document = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[role="document"]');
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[role="dialog"]');
      const main = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[role="main"]');
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('footer[role="contentinfo"]');

      expect(document).to.exist;
      expect(header).to.exist;
      expect(main).to.exist;
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('CSS classes', () => {
    it('should apply drawer-active class when active', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html` <col-drawer active>Content</col-drawer> `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-active')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should apply correct size and position classes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColDrawer>(html`
        <col-drawer active position="left" size="large">Content</col-drawer>
      `);

      await waitUntil(() => element['_isDrawerActive'], 'Drawer should be active', {
        timeout: 500,
      });

      const drawer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.drawer');
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer')).to.be.true;
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-left')).to.be.true;
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-large')).to.be.true;
      expect(drawer?.classList.contains('drawer-active')).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/organism/drawer/col-drawer.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property, state, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColOverlay } from '@/components';
import { ColDrawerStyles } from './col-drawer.styles';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { FocusTrap } from '@/utils/accessibility';

/**
 * Drawer component that creates a sliding panel from the edge of the viewport.
 *
 * @element col-drawer
 *
 * @summary A sliding panel component for navigation, forms, or supplementary content that overlays the main content.
 *
 * @slot - The drawer content
 * @slot header - Optional header section with bottom border
 * @slot footer - Optional footer section with top border
 *
 * @csspart drawer - The drawer container element
 * @csspart content - The content container element
 *
 * @cssprop [--col-drawer-width] - Custom width for the drawer (overrides size preset)
 *
 * @attr {boolean} active - Whether the drawer is active/visible
 * @attr {'left'|'right'} position - Edge from which the drawer slides
 * @attr {'small'|'medium'|'large'} size - Preset drawer width (small: 448px, medium: 640px, large: 960px)
 * @attr {number} width - Custom width in pixels (overrides size preset)
 * @attr {boolean} no-focus-trap - Disable focus trapping
 *
 * @fires overlay-click-outside - Fired when clicking outside the drawer
 */
@Meta({ name: 'drawer', components: [ColOverlay] })
export class ColDrawer extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColDrawerStyles];

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  active: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  position: 'left' | 'right' = 'right';

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' = 'small';

  @property({ type: Number, reflect: true })
  width!: number;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true, attribute: 'nofocustrap' })
  noFocusTrap: boolean = false;

  @state()
  private _isDrawerActive: boolean = false;

  @query('.drawer')
  private _drawerElement!: HTMLElement;

  private _focusTrap: FocusTrap | null = null;
  private _animationTimeout: number | null = null;

  disconnectedCallback() {
    super.disconnectedCallback();

    // Clean up timeout
    if (this._animationTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(this._animationTimeout);
      this._animationTimeout = null;
    }

    // Clean up focus trap
    if (this._focusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.destroy();
      this._focusTrap = null;
    }
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    if (changedProperties.has('active')) {
      this._handleActiveChange();
    }

    if (changedProperties.has('noFocusTrap')) {
      this._handleFocusTrapChange();
    }
  }

  protected updated(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    // Initialize or update focus trap when drawer becomes active
    if (
      changedProperties.has('active') &&
      this.active &&
      this._drawerElement &&
      !this.noFocusTrap
    ) {
      // Wait for drawer animation to complete
      setTimeout(() => {
        this._initializeFocusTrap();
      }, 350); // Match CSS transition duration
    }
  }

  private _initializeFocusTrap() {
    if (!this._drawerElement || this.noFocusTrap) return;

    // Clean up existing focus trap
    if (this._focusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.destroy();
      this._focusTrap = null;
    }

    // Create new focus trap
    // Pass the shadow root to focus trap so it can properly query focusable elements
    this._focusTrap = new FocusTrap(this._drawerElement, this.shadowRoot as ShadowRoot);

    if (this.active && this._isDrawerActive) {
      this._focusTrap.activate();
    }
  }

  private _handleActiveChange() {
    // Clear any existing timeout
    if (this._animationTimeout) {
      clearTimeout(this._animationTimeout);
      this._animationTimeout = null;
    }

    if (this.active) {
      // Small delay for smooth slide transition on show drawer
      this._animationTimeout = window.setTimeout(() => {
        this._isDrawerActive = true;
      }, 10);
    } else {
      this._isDrawerActive = false;

      // Deactivate focus trap immediately when closing
      if (this._focusTrap) {
        this._focusTrap.deactivate();
      }
    }
  }

  private _handleFocusTrapChange() {
    if (this.noFocusTrap) {
      // Disable focus trap
      if (this._focusTrap) {
        this._focusTrap.destroy();
        this._focusTrap = null;
      }
    } else {
      // Enable focus trap if drawer is active
      if (this.active && this._isDrawerActive) {
        this._initializeFocusTrap();
      }
    }
  }

  private _handleOverlayClickOutside = () => {
    this.active = false;
  };

  private get widthDrawer() {
    return this.width ? `--col-drawer-width: ${this.width}px` : nothing;
  }

  private get classes() {
    return {
      drawer: true,
      [`drawer-${this.position}`]: this.position,
      [`drawer-${this.size}`]: this.size,
      'drawer-active': this._isDrawerActive,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Manually update the focus trap (useful when content changes dynamically)
   */
  updateFocusTrap() {
    if (this._focusTrap && !this.noFocusTrap) {
      this._focusTrap.updateTrap();
    }
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <aside
        part="drawer"
        ?hidden=${!this.active}
        role="dialog"
        aria-modal="true"
        aria-hidden=${!this.active}
        aria-label="Drawer panel"
      >
        <col-overlay
          ?active=${this.active}
          nocentered
          nofocustrap
          @overlay-click-outside=${this._handleOverlayClickOutside}
          @overlay-escape=${this._handleOverlayClickOutside}
        >
          <div role="document" class="${classMap(this.classes)}" style=${this.widthDrawer}>
            ${this.hasSlotted('header')
              ? html`
                  <header class="drawer-header" role="contentinfo">
                    <slot name="header"></slot>
                  </header>
                `
              : nothing}

            <div part="content" class="drawer-content" role="main">
              <slot></slot>
            </div>

            ${this.hasSlotted('footer')
              ? html`
                  <footer class="drawer-footer" role="contentinfo">
                    <slot name="footer"></slot>
                  </footer>
                `
              : nothing}
          </div>
        </col-overlay>
      </aside>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-drawer': ColDrawer;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';

export const ColSiteMenuStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: flex;
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: var(--col-site-menu-toolbar-width, 56px);
    height: 100dvh;
    z-index: var(--col-site-menu-z-index, 1000);
  }

  :host([open]) {
    width: var(--col-site-menu-width, 298px);
  }

  .site-menu-container {
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    position: relative;
  }

  ::slotted(col-site-menu-toolbar) {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    width: var(--col-site-menu-toolbar-width, 56px);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  ::slotted(col-site-menu-submenu) {
    flex: 1;
    width: var(--col-site-menu-submenu-width, 242px);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }
`;
