FILE: src/components/organism/site-menu/col-site-menu.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColSiteMenu } from './col-site-menu';
import { ColSiteMenuToolbar } from '@/components/molecules/site-menu-toolbar';
import { ColSiteMenuSubmenu } from '@/components/molecules/site-menu-submenu';
import { ColSiteMenuButton } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-button';
import { ColSiteMenuCategory } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-category';
import { ColSiteMenuSubcategory } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-subcategory';
import { ColSiteMenuItem } from '@/components/atoms/site-menu-item';
import { ColIcon } from '@telesign/colibri-icons';

customElements.define('col-icon', ColIcon);
customElements.define('col-site-menu', ColSiteMenu);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-toolbar', ColSiteMenuToolbar);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-submenu', ColSiteMenuSubmenu);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-button', ColSiteMenuButton);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-category', ColSiteMenuCategory);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-subcategory', ColSiteMenuSubcategory);
customElements.define('col-site-menu-item', ColSiteMenuItem);

describe('ColSiteMenu', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    document.body.innerHTML = '';
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-site-menu').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('should render nav container with proper accessibility attributes', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html` <col-site-menu></col-site-menu> `);

      const navElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="container"]') as HTMLElement;
      expect(navElement).to.exist;
      expect(navElement.tagName.toLowerCase()).to.equal('nav');
      expect(navElement.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('navigation');
      expect(navElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Site navigation menu');
    });

    it('should render with toolbar and submenu slots', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar"></col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu"></col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const toolbarSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'slot[name="toolbar"]'
      ) as HTMLSlotElement;
      const submenuSlot = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        'slot[name="submenu"]'
      ) as HTMLSlotElement;

      expect(toolbarSlot).to.exist;
      expect(submenuSlot).to.exist;

      const toolbar = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-toolbar');
      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');

      expect(toolbar).to.exist;
      expect(submenu).to.exist;
    });

    it('should apply default color variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html` <col-site-menu></col-site-menu> `);

      expect(element.color).to.equal(SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY);
      expect(element.getAttribute('color')).to.equal(SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY);
    });

    it('should apply custom color variant', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark"></col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.color).to.equal(SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.DARK);
      expect(element.getAttribute('color')).to.equal(SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.DARK);
    });
  });

  describe('Property validation', () => {
    it('should validate color property with valid values', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="primary"></col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.color).to.equal(SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY);
    });

    it('should warn about invalid color values', async () => {
      const originalWarn = console.warn;
      let capturedWarnings: string[] = [];

      console.warn = (message: string) => {
        capturedWarnings.push(message);
      };

      await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html` <col-site-menu color="invalid-color"></col-site-menu> `);

      expect(capturedWarnings.some(warning => warning.includes('Invalid value'))).to.be.true;
      console.warn = originalWarn;
    });
  });

  describe('State management properties', () => {
    it('should have default state values', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html` <col-site-menu></col-site-menu> `);

      expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;
    });

    it('should reflect selectedActionId to attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="test-action"></col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.selectedActionId).to.equal('test-action');
      expect(element.getAttribute('selected-action-id')).to.equal('test-action');
    });

    it('should reflect open state to attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html` <col-site-menu open></col-site-menu> `);

      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(element.hasAttribute('open')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should reflect openSubcategoryId to attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="test-subcategory"></col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('test-subcategory');
      expect(element.getAttribute('open-subcategory-id')).to.equal('test-subcategory');
    });
  });

  describe('Context provision', () => {
    it('should provide context to child components', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu color="dark" selected-action-id="dashboard" open>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Settings</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(button?.hasAttribute('selected')).to.be.true;
      expect(aside?.classList.contains('submenu-visible')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should update context when properties change', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="analytics">Analytics</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Reports</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const submenu = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-submenu');
      const aside = submenu?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="submenu"]') as HTMLElement;

      expect(button?.hasAttribute('selected')).to.be.false;
      expect(submenu?.hasAttribute('visible')).to.be.false;

      element.selectedActionId = 'analytics';
      element.open = true;
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(button?.hasAttribute('selected')).to.be.true;
      expect(aside?.classList.contains('submenu-visible')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Action selection', () => {
    it('should select action and open submenu', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Overview</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      let actionSelectedEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;
      let submenuToggleEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;

      element.addEventListener('site-menu-action-selected', (e: Event) => {
        actionSelectedEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      });

      element.addEventListener('site-menu-submenu-toggle', (e: Event) => {
        submenuToggleEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      });

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.selectedActionId).to.equal('dashboard');
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;
      expect(actionSelectedEvent!.detail).to.deep.equal({
        actionId: 'dashboard',
        selected: true,
      });
      expect(submenuToggleEvent!.detail).to.deep.equal({
        visible: true,
        actionId: 'dashboard',
      });
    });

    it('should deselect action and close submenu', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="analytics" open>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="analytics">Analytics</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Reports</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      let actionSelectedEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;
      let submenuToggleEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;

      element.addEventListener('site-menu-action-selected', (e: Event) => {
        actionSelectedEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      });

      element.addEventListener('site-menu-submenu-toggle', (e: Event) => {
        submenuToggleEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      });

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      expect(actionSelectedEvent!.detail).to.deep.equal({
        actionId: 'analytics',
        selected: false,
      });
      expect(submenuToggleEvent!.detail).to.deep.equal({
        visible: false,
        actionId: undefined,
      });
    });

    it('should switch between actions maintaining single selection', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="dashboard" open>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-button>
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="analytics">Analytics</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Content</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      const analyticsButton = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button[action-id="analytics"]');
      const analyticsButtonElement = analyticsButton?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      analyticsButtonElement.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.selectedActionId).to.equal('analytics');
      expect(element.open).to.be.true;

      const dashboardButton = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button[action-id="dashboard"]');
      expect(dashboardButton?.hasAttribute('selected')).to.be.false;
      expect(analyticsButton?.hasAttribute('selected')).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Submenu close handling', () => {
    it('should handle submenu close event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu selected-action-id="settings" open>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings">Settings</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>System</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      let submenuToggleEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;
      element.addEventListener('site-menu-submenu-toggle', (e: Event) => {
        submenuToggleEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      });

      const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
      const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="close-button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      closeButton.click();

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
      expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      expect(submenuToggleEvent!.detail).to.deep.equal({
        visible: false,
        actionId: undefined,
      });
    });
  });

  describe('Subcategory management', () => {
    it('should enforce single subcategory open behavior', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="account">
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Settings</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('account');

      element.openSubcategoryId = 'security';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('security');
      expect(element.getAttribute('open-subcategory-id')).to.equal('security');
    });

    it('should provide subcategory context to child components', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu open-subcategory-id="profile">
          <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
            <col-site-menu-category>Account</col-site-menu-category>
          </col-site-menu-submenu>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('profile');
    });
  });

  describe('Event bubbling', () => {
    it('should properly bubble action selected events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="reports">Reports</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      let eventBubbled = false;
      element.addEventListener('site-menu-action-selected', () => {
        eventBubbled = true;
      });

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      expect(eventBubbled).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should properly bubble submenu toggle events', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
        <col-site-menu>
          <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
            <col-site-menu-button action-id="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-button>
          </col-site-menu-toolbar>
        </col-site-menu>
      `);

      let eventBubbled = false;
      element.addEventListener('site-menu-submenu-toggle', () => {
        eventBubbled = true;
      });

      const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
      const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '[part="button"]'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      buttonElement.click();

      expect(eventBubbled).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Accessibility', () => {
    it('should provide proper ARIA labels and roles', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html` <col-site-menu></col-site-menu> `);

      const navElement = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('[part="container"]') as HTMLElement;
      expect(navElement.getAttribute('role')).to.equal('navigation');
      expect(navElement.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Site navigation menu');
    });
  });

  describe('Integration tests', () => {
    describe('Focus management integration', () => {
      it('should store and restore focus when submenu is toggled', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu>
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings" aria-label="Settings">
                <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
              </col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category category-name="settings">
                <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
                Configuration
              </col-site-menu-category>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button')!;
        const buttonElement = button.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;

        expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
        expect(element.open).to.be.false;

        buttonElement.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.selectedActionId).to.equal('settings');
        expect(element.open).to.be.true;

        const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
        const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="close-button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        closeButton.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
        expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      });

      it('should handle focus management when no focused element exists', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu selected-action-id="dashboard" open>
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="dashboard">Dashboard</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>Overview</col-site-menu-category>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
        const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="close-button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        closeButton.click();

        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
        expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      });
    });

    describe('Subcategory context integration', () => {
      it('should call _toggleSubcategory when subcategory header is clicked', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu selected-action-id="settings" open>
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings">Settings</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>System</col-site-menu-category>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="account">
                <span>Account</span>
                <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="#profile">Profile</col-site-menu-item>
                <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="#security">Security</col-site-menu-item>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        let subcategoryToggleEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;
        element.addEventListener('site-menu-subcategory-toggle', (e: Event) => {
          subcategoryToggleEvent = e as CustomEvent;
        });

        const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
        const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;

        header.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('account');
        expect(subcategoryToggleEvent!.detail).to.deep.equal({
          subcategoryId: 'account',
          open: true,
          openSubcategoryId: 'account',
        });
      });

      it('should enforce single subcategory open behavior using _toggleSubcategory', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu selected-action-id="settings" open>
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings">Settings</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>System</col-site-menu-category>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="account">
                <span>Account</span>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="security">
                <span>Security</span>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        const accountSubcategory = element.querySelector(
          'col-site-menu-subcategory[subcategory-id="account"]'
        );
        const accountSubcategoryItems = accountSubcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-items"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;

        const securitySubcategory = element.querySelector(
          'col-site-menu-subcategory[subcategory-id="security"]'
        );
        const securitySubcategoryItems = securitySubcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-items"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;
        const accountHeader = accountSubcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;
        const securityHeader = securitySubcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;

        accountHeader.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('account');
        expect(accountSubcategoryItems?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.true;
        expect(securitySubcategory?.hasAttribute('open')).to.be.false;

        securityHeader.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('security');
        expect(accountSubcategoryItems?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.false;
        expect(securitySubcategoryItems?.classList.contains('expanded')).to.be.true;
      });

      it('should close subcategory when clicking open subcategory header using _toggleSubcategory', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu selected-action-id="settings" open open-subcategory-id="preferences">
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings">Settings</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>System</col-site-menu-category>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="preferences">
                <span>Preferences</span>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        await elementUpdated(element);

        const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
        const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('preferences');
        expect(header).attribute('aria-expanded').to.equal('true');

        header.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;
        expect(header).attribute('aria-expanded').to.equal('false');
      });
    });

    describe('Context method integration', () => {
      it('should use _openSubcategory method through context', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu selected-action-id="settings" open>
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings">Settings</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>System</col-site-menu-category>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="advanced">
                <span>Advanced</span>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;

        element.openSubcategoryId = 'advanced';
        await elementUpdated(element);

        const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
        const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('advanced');
        expect(header).attribute('aria-expanded').to.equal('true');
      });

      it('should use _closeAllSubcategories method when submenu closes', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu selected-action-id="settings" open open-subcategory-id="user-management">
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="settings">Settings</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>Admin</col-site-menu-category>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="user-management">
                <span>User Management</span>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        await elementUpdated(element);

        const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
        const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('user-management');
        expect(header).attribute('aria-expanded').to.equal('true');

        const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
        const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="close-button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        closeButton.click();

        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;
        expect(header).attribute('aria-expanded').to.equal('false');
        expect(element.open).to.be.false;
      });

      it('should handle context method calls when components interact', async () => {
        const element = await fixture<ColSiteMenu>(html`
          <col-site-menu>
            <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
              <col-site-menu-button action-id="projects">Projects</col-site-menu-button>
            </col-site-menu-toolbar>
            <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
              <col-site-menu-category>Workspace</col-site-menu-category>
              <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="active-projects">
                <span>Active Projects</span>
                <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="#project-1">Project 1</col-site-menu-item>
                <col-site-menu-item slot="items" href="#project-2">Project 2</col-site-menu-item>
              </col-site-menu-subcategory>
            </col-site-menu-submenu>
          </col-site-menu>
        `);

        const button = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-button');
        const buttonElement = button?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;

        buttonElement.focus();
        buttonElement.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.selectedActionId).to.equal('projects');
        expect(element.open).to.be.true;

        const subcategory = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-subcategory');
        const header = subcategory?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="subcategory-header"]'
        ) as HTMLElement;
        header.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.equal('active-projects');

        const menuItem = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-item');
        const itemElement = menuItem?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="item"]'
        ) as HTMLAnchorElement;
        expect(itemElement.getAttribute('href')).to.equal('#project-1');

        const category = element.querySelector('col-site-menu-category');
        const closeButton = category?.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
          '[part="close-button"]'
        ) as HTMLButtonElement;
        closeButton.click();
        await elementUpdated(element);

        expect(element.selectedActionId).to.be.undefined;
        expect(element.open).to.be.false;
        expect(element.openSubcategoryId).to.be.undefined;
      });
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/organism/site-menu/col-site-menu.ts
================================================
import { html, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { provide } from '@lit/context';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent, Validate, siteMenuContext, SiteMenuContextValue } from '@/config';
import { getEnumValues, SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS } from '@/types';
import { ColSiteMenuSubmenu } from '@/components/molecules/site-menu-submenu';
import { ColSiteMenuToolbar } from '@/components/molecules/site-menu-toolbar';
import { ColSiteMenuStyles } from './col-site-menu.styles';

export interface SiteMenuActionSelectedDetail {
  actionId: string;
  selected: boolean;
}

export interface SiteMenuSubmenuToggleDetail {
  visible: boolean;
  actionId?: string;
}

export interface SiteMenuSubcategoryToggleDetail {
  subcategoryId: string;
  open: boolean;
  openSubcategoryId?: string;
}

/**
 * Site Menu organism component that orchestrates toolbar and submenu interactions
 *
 * @element col-site-menu
 *
 * @summary Main site navigation component that manages action selection and submenu visibility.
 *          Provides context for all child components and coordinates state management across the entire site menu system.
 *          Uses slot-based composition for flexible structure and supports single-open accordion behavior for subcategories.
 *
 * @slot toolbar - Toolbar content (col-site-menu-toolbar component)
 * @slot submenu - Submenu content (col-site-menu-submenu component)
 *
 * @csspart container - The main site menu container
 *
 * @cssprop [--col-site-menu-width] - Total width of the site menu (default: 298px)
 * @cssprop [--col-site-menu-toolbar-width] - Width of the toolbar section (default: 56px)
 * @cssprop [--col-site-menu-submenu-width] - Width of the submenu section (default: 242px)
 * @cssprop [--col-site-menu-z-index] - Z-index for the site menu overlay (default: 1000)
 *
 * @attr {string} color - Color variant for the site menu
 * @attr {string} selected-action-id - Currently selected action ID
 * @attr {boolean} open - Whether the submenu is visible
 * @attr {string} open-subcategory-id - Currently open subcategory ID (enforces single-open)
 * @attr {string} aria-label - Accessible label for the site menu navigation
 *
 * @property {SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS} color - Color variant for the site menu
 * @property {string} selectedActionId - Currently selected action ID
 * @property {boolean} open - Whether the submenu is visible
 * @property {string} openSubcategoryId - Currently open subcategory ID (enforces single-open)
 * @property {string} ariaLabel - Accessible label for the site menu navigation
 *
 * @fires site-menu-action-selected - Fired when a toolbar action is selected
 * @fires site-menu-submenu-toggle - Fired when submenu visibility changes
 * @fires site-menu-subcategory-toggle - Fired when subcategory open/close state changes
 *
 * @default SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY - Default color value
 * @default undefined - Default selectedActionId value
 * @default false - Default open state
 * @default undefined - Default openSubcategoryId value
 * @default 'Site navigation menu' - Default ariaLabel value
 *
 *
 * @example
 * ```html
 * <col-site-menu color="primary">
 *   <!-- Toolbar with logo and actions -->
 *   <col-site-menu-toolbar slot="toolbar">
 *     <col-icon slot="logo" name="home" size="24" style="color: white"></col-icon>
 *
 *     <col-site-menu-button
 *       slot="actions"
 *       action-id="dashboard"
 *       aria-label="Dashboard">
 *       <col-icon name="dash-board" size="20"></col-icon>
 *     </col-site-menu-button>
 *
 *     <col-site-menu-button slot="actions" action-id="analytics" aria-label="Analytics">
 *       <col-icon name="trending-up-square" size="20"></col-icon>
 *     </col-site-menu-button>
 *   </col-site-menu-toolbar>
 *
 *   <!-- Submenu with initial content -->
 *   <col-site-menu-submenu slot="submenu">
 *     <col-site-menu-category category-name="settings">
 *       <col-icon name="settings" size="20"></col-icon>
 *       Settings
 *     </col-site-menu-category>
 *
 *     <col-site-menu-subcategory subcategory-id="account">
 *       <col-icon slot="icon" name="person" size="18"></col-icon>
 *       Account
 *
 *       <col-site-menu-item slot="items" item-name="profile" parent-subcategory-id="account">
 *         Profile
 *       </col-site-menu-item>
 *       <col-site-menu-item slot="items" item-name="security" parent-subcategory-id="account">
 *         Security
 *       </col-site-menu-item>
 *     </col-site-menu-subcategory>
 *   </col-site-menu-submenu>
 * </col-site-menu>
 * ```
 *
 * Note: Provides site menu context to all child components for coordinated state management
 * Note: Implements single-open accordion behavior for subcategories through context coordination
 * Note: Handles focus management and accessibility features through context methods
 */

@Meta({ name: 'site-menu', components: [ColSiteMenuSubmenu, ColSiteMenuToolbar] })
export class ColSiteMenu extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColSiteMenuStyles];

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  @Validate(getEnumValues(SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS), SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS.PRIMARY)
  color!: SITE_MENU_COLOR_VARIANTS;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true, attribute: 'selected-action-id' })
  selectedActionId?: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  open: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: String, reflect: true, attribute: 'open-subcategory-id' })
  openSubcategoryId?: string;

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'aria-label' })
  ariaLabel: string = 'Site navigation menu';

  @provide({ context: siteMenuContext })
  contextValue!: SiteMenuContextValue;

  private _focusedActionElement?: HTMLElement;

  connectedCallback() {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this.addEventListener('submenu-close', this._handleSubmenuClose as EventListener);
    this.contextValue = this._createContextValue();
  }

  disconnectedCallback() {
    this.removeEventListener('submenu-close', this._handleSubmenuClose as EventListener);
    super.disconnectedCallback();
  }

  protected willUpdate(changedProperties: PropertyValues) {
    if (
      changedProperties.has('color') ||
      changedProperties.has('selectedActionId') ||
      changedProperties.has('open') ||
      changedProperties.has('openSubcategoryId')
    ) {
      this.contextValue = this._createContextValue();
    }
  }

  private _createContextValue(): SiteMenuContextValue {
    return {
      color: this.color,
      selectedActionId: this.selectedActionId,
      open: this.open,
      openSubcategoryId: this.openSubcategoryId,
      focusedActionElement: this._focusedActionElement,
      selectAction: this._selectAction.bind(this),
      deselectAllActions: this._deselectAllActions.bind(this),
      toggleSubmenu: this._toggleSubmenu.bind(this),
      closeSubmenu: this._closeSubmenu.bind(this),
      toggleSubcategory: this._toggleSubcategory.bind(this),
      openSubcategory: this._openSubcategory.bind(this),
      closeAllSubcategories: this._closeAllSubcategories.bind(this),
      setFocusedActionElement: this._setFocusedActionElement.bind(this),
      restoreFocus: this._restoreFocus.bind(this),
    };
  }

  private _selectAction = (actionId: string) => {
    this.selectedActionId = actionId;
    this.open = true;

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-action-selected', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { actionId, selected: true },
      })
    );

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-submenu-toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { visible: true, actionId },
      })
    );
  };

  private _deselectAllActions = () => {
    const previousActionId = this.selectedActionId;
    this.selectedActionId = undefined;
    this.open = false;

    if (previousActionId) {
      this.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('site-menu-action-selected', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          detail: { actionId: previousActionId, selected: false },
        })
      );
    }

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-submenu-toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { visible: false, actionId: undefined },
      })
    );
  };

  private _toggleSubmenu = (visible?: boolean) => {
    this.open = visible !== undefined ? visible : !this.open;

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-submenu-toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { visible: this.open, actionId: this.selectedActionId },
      })
    );
  };

  private _closeSubmenu = () => {
    this.selectedActionId = undefined;
    this.open = false;
    this.openSubcategoryId = undefined;

    this._restoreFocus();

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-submenu-toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { visible: false, actionId: undefined },
      })
    );
  };

  private _setFocusedActionElement = (element: HTMLElement) => {
    this._focusedActionElement = element;
    this.contextValue = { ...this.contextValue, focusedActionElement: this._focusedActionElement };
  };

  private _restoreFocus = () => {
    if (this._focusedActionElement) {
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        this._focusedActionElement?.focus();
      });
    }
  };

  private _toggleSubcategory = (subcategoryId: string) => {
    const wasOpen = this.openSubcategoryId === subcategoryId;

    if (wasOpen) {
      this.openSubcategoryId = undefined;
    } else {
      this.openSubcategoryId = subcategoryId;
    }

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-subcategory-toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: {
          subcategoryId,
          open: !wasOpen,
          openSubcategoryId: this.openSubcategoryId,
        },
      })
    );
  };

  private _openSubcategory = (subcategoryId: string) => {
    const wasAlreadyOpen = this.openSubcategoryId === subcategoryId;
    this.openSubcategoryId = subcategoryId;

    if (!wasAlreadyOpen) {
      this.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('site-menu-subcategory-toggle', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          detail: {
            subcategoryId,
            open: true,
            openSubcategoryId: this.openSubcategoryId,
          },
        })
      );
    }
  };

  private _closeAllSubcategories = () => {
    const previousSubcategoryId = this.openSubcategoryId;
    this.openSubcategoryId = undefined;

    if (previousSubcategoryId) {
      this.dispatchEvent(
        new CustomEvent('site-menu-subcategory-toggle', {
          bubbles: true,
          composed: true,
          detail: {
            subcategoryId: previousSubcategoryId,
            open: false,
            openSubcategoryId: undefined,
          },
        })
      );
    }
  };

  private _handleSubmenuClose = (e: CustomEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();

    this.open = false;
    this.selectedActionId = undefined;

    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('site-menu-submenu-toggle', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        detail: { visible: false, actionId: undefined },
      })
    );
  };

  render() {
    return html`
      <nav
        part="container"
        class="site-menu-container"
        role="navigation"
        aria-label="${this.ariaLabel}"
      >
        <slot name="toolbar"></slot>
        <slot name="submenu"></slot>
      </nav>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-site-menu': ColSiteMenu;
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const ColTableStyles = css`
  :host {
    display: block;
    position: relative;
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};
  }

  .table-container {
    width: 100%;
    padding: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')} ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.l')};
    position: relative;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .table-main {
    margin: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')} 0;
    height: 100%;
    background: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    min-height: var(--col-table-min-height);
    overflow-y: auto;
  }

  :host([scroller]) .table-main {
    max-height: var(--col-table-max-height, ${getThemeVar('layout.breakpoints.md')});
  }
`;

FILE: src/components/organism/table/col-table.test.ts
================================================
import { html } from 'lit';
import { fixture, expect, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { ColTableRow } from '@/components/atoms/table-row';
import { ColTableCell } from '@/components/atoms/table-cell';
import { ColTable } from './col-table';
import { ColCheckbox, ColTableBody } from '@/components/atoms';

describe('ColTableBody', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('col-table')) {
      customElements.define('col-table', ColTable);
      customElements.define('col-table-body', ColTableBody);
      customElements.define('col-table-row', ColTableRow);
      customElements.define('col-table-cell', ColTableCell);
      customElements.define('col-checkbox', ColCheckbox);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-body').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-row').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-table-cell').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('col-checkbox').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Basic rendering', () => {
    it('Table with default props', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html` <col-table></col-table> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.minHeight).to.equal('auto');
      expect(element.selectable).to.be.false;
      expect(element.scroller).to.be.false;

      const container = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div[role="table"]');
      expect(container).to.exist;
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-rowcount')).to.equal('0');
      expect(container?.getAttribute('aria-colcount')).to.equal('0');
    });

    it('Table with min height', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html` <col-table min-height="275px"></col-table> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.minHeight).to.equal('275px');
      expect(element.style.getPropertyValue('--col-table-min-height')).to.equal('275px');
    });

    it('Table with max height', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html` <col-table max-height="475px"></col-table> `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.maxHeight).to.equal('475px');
      expect(element.style.getPropertyValue('--col-table-max-height')).to.equal('475px');
    });

    it('Table with header slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html`
        <col-table min-height="275px">
          <col-toolbar slot="table-header">
            <col-typography variant="subheading">Table Header</col-typography>
            <col-spacer></col-spacer>
            <col-button>
              <col-icon name="search"></col-icon>
            </col-button>
          </col-toolbar>
        </col-table>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      const header = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="table-header"]');
      expect(header).to.exist;
    });

    it('Table with footer slot', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html`
        <col-table min-height="275px">
          <col-toolbar slot="table-footer">
            <col-typography variant="helper">Table Footer</col-typography>
            <col-spacer></col-spacer>
            <col-button color="primary">Close</col-button>
          </col-toolbar>
        </col-table>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      const footer = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('slot[name="table-footer"]');
      expect(footer).to.exist;
    });

    it('Table with tableHead and tableBody', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html`
        <col-table min-height="275px">
          <col-table-head>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 1</col-table-cell>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 2</col-table-cell>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 3</col-table-cell>
          </col-table-head>
          <col-table-body></col-table-body>
        </col-table>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;

      const tableHead = element?.querySelector('col-table-head');
      expect(tableHead).to.exist;
      const tableHeadCell = tableHead?.querySelector('col-table-cell') as ColTableCell;
      expect(tableHeadCell).to.exist;
      expect(tableHeadCell.header).to.be.true;
      expect(tableHeadCell.textContent?.trim().includes('Prueba 1')).to.be.true;

      const tableBody = element?.querySelector('col-table-body');
      expect(tableBody).to.exist;
      const emptyTableBody = tableBody?.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.empty-body');
      expect(emptyTableBody).to.exist;
      expect(emptyTableBody?.textContent?.includes('No data to be displayed')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('Table with selectable prop', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html`
        <col-table min-height="275px" selectable>
          <col-table-head>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 1</col-table-cell>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 2</col-table-cell>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 3</col-table-cell>
          </col-table-head>
          <col-table-body>
            <col-table-row id="row1">
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
            </col-table-row>
          </col-table-body>
        </col-table>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.selectable).to.be.true;

      const tableHead = element?.querySelector('col-table-head');
      expect(tableHead).to.exist;
      const tableCheckboxHeadCell = tableHead
        ?.querySelectorAll('col-table-cell')[0]
        ?.querySelector('col-checkbox') as ColCheckbox;
      expect(tableCheckboxHeadCell).to.exist;

      const tableBody = element?.querySelector('col-table-body');
      expect(tableBody).to.exist;
      const tableRow = tableBody?.querySelector('col-table-row');
      expect(tableRow).to.exist;
      const tableCheckboxRowCell = tableRow
        ?.querySelector('col-table-cell')
        ?.querySelector('col-checkbox') as ColCheckbox;
      expect(tableCheckboxRowCell).to.exist;
    });
  });

  describe('Click interactions', () => {
    it('Table will select all rows with the Head checkbox click', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<ColTable>(html`
        <col-table min-height="275px" selectable>
          <col-table-head>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 1</col-table-cell>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 2</col-table-cell>
            <col-table-cell header>Prueba 3</col-table-cell>
          </col-table-head>
          <col-table-body>
            <col-table-row id="row1">
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
            </col-table-row>
            <col-table-row id="row2">
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
              <col-table-cell>prueba</col-table-cell>
            </col-table-row>
          </col-table-body>
        </col-table>
      `);

      expect(element).to.exist;
      expect(element.selectable).to.be.true;

      const tableHead = element?.querySelector('col-table-head');
      expect(tableHead).to.exist;
      const tableHeadCell = tableHead?.querySelector('col-table-cell');
      const tableCheckboxHeadCell = tableHeadCell?.querySelector('col-checkbox') as ColCheckbox;
      expect(tableCheckboxHeadCell).to.exist;

      tableCheckboxHeadCell.click();
      await elementUpdated(element);

      const row1 = element?.querySelector('col-table-row') as ColTableRow;
      expect(row1.selectable).to.be.true;
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/components/organism/table/col-table.ts
================================================
import { CSSResult, html, nothing, PropertyValues } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { Meta, ThemedComponent } from '@/config';
import { ColTableBody } from '@/components/atoms/table-body';
import { ColTableHead } from '@/components/atoms/table-head';
import { ColTableRow } from '@/components/atoms/table-row';
import { ColTableCell } from '@/components/atoms/table-cell';
import { ColTableStyles } from './col-table.styles';
import { ColCheckbox } from '@/components/atoms';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

/**
 * Table component that provides a structured layout for displaying tabular data.
 *
 * @element col-table
 *
 * @summary A table container component that manages the overall table structure with support for fixed headers and scrollable content.
 *
 * @slot - The main table content (col-table-head and col-table-body)
 * @slot table-header - Optional heading section above the table
 * @slot table-footer - Optional footer section below the table
 *
 * @csspart table-container - The outer container element
 * @csspart table-main - The main table wrapper element
 *
 * @cssprop [--col-table-min-height] - Minimun height for the table
 * @cssprop [--col-table-max-height] - Maximum height for the table (enables scrolling when exceeded)
 *
 * @attr {string} max-height - Maximum height css value for the table content area
 * @attr {string} min-height - Minimun height css value for the table content area
 * @attr {string} checkbox-cell-width - Defines the column width for the checkbox in each row
 * @attr {boolean} selectable - Whether the table rows are allowed to be selected
 * @attr {boolean} scroller - Wheter the table has vertical scroll (according to max-height value)
 *
 * @property {string} maxHeight - Maximum height css value for the table content area
 * @property {string} minHeight - Minimun height css value for the table content area
 * @property {string} checkboxCellWidth - Defines the column width for the checkbox in each row
 * @property {boolean} selectable - Whether the table rows are allowed to be selected
 * @property {boolean} scroller - Whether the table has vertical scroll (according to max-height value)
 *
 * @default 'auto' - Default minHeight value
 * @default false - Default selectable value
 * @default false - Default scroller value
 *
 * @fires all-rows-selected - Fired when TableHead's checkbox is checked
 */
@Meta({
  name: 'table',
  components: [ColTableBody, ColTableHead, ColTableRow, ColTableCell, ColCheckbox],
})
export class ColTable extends ThemedComponent {
  static styles = [ColTableStyles];

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'max-height' })
  maxHeight?: string;

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'min-height' })
  minHeight: string = 'auto';

  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'checkbox-cell-width' })
  checkboxCellWidth?: string;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  selectable: boolean = false;

  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  scroller: boolean = false;

  private _colCount: number = 0;
  private _defaultCheckboxCellWidth: CSSResult = getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xl');

  connectedCallback(): void {
    super.connectedCallback();
    this._colCount = this._getColCount();
  }

  disconnectedCallback(): void {
    super.disconnectedCallback();
    this.removeEventListener('all-rows-selected', this._handleSelectAll);
  }

  protected willUpdate(_changedProperties: PropertyValues): void {
    if (_changedProperties.has('selectable') && this.selectable) {
      // When the table is selectable all its rows must be selectable too.
      const rows = this.querySelectorAll('col-table-row');
      rows.forEach(row => {
        row.setAttribute('selectable', '');
      });
    }
    if (_changedProperties.has('minHeight') && this.minHeight) {
      this.style.setProperty('--col-table-min-height', this.minHeight);
    }
    if (_changedProperties.has('maxHeight') && this.maxHeight) {
      this.style.setProperty('--col-table-max-height', this.maxHeight);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Counts the columns according to all the cells in the TableHead
   * @returns columns in the table
   */
  private _getColCount(): number {
    const tableHead = this.querySelector('col-table-head');
    if (tableHead) {
      return tableHead.querySelectorAll('col-table-cell').length;
    }
    return 0;
  }

  private get tableRows(): ColTableRow[] {
    return [...this.querySelectorAll('col-table-row')] as ColTableRow[];
  }

  /**
   *
   * When the @property selectable is true, it creates a checkbox cell at the beginning
   * of the TableHead component
   *
   */
  private _addHeadCheckbox() {
    const tableHead = this.querySelector('col-table-head') as ColTableHead;
    if (tableHead) {
      const checkboxCell = document.createElement('col-table-cell');
      checkboxCell.setAttribute('header', '');
      // Shorts the width of the cell to fit the checkbox
      checkboxCell.style.setProperty(
        '--cell-flex',
        `0 0 ${this.checkboxCellWidth ?? this._defaultCheckboxCellWidth}`
      );

      const checkbox = document.createElement('col-checkbox');
      // When checked all the rows must the selected and its checkboxes must also be checked
      checkbox.addEventListener('change', e => this._handleSelectAll(e));

      checkboxCell.appendChild(checkbox);
      // Now the checkbox is the firstchild of the TableHead
      tableHead.insertBefore(checkboxCell, tableHead.firstChild);
    }
  }

  /**
   *
   * When the @property selectable is true, it creates a checkbox cell at the beginning
   * of all the Rows components. First it checks if the row is selectable
   *
   */
  private _addRowsCheckboxes() {
    const rows = this.querySelectorAll('col-table-row[selectable]');
    rows.forEach(row => {
      // Allows only a checkbox per Row
      if (!row.querySelector('checkbox-column')) {
        const checkboxCell = document.createElement('col-table-cell');
        // Shorts the width of the cell to fit the checkbox
        checkboxCell.style.setProperty(
          '--cell-flex',
          `0 0 ${this.checkboxCellWidth ?? this._defaultCheckboxCellWidth}`
        );

        const checkbox = document.createElement('col-checkbox');

        checkboxCell.appendChild(checkbox);
        // Now the checkbox is the firstchild of the TableRow
        row.insertBefore(checkboxCell, row.firstChild);
      }
    });
  }

  /**
   * Handler for any changes in default slot (TableHead and TableBody) and it checks if the
   * @property selectable is true and appends a checkbox cell to all rows and head
   * @param e
   */
  private _handleSlotChange(e: Event) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (this.selectable) {
      this._addHeadCheckbox();
      this._addRowsCheckboxes();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Handler when the TableHead's checkbox is checked.
   * @param e
   */
  private _handleSelectAll(e: Event) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const checkbox = e.target as ColCheckbox;
    this.tableRows.forEach(row => {
      const rowCheckbox = row.querySelector('col-checkbox') as ColCheckbox;
      if (checkbox.checked) {
        row.setAttribute('selected', '');
        rowCheckbox.setAttribute('checked', '');
      } else {
        row.removeAttribute('selected');
        rowCheckbox.removeAttribute('checked');
      }
    });

    const detail = {
      rows: this.tableRows,
      element: this,
      selectable: this.selectable,
    };
    this._dispatchEvent('all-rows-selected', detail);
  }

  private _dispatchEvent(action: string, detail: Record<string, any>) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent(action, {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  render() {
    return html`
      <div
        class="table-container"
        role="table"
        aria-label="Table"
        part="table-container"
        aria-rowcount=${this.tableRows.length}
        aria-colcount=${this._colCount}
      >
        ${this.hasSlotted('table-header') ? html` <slot name="table-header"></slot> ` : nothing}
        <div part="table-main" class="table-main">
          <slot @slotchange=${this._handleSlotChange}></slot>
        </div>
        ${this.hasSlotted('table-footer') ? html` <slot name="table-footer"></slot> ` : nothing}
      </div>
    `;
  }
}

declare global {
  interface HTMLElementTagNameMap {
    'col-table': ColTable;
  }
}

export * from './col-table';



================================================
FILE: src/config/constants.ts
================================================
import { tokens } from '@/styles/tokens';

export const TAG_PREFIX = 'col';

export const GRID_VALIDATION_ARRAYS = {
  columns: Object.keys(tokens.grid.columns),
  rows: Object.keys(tokens.grid.rows),
  autofit: Object.keys(tokens.grid.autofit),
  areas: Object.keys(tokens.grid.areas),
  area: Object.keys(tokens.grid.area),
} as const;

export const LAYOUT_VALIDATION_ARRAYS = {
  gaps: Object.keys(tokens.layout.size),
} as const;

export const GRID_SPAN_ARRAYS = {
  colSpan: [...Object.keys(tokens.grid.columns).filter(k => k !== 'none'), 'full'],
  rowSpan: [...Object.keys(tokens.grid.rows).filter(k => k !== 'none'), 'full'],
} as const;



================================================
FILE: src/config/events.d.ts
================================================
declare class Event {
  constructor(type: string, eventInitDict?: EventInit);
  readonly bubbles: boolean;
  readonly cancelable: boolean;
  readonly composed: boolean;
  readonly currentTarget: EventTarget | null;
  readonly defaultPrevented: boolean;
  readonly eventPhase: number;
  readonly isTrusted: boolean;
  readonly target: EventTarget | null;
  readonly timeStamp: number;
  readonly type: string;
  preventDefault(): void;
  stopImmediatePropagation(): void;
  stopPropagation(): void;
}

interface EventInit {
  bubbles?: boolean;
  cancelable?: boolean;
  composed?: boolean;
}

declare class InputEvent extends Event {
  constructor(type: string, eventInitDict?: InputEventInit);
  readonly data: string | null;
  readonly inputType: string;
  readonly isComposing: boolean;
}

interface InputEventInit extends EventInit {
  data?: string | null;
  inputType?: string;
  isComposing?: boolean;
}

declare class CustomEvent<T = any> extends Event {
  constructor(type: string, eventInitDict?: CustomEventInit<T>);
  readonly detail: T;
}

interface CustomEventInit<T = any> extends EventInit {
  detail?: T;
}

FILE: src/config/components/alert-component/alert-component.ts
================================================
import { ThemedComponent } from '@/config/components/themed-component/themed-component';
import { Validate } from '@/config/decorators';
import { ALERT_VARIANTS, getEnumValues } from '@/types';
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues, TemplateResult } from 'lit';
import { property, state } from 'lit/decorators.js';

/**
 * Base component for alert/notification elements with common functionality
 */
export class AlertComponent extends ThemedComponent {
  /**
   * The variant attribute for different kind of alerts
   */
  @property()
  @Validate(getEnumValues(ALERT_VARIANTS), ALERT_VARIANTS.INFO)
  variant!: string;

  /**
   * Determines the duration in seconds in which the component will be visible.
   */
  @property({ type: Number })
  duration!: number;

  /**
   * Whether the component is in shown state.
   */
  @state()
  open: boolean = true;

  // Defines uniqueId for the component, it can be overrided
  protected _uniqueId = `alert-base-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;
  // Defines a Timeout object for all the component
  protected _closeTimeout?: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>;

  /**
   * Lifecycle method called when component properties are updated
   *
   * @param props - Map of all defined properties
   *
   * Subclasses can override this method to handle property changes
   * and should call super.updated(changedProps) if they do.
   */
  protected updated(props: PropertyValues) {
    if (props.has('duration')) {
      this._setCloseTimeout();
    } else {
      clearTimeout(this._closeTimeout);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Generates common input attributes that are shared across alert components
   *
   * @returns Object containing common div attributes for alerts
   *
   * Returns individual attribute values for explicit binding in templates:
   * - id: Unique alert identifier
   * - role: ARIA role for alert base components
   * - ariaHidden: ARIA hidden references
   * - ariaLive: ARIA live state define as 'polite'
   * - tabIndex: tabindex attribute whether the alert is open or close
   */
  protected _getCommonAttributes() {
    return {
      id: this._uniqueId,
      role: 'alert',
      ariaHidden: !this.open,
      ariaLive: 'polite',
      tabIndex: this.open ? '0' : '-1',
    };
  }

  /**
   * Dispatches an alert-closed event when the component receives a close action
   * @param detail - Optional custom data to include with the change event
   *
   * The detail parameter allows subclasses to pass component-specific
   * information about what changed (e.g., selected options, validation state).
   *
   * Used to notify parent components that the element has been closed.
   */
  protected _dispatchClose(detail?: any) {
    this.open = false;
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('alert-closed', {
        detail: detail ?? {
          open: this.open,
          variant: this.variant,
          duration: this.duration,
          element: this,
        },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  /**
   * Timeout implementation
   *
   * Sets a timeout to the @object _closeTimeout according to the @prop duration
   */
  private _setCloseTimeout() {
    clearTimeout(this._closeTimeout);
    if (this.open && this.duration > 0) {
      const durationInSecs = this.duration * 1000;

      this._closeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
        this._dispatchClose();
      }, durationInSecs);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Base close click event handler
   *
   * @param _e - The click event (unused parameter)
   *
   * Override in subclasses that implement closing functionality
   */
  protected _handleClose(_e: Event): void {}

  /**
   * Base close keyboard event handler
   *
   * @param _e - The keyboard event (unused parameter)
   *
   * Override in subclasses that implement closing functionality
   */
  protected _handleKeyboardClose(_e: KeyboardEvent): void {}

  /**
   * Renders the right close button element
   *
   * @returns {TemplateResult | typeof nothing} The rendered right adornment element,
   * or nothing if not applicable.
   *
   * Displays the close button
   *
   * The @class alert-close-button has no styles so its suppoused to be implemented
   * within the alert base component
   *
   * The close button is rendered with appropriate accessibility attributes
   * (aria-label and type) and event handling for closeing the alert.
   */
  protected renderCloseButton(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return html`<button
      class="alert-close-button"
      type="button"
      aria-label="Alert close button"
      @click=${this._handleClose}
      @keydown=${this._handleKeyboardClose}
    >
      <col-icon size="16px" name="close" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
    </button>`;
  }
}
