FILE: src/config/components/form-component/form-component.test.ts
================================================
import { html, fixture, expect, elementUpdated, oneEvent } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { FormComponent } from './form-component';

// Create a test class that extends FormComponent for testing
class TestFormComponent extends FormComponent {
  render() {
    return html` <div>Test Component</div>`;
  }
}

describe('FormComponent', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('test-form-component')) {
      customElements.define('test-form-component', TestFormComponent);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('test-form-component').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  describe('Name property', () => {
    it('should have a name property that reflects to attribute', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component name="test-name"></test-form-component>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('test-name');
      expect(element.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('test-name');
    });

    it('should update name property dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('');

      element.name = 'dynamic-name';
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('dynamic-name');
      expect(element.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('dynamic-name');
    });

    it('should update name attribute dynamically', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('');

      element.setAttribute('name', 'attribute-name');
      await elementUpdated(element);

      expect(element.name).to.equal('attribute-name');
      expect(element.getAttribute('name')).to.equal('attribute-name');
    });
  });

  describe('Event dispatching', () => {
    it('should dispatch a focus event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      setTimeout(() => (element as any)._dispatchFocus());
      const event = await oneEvent(element, 'focus');

      expect(event).to.exist;
      expect(event.type).to.equal('focus');
      expect(event.bubbles).to.be.true;
      expect(event.composed).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should dispatch an input event with correct data', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      setTimeout(() => (element as any)._dispatchInput('test input data'));
      const event = (await oneEvent(element, 'input')) as InputEvent;

      expect(event).to.exist;
      expect(event.type).to.equal('input');
      expect(event.data).to.equal('test input data');
      expect(event.inputType).to.equal('insertText');
      expect(event.isComposing).to.be.false;
      expect(event.bubbles).to.be.true;
      expect(event.composed).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should dispatch a change event with custom detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      const testDetail = { value: 'test value', checked: true };
      setTimeout(() => (element as any)._dispatchChange(testDetail));
      const event = (await oneEvent(element, 'change')) as CustomEvent;

      expect(event).to.exist;
      expect(event.type).to.equal('change');
      expect(event.detail).to.deep.equal(testDetail);
      expect(event.bubbles).to.be.true;
      expect(event.composed).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should dispatch input event with empty string data', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      setTimeout(() => (element as any)._dispatchInput(''));
      const event = (await oneEvent(element, 'input')) as InputEvent;

      expect(event.data).to.equal('');
      expect(event.inputType).to.equal('insertText');
    });

    it('should dispatch change event with null detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      setTimeout(() => (element as any)._dispatchChange(null));
      const event = (await oneEvent(element, 'change')) as CustomEvent;

      expect(event.detail).to.be.null;
    });

    it('should dispatch change event with complex object detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      const complexDetail = {
        value: 'complex value',
        checked: false,
        metadata: {
          timestamp: Date.now(),
          source: 'test',
        },
        options: ['option1', 'option2'],
      };

      setTimeout(() => (element as any)._dispatchChange(complexDetail));
      const event = (await oneEvent(element, 'change')) as CustomEvent;

      expect(event.detail).to.deep.equal(complexDetail);
    });
  });

  describe('Event properties', () => {
    it('should have correct event properties for focus event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      let capturedEvent: Event | null = null;
      element.addEventListener('focus', e => {
        capturedEvent = e;
      });

      (element as any)._dispatchFocus();

      expect(capturedEvent).to.exist;
      if (capturedEvent) {
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).type).to.equal('focus');
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).bubbles).to.be.true;
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).composed).to.be.true;
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).cancelable).to.be.false; // Default for Event
      }
    });

    it('should have correct event properties for input event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      let capturedEvent: InputEvent | null = null;
      element.addEventListener('input', e => {
        capturedEvent = e as InputEvent;
      });

      (element as any)._dispatchInput('test data');

      expect(capturedEvent).to.exist;
      if (capturedEvent) {
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).type).to.equal('input');
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).bubbles).to.be.true;
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).composed).to.be.true;
        expect((capturedEvent as InputEvent).data).to.equal('test data');
        expect((capturedEvent as InputEvent).inputType).to.equal('insertText');
        expect((capturedEvent as InputEvent).isComposing).to.be.false;
      }
    });

    it('should have correct event properties for change event', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      const testDetail = { test: 'data' };
      let capturedEvent: CustomEvent | null = null;
      element.addEventListener('change', e => {
        capturedEvent = e as CustomEvent;
      });

      (element as any)._dispatchChange(testDetail);

      expect(capturedEvent).to.exist;
      if (capturedEvent) {
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).type).to.equal('change');
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).bubbles).to.be.true;
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).composed).to.be.true;
        expect((capturedEvent as CustomEvent).detail).to.deep.equal(testDetail);
        expect((capturedEvent as Event).cancelable).to.be.false; // Default for CustomEvent
      }
    });
  });

  describe('Multiple event listeners', () => {
    it('should trigger multiple focus event listeners', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      let listener1Called = false;
      let listener2Called = false;

      element.addEventListener('focus', () => {
        listener1Called = true;
      });
      element.addEventListener('focus', () => {
        listener2Called = true;
      });

      (element as any)._dispatchFocus();

      expect(listener1Called).to.be.true;
      expect(listener2Called).to.be.true;
    });

    it('should trigger multiple input event listeners with same data', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      let listener1Data: string | null = null;
      let listener2Data: string | null = null;

      element.addEventListener('input', (e: Event) => {
        listener1Data = (e as InputEvent).data;
      });
      element.addEventListener('input', (e: Event) => {
        listener2Data = (e as InputEvent).data;
      });

      (element as any)._dispatchInput('shared data');

      expect(listener1Data).to.equal('shared data');
      expect(listener2Data).to.equal('shared data');
    });

    it('should trigger multiple change event listeners with same detail', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      const testDetail = { value: 'shared value' };
      let listener1Detail: any = null;
      let listener2Detail: any = null;

      element.addEventListener('change', (e: Event) => {
        listener1Detail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });
      element.addEventListener('change', (e: Event) => {
        listener2Detail = (e as CustomEvent).detail;
      });

      (element as any)._dispatchChange(testDetail);

      expect(listener1Detail).to.deep.equal(testDetail);
      expect(listener2Detail).to.deep.equal(testDetail);
    });
  });

  describe('Component inheritance', () => {
    it('should render the test component content', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component></test-form-component>`
      );

      const content = element.shadowRoot?.querySelector('div');
      expect(content).to.exist;
      expect(content?.textContent).to.equal('Test Component');
    });

    it('should inherit FormComponent properties and methods', async () => {
      const element = await fixture<TestFormComponent>(
        html` <test-form-component name="inheritance-test"></test-form-component>`
      );

      expect(element.name).to.equal('inheritance-test');
      expect(typeof (element as any)._dispatchFocus).to.equal('function');
      expect(typeof (element as any)._dispatchInput).to.equal('function');
      expect(typeof (element as any)._dispatchChange).to.equal('function');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/config/components/form-component/form-component.ts
================================================
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { ThemedComponent } from '@/config/components/themed-component/themed-component';

/**
 * Base component for form elements with common form functionality
 */
export class FormComponent extends ThemedComponent {
  /**
   * The name attribute for form field identification
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  name: string = '';
  /**
   * The type of form control - determines how values are handled
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  type: 'text' | 'checkbox' | 'radio' | 'select' | 'textarea' | 'toggle' = 'text';
  /**
   * The current value of the form control
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  value: string = '';

  // Form association support
  static get formAssociated() {
    return true;
  }
  protected _internals: ElementInternals;

  constructor() {
    super();
    this._internals = this.attachInternals();
  }

  /**
   * Updates the form value based on the component type and current state
   *
   * Handles different form control types:
   * - checkbox and toggle: 'on' when checked, null when unchecked
   * - radio: current value when checked, null when unchecked
   * - text/textarea/select: always current value
   */
  protected _updateFormValue(): void {
    if (!this._internals) return;

    let formValue: string | null = null;

    switch (this.type) {
      case 'checkbox':
      case 'toggle': {
        // For checkboxes and toggles: 'on' when checked, null when unchecked
        const isChecked = (this as any).checked;
        formValue = isChecked ? this.value || 'on' : null;
        break;
      }
      case 'radio': {
        // For radio buttons: value when selected, null when not selected
        const isSelected = (this as any).checked;
        formValue = isSelected ? this.value : null;
        break;
      }

      case 'text':
      case 'textarea':
      case 'select':
      default:
        // For text inputs and others: always use current value
        // For select elements, preserve empty string
        formValue = this.type === 'select' ? this.value : this.value || null;
        break;
    }

    this._internals.setFormValue(formValue);
  }

  /**
   * Call this method whenever the component's state changes
   * to keep the form value in sync
   */
  protected _syncFormValue(): void {
    this._updateFormValue();
  }
  /**
   * Dispatches a focus event when the component receives focus
   *
   * Used by subclasses when they need to notify parent components
   * or form containers that the element has received focus.
   */
  protected _dispatchFocus() {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new Event('focus', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  /**
   * Dispatches an input event when the component's value changes
   *
   * @param data - The input data/text that was entered
   *
   * The event includes standard InputEvent properties:
   * - data: The actual input content
   * - inputType: Set to 'insertText' for text input
   * - isComposing: Set to false (not handling IME composition)
   */
  protected _dispatchInput(data: string) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new InputEvent('input', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
        data,
        inputType: 'insertText',
        isComposing: false,
      })
    );
  }

  /**
   * Dispatches a change event when the component's value is committed
   *
   * @param detail - Custom data to include with the change event
   *
   * The detail parameter allows subclasses to pass component-specific
   * information about what changed (e.g., selected options, validation state).
   */
  protected _dispatchChange(detail: any) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('change', {
        detail,
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }
}

import { css } from 'lit';
import { getThemeVar } from '@/styles/utils';

export const InputFormComponentStyles = css`
  :host {
    --input-width: auto;
    display: inline-block;
    width: var(--input-width);
  }

  :host([disabled]) {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  :host([disabled]) input,
  :host([disabled]) textarea {
    cursor: not-allowed;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.disabled')};
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};

    &::placeholder {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.disabled')};
    }
  }

  :host([readonly]) input,
  :host([readonly]) textarea {
    border: none;

    &::placeholder {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-darker')};
    }

    &:focus {
      border: none;
      box-shadow: none;
    }
  }

  input,
  textarea {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    width: 100%;
    height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xl')};
    padding-top: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
    padding-bottom: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
    padding-left: var(--input-padding-left, ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')});
    padding-right: var(--input-padding-right, ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')});
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-darker')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-s')};
    line-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.ml')};
    font-weight: 400;
    background-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.ui.default')};
    border-radius: ${getThemeVar('radius.size.xs')};
    cursor: pointer;

    &::placeholder {
      color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
    }

    &:focus {
      outline: none;
    }

    &.input-error {
      border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};

      &:hover {
        border-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
      }

      &:focus {
        outline-color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
      }
    }
  }

  }

  .input-variant-outline textarea {
    border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.default-light')};

    &:focus {
      border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
    }

    &.input-error {
      border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
    }
  }

  .input-variant-plain input,
  .input-variant-plain textarea {
    border: none;

    &:focus {
      border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.focus')};
      box-shadow: ${getThemeVar('depth.box-shadow.focus')};
    }

    &:read-only {
      border: none;
    }

    &.input-error {
      border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.4xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
    }
  }

  .adornment-container {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .prefix-container {
    left: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.xs')};
  }

  .suffix-container {
    right: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.1xs')};
  }

  .input-sublabel {
    display: inline-flex;
  }

  .input-hint {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .input-char-count,
  .input-selection-count {
    font-family: ${getThemeVar('typography.font-family.primary')};
    font-size: ${getThemeVar('typography.text.body.regular-xs')};
    line-height: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.m')};
    font-weight: 400;
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
  }

  .input-helper {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.text.default-light')};
  }

  .input-error-message {
    color: ${getThemeVar('colors.stroke.danger')};
  }

  .icon-close-container {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background-color: transparent;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .loading-indicator {
    z-index: 1;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .spinner {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
    border: ${getThemeVar('spacing.size.3xs')} solid ${getThemeVar('colors.icon.default-light')};
    border-radius: 50%;
    border-top-color: transparent;
    animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes spin {
    to {
      transform: rotate(360deg);
    }
  }
`;



================================================
FILE: src/config/components/input-form-component/input-form-component.test.ts
================================================
import { expect, fixture, html, elementUpdated } from '@open-wc/testing';
import { nothing } from 'lit';
import { property } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { InputFormComponent } from './input-form-component';

class TestInputComponent extends InputFormComponent {
  value = '';
  @property({ type: Boolean, attribute: 'readonly' })
  readOnly = false;

  public handleFocus = (e: FocusEvent) => {
    (this as any)._handleFocus?.(e);
  };
  public handleBlur = (e: FocusEvent) => {
    (this as any)._handleBlur?.(e);
  };

  public getCommonInputAttributes() {
    return this._getCommonInputAttributes();
  }

  public getCommonInputEventHandlers() {
    return this._getCommonInputEventHandlers();
  }

  public getInputId() {
    return this.inputId;
  }

  public handleChange() {
    this._handleChange();
  }

  renderInput() {
    return html`<input
      id="${this.inputId}"
      name="${this.name ?? ''}"
      .value=${this.value}
      aria-labelledby="${this._getAriaLabelledBy() || nothing}"
      aria-describedby="${this._getAriaDescribedBy() || nothing}"
      ?required=${this.required}
      ?disabled=${this.disabled}
      ?readonly=${this.readOnly}
      @input=${(e: any) => {
        this.value = e.target.value;
        this._syncFormValue();
      }}
      @focus=${this.handleFocus}
      @blur=${this.handleBlur}
    />`;
  }
  validate(_value: unknown) {
    return true;
  }
}

class TestClearableInputComponent extends InputFormComponent {
  value = '';

  protected get _supportsClearing(): boolean {
    return true;
  }

  protected get _hasValue(): boolean {
    return !!this.value;
  }

  protected _handleClear(): void {
    this.value = '';
  }

  renderInput() {
    return html`<input
      id="${this.inputId}"
      name="${this.name ?? ''}"
      .value=${this.value}
      @input=${(e: any) => {
        this.value = e.target.value;
      }}
    />`;
  }
  validate(_value: unknown) {
    return true;
  }
}

describe('InputFormComponent', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    if (!customElements.get('test-input-component')) {
      customElements.define('test-input-component', TestInputComponent);
    }
    if (!customElements.get('test-clearable-input-component')) {
      customElements.define('test-clearable-input-component', TestClearableInputComponent);
    }
  });

  afterEach(() => {
    document.querySelectorAll('test-input-component').forEach(el => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll('test-clearable-input-component').forEach(el => el.remove());
  });

  it('displays label text', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Username"></test-input-component>`);
    const label = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-label');
    expect(label?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Username');
  });

  it('sets the required property on the label element for required fields', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component label="Email" required></test-input-component>`
    );
    const label = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-label');
    expect(label).to.exist;
    const hasRequiredProp = (label as any)?.required === true;
    const hasRequiredAttr =
      label?.getAttribute('required') !== null || label?.hasAttribute('required');
    const hasRequiredClass = label?.classList.contains('required');
    const hasAsterisk = label?.textContent?.includes('*');
    expect(hasRequiredProp || hasRequiredAttr || hasRequiredClass || hasAsterisk).to.be.true;
  });

  it('displays helper text', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component
        label="Username"
        helper="Must be at least 3 characters"
      ></test-input-component>`
    );
    const helper = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-helper');
    expect(helper?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Must be at least 3 characters');
  });

  it('displays sublabel text', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component label="Username" sub-label="Optional"></test-input-component>`
    );
    const sublabel = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-sublabel');
    expect(sublabel?.textContent?.trim()).to.equal('Optional');
  });

  it('displays slotted icon content', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component label="Search"
        ><span slot="icon">icon</span></test-input-component
      >`
    );
    const icon = el.querySelector('[slot="icon"]');
    expect(icon).to.exist;
    expect(icon?.textContent).to.equal('icon');
  });

  it('associates label with input element', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Username"></test-input-component>`);
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
    const label = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-label');
    expect(input?.getAttribute('aria-labelledby')).to.equal(label?.id);
  });

  it('provides proper ARIA attributes for helper text', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component
        label="Email"
        helper="Enter a valid email address"
      ></test-input-component>`
    );
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
    const helper = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-helper');
    expect(input?.getAttribute('aria-describedby')).to.include(helper?.id);
  });

  it('announces character count changes', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component label="Bio" char-count=${10}></test-input-component>`
    );
    const charCount = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-char-count');
    expect(charCount?.getAttribute('aria-live')).to.equal('polite');
  });

  it('participates in form submission', async () => {
    const form = await fixture(
      html`<form>
        <test-input-component name="username" label="Username"></test-input-component>
      </form>`
    );
    const el = form.querySelector('test-input-component') as TestInputComponent;
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;
    input.value = 'testuser';
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
    await elementUpdated(el);
    await elementUpdated(form);
    const formData = new FormData(form as HTMLFormElement);
    expect(formData.get('username')).to.equal('testuser');
  });

  it('respects disabled state', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component label="Username" disabled></test-input-component>`
    );
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
    expect(input).to.exist;
    expect(input?.disabled).to.be.true;
  });

  it('respects readonly state', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(
      html`<test-input-component label="Username" readonly></test-input-component>`
    );
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
    expect(input?.readOnly).to.be.true;
  });

  it('validateField triggers validation and returns valid state', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`);
    expect((el as TestInputComponent).validateField()).to.be.true;
  });

  it('getValidationState returns correct structure and values', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`);
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
    input.value = 'abc';
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
    await elementUpdated(el);
    (el as TestInputComponent).validateField();
    await elementUpdated(el);
    const state = (el as TestInputComponent).getValidationState();
    expect(state).to.not.be.null;
    expect(state).to.include.keys(
      'valid',
      'validationMessage',
      'validity',
      'value',
      'touched',
      'dirty',
      'focused'
    );
    expect(state!.valid).to.be.true;
    expect(state!.value).to.equal('abc');
    expect(state!.validity.valid).to.be.true;
  });

  it('_handleFormSubmitValidation returns correct validity', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`);
    const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement;
    input.value = 'abc';
    input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
    await elementUpdated(el);
    const result = (el as TestInputComponent)._handleFormSubmitValidation();
    expect(result).to.be.true;
  });

  it('_handleLabelClick focuses the input', async () => {
    const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`);
    const label = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.input-label') as HTMLElement;
    expect(document.activeElement).to.not.equal(el);
    label.click();
    await elementUpdated(el);
    expect(document.activeElement).to.equal(el);
  });

  describe('Helper methods', () => {
    it('_getCommonInputAttributes returns correct attributes', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" required disabled></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      const attrs = el.getCommonInputAttributes();

      expect(attrs.id).to.equal(el.getInputId());
      expect(attrs.name).to.equal('');
      expect(attrs.ariaLabelledby).to.include('label');
      expect(attrs.ariaRequired).to.be.true;
      expect(attrs.required).to.be.true;
      expect(attrs.disabled).to.be.true;
      expect(attrs.errorClass).to.equal('');
    });

    it('_getCommonInputEventHandlers returns event handlers', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      const events = el.getCommonInputEventHandlers();

      expect(events.onFocus).to.be.a('function');
      expect(events.onBlur).to.be.a('function');
      expect(events.onChange).to.be.a('function');
    });
  });

  describe('Clear button functionality', () => {
    it('does not show clear button by default', async () => {
      const el = await fixture(html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`);
      const clearButton = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container');
      expect(clearButton).to.be.null;
    });

    it('shows clear button when component supports clearing and has value', async () => {
      const el = await fixture(
        html`<test-clearable-input-component label="Test"></test-clearable-input-component>`
      );
      const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      let clearButton = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container');
      expect(clearButton).to.be.null;

      input.value = 'test';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(el);

      clearButton = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container');
      expect(clearButton).to.exist;
      expect(clearButton?.getAttribute('aria-label')).to.equal('Clear input');
    });

    it('clears value when clear button is clicked', async () => {
      const el = await fixture(
        html`<test-clearable-input-component label="Test"></test-clearable-input-component>`
      );
      const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      input.value = 'test';
      input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true, composed: true }));
      await elementUpdated(el);

      const clearButton = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector(
        '.icon-close-container'
      ) as HTMLButtonElement;
      clearButton.click();
      await elementUpdated(el);

      expect((el as TestClearableInputComponent).value).to.equal('');
      expect(el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('.icon-close-container')).to.be.null;
    });
  });

  describe('Base event handlers', () => {
    it('_handleFocus sets focused and touched state', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      expect(el.focused).to.be.false;
      expect(el.touched).to.be.false;

      input.focus();
      await elementUpdated(el);

      expect(el.focused).to.be.true;
      expect(el.touched).to.be.true;
    });

    it('_handleBlur sets focused to false', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      const input = el.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input')!;

      input.focus();
      await elementUpdated(el);
      expect(el.focused).to.be.true;

      input.blur();
      await elementUpdated(el);
      expect(el.focused).to.be.false;
    });

    it('_handleChange dispatches change event', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      let changeFired = false;

      el.addEventListener('change', () => {
        changeFired = true;
      });

      el.handleChange();
      expect(changeFired).to.be.true;
    });
  });

  describe('Validation timing functionality', () => {
    it('has default validationTiming of "blur"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      expect(el.validationTiming).to.equal('blur');
    });

    it('can set validationTiming via attribute', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="input"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      expect(el.validationTiming).to.equal('input');
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns true for submit trigger regardless of timing', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="blur"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('submit')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns true for input trigger when validationTiming is "input"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="input"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('input')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns false for input trigger when validationTiming is "blur"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="blur"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('input')).to.be.false;
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns true for blur trigger when validationTiming is "blur"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="blur"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('blur')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns true for blur trigger when validationTiming is "change"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="change"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('blur')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns true for change trigger when validationTiming is "change"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="change"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('change')).to.be.true;
    });

    it('_shouldValidate returns false for change trigger when validationTiming is "blur"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" validation-timing="blur"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      expect((el as any)._shouldValidate('change')).to.be.false;
    });
  });

  describe('Input mode functionality', () => {
    it('has default inputMode of "text"', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      expect(el.inputMode).to.equal('text');
    });

    it('can set inputMode via attribute', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" input-mode="numeric"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;
      expect(el.inputMode).to.equal('numeric');
    });

    it('includes inputMode in common input attributes', async () => {
      const el = (await fixture(
        html`<test-input-component label="Test" input-mode="email"></test-input-component>`
      )) as TestInputComponent;

      const attributes = el.getCommonInputAttributes();
      expect(attributes.inputMode).to.equal('email');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/config/components/input-form-component/input-form-component.ts
================================================
import { html, nothing, PropertyValues, TemplateResult } from 'lit';
import { property, state, query } from 'lit/decorators.js';
import { classMap } from 'lit/directives/class-map.js';
import { FormComponentMixin } from '@/config/mixins';
import { FormComponent } from '@/config/components/form-component/form-component';
import { tokens } from '@/styles/tokens';

/**
 * Base component for form input elements with enhanced functionality
 *
 * Extends FormComponentMixin(FormComponent) to provide:
 * - Label and sub-label support
 * - Helper text and error messaging
 * - Character counting
 * - Accessibility features (ARIA attributes)
 * - Form validation integration
 * - Clear button functionality
 * - Focus and touch state management
 *
 * Subclasses must implement:
 * - renderInput(): The actual form control element template
 * - validate(value): Component-specific validation logic
 */
export abstract class InputFormComponent extends FormComponentMixin(FormComponent) {
  /**
   * The visual variant of the input field
   */
  @property({ type: String, reflect: true })
  variant: 'outline' | 'plain' = 'outline';

  /**
   * The main label text displayed above the input
   */
  @property({ type: String })
  label? = '';

  /**
   * Additional sub-label text displayed next to the input
   * Maps to the 'sub-label' attribute
   */
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'sub-label' })
  subLabel? = '';

  /**
   * Helper text displayed below the input to provide additional guidance
   */
  @property({ type: String })
  helper = '';

  /**
   * Whether the input is required for form submission
   */
  @property({ type: Boolean })
  required = false;

  /**
   * Whether the input is disabled and cannot be interacted with
   * Reflects to the DOM attribute
   */
  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  disabled = false;

  /**
   * Whether the input is in an error state
   */
  @property({ type: Boolean })
  error = false;

  /**
   * Error message displayed when the input is in an error state
   * Maps to the 'error-message' attribute
   */
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'error-message' })
  errorMessage?: string;

  /**
   * Maximum character count for the input
   * When set, displays current/maximum character count
   * Maps to the 'char-count' attribute
   */
  @property({ type: Number, attribute: 'char-count' })
  charCount?: number;

  /**
   * When to trigger validation for the input field
   * Maps to the 'validation-timing' attribute
   *
   * - 'blur': Validate when input loses focus (default)
   * - 'change': Validate when input value changes
   * - 'input': Validate on every input event
   * - 'submit': Validate only on form submission
   */
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'validation-timing' })
  validationTiming: 'blur' | 'change' | 'input' | 'submit' = 'blur';

  /**
   * HTML inputmode attribute to specify the type of keyboard
   * Maps to the 'input-mode' attribute
   *
   * Helps mobile devices show the appropriate keyboard type
   */
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'input-mode' })
  inputMode: 'none' | 'text' | 'numeric' | 'decimal' | 'email' | 'tel' | 'url' | 'search' = 'text';

  /**
   * Displays a loading spinner in the suffix area of the input field.
   */
  @property({ type: Boolean, reflect: true })
  loading = false;

  /**
   * Custom width for the input field
   */
  @property({ type: String, attribute: 'custom-width' })
  customWidth = '';

  /**
   * The prefix container element
   */
  @query('.prefix-container')
  private prefixContainer?: HTMLDivElement;

  /**
   * The suffix container element
   */
  @query('.suffix-container')
  private suffixContainer?: HTMLDivElement;

  /**
   * Whether the input has been touched (focused and blurred)
   */
  @state()
  public touched = false;

  /**
   * Whether the input value has been modified from its initial state
   */
  @state()
  public dirty = false;

  /**
   * Whether the input value passes validation
   */
  @state()
  public valid = true;

  /**
   * Whether the input currently has focus
   */
  @state()
  public focused = false;

  /**
   * Current character count for the input value
   */
  @state()
  protected countValue = 0;

  /**
   * The left padding for the input
   */
  @state()
  protected leftPadding = parseInt(tokens.spacing.size.xs);

  /**
   * The right padding for the input
   */
  @state()
  protected rightPadding = parseInt(tokens.spacing.size.xs);

  /**
   * The initial value of the input when first rendered
   * Used to track dirty state
   */
  @state()
  protected initialValue = '';

  /**
   * Unique identifier for the input element
   * Generated automatically if no id is provided
   */
  protected _uniqueId = `input-base-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 11)}`;

  /**
   * Observers used to detect when the component becomes visible and when its
   * size (or its adornments' size) changes so we can recompute paddings.
   */
  private _resizeObserver?: ResizeObserver;
  private _intersectionObserver?: IntersectionObserver;

  /**
   * Lifecycle method called when component is first updated
   *
   * @param changedProps - Map of changed properties
   *
   * Captures the initial value on first render for dirty state tracking.
   */
  firstUpdated(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    super.firstUpdated?.(changedProps);
    this.initialValue = this.value;
    // Ensure paddings are correct after first render (even if initially hidden)
    this._setupLayoutObservers();
    this._observeAdornmentContainers();
    // Try a first computation right away
    this._updateInputPadding();
  }

  /**
   * Lifecycle method called when component properties are updated
   *
   * @param changedProps - Map of changed properties
   *
   * Subclasses can override this method to handle property changes
   * and should call super.updated(changedProps) if they do.
   */
  updated(changedProps: PropertyValues) {
    if (changedProps.has('subLabel') || changedProps.has('value')) {
      this._updateInputPadding();
    }

    if (this.customWidth) {
      this.style.setProperty('--input-width', this.customWidth);
    }
    // In case adornment containers are rendered conditionally, (re)observe them
    this._observeAdornmentContainers();
  }

  /**
   * Start observers that will recalculate paddings when the element becomes
   * visible or when sizes change (e.g., when placed inside a modal/drawer).
   */
  private _setupLayoutObservers() {
    // Observe visibility changes (e.g., when parent goes from display:none to visible)
    if (!this._intersectionObserver && 'IntersectionObserver' in window) {
      this._intersectionObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        for (const entry of entries) {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            // On next frame after being shown, recompute paddings
            requestAnimationFrame(() => this._updateInputPadding());
          }
        }
      });
      this._intersectionObserver.observe(this);
    }

    // Observe size changes on host and adornment containers
    if (!this._resizeObserver && 'ResizeObserver' in window) {
      this._resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => this._updateInputPadding());
      this._resizeObserver.observe(this);
      // Adornment containers may appear conditionally; we'll hook them via helper
      this._observeAdornmentContainers();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Observe prefix/suffix containers when available so padding updates react to
   * their size changes.
   */
  private _observeAdornmentContainers() {
    if (!this._resizeObserver) return;
    if (this.prefixContainer) this._resizeObserver.observe(this.prefixContainer);
    if (this.suffixContainer) this._resizeObserver.observe(this.suffixContainer);
  }

  connectedCallback(): void {
    super.connectedCallback();
    // In case the element is re-attached, ensure observers are running
    this._setupLayoutObservers();
  }

  disconnectedCallback(): void {
    // Clean up observers to avoid leaks
    this._intersectionObserver?.disconnect();
    this._intersectionObserver = undefined;
    this._resizeObserver?.disconnect();
    this._resizeObserver = undefined;
    super.disconnectedCallback();
  }

  /**
   * Abstract method that subclasses must implement
   *
   * @param value - The value to validate
   * @returns boolean - Whether the value is valid
   *
   * This method should contain component-specific validation logic
   * and update the valid state accordingly.
   */
  public abstract validate(value: unknown): boolean;

  /**
   * Determines whether validation should be triggered based on the current validation timing setting
   *
   * @param trigger - The event that triggered the validation check
   * @returns boolean - Whether validation should be performed
   *
   * This method checks the validationTiming property to determine if validation
   * should be triggered for the given event type.
   */
  protected _shouldValidate(trigger: 'input' | 'change' | 'blur' | 'submit'): boolean {
    switch (trigger) {
      case 'submit':
        return true;

      case 'input':
        return this.error || this.validationTiming === 'input';

      case 'blur':
        return this.validationTiming === 'blur' || this.validationTiming === 'change';

      case 'change':
        return this.validationTiming === 'change';

      default:
        return false;
    }
  }

  /**
   * Generates common input attributes that are shared across input components
   *
   * @returns Object containing common input attributes
   *
   * Returns individual attribute values for explicit binding in templates:
   * - id: Unique input identifier
   * - name: Form field name
   * - ariaLabelledby: ARIA label references
   * - ariaDescribedby: ARIA description references
   * - ariaInvalid: ARIA invalid state
   * - ariaRequired: ARIA required state
   * - required: HTML required attribute
   * - disabled: HTML disabled attribute
   * - errorClass: CSS class for error styling
   */
  protected _getCommonInputAttributes() {
    return {
      id: this.inputId,
      name: this.name ?? '',
      label: this.label ?? '',
      ariaLabelledby: this._getAriaLabelledBy() || nothing,
      ariaDescribedby: this._getAriaDescribedBy() || nothing,
      ariaInvalid: this.error ? 'true' : 'false',
      ariaRequired: this.required,
      required: this.required,
      disabled: this.disabled,
      errorClass: this.error ? 'input-error' : '',
      inputMode: this.inputMode,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Generates common input event handlers
   *
   * @returns Object containing common event handlers
   *
   * Returns individual event handlers for explicit binding in templates:
   * - onFocus: Focus event handler
   * - onBlur: Blur event handler
   * - onChange: Change event handler
   */
  protected _getCommonInputEventHandlers() {
    return {
      onFocus: this._handleFocus,
      onBlur: this._handleBlur,
      onChange: this._handleChange,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Whether the component supports clearing functionality
   *
   * @returns boolean - True if the component supports clearing
   *
   * Override in subclasses that support clearing to return true
   */
  protected get _supportsClearing(): boolean {
    return false;
  }

  /**
   * Indicates whether the component supports rendering a prefix element.
   *
   * Subclasses can override this getter to disable prefix support if not applicable.
   * Used by input components to determine if a prefix element should be rendered.
   *
   * @returns boolean - True if prefix is supported, false otherwise.
   */
  protected get _supportsPrefix(): boolean {
    return true;
  }

  /**
   * Indicates whether the component supports rendering a suffix element.
   *
   * Subclasses can override this getter to disable suffix support if not applicable.
   * Used by input components to determine if a suffix element should be rendered.
   *
   * @returns boolean - True if suffix is supported, false otherwise.
   */
  protected get _supportsSuffix(): boolean {
    return true;
  }

  /**
   * Whether the component currently has a value
   *
   * @returns boolean - True if the component has a value
   *
   * Override in subclasses if the value property has a different name
   */
  protected get _hasValue(): boolean {
    return !!this.value;
  }

  /**
   * Handles the clear button click event
   *
   * Override in subclasses that implement clearing functionality
   */
  protected _handleClear(): void {
    // Override in subclasses that implement clearing
  }

  /**
   * Base focus event handler
   *
   * @param _e - The focus event (unused parameter)
   *
   * Sets focused and touched states to true and dispatches a focus event.
   * Can be overridden by subclasses for custom focus behavior.
   */
  protected _handleFocus = (_e: FocusEvent): void => {
    this.focused = true;
    this.touched = true;
    this._dispatchFocus();
  };

  /**
   * Base blur event handler
   *
   * @param _e - The blur event (unused parameter)
   *
   * Sets focused state to false, syncs form value, and dispatches a blur event.
   * Can be overridden by subclasses for custom blur behavior.
   */
  protected _handleBlur = (_e: FocusEvent) => {
    this.focused = false;
    this._syncFormValue();
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new Event('blur', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  };

  /**
   * Base change event handler
   *
   * Dispatches a change event with the current value.
   * Can be overridden by subclasses for custom change behavior.
   */
  protected _handleChange = () => {
    this._dispatchChange(this.value);
  };

  /**
   * Dispatches a focus event when the component receives focus
   *
   * Used to notify parent components or form containers that the element
   * has received focus.
   */
  protected _dispatchFocus() {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new Event('focus', {
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  /**
   * Dispatches a change event when the component's value changes
   *
   * @param value - The new value that triggered the change
   *
   * The event includes the new value in the detail property for
   * parent components to access.
   */
  protected _dispatchChange(value: any) {
    this.dispatchEvent(
      new CustomEvent('change', {
        detail: { value },
        bubbles: true,
        composed: true,
      })
    );
  }

  /**
   * Handles form reset events
   *
   * Resets all form-related state to initial values:
   * - touched: false
   * - dirty: false
   * - valid: true
   * - value: empty string
   * - countValue: 0
   * - error: false
   * - errorMessage: undefined
   * - initialValue: undefined
   */
  public _handleFormReset(): void {
    this.touched = false;
    this.dirty = false;
    this.valid = true;
    this.error = false;
    this.value = this.initialValue || '';
    this.countValue = this.value.length;
    this._syncFormValue();

    if (this._internals) {
      this._internals.setValidity({}, '');
    }
  }

  /**
   * Handles form submission validation
   *
   * @returns boolean - Whether the input passes validation
   *
   * Sets touched to true and validates the current value.
   * Returns the validation result for form submission handling.
   */
  public _handleFormSubmitValidation(): boolean {
    this.touched = true;
    this.valid = this.validate(this.value);
    return this.valid;
  }

  /**
   * Triggers validation and returns the current valid state
   *
   * @returns boolean - Whether the input is currently valid
   *
   * Validates the current value and returns the validation state.
   */
  public validateField(): boolean {
    this.valid = this.validate(this.value);
    return this.valid;
  }

  /**
   * Returns the current validation state, or null if input is missing
   *
   * @returns Validation state object or null
   *
   * Returns comprehensive validation information including:
   * - valid: Current validation state
   * - validationMessage: Browser validation message
   * - validity: Browser validity state
   * - value: Current input value
   * - touched: Whether input has been touched
   * - dirty: Whether input has been modified
   * - focused: Whether input has focus
   */
  public getValidationState(): {
    valid: boolean;
    validationMessage: string;
    validity: ValidityState;
    value: string;
    touched: boolean;
    dirty: boolean;
    focused: boolean;
  } | null {
    const input = (this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input') as HTMLInputElement) || null;
    if (!input) return null;
    return {
      valid: this.valid,
      validationMessage: input.validationMessage,
      validity: input.validity,
      value: this.value,
      touched: this.touched,
      dirty: this.dirty,
      focused: this.focused,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Gets the unique identifier for the input element
   *
   * @returns string - The input identifier
   *
   * Uses the provided id or generates a unique one if none is provided.
   */
  protected get inputId(): string {
    return this.id || this._uniqueId;
  }

  /**
   * Handles label click events
   *
   * @param e - The click event
   *
   * Prevents default behavior and focuses the input element
   * when the label is clicked.
   */
  protected _handleLabelClick = (e: Event) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const input = this.shadowRoot?.querySelector('input');
    input?.focus();
  };

  /**
   * Generates ARIA describedby attribute value
   *
   * @returns string - Space-separated list of element IDs
   *
   * Includes IDs for error message, helper text, and character count
   * elements that describe the input.
   */
  protected _getAriaDescribedBy(): string {
    const describedBy: string[] = [];
    if (this.error && this.errorMessage) {
      describedBy.push(`${this.inputId}-error`);
    } else if (this.helper) {
      describedBy.push(`${this.inputId}-helper`);
    }
    if (this.charCount) {
      describedBy.push(`${this.inputId}-charcount`);
    }
    return describedBy.join(' ');
  }

  /**
   * Generates ARIA labelledby attribute value
   *
   * @returns string - Space-separated list of element IDs
   *
   * Includes IDs for label and sub-label elements that label the input.
   */
  protected _getAriaLabelledBy(): string {
    const labelledBy: string[] = [];
    if (this.label) {
      labelledBy.push(`${this.inputId}-label`);
    }
    if (this.subLabel) {
      labelledBy.push(`${this.inputId}-sublabel`);
    }
    return labelledBy.join(' ');
  }

  /**
   * Updates the input padding based on the width of the left and right slot elements
   */
  protected _updateInputPadding() {
    const updatePadding = () => {
      const leftWidth = this.prefixContainer?.getBoundingClientRect().width ?? 0;
      const rightWidth = this.suffixContainer?.getBoundingClientRect().width ?? 0;

      const leftPadding =
        leftWidth > 0
          ? leftWidth + 2 * parseInt(tokens.spacing.size.xs)
          : parseInt(tokens.spacing.size.xs);
      const rightPadding =
        rightWidth > 0
          ? rightWidth + parseInt(tokens.spacing.size.xs)
          : parseInt(tokens.spacing.size.xs);

      // Expose via inline CSS variables for styling
      this.style.setProperty('--input-padding-left', `${leftPadding}px`);
      this.style.setProperty('--input-padding-right', `${rightPadding}px`);

      // Keep internal state in sync for any subclasses/styles using these values
      this.leftPadding = leftPadding;
      this.rightPadding = rightPadding;
    };

    if (this.hasUpdated) {
      requestAnimationFrame(updatePadding);
    } else {
      setTimeout(updatePadding, 0);
    }
  }

  /**
   * Renders the input label
   *
   * @returns {TemplateResult | typeof nothing} The rendered label, or nothing if not applicable.
   *
   * Renders a col-typography component as a label with proper
   * accessibility attributes and click handling.
   */
  protected renderLabel(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return this.label
      ? html`
          <col-typography
            class="input-label"
            variant="label"
            element="label"
            .required=${this.required}
            @click=${this._handleLabelClick}
            id="${this.inputId}-label"
          >
            ${this.label}
          </col-typography>
        `
      : nothing;
  }

  /**
   * Renders input decorators (icons and sub-labels)
   *
   * @returns {TemplateResult | typeof nothing} The rendered left adornment element,
   * or nothing if not applicable.
   *
   * Renders a container with icon slot and sub-label if present.
   * Includes slot change handling to update input padding.
   */
  protected renderPrefix(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    if (!this._supportsPrefix) return nothing;

    return this.hasSlotted('icon') || this.subLabel
      ? html`<div
          id="${this.inputId}-prefix-container"
          class="adornment-container prefix-container"
        >
          <slot
            ?hidden=${!this.hasSlotted('icon')}
            @slotchange=${this._updateInputPadding}
            name="icon"
          ></slot>
          ${this.subLabel
            ? html`
                <col-typography
                  class="input-sublabel"
                  variant="label"
                  element="label"
                  id="${this.inputId}-sublabel"
                >
                  ${this.subLabel}
                </col-typography>
              `
            : nothing}
        </div>`
      : nothing;
  }

  /**
   * Renders input hints (error messages, helper text, character count)
   *
   * @returns {TemplateResult | typeof nothing} The rendered hints,
   * or nothing if not applicable.
   *
   * Renders error messages, helper text, and character count
   * with appropriate ARIA attributes for accessibility.
   */
  protected renderHint(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    return html`
      <div class="input-hint">
        ${this.error && this.errorMessage
          ? html`
              <col-typography
                class="input-error-message"
                id="${this.inputId}-error"
                role="alert"
                aria-live="assertive"
                variant="helper"
                element="span"
              >
                ${this.errorMessage}
              </col-typography>
            `
          : this.helper
            ? html`
                <col-typography
                  class="input-helper"
                  id="${this.inputId}-helper"
                  aria-live="polite"
                  aria-atomic="true"
                  variant="helper"
                  element="span"
                >
                  ${this.helper}
                </col-typography>
              `
            : html`<span></span>`}
        <span
          ?hidden=${!this.charCount}
          aria-live="polite"
          class="input-char-count"
          id="${this.inputId}-charcount"
          >${this.countValue}/${this.charCount}</span
        >
      </div>
    `;
  }

  /**
   * Renders the right adornment element (e.g., clear button)
   *
   * @returns {TemplateResult | typeof nothing} The rendered right adornment element,
   * or nothing if not applicable.
   *
   * Displays the clear button only if the component supports clearing and currently has a value.
   * The clear button is rendered with appropriate accessibility attributes
   * (aria-label, aria-controls, aria-describedby) and event handling for clearing the input.
   */
  protected renderSuffix(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    if (!this._supportsSuffix) return nothing;

    return html`<div
      id="${this.inputId}-suffix-container"
      class="adornment-container suffix-container"
    >
      ${this._supportsClearing && this._hasValue && !this.loading
        ? html`
            <button
              type="button"
              aria-label="Clear input"
              class="icon-close-container"
              id="${this.inputId}-clear"
              aria-controls="${this.inputId}"
              aria-describedby="${this.inputId}"
              @click=${this._handleClear}
            >
              <col-icon size="12px" name="close" aria-hidden="true"></col-icon>
            </button>
          `
        : nothing}
      ${this.loading
        ? html`
            <div class="loading-indicator">
              <div class="spinner"></div>
            </div>
          `
        : nothing}
    </div>`;
  }

  /**
   * Renders the complete input component
   *
   * @returns {TemplateResult | typeof nothing} The complete input component template
   *
   * Renders the input group with label, decorators, input element,
   * trigger, and hints. Applies appropriate CSS classes based on
   * component state.
   */
  protected render(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    const classes = {
      input: true,
      'input-icon-left': this.hasSlotted('icon'),
      'input-sublabel': !!this.subLabel,
      [`input-variant-${this.variant}`]: true,
    };

    return html`<div class="input-group">
      ${this.renderLabel()}
      <div class=${classMap(classes)}>
        ${this.renderPrefix()} ${this.renderInput()} ${this.renderSuffix()}
      </div>
      ${this.renderHint()}
    </div> `;
  }

  /**
   * Default implementation of renderInput for basic text inputs
   *
   * Subclasses can override this method to provide custom input rendering
   * or call super.renderInput() and extend the result
   */
  protected renderInput(): TemplateResult | typeof nothing {
    const attrs = this._getCommonInputAttributes();
    const events = this._getCommonInputEventHandlers();

    return html`
      <input
        class=${attrs.errorClass}
        type="text"
        name="${attrs.name}"
        id="${attrs.id}"
        aria-labelledby=${attrs.ariaLabelledby}
        aria-describedby=${attrs.ariaDescribedby}
        aria-invalid=${this.error ? 'true' : 'false'}
        aria-required=${this.required ? 'true' : 'false'}
        ?required=${attrs.required}
        .value="${this.value || ''}"
        ?disabled=${attrs.disabled}
        @focus=${events.onFocus}
        @blur=${events.onBlur}
        @change=${events.onChange}
        @input=${this._handleInput}
      />
    `;
  }

  /**
   * Default input handler for basic text inputs
   */
  protected _handleInput(e: globalThis.Event & { target: globalThis.HTMLInputElement }) {
    const oldValue = this.value;
    this.value = e.target.value;

    if (this._supportsClearing && ((!oldValue && this.value) || (oldValue && !this.value))) {
      this._updateInputPadding();
    }

    this._syncFormValue();
    this._dispatchChange(this.value);
  }
}
